Ablations and visualizations further validate the effectiveness of each module. Overall, MyoSem advances EMG-based hand action understanding from fixed-label recognition toward queryable bidirectional semantic retrieval, providing a new modeling paradigm for language-mediated EMG action understanding.

</details>


### [36] [APE: Agentic Prompt Enhancer for Image Generation and Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00204)
*Zijian Huang,Jay Zhangjie Wu,Zian Wang,Tianshi Cao,Jiasi Chen,Sanja Fidler,Huan Ling,Xuanchi Ren*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Agentic Prompt Enhancer (APE)，一种轻量级框架，通过后训练小型语言模型（SLMs）来增强文本提示，以提升文本引导图像生成与编辑的效果。APE包含单代理（SAPE）和多代理（MAPE）两种形式，后者通过路由-重写-组合流程处理复杂视觉约束，在多个基准测试中显著提升视觉对齐性和提示遵循能力，并缩小与闭源大模型提示增强器的性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本引导的视觉系统对提示词表述高度敏感，语义相似的请求因措辞、具体性或视觉约束显式程度不同而产生差异结果；现有强效提示增强器依赖大型闭源LLM（如ChatGPT、Gemini），带来成本、延迟与部署依赖问题。

Method: 提出APE框架，对小型语言模型进行任务感知奖励驱动的后训练，支持单代理（SAPE）一次性重写和多代理（MAPE）分工增强（路由器-重写器-组合器），不修改下游视觉模型。

Result: 在图像生成与编辑基准上，APE后训练的小模型显著优于基线，性能接近闭源提示增强器；MAPE在涉及对象、属性、空间关系与编辑的复杂组合任务中表现尤为突出。

Conclusion: APE证明了轻量级、可部署的小型语言模型经针对性后训练后，可高效替代大型闭源模型执行提示增强任务，提升文本到图像系统的鲁棒性与实用性。

Abstract: Natural language has become a powerful interface for image generation and editing, yet text-guided visual systems remain highly sensitive to prompt formulation. Semantically similar requests can produce different outputs depending on wording, specificity, and how explicitly visual constraints are stated, motivating prompt enhancement as a trainable component rather than a peripheral user choice. Existing strong enhancers often rely on large, proprietary LLMs such as ChatGPT or Gemini, adding cost, latency, and deployment dependence to the visual generation pipeline. We propose Agentic Prompt Enhancer (APE), a lightweight framework that post-trains small language models (SLMs) as prompt-enhancement agents. APE supports both single-agent rewriting and role-specialized multi-agent enhancement. Its single-agent instantiation, SAPE, rewrites the prompt in one pass, while its multi-agent instantiation, MAPE, decomposes enhancement into a router--rewriter--composer process for handling compositional constraints over objects, attributes, spatial relations, and edits. With task-aware rewards and post-training protocols, APE improves visual alignment and prompt following without modifying the downstream visual model. Experiments on challenging image generation and editing benchmarks demonstrate that post-trained small prompt enhancers reliably outperform their base counterparts, narrowing the gap to closed-source prompt enhancers; in addition, MAPE proves particularly strong on complex compositional tasks within these benchmarks.

</details>


### [37] [Multimodal Approaches for Visually-Rich Document Type Classification: A Comparative Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02162)
*Catyana Heyne,Jürgen Frikel,Filippo Riccio*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了基于Transformer和大语言模型（LLM）的多模态架构在文档类型分类任务中的设计策略，通过在RVL-CDIP基准上统一评估LayoutLMv3、Donut、Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct和Qwen3-32B四个代表性模型，对比OCR依赖与OCR免依赖方法，发现专用多模态Transformer优于LLM方法，图像信息贡献最大，布局结构关键，多模态处理仍不可替代。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文档类型分类方法因多模态建模策略异构、评估设置不统一，导致难以系统比较与评估进展。

Method: 在统一实验框架下，对四种代表性多模态模型（LayoutLMv3、Donut、Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct、Qwen3-32B）在RVL-CDIP数据集上进行受控实证比较，重点分析文本、图像与布局模态的贡献，并区分OCR依赖与OCR-free范式。

Result: 专用多模态Transformer（如LayoutLMv3、Donut）在视觉丰富且布局密集的文档上显著优于LLM-based方法（如Qwen3系列）；图像信息对分类可靠性贡献最强，OCR文本提供次重要支持；布局结构显著影响性能，多模态处理仍不可或缺。

Conclusion: 多模态建模仍是文档类型分类的关键，尤其对具强布局结构的文档；研究为架构比较提供系统基准，并为特征组合与模型选型提供实践指导。

Abstract: Document type classification in visually rich documents remains challenging, as relevant information is distributed across textual, visual, and layout modalities. To capture this complexity, current approaches rely on diverse multimodal modeling strategies, resulting in heterogeneous architectures that complicate systematic comparison. This variability is also reflected in existing comparative studies, which often rely on heterogeneous evaluation setups, further complicating systematic comparison and making it difficult to assess progress. To address these limitations, this work provides a structured analysis of multimodal design strategies across transformer- and LLM-based architectures, combined with a controlled empirical comparison within a unified experimental framework. Specifically, four representative models (LayoutLMv3, Donut, Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct, and Qwen3-32B) are evaluated on the RVL-CDIP benchmark to systematically analyze the contributions of text, image, and layout information for document type classification, with a particular focus on contrasting OCR-dependent and OCR-free approaches. The results show that specialized multimodal Transformers outperform LLM-based approaches on visually rich and layout-intensive documents. Image information contributes most strongly to reliable classification, while OCR-derived text provides useful but secondary support. These findings highlight that multimodal processing remains essential for documents with pronounced layout structure. Overall, the study provides a systematic basis for comparing multimodal architectures and offers practical guidance for selecting effective feature combinations and model designs for document type classification.

</details>


### [38] [LastAct: Trajectory-Guided Latest-Activity Localization for Real-Time Smart-Home Activity Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00260)
*Zishuai Liu,Ruili Fang,Jin Lu,Fei Dou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: LastAct是一种面向流式智能家庭人体活动识别（HAR）的轨迹中心框架，通过将传感器事件映射到户型图生成布局对齐的轨迹图像序列，结合门控机制识别污染窗口、边界定位器进行边界引导掩码，提升混合活动窗口下的识别鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实部署中传感器事件为连续流、活动边界未知，滑动窗口推理易产生跨越边界的混合窗口（边界污染），且多数方法忽略传感器空间位置关系。

Method: LastAct将传感器事件投影至户型图形成布局对齐的轨迹图像序列；引入轻量级门控机制识别污染窗口；设计边界定位器估计最近活动转换点，并进行边界引导掩码以增强边界后证据、抑制过时上下文；利用预计算的布局模板缓存提升效率。

Result: 在四个公开智能家庭数据集及近真实混合活动协议下，LastAct在纯窗口上性能具竞争力，在交叉/混合窗口上Macro-F1显著提升，展现出更强的滑动窗口鲁棒性。

Conclusion: LastAct有效缓解了边界污染问题，显式建模空间结构与活动边界，为流式、无分割假设的智能家庭HAR提供了更实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Human Activity Recognition (HAR) from ambient sensors enables smart-home applications such as health monitoring and assisted living. In realistic deployments, however, sensor events arrive as a continuous stream and activity boundaries are unknown. Sliding-window inference therefore produces many windows that straddle transitions and contain mixed activities, creating boundary contamination that violates the pre-segmented instance assumption used by most benchmarks and models. Moreover, many pipelines under-use spatial context by treating sensor IDs as independent tokens. We present LastAct, a trajectory-centric framework for streaming smart-home HAR that targets the most recent activity under mixed windows while explicitly modeling spatial structure. LastAct projects sensor events onto the home floorplan to form a layout-aligned trajectory image sequence that preserves spatial continuity. A lightweight gate identifies contaminated windows, and a boundary localizer estimates the last transition to enable boundary-guided masking that emphasizes post-boundary evidence and suppresses stale context. For efficiency, we reuse a precomputed layout-aligned template cache to avoid repeated rendering. Empirically, across four public smart-home datasets under near-realistic mixed-activity protocols, LastAct achieves competitive or superior performance on pure windows and yields substantial Macro-F1 gains on cross/mixed windows, demonstrating improved robustness under near-realistic sliding-window regimes.

</details>


### [39] [The Harsh Truth: Segment-Level Analysis of Harsh Driving Events in Milan Using Large-Scale Telematics, Street Networks, and Google Street View](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00261)
*Andrea La Grotteria,Paolo Santi,Titus Venverloo,Umberto Fugiglando,Carlo Ratti*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究利用米兰市超过420万辆车载设备的高分辨率远程信息数据，结合交通、道路网络、基础设施及街景视觉特征，分析了城市道路中急加速和急刹车事件（作为安全代理指标）的空间分布规律；发现车道宽度、交叉口、公交站、开阔视野等与更高强度的急驾驶事件相关，而建筑界面密度则与更低强度相关；自行车道类型也显著影响急驾驶强度，标线型车道和混行路段分别比物理隔离车道高出19.5%和11.5%；结果支持因地制宜而非一刀切的安全干预策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 警用事故统计数据存在不完整性和滞后性，难以支撑及时、精细化的城市交通安全干预；而急驾驶事件虽被广泛用作替代安全指标，但此前研究局限于小规模城市样本，缺乏大尺度实证支持。

Method: 整合车载终端（OBU）遥测数据（>420万辆车）、TomTom路段级交通指标、OpenStreetMap路网与基础设施属性、以及基于OneFormer语义分割模型提取的Google街景视觉特征；采用Mann-Whitney U非参数检验比较高低急驾驶强度路段的特征分布，并结合监督式机器学习回归建模。

Result: 在控制交通暴露量后，更宽的车行道、更多交叉口与公交站点、更高比例的天空与路面像素（即更开阔的视觉场）与更高的急驾驶事件强度正相关；而更密集的沿街建筑界面则与更低强度相关；自行车道类型呈现清晰梯度：标线型车道比物理隔离路径急驾驶强度高19.5%，混行路段高11.5%。

Conclusion: 城市交通安全干预应强调情境特异性而非统一标准；大规模车载遥测数据与开放地理空间及视觉数据的融合，可为‘零愿景’（Vision Zero）在都市尺度上的决策提供有力支撑。

Abstract: Police-reported crash statistics remain the standard input for urban road-safety assessment, but their incompleteness and reporting lag limit their usefulness for timely, fine-grained intervention design. Harsh acceleration and braking events are widely used as surrogate safety indicators, but have so far been studied only in comparatively small urban samples. This study analyses harsh events across the urban road network of Milan, combining high-resolution telematics from more than 4.2 million vehicles equipped with On-Board Units, segment-level traffic metrics from TomTom, street-network and infrastructure attributes from OpenStreetMap, and visual streetscape features extracted from Google Street View via semantic segmentation using a OneFormer model. We employ an analytical framework combining non-parametric Mann--Whitney U tests of segment-feature distributions between high- and low-harshness groups with supervised machine-learning regressors. We find that, once exposure is controlled for, wider carriageways, crossings and transit stops, and more open visual fields (higher sky- and road-pixel proportions) are associated with higher harsh-event intensity, while denser built frontage is associated with lower intensity. Finally, the cycling-infrastructure case study identifies a gradient in harsh-event intensity across facility types: markings-only cycle lanes are associated with a 19.5% higher harshness score, and mixed-traffic configurations with an 11.5% higher score, relative to physically separated cycle paths, conditional on the included controls. These results support context-specific rather than uniform urban-safety interventions and illustrate how large-scale telematics combined with open geospatial and visual data can inform Vision Zero decision-making at the metropolitan scale.

</details>


### [40] [StressDream: Steering Video World Models for Robust Policy Evaluation and Improvement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00267)
*Junwon Seo,Sushant Veer,Ran Tian,Wenhao Ding,Apoorva Sharma,Karen Leung,Edward Schmerling,Marco Pavone,Andrea Bajcsy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出StressDream方法，通过在推理时优化扩散模型的初始噪声，引导视频世界模型生成高影响但合理的未来场景（如任务失败），从而实现更鲁棒的策略评估与改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频世界模型通常依赖名义想象（nominal imaginations）进行策略评估，易忽略高影响结果，而大量采样又不现实；需一种能定向生成关键、合理未来场景的方法。

Method: StressDream通过联合优化两个目标来引导扩散式视频世界模型：1）语义目标——利用视觉语言模型对生成视频进行推理并提供梯度；2）合理性目标——约束优化后的噪声不偏离原始分布，避免生成不合理视频。

Result: 在自动驾驶和机器人操作的先进视频世界模型上验证了StressDream的有效性，可按文本指令（如‘车辆撞上行人’）精准引导生成高影响且合理的失败场景，显著提升策略鲁棒性评估能力。

Conclusion: StressDream为基于视频世界模型的策略评估与改进提供了新范式，使系统能主动识别并规避可能导致严重后果的动作，增强了安全关键型智能体的可靠性。

Abstract: Video world models (WMs) have shown promise for policy evaluation and improvement by imagining realistic future observations conditioned on ego-robot actions. While WMs can model distributions over futures, policy evaluation and improvement typically rely on nominal imaginations, which can miss high-impact outcomes of robot actions unless prohibitively many samples are drawn. To enable robust policy evaluation and improvement over WM imaginations, we propose StressDream, which steers imaginations toward high-impact yet plausible outcomes specified at inference time by optimizing the initial noise of diffusion-based WMs. However, optimizing high-dimensional noise is challenging: the optimization must reason about nuanced, scene-dependent target events in generated videos while avoiding out-of-distribution (OOD) noise that yields implausible imaginations. We address this with two complementary objectives: a semantic objective with a Vision-Language Model that provides informative gradients by reasoning about the generated video, and a plausibility objective that prevents the optimized noise from drifting OOD. With state-of-the-art video world models for autonomous driving and robotic manipulation, we show that StressDream effectively steers imaginations toward high-impact yet plausible outcomes specified by text at inference time, such as task failures, enabling robust policy evaluation and improvement by identifying actions whose plausible futures include undesirable outcomes. Video results are available at https://junwon.me/StressDream/.

</details>


### [41] [Hyperbolic and Evidence-Prioritized Experts for Large Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00275)
*Zijie Zhou,Dandan Zhu,Hangxiangpan Wang,Heng Zhang,Huishen Jiao,Yi Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出AsyMoE架构，通过三种专业化专家组（模态内、双曲跨模态、证据优先语言专家）解决现有MoE-LVLM中视觉与语言模态对称建模导致的层次关系建模不足和语言专家脱离上下文的问题，在性能提升的同时降低参数激活量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MoE-LVLM采用对称架构处理视觉与语言模态，忽视二者内在不对称性：文本查询通常只描述完整视觉场景的部分内容（层次包含关系），且深层语言专家易转向参数化记忆而脱离输入证据。

Method: 提出AsyMoE架构，包含三类专家：1）模态内专家负责单模态处理；2）基于双曲几何（负曲率）的跨模态专家建模视觉-语言间的层次关系；3）证据优先的语言专家抑制参数化记忆、保持上下文接地。

Result: AsyMoE在多项任务上平均超越MoE基线1.5%，在幻觉敏感任务上最高提升3.8%；相比稠密模型，参数激活量减少25.45%。

Conclusion: 显式建模视觉与语言模态间的不对称性（尤其是层次结构与证据依赖性）可显著提升LVLM的准确性与鲁棒性，同时提高计算效率。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance on multimodal tasks through scaled architectures and extensive training. Recent studies introduce Mixture of Experts (MoE) into LVLMs for improved computational efficiency. However, existing MoE approaches treat visual and linguistic modalities with symmetric architectures, overlooking the inherent asymmetry in how these two modalities are processed. This asymmetry causes two critical issues. First, text and vision form hierarchical rather than parallel relationships, as text queries typically describe partial aspects of complete visual scenes. Euclidean expert space struggles to encode such containment structures. Second, language experts in deeper layers progressively shift from evidence-based processing to parametric memory dependence, losing grounding in the provided visual and linguistic information. To address these issues, we propose AsyMoE, a novel architecture that explicitly models this asymmetry through three specialized expert groups. Intra-modality experts handle modality-specific processing. Hyperbolic inter-modality experts capture hierarchical cross-modal relationships through negative curvature geometry. Evidence-priority language experts suppress parametric memory activation and maintain contextual grounding throughout network depth. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AsyMoE achieves consistent improvements over baseline methods, with average gains of 1.5\% over MoE variants and up to 3.8\% on hallucination-sensitive tasks. AsyMoE activates 25.45\% fewer parameters compared to dense models.

</details>


### [42] [Real2SAM2Real: Generative 3D Caches as Complementary Context for Video Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00299)
*Jiayi Wu,Haoming Cai,Cornelia Fermuller,Christopher Metzler,Yiannis Aloimonos*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Real2SAM2Real框架，利用3D提升模型（如SAM3D）构建可编辑的3D缓存作为几何骨架，结合软空间对齐注入机制与轻量微调策略，提升视频扩散模型在复杂运动、大视角变化和强遮挡下的相机与场景可控性与时空一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频扩散模型依赖隐式扩散先验生成未观测区域，导致高动态运动或复杂遮挡下结构坍塌，缺乏显式的3D几何引导。

Method: 提出Real2SAM2Real框架：1）用SAM3D等3D提升模型提取全体积（非仅可见面）的可编辑3D缓存；2）设计Soft Spatial-Aligned Injection机制融合3D引导与预训练先验；3）采用掩码法线图构建无须真实3D标注的数据蒸馏与扰动流程；4）最小侵入式微调VDM。

Result: 在相机轨迹与多实体运动控制上实现精确解耦控制；大幅增强大视角位移与严重遮挡下的时空一致性；消除因结构空洞、错误立面、反射/折射误导导致的透视歧义。

Conclusion: 将显式、可编辑、全体积3D几何缓存引入视频扩散模型，能有效弥补纯扩散先验的局限性，为可控视频生成提供鲁棒的3D感知基础。

Abstract: While Video Diffusion Models (VDMs) excel at synthesizing high-fidelity videos, enabling precise camera and scene control remains challenging. Existing methods predominantly rely on implicit diffusion priors to generate unobserved regions, inevitably leading to structural collapse during high-dynamic movements or complex occlusions. To address this challenge, we propose Real2SAM2Real, a framework that leverages 3D lifting models (e.g., SAM3D) to extract an explicitly editable 3D cache, serving as a robust geometric scaffold for the VDM. By capturing the entire 3D volume of foreground entities rather than just their visible shells, this cache injects holistic spatial priors into the VDM, providing dependable 3D-aware guidance for complex scene dynamics. To effectively leverage this 3D guidance while preserving pre-trained priors, we design a Soft Spatial-Aligned Injection mechanism alongside a minimally invasive fine-tuning strategy tailored for VDMs. Furthermore, we employ masked normal maps as a cross-modal bridge to construct a 3D-free data curation and perturbation pipeline. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Real2SAM2Real enables precise, decoupled control over both camera trajectories and multi-entity motions. By utilizing the complementary context from generative 3D caches, our framework overcomes typical breakdowns caused by over-reliance on diffusion priors, maintaining exceptional spatiotemporal consistency under large camera shifts and severe occlusions. Crucially, by decoupling geometry from appearance, our VDM-tailored 3D cache eradicates perspective ambiguities caused by structural holes and erroneous facades, as well as misleading cues from reflections and refractions. Project website is available at https://jiayi-wu-leo.github.io/real2sam2real

</details>


### [43] [Where to Refine, When to Stop: Rethinking Redundancy via Latent Discrepancy for Efficient Visual Autoregressive Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00310)
*Changwang Mei,Peisong Wang,Zekun Li,Changsheng Li,Shuang Qiu,Qinghao Hu,Gang Li,Yifan Zhang,Zhihui Wei,Jian Cheng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出LD-Pruning方法，通过引入Latent Discrepancy度量VAR模型中token对像素空间生成的实际影响，实现无需训练的高效推理加速，显著降低延迟并保持高质量图像生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VAR模型虽生成质量高，但高分辨率下推理延迟严重；现有基于层特征启发式剪枝的方法对语义敏感、冗余识别不准、泛化性差。

Method: 提出Latent Discrepancy统一指标，量化token在生成过程中对模型状态变化的影响；据此设计解码无关区域选择与自适应无条件分支跳过机制，构建训练免费的LD-Pruning框架。

Result: 在Infinity-8B上实现最高2.35倍推理加速，同时保持高生成质量；在不同prompt下展现更强鲁棒性与适应性。

Conclusion: 从像素/隐空间信号出发评估冗余更准确；LD-Pruning为VAR模型提供了一种高效、通用、免训练的加速新范式。

Abstract: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models deliver high-quality image generation but suffer from significant inference latency at high resolutions. Recent acceleration approaches most rely on heuristic measures with layer features to prune tokens. Such heuristics are sensitive to complex contextual semantics, leading to inaccurate identification of redundant computation and poor adaptability across prompts. We rethink redundancy in VAR from the perspective of its impact on pixel-space generation and introduce Latent Discrepancy. This unified metric quantifies a token's contribution by measuring the change in model states during generation. Our analysis shows that redundancy is more accurately identified when guided by image latent or pixel-space signals. We further observed that in classifier-free guidance (CFG), the convergence trend of the discrepancy between conditional and unconditional branches exhibits high dynamics with different prompts. Based on these findings, we propose LD-Pruning (Latent Discrepancy Pruning), a training-free framework that removes redundancy via latent discrepancy by integrating decoding-free region selection and adaptive unconditional-branch skipping. Extensive experiments show that LD-Pruning substantially reduces inference latency while maintaining high generation quality, achieving up to 2.35x speedup on Infinity-8B.

</details>


### [44] [Training-Free Object-Agnostic Jam Detection in Fulfillment Centers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00321)
*Ruiliang Liu,Tina Dongxu Li,Joshua Migdal,Fernando Ruch,Kenneth Meszaros,Moses Trevor Dardik*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练、与物体无关的输送带堵塞检测方法AllTracker，通过监测参考点是否被持续遮挡来判断堵塞，避免了传统依赖大量标注数据和特定物体类别的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统堵塞检测方法依赖大量人工标注（约两周）、仅适用于已标注物体类别，且对遮挡处理不佳。

Method: 在无物体时均匀采样监控区域内的参考点；当物体经过并遮挡这些点时，检测遮挡状态；若足够多的点被持续遮挡超过时间阈值，则判定为堵塞。将遮挡本身作为检测信号，而非视为跟踪失败。

Result: 在1069个视频上实验表明，AllTracker达到100.00%精确率和93.33% F1分数，显著优于经典稀疏跟踪方法，且无需训练。

Conclusion: 该方法具备三大优势：无需标注数据、可泛化至任意物体类型、开发时间大幅缩短，适用于真实仓储场景的鲁棒、低开销堵塞检测。

Abstract: In fulfillment centers, diverse objects move continuously from inbound to outbound operations and can become jammed due to excessive conveyor friction, incorrect orientation, or mechanical failures. Traditional jam detection approaches rely on object detection models to identify objects, followed by tracking algorithms (such as IoU overlap and Kalman filtering) to monitor motion over time. This pipeline requires thousands of manual annotations, consuming approximately two weeks of effort, and is limited to annotated object classes. We present a training-free, object-agnostic jam detection method that eliminates the need for labeled data. Our approach uniformly samples reference points within the monitoring region when no objects are present. As objects occlude these points, we detect motion. When a sufficient fraction remains occluded beyond a temporal threshold, we classify the event as a jam. Unlike conventional point tracking--which treats occlusion as a failure case--our approach repurposes occlusion as a detection signal, monitoring whether reference points remain persistently occluded rather than tracking where they move. Our experimental evaluation on 1,069 videos demonstrates that AllTracker achieves 100.00% precision and 93.33% F1 score, significantly outperforming classical sparse tracking methods while maintaining training-free deployment. This approach offers three key advantages: (1) no training data or manual annotations, (2) object-agnostic generalization to arbitrary object types, and (3) significantly reduced development time.

</details>


### [45] [UniVerse: A Unified Modulation Framework for Segmentation-Free,Disentangled Multi-Concept Personalization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00351)
*Quynh Phung,Sandesh Ghimire,Minsi Hu,Chung-Chi Tsai,Jia-Bin Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出UniVerse框架，实现无需分割监督的多概念解耦个性化，提升复杂场景中目标概念的定位与表征能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理含多个物体的图像时难以准确定位和提取特定概念，且依赖分割监督或泛化能力差。

Method: 提出UniVerse——一种统一调制框架，基于扩散Transformer实现分割无关、解耦的多概念个性化，支持概念的可组合与可分解提取。

Result: 在多个基准上显著优于SOTA方法，定位精度与视觉保真度均更优；能精确提取杂乱场景中的目标概念。

Conclusion: UniVerse为灵活、可解释、个性化的视觉生成与理解提供了新路径。

Abstract: Personalized visual understanding has advanced significantly, yet existing approaches struggle to localize and extract specific concepts when input images contain multiple objects. Many prior methods rely heavily on segmentation-based supervision or exhibit poor compositional generalization, limiting their ability to accurately disentangle and manipulate individual concepts. In this work, we propose UniVerse, a Unified Modulation Framework for segmentation-free, disentangled multi-concept personalization in diffusion transformers. Our method allows for composable and decomposable concept extraction, enabling fine-grained localization and representation of target objects without explicit segmentation masks. UniVerse learns to decompose complex scenes into concept-specific representations and then compose them in a unified manner, enabling robust personalization across diverse visual contexts. Through extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks, we demonstrate that UniVerse significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both localization accuracy and visual fidelity. Qualitative and quantitative results show that our approach can precisely extract target concepts in cluttered scenes, paving the way for more flexible, interpretable, and personalized visual generation and understanding.

</details>


### [46] [LFA: Layer Feature Attention for Run-Time Introspection of 2D Object Detectors in Automated Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00372)
*Mert Keser,Alois Knoll*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出Layer Feature Attention (LFA)方法，通过注意力机制聚合多层骨干网络特征以预测目标检测器的失败，提升自动驾驶中检测可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有检测器错误预测方法仅依赖最后一层特征或手工统计，忽略了早期层中蕴含的多层次视觉抽象信息。

Method: 提出轻量级Layer Feature Attention（LFA）方法，利用注意力机制端到端学习多骨干层特征的权重，融合低层细节与高层语义信息。

Result: 在KITTI和BDD100K数据集上实验表明，LFA在多种检测器架构下均达到最优的错误预测性能，并具备可解释性。

Conclusion: LFA有效提升了检测器失败预测能力，兼顾性能与可解释性，为安全自动驾驶提供可靠保障。

Abstract: Reliable object detection is critical for automated driving, yet even state-of-the-art detectors inevitably make errors that can compromise safety. Introspection methods that predict detector failures enable safer deployment by triggering fallback mechanisms or alerting human operators. However, existing approaches rely solely on last-layer features or hand-crafted statistics, discarding valuable information from earlier layers that capture different levels of visual abstraction. We propose Layer Feature Attention (LFA), a lightweight introspection method that learns to aggregate features from multiple backbone layers through an attention mechanism. Our key insight is that detection errors manifest differently across feature hierarchies: low-level layers capture fine-grained details essential for detecting small or occluded objects, while high-level layers encode semantic information for scene understanding. LFA learns layer importance weights end-to-end, enabling both improved error prediction and interpretable analysis of which feature levels are most indicative of detector failures. Extensive experiments on KITTI and BDD100K demonstrate that LFA achieves state-of-the-art introspection performance, outperforming single-layer baselines across multiple detector architectures.

</details>


### [47] [Score-Control for Hallucination Reduction in Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00377)
*Mahesh Bhosale,Naresh Kumar Devulapally,Abdul Wasi,Chau Pham,Vishnu Suresh Lokhande,David Doermann*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种方差引导的分数调制（VSM）策略，通过控制分数函数的雅可比矩阵来降低其Lipschitz常数，从而减少扩散模型图像生成中的幻觉现象，并在多个数据集上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型虽成功但存在幻觉问题（生成不真实样本），已有假设认为分数函数平滑性是主因；本文旨在从密度视角建模并量化该问题，并提出可解释、可控制的解决方案。

Method: 首先通过实证验证分数平滑性与幻觉的关系，并建立幻觉概率质量与学习到的分数函数Lipschitz常数之间的理论联系；进而提出方差引导的分数调制（VSM）策略，显式约束分数雅可比以降低平滑性，逼近真实分数函数。

Result: 在合成与真实数据集上，VSM将幻觉率降低最多约25%，同时保持高保真度和多样性；并构建了两个具有极端语义变化的基准数据集用于系统化幻觉评估。

Conclusion: VSM为提升扩散模型可靠性提供了原理性路径，揭示了分数函数正则化对生成质量的关键作用，并推动了幻觉问题的可评估性与可控性研究。

Abstract: Diffusion models have emerged as the backbone of modern generative AI, powering advances in vision, language, audio and other modalities. Despite their success, they suffer from hallucinations, implausible samples that lie outside the support of true data distribution, which degrade reliability and trust. In this work, we first empirically confirm previously proposed hypothesis that score smoothness causes hallucinations in Image Generation diffusion models and provide a density-based perspective. We further formalize this notion by linking the hallucinations probability mass to lipschitz constant of the learned score function. Motivated by this, we introduce a Variance-Guided Score Modulation (VSM) strategy that controls the score Jacobian, in turn reducing score smoothness and better approximating the ground truth score that decreases hallucinations. Empirical results on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that our approach reduces hallucinations (up to ~25%) while maintaining high fidelity and diversity, providing a principled step toward more reliable diffusion-based image generation. We also propose two benchmark datasets with extreme semantic variation for systematic hallucination evaluation. Code and Datasets are publicly available at https://github.com/bhosalems/VSM.

</details>


### [48] [Non-Learning Low-Light Stereo Vision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00379)
*Jason Wang,Lucas Nguyen,Hyunseung Eom,Wei Xu,Qi Guo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需学习的立体匹配框架，利用Field of Junctions（FoJ）在严重噪声图像中构建鲁棒的成本体积，并结合边界感知的半全局匹配（SGM）生成更精确的稀疏视差图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有立体匹配方法在严重噪声图像上性能下降，难以区分真实纹理与光子噪声，亟需一种对噪声鲁棒的非学习方法。

Method: 基于Field of Junctions（FoJ）提取抗噪粗粒度结构特征用于成本体积构建；设计边界感知的Semi-Global Matching（SGM），动态调整平滑性惩罚以保留真实视差不连续性。

Result: 在主流基准数据集上，该方法在未遮挡像素上的视差估计精度优于近期多种立体算法，输出为高精度稀疏视差图。

Conclusion: 结构化先验（如FoJ）与经典优化（如SGM）的有效结合，可在无监督、非学习前提下显著提升噪声场景下的立体匹配鲁棒性与精度。

Abstract: We present a non-learning stereo framework for disparity estimation from severely noisy images. Using the Field of Junctions (FoJ), it retains coarse visual features stable under severe noise for cost volume construction while discarding fine textures inseparable from photon noise. The resulting structural information guides boundary-aware Semi-Global Matching (SGM) that dynamically adapts smoothness penalties to preserve true disparity discontinuities. The output is a sparse disparity map more accurate than those of recent stereo algorithms over unmasked pixels on widely-used benchmark datasets.

</details>


### [49] [SUPREME: A Multi-GPU Framework for Reproducible Image Unlearning Method Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00380)
*Petros Andreou,Jamie Lanyon,Axel Finke,Georgina Cosma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文介绍了SUPREME，一个开源的多GPU分布式机器遗忘框架，用于高效评估图像分类中的遗忘方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像分类遗忘框架仅在单GPU上运行，导致跨多个随机种子重复训练、遗忘和评估计算开销大，难以高效评估。

Method: 提出SUPREME框架，包含基于注册表的设计、支持多加速器与多种精度模式的多GPU架构，并在Pins人脸数据集上用ResNet18和ViT验证全类与随机样本遗忘场景。

Result: 实现了跨十种随机种子的高效遗忘评估，支持灵活扩展新方法、指标、模型与场景，并已开源。

Conclusion: SUPREME显著提升了机器遗忘评估的可扩展性与效率，为未来遗忘研究提供了实用、模块化、分布式的基础设施。

Abstract: Machine unlearning removes the influence of specific training data from a trained model without retraining it from scratch. Evaluating an unlearning method requires repeating training, unlearning, and evaluation across multiple seeds, which is computationally expensive. To our knowledge, existing image classification unlearning frameworks run on a single GPU, which limits how many seeds can be evaluated in reasonable time. We introduce SUPREME, an open-source framework that distributes these stages across multiple GPUs. SUPREME makes three contributions: a registry-based design for adding new methods, metrics, models, and scenarios; a multi-GPU architecture supporting multiple accelerators and precision modes; and a demonstration on Pins Face Recognition using ResNet18 and ViT under full-class and random-sample unlearning across ten seeds. The framework is available at https://github.com/pedroandreou/supreme-unlearning.

</details>


### [50] [αDepth: Learning Single-Pass Soft Boundary Decomposition for Stereo Conversion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00386)
*Xiang Zhang,Yang Zhang,Lukas Mehl,Karlis Martins Briedis,Markus Gross,Christopher Schroers*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出αDepth，一种用于高保真立体转换的分层表示方法，通过估计软边界处的分层颜色和深度值，并设计循环Alpha表示（CAR）来解决多目标复杂场景中的深度模糊问题，无需人工干预，显著提升了立体转换质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确建模软边界（如头发、散焦模糊）是立体转换中的基本挑战，现有单层深度模型在软边界处存在深度对应模糊；而传统抠图方法在多目标复杂场景中效果差且依赖人工干预。

Method: 提出αDepth分层表示，结合分层颜色与深度估计，并设计循环Alpha表示（CAR），将范式从全局目标提取转向局部边界分解，支持场景级无指导推理。

Result: 在立体转换任务中达到SOTA性能，有效消除软边界处的背景渗色和结构畸变。

Conclusion: αDepth通过分层建模与CAR机制，为复杂场景下的高保真立体转换提供了鲁棒、自动化的解决方案。

Abstract: Accurately modeling soft boundaries, e.g., hair and defocus blur, is a fundamental challenge in stereo conversion due to the ambiguous blending of foreground and background. Existing depth models primarily predict single-layer depth, leading to ambiguity in depth correspondence at soft boundaries. While matting techniques can capture opacity for layered modeling, they often struggle in complex scenes with multiple targets and usually require user intervention. This paper introduces αDepth, a layered representation that decomposes soft boundaries for high-fidelity stereo conversion. Specifically, we first resolve mixed color and depth ambiguity by estimating layered color and depth values at soft boundaries. Considering complex multi-target scenes, we design a Circular Alpha Representation (CAR) that shifts the paradigm from global target extraction to local boundary decomposition. Unlike prior matting methods restricted to a single foreground/background, CAR enables efficient scene-level inference without manual guidance. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that αDepth achieves state-of-the-art performance in stereo conversion, eliminating background bleeding and structural distortions at soft boundaries.

</details>


### [51] [Zamba2-VL Technical Report](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00390)
*Hassan Shapourian,Kasra Hejazi,Olabode M. Sule,Beren Millidge*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Zamba2-VL是一系列基于Zamba2（结合Mamba2状态空间模型与少量共享Transformer块）的视觉-语言模型，在多项视觉理解任务上性能媲美主流Transformer-based开源VLM，同时显著提升推理速度，尤其适合端侧部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为解决现有视觉-语言模型（VLM）在效率（尤其是首字延迟TTFT）和端侧部署适配性上的不足，探索将高效状态空间模型（SSM）与Transformer结合的混合架构潜力。

Method: 构建基于Zamba2混合架构（Mamba2+少量共享Transformer块）的视觉-语言模型Zamba2-VL，支持多尺度（1.2B/2.7B/7B），并进行跨模态预训练与多任务微调。

Result: Zamba2-VL在图像理解、OCR、定位、计数等基准上媲美Molmo2、Qwen3-VL、InternVL3.5等主流Transformer VLM，显著优于VL-Mamba等SSM或混合VLM；TTFT比同规模Transformer基线低约一个数量级，小模型优势更明显。

Conclusion: Zamba2-VL验证了SSM与Transformer混合架构在视觉-语言建模中的有效性与高效性，为边缘设备部署高性能VLM提供了新范式。

Abstract: We present Zamba2-VL, a suite of vision-language models built on Zamba2, a hybrid language-model architecture combining Mamba2 state-space layers with a small number of shared transformer blocks. Across a broad range of image understanding, reasoning, OCR, grounding, and counting benchmarks, Zamba2-VL is competitive with leading Transformer-based open-weight VLMs of comparable scale, including the Molmo2, Qwen3-VL, and InternVL3.5 families, and substantially outperforms prior SSM-based and hybrid VLMs such as VL-Mamba, Cobra, and mmMamba. Inheriting the near-linear prefill compute and small, near-constant recurrent state of its Zamba2 backbone, Zamba2-VL delivers roughly an order of magnitude lower time-to-first-token (TTFT) than these Transformer baselines at matched parameter scale, with the efficiency gap most pronounced at the smaller 1.2B and 2.7B scales most relevant to on-device and edge deployment. We release three models -- 1.2B, 2.7B, and 7B -- together with inference code at https://huggingface.co/collections/Zyphra/zamba2-vl.

</details>


### [52] [Rethinking Amortized Neural Representations for High-Resolution Terrain Elevation Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00404)
*Haoan Feng,Xin Xu,Leila De Floriani*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出HUVR+SIREN，一种针对地形高程数据优化的隐式神经表示方法，在保持低存储和解码成本的同时，提升了高度和导数保真度，并支持量化压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示（INRs）的地形建模方法大多借鉴图像领域，其在地形高程数据上的适用性尚不明确，且存在跨域性能差距。

Method: 构建1米/像素地形数据基准，统一评估三种典型 amortized 神经表示方法；提出 HUVR+SIREN：在最强基线 HUVR 上，用 SIREN 替换原有坐标解码器，实现解析可微与平滑建模。

Result: HUVR+SIREN 在高度与导数保真度上最优，无需额外每瓦片存储、解码开销更低，并支持激进后训练量化而质量损失可忽略；消融分析表明每瓦片瓶颈已近极限，剩余差距源于共享超网络架构设计。

Conclusion: 地形高程数据需专门适配的 INR 架构；SIREN 类解析可微解码器显著提升地形建模质量；未来改进应聚焦于共享超网络的结构设计而非增大每瓦片表征容量。

Abstract: Implicit neural representations (INRs) model a signal as a continuous coordinate-to-value function. For terrain elevation data, this supports analytic derivatives, arbitrary-resolution decoding, and a smooth surface model of the underlying heightfield. However, fitting and storing a separate INR for every tile does not scale to large terrain datasets. Amortized neural representations reduce this cost with a shared network: a new tile is mapped to a compact per-tile payload, and a shared decoder reconstructs the heightfield from it. Most such methods are hypernetworks that predict the payload in a single forward pass, while others recover it through a short per-tile optimization. These methods were developed primarily for natural images, and their suitability for terrain heightfields remains unclear. We introduce a controlled benchmark on a 1 m/pixel terrain dataset and evaluate three representative methods under a unified protocol. Observing a clear cross-domain gap, we propose HUVR+SIREN, a hypernetwork that adapts the strongest benchmarked method (HUVR) by replacing its coordinate decoder with a smooth, analytically differentiable one. It attains the best height and derivative fidelity on the benchmark with no additional per-tile storage and lower decode cost, and tolerates aggressive post-training quantization with negligible quality loss, giving a compact terrain neural format. Ablations and diagnostics further identify which design choices transfer to terrain and show that the per-tile bottleneck is already near its useful limit, leaving the remaining gap in the shared hypernetwork's architectural design.

</details>


### [53] [4D Radar Meets LiDAR and Camera: Cooperative Perception under Adverse Weather](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00416)
*Melih Yazgan,Iramm Hamdard,Qiyuan Wu,J. Marius Zoellner*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种融合4D成像雷达的协同感知方法，通过多智能体融合和多模态（雷达-相机/雷达-LiDAR）架构提升自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的鲁棒性，并发布了两个雷达增强型基准数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有协同感知方法在恶劣天气下因相机和LiDAR性能下降而变得脆弱，亟需引入对天气不敏感的传感器模态。

Method: 将4D成像雷达作为抗天气干扰的新模态引入协同感知框架，并设计多智能体融合中的多普勒引导空间注意力机制；扩展了两种主干架构：雷达-相机（雷达替代LiDAR）与LiDAR-雷达（雷达补充LiDAR）；构建并发布OPV2V-R和Adver-City-R两个物理建模的雷达增强基准数据集。

Result: 实验表明该方法在雾、雨等恶劣天气下显著提升感知鲁棒性，尤其在雷达替代退化LiDAR时效果突出；在MAN TruckScenes真实场景中验证了方法的跨域迁移能力。

Conclusion: 4D成像雷达是一种适用于全天候协同感知的鲁棒传感器模态，所提方法及数据集为未来研究提供了重要支撑。

Abstract: Cooperative perception is important for autonomous driving but remains fragile when cameras and LiDAR degrade in adverse weather. We address this challenge by integrating 4D imaging radar as a weather-robust modality into collaborative perception and introducing a Doppler-guided spatial attention mechanism for multi-agent fusion. Our approach extends two representative backbones: a radar-camera pipeline where radar substitutes LiDAR, and a LiDAR-radar pipeline where radar complements LiDAR. To support evaluation, we release radar-augmented benchmarks, OPV2V-R and Adver-City-R, with physics-based LiDAR degradation. Experiments show strong robustness gains in fog and rain, including substantial improvements when radar replaces degraded LiDAR. Additional validation on MAN TruckScenes demonstrates transfer beyond simulation. Overall, our results highlight 4D imaging radar as a robust modality for all-weather collaborative perception. Dataset and code are available at: https://url.fzi.de/SlimComm.

</details>


### [54] [Detect Before You Leap: Mirage Detection in Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00435)
*Sayeed Shafayet Chowdhury,Md. Shaown Miah*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种模型无关的预发布幻象（mirage）检测方法TC-LIA，通过分析CLIP视觉编码器各层中图像块与问题文本的对齐轨迹，并融合多种特征，在多个VQA任务上显著降低了VLM生成无视觉依据答案的错误率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: VLMs在缺乏或无关视觉证据时仍可能给出高置信度但错误的回答（即mirage），这在医疗和文档VQA等关键领域尤为危险，亟需在模型作答前判断是否应拒绝回答。

Method: 提出Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment（TC-LIA）：将CLIP ViT-H/14各层图像patch token投影至最终文本嵌入空间，计算其与问题嵌入的相似度，构建对齐轨迹；提取余弦相似度、late-layer top-k对齐、early-to-late增益、层间斜率等特征，并联合像素统计（空白/噪声检测）、零样本领域路由及VLM自评估构成集成检测器。

Result: 在五个VQA领域、三种输入条件、十二种VLM主干网络上，最优系统实现94.6–94.7%三分类检测准确率，mirage率低于3%，而基线mirage率高达21.7%–66.6%。

Conclusion: TC-LIA是一种高效、通用且可解释的预发布mirage检测框架，能显著提升VLM在关键视觉问答场景中的可靠性与安全性。

Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can produce confident visual answers even when the required visual evidence is missing, blank, or unrelated to the question. This failure mode, known as mirage (Asadi et al. 2026), is especially concerning in medical and document visual question answering, where plausible but visually ungrounded responses may be mistaken for image-based evidence. We study pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, the goal is to determine whether a VLM should answer or abstain before producing a response. We propose Text-Conditioned Layer-wise Internal Alignment (TC-LIA), a model-agnostic method that probes patch-token representations across the layers of a CLIP ViT-H/14 vision encoder. TC-LIA projects layer-wise image patch tokens into the final CLIP embedding space and measures their similarity to the question embedding, allowing the method to track whether question-relevant visual evidence emerges across vision layers. The resulting alignment trajectory is summarized using final image-text cosine similarity, late-layer top-k patch-text alignment, early-to-late gain, and layer-wise slope. These features are combined with pixel-statistic blank/noise detection, zero-shot domain routing, and structured VLM self-assessment in an ensemble. Across five VQA domains, three input conditions, and twelve VLM backbones, the best systems achieve approximately 94.6-94.7% three-class detection accuracy with mirage rates below 3%, while baseline mirage rates range from 21.7% to 66.6%.

</details>


### [55] [Physical Object Understanding with a Physically Controllable World Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00439)
*Rahul Venkatesh,Klemen Kotar,Lilian Naing Chen,Wanhee Lee,Gia Ancone,Seungwoo Kim,Luca Thomas Wheeler,Jared Watrous,Honglin Chen,Daniel Bear,Stefan Stojanov,Daniel LK Yamins*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型概率世界模型，通过自回归序列建模高效训练，能从视频中推断物体结构、运动规律及物理关系，并实现3D对象操作与视觉物理推理（如Visual Jenga）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型无法从原始视频中有效推断场景的物理结构（如物体组成与交互规律），亟需能基于部分观测估计任意视觉变量分布的世界模型。

Method: 提出基于自回归序列建模的概率世界模型，支持任意视觉变量（外观、动力学等）的条件概率估计；通过多未来状态生成与运动相关性分析提取物体及部件；结合3D操作与物理关系建模实现视觉物理推理。

Result: 模型能生成多 plausible 未来状态以捕捉物体运动规律；从中提取物体及子部件；支持3D对象操控；可计算物体间物理关系，成功应用于Visual Jenga等任务。

Conclusion: 该概率世界模型为视觉智能提供了统一框架，实现了从视频中学习物理结构、动态建模、对象发现与物理推理的能力，显著拓展了当前世界模型的功能边界。

Abstract: A central challenge in visual intelligence is learning the physical structure of scenes from raw videos: how regions form objects and the laws that govern their interactions. Solving these tasks requires world models capable of inferring distributional states of the world from partial observations - capabilities that current architectures do not provide. We introduce a new class of probabilistic world models that support estimation of the probability of any visual variable, such as appearance and dynamics, conditioned on any other variables. Here, we identify that these models can be trained efficiently with autoregressive sequence modeling, yielding world models from which rich object understanding emerges. First, we demonstrate that our model captures the physical laws governing how objects move by generating multiple plausible future states of the world through sequential inference. Then, by analyzing motion correlations across these futures, we extract objects and articulated object subparts. Having discovered these objects, we show that our world model can manipulate them in 3D. Finally, we demonstrate how physical relationships between objects can be computed from the world model, enabling applications such as Visual Jenga.

</details>


### [56] [DarkVesselNet: Multi-Modal Remote Sensing and Trajectory Reasoning for Dark Vessel Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00445)
*Arun Sharma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: DarkVesselNet 是一个融合多源遥感数据（Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2 光学影像）与 AIS 轨迹推理的暗船检测系统，采用地理空间基础模型骨干网络、TGARD式间隙检测与Pi-DPM启发的异常检测头，并以开源软件形式验证各模块。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决船舶未开启AIS（即‘暗船’）导致的海上监管盲区问题，需融合卫星遥感观测与AIS报告进行协同检测。

Method: 构建多模态遥感栈，整合Sentinel-1 SAR、Sentinel-2光学影像；采用地理空间基础模型作为骨干网络；引入AIS轨迹推理与TGARD风格的航行间隙检测；设计Pi-DPM启发的可微分异常检测头；通过Python包与Hugging Face Space实现系统化封装与测试。

Result: 实现了端到端可测试的暗船检测系统，完成SAR斑点滤波、光学波段比、Haversine距离计算、TGARD间隙生成、传感器配准、骨干网络token形状验证及可微分异常评分等模块的软件层面验证。

Conclusion: DarkVesselNet为暗船检测提供了模块化、可复现、开源可部署的多模态技术框架，当前验证聚焦于系统组件的软件正确性，为后续真实场景性能评估奠定基础。

Abstract: Dark vessel detection requires fusing what vessels report through AIS with what satellites observe through radar and optical sensors. DarkVesselNet is a multi-modal remote sensing stack that combines Sentinel-1 SAR, Sentinel-2 optical imagery, geospatial foundation model backbones, AIS trajectory reasoning, TGARD-style gap detection, and a Pi-DPM-inspired anomaly head. The repository exposes the system as a tested Python package and a public Hugging Face Space. The paper presents the sensor stack, backbone abstraction, fusion path, anomaly head, and current validation. The evidence currently available is software-grounded: tests for SAR speckle filtering, optical band ratios, Haversine distance, TGARD gap emission, sensor coregistration, backbone token shapes, and differentiable anomaly scoring.

</details>


### [57] [GeoSAM-3D: Geodesic Prompt Propagation for Open-Vocabulary 3D Scene Segmentation from Monocular Video](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00447)
*Arun Sharma*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GeoSAM-3D 提出一种轻量级开放词汇3D场景分割方法，仅需用户上传单目视频、点击或命名目标物体，即可在高斯溅射重建的3D场景上实现跨帧3D掩码传播；核心创新是基于场景图热核距离（而非欧氏距离）进行提示传播，提升曲面连续性与跨物体隔离性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决现有开放词汇3D场景分割依赖RGB-D视频、多视角标定或显式网格重建等重条件的问题，探索更轻量、更交互友好的单目视频输入范式。

Method: 融合冻结的图像/视频基础模型、单目3D高斯溅射重建，以及在高斯质心构建的场景图上定义的可微分图测地线传播核（热核距离）；并训练专用特征头以适配Segment Anything生成的掩码。

Result: 实现了从单目视频和单帧提示到全3D高斯场景的高效、连续且低泄漏的掩码传播；验证涵盖实现正确性、图传播质量、泄漏控制和交互延迟四方面。

Conclusion: 基于图热核距离的提示传播机制优于传统欧氏邻域传播，在保持曲面连续性的同时显著抑制跨物体泄漏，为轻量级交互式3D分割提供了可行新路径。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary 3D scene segmentation usually assumes RGB-D video, calibrated multi-view imagery, or a reconstructed mesh. GeoSAM-3D studies a lighter setting: a user uploads a short monocular video, clicks or names an object in one frame, and receives a propagated 3D mask over a Gaussian scene. The implementation combines frozen image and video foundation models with a monocular 3D Gaussian Splatting reconstruction and a differentiable graph-geodesic propagation kernel over Gaussian centroids. The central design choice is to propagate prompts by heat-kernel distance on the reconstructed scene graph, rather than by Euclidean nearest neighbors in 3D. This preserves continuity around curved surfaces and reduces leakage across nearby but disconnected objects. This paper describes the repository state, the mathematical kernel implemented in geosam3d.propagate, the feature head trained from Segment Anything masks, and the validation already present in the codebase. The evaluation protocol separates implementation validation, graph propagation quality, leakage control, and interactive latency.

</details>


### [58] [An explainable hierarchical self attention-based approach for tremor detection in the time domain](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00461)
*Timothy Odonga,Jeanne M. Powell,Mark Saad,Richa Tripathi,Christine D. Esper,Stewart A. Factor,Hyeokhyen Kwon,J. Lucas Mckay*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可解释的两阶段分层框架，用于在时域内直接从3D运动学标记时间序列数据中自动检测震颤，无需依赖专家设计的频域特征。该框架结合CNN-LSTM与Vision Transformer，实现了跨多个身体部位的震颤检测，并提供注意力权重和Grad-CAM等可解释性分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统震颤诊断依赖临床专家，现有自动化方法多基于专家知识驱动的频域特征；本文旨在探索数据驱动、低预处理、可解释的纯时域建模方法。

Method: 构建两阶段框架：第一阶段用CNN-LSTM从非重叠短时段运动学数据中学习局部震颤表征；第二阶段用Vision Transformer建模各时段特征的长期时序动态，实现整段试验级分类；辅以注意力机制和Grad-CAM进行可解释性分析。

Result: 在九个身体部位上F1分数为0.594–0.947（平均0.765），略低于频域SOTA（0.909），但预处理极简；成功识别出不同部位的时域震颤特征。

Conclusion: 验证了纯时域、数据驱动建模震颤的可行性，降低了对专家频谱特征的依赖，同时提供了时间与解剖层面的后验可解释性。

Abstract: Tremor is a common movement disorder associated with conditions like Parkinson's disease and Essential tremor, traditionally diagnosed through expert clinician assessment. Current automated detection methods rely on frequency-domain features informed by clinical expertise. In this work, we present an explainable, two-stage hierarchical framework for tremor detection in the time domain that learns tremor patterns directly from 3D kinematic marker time-series data across entire tremor-provoking trials. Our framework combined a deep convolutional and long short-term memory network to learn tremor representations from short, discrete, non-overlapping time segments of kinematic time series data from trials, which are then processed by a vision transformer that models their long-term temporal dynamics of time segment features for trial (session) level classification. Evaluated across nine body parts, the framework achieved F1-scores of 0.594 - 0.947 depending on body parts (average: 0.765), falling short of the frequency-domain state-of-the-art performance (0.909) while requiring minimal preprocessing. Attention weights and gradient-based class activation maps (Grad-CAM) identified time-domain features of tremor across body parts. This proof of concept demonstrated the feasibility of data-driven time-domain modeling for tremor detection across anatomically diverse body parts, while reducing reliance on expert-engineered spectral features and providing posthoc interpretability of temporal and anatomical patterns of tremor.

</details>


### [59] [MUSCLE-NET: Predicted-Multiscale-Aware Network for Pedestrian Trajectory Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00471)
*Yu Liu,Ming Huang,Xiao Ren,Zhijie Liu,Youfu Li,He Kong*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出MUSCLE-NET，一种多尺度感知网络，通过多模态特征提取与尺度自适应预测机制提升行人轨迹预测精度与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以充分利用多样化观测信息，且忽略未来运动的尺度依赖性，导致对不同行人行为的泛化能力不足。

Method: 提出MUSCLE-NET框架，包含Multiscale Multimodal Feature Extraction（MMFE）模块（融合边界框、速度、姿态等多模态信息并进行尺度与方向建模）和Multiscale Enhanced Hierarchical Prediction（MEHP）模块（基于概率粗预测、尺度对齐融合与渐进式精炼实现运动细化）。

Result: 在JAAD和PIE数据集上取得优于当前最优方法的性能，验证了模型的有效性与鲁棒性。

Conclusion: MUSCLE-NET通过显式建模多尺度运动动态与多模态语义对齐，显著提升了行人轨迹预测的准确性与泛化能力。

Abstract: Accurate pedestrian trajectory prediction is essential for safe navigation in autonomous driving and intelligent transportation systems. Despite substantial progress made by recent methods, most existing approaches are limited in fully exploiting diverse observations and often overlook the scale dependency of future motion, treating multiscale features uniformly regardless of underlying motion dynamics. This limits their robustness across diverse pedestrian behaviors. To address these challenges, we propose a Predicted-MUltiSCale-Aware Network (MUSCLE-NET) for Pedestrian Trajectory Forecasting that integrates complementary multimodal cues with scale-adaptive prediction mechanisms. The proposed framework is built upon a Multiscale Multimodal Feature Extraction (MMFE) module, which combines multiscale representation, modality-aware recalibration, and directional cross-modal fusion to construct semantically aligned representations from bounding boxes, velocities, and pose information. Building on these features, a Multiscale Enhanced Hierarchical Prediction (MEHP) module performs prediction-aware future-motion refinement via a probabilistic coarse predictor, scale-aligned fusion, and progressive refinement, adaptively selecting scale-relevant cues to mitigate spatial drift. Extensive experiments on the JAAD and PIE benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed MUSCLE-Net achieves competitive performance and consistent gains compared with state-of-the-art trajectory prediction methods.

</details>


### [60] [CodeCytos: AI-assisted spatial molecular imaging analysis via code-augmented agent action space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00472)
*Hung Q. Vo,Huy Q. Vo,Son T. Ly,Zhihao Wan,Anh-Vu Nguyen,Hong Zhao,Jianting Sheng,Stephen T. C. Wong,Hien V. Nguyen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出CodeCytos，一种基于编程的推理代理框架，用于动态、可编程地分析空间分子成像数据，提升自动化程度与定制化能力，无需大量专家标注即可实现高效空间细胞特征探索和生物标志物发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有组织图像分析软件依赖人工干预、缺乏代码驱动自动化、难以扩展且自定义分析能力有限，难以满足复杂空间组织研究需求。

Method: 提出CodeCytos框架，结合具备强编码能力的大语言模型，在最小提示（minimal prompt）设置下，通过引入领域无关的少样本编程推理示例，实现对空间分子成像数据的动态交互与定制分析。

Result: 在四个不同组织类型（额叶皮层、非小细胞肺癌、胰腺、扁桃体）数据集上验证了CodeCytos的有效性；在无任务特异性提示下仍表现优异；领域无关少样本示例显著提升性能；整体优于基线方法。

Conclusion: CodeCytos展示了代码动作代理在空间分子成像中支持定制化特征探索与加速生物标志物发现的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Conventional tissue image analysis software provides foundational capabilities for cellular analysis, including segmentation, basic morphological feature extraction, and spatial organization analysis. However, these tools often require manual intervention and are not well integrated with code-driven automation, limiting efficiency and scalability for complex spatial tissue studies. In addition, they offer limited flexibility for custom analyses, as they typically support only a fixed set of pre-implemented spatial cellular features. To address these limitations, we propose CodeCytos, a coding-based reasoning agent framework that enables dynamic, programmable interaction with spatial molecular imaging data to improve automation and customization. CodeCytos is designed to streamline the exploration of custom spatial cellular features and adapt to diverse research needs. We demonstrate its utility through case studies on four expert-curated datasets from distinct tissue types: frontal cortex, non-small-cell lung cancer, pancreas, and tonsil. We evaluate CodeCytos under a realistic minimal prompt setting, where bioscientists pose simple questions without task-specific instructions or contextual information about spatial cellular analysis, and benchmark multiple LLM backbones with strong coding capabilities. We further show that incorporating tailored, domain-agnostic few-shot in-context coding-reasoning examples (randomly sampled demonstrations outside the spatial analysis domain) can substantially improve performance without requiring costly, expert-crafted in-domain demonstrations. Overall, CodeCytos outperforms baseline approaches, highlighting the potential of code-action agents to assist with custom feature exploration in spatial molecular imaging and to accelerate biomarker discovery.

</details>


### [61] [3D Segment Anything Model with Visual Mamba for Diagnosing Placenta Accreta Spectrum](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00489)
*Yuliang Zhang,Fang He,Lulu Peng,Tianyu Yan,Pingping Zhang,Ting Song,Lili Du,Dunjin Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出3DSAMba框架，结合3D Segment Anything Model与多级聚合Mamba等创新模块，实现基于MRI的胎盘植入谱系（PAS）自动诊断，并发布首个带分割与分类标注的MRI-PAS数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation:  district-level医院缺乏PAS诊断所需的专业知识和资源，亟需自动化、高精度的MRI辅助诊断方法。

Method: 构建首个MRI-based PAS数据集（含细粒度分割与分类标注）；提出3DSAMba框架，包括：1）融入医学先验的3D SAM；2）多级特征聚合的MLAM模块；3）融合编码器-解码器多尺度特征的FSSM模块；4）通过掩码乘法聚焦病变区域。

Result: 实验表明该框架显著提升PAS诊断性能；数据集与代码已开源。

Conclusion: 3DSAMba为PAS早期精准诊断提供了有效、可推广的AI解决方案，并推动基层医疗机构的智能辅助诊断能力。

Abstract: Placenta Accreta Spectrum (PAS) is a rare but highly dangerous obstetric disease. Early and accurate PAS diagnosis is critical for maternal health. Traditional PAS diagnosis relies on experienced doctors by analyzing the cesarean history and Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) data. However, district-level hospitals often lack the expertise and resources for accurate PAS diagnosis. To address these challenges, we establish the first MRI-based PAS dataset, which includes both fine-grained segmentation and classification annotations. Meanwhile, diagnosing PAS can be significantly enhanced by segmenting lesion areas from MRI images of the uterus. To achieve automatic PAS diagnosis, we propose 3DSAMba, a novel feature learning framework for effective lesion segmentation. More specifically, we first design a 3D Segment Anything Model (SAM) and incorporate medical domain information into the model through an efficient adapter mechanism. In addition, we introduce a Multi-Level Aggregation Mamba (MLAM) to aggregate feature maps across different levels and a Fusion State Space Model (FSSM) to fuse multi-scale features from both the encoder and decoder. Finally, we apply segmentation masks to the original MRI images through element-wise multiplication, effectively isolating lesion areas for more accurate PAS diagnosis. Extensive experiments validate that our framework significantly improves the PAS diagnostic performance. To facilitate further research in PAS diagnosis, we have released the dataset and source code at https://github.com/Drchip61/PASD.

</details>


### [62] [Pre-Deployment Robustness Stress Testing for CT Segmentation Systems Using Clinically Motivated Multi-Corruption Augmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00491)
*CholMin Kang,Jonghyun Chung,Amanpreet Kaurb,Nagesh Gulkotwarb,Arthi Sivasankaranb*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出RAMP框架，通过解剖学约束的空间扰动、CT强度变换和随机多损坏组合，在训练中暴露模型于临床合理的图像退化，显著提升CT分割系统在异质临床环境下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习CT分割系统在干净基准图像上表现良好，但在噪声、分辨率下降、对比度变化、强度偏移和伪影等真实临床成像条件下性能易下降，影响实际部署可靠性。

Method: 提出Robustness via Augmented Multi-corruption Pipeline（RAMP），一种面向鲁棒性的增强框架，融合解剖学约束空间扰动、CT强度变换与随机多损坏合成策略。

Result: 在两个CT分割评估场景中，RAMP显著提升退化图像Dice分数（如五器官噪声基准中从0.610升至0.753），大幅缩小干净到退化图像的鲁棒性差距（从0.264降至0.064）；虽未达最高干净图像Dice，但有效缓解严重退化下的最差分割崩溃。

Conclusion: 多损坏增强可作为实用的预部署策略，提升CT分割系统在异质临床环境中的可靠性。

Abstract: Deep learning-based CT segmentation systems often achieve high accuracy on clean benchmark images, but their performance may degrade under heterogeneous clinical imaging conditions such as noise, resolution loss, contrast variation, intensity shift, and artifacts. This instability can limit reliable deployment in real-world medical imaging workflows.
  We propose Robustness via Augmented Multi-corruption Pipeline (RAMP), a robustness-oriented augmentation framework for CT segmentation. RAMP combines anatomically constrained spatial perturbations, CT intensity transformations, and stochastic multi-corruption composition to expose models to clinically plausible image degradation during training.
  Across two CT segmentation evaluation settings, RAMP achieved the strongest corrupted-image performance and the smallest clean-to-corrupted robustness gap. In the five-organ noisy evaluation benchmark, RAMP improved mean corrupted Dice from 0.610 to 0.753 and reduced the robustness gap from 0.264 to 0.064 compared with the nnU-Net baseline. In Abdomen1K, RAMP improved mean corrupted Dice from 0.633 to 0.789 and reduced the robustness gap from 0.290 to 0.070. Although RAMP did not achieve the highest clean-image Dice, it substantially mitigated worst-case segmentation collapse under severe image degradation.
  These results suggest that multi-corruption augmentation can serve as a practical pre-deployment strategy for improving the reliability of CT segmentation systems in heterogeneous clinical environments.

</details>


### [63] [OptiWorld: Optimal Control for Video World Generation under Physical Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00499)
*Yu Yuan,Jianhao Yuan,Xijun Wang,Daiqing Li,Liu He,Lu Ling,Stanley H. Chan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出OptiWorld框架，将经典最优控制引入视频生成，在推理时优化视频中物体的运动轨迹，使其更安全、平滑、高效且物理一致。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成模型主要生成看似合理的运动，但缺乏对底层动力学的主动控制或优化，导致生成轨迹可能存在安全隐患、不平滑、低效或物理不一致等问题。

Method: OptiWorld首先提取紧凑且任务相关的世界状态，然后在物理约束下规划最优轨迹，最后基于该轨迹渲染视频；将规划建模为连续流形上的几何问题，统一融合3D几何与任务相关物理约束。

Result: OptiWorld在目标条件图像到视频生成、视频动力学编辑和反事实生成等多个任务上展现出优越的动力学生成能力。

Conclusion: 通过引入最优控制层，OptiWorld显著提升了视频生成中运动轨迹的物理合理性与任务适应性，为构建可控、可优化的世界模型提供了新范式。

Abstract: Video generation models are becoming a scalable form of world models, but they mainly generate plausible motion rather than proactively control or optimize the underlying dynamics. As a result, an object in the generated video may follow trajectories that are unsafe, not smooth, inefficient, or physically inconsistent. In this work, we propose \textbf{OptiWorld}, a framework that brings classical optimal control into video generation at inference time. OptiWorld first extracts a compact, task-relevant world state, then plans an optimal trajectory under physical constraints, and finally renders the video conditioned on this trajectory. We formulate planning as a geometric problem on a continuous manifold, which converts 3D geometry and task-dependent physical constraints into a unified planning geometry. By adding this optimal-control layer, OptiWorld generates videos with preferable dynamics, demonstrating strong potential in multiple tasks including goal-conditioned image-to-video generation, video dynamics editing, and counterfactual generation.

</details>


### [64] [V-LynX: Token Interface Alignment for Video+X LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00508)
*Jungin Park,Jiyoung Lee,Kwanghoon Sohn*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文发现Video LLMs内部存在视觉token连续流形，并据此提出轻量、无需配对数据的多模态扩展框架V-LynX，在多项视频理解任务上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有Video LLMs多依赖重型模态专用编码器或配对监督，难以高效扩展新模态；本文旨在利用其内在视觉token结构，实现更灵活、低开销的多模态集成。

Method: 提出V-LynX框架，通过在冻结视觉编码器旁引入轻量辅助通路，仅用非配对单模态数据，对齐注意力响应与统计分布，实现新感官输入与视频先验的流形兼容融合。

Result: 在音频-视觉问答、3D推理、高帧率及多视角视频理解等基准上均达到SOTA性能，同时保持高效性与模型完整性。

Conclusion: Video LLMs具备可挖掘的内在token manifold结构，V-LynX验证了无需重训或强监督即可安全、高效扩展其多模态能力的可行性。

Abstract: This study introduces an intriguing phenomenon in Video LLMs: rather than merely translating frames into textual embeddings, Video LLMs establish a continuous manifold, token interface, allowing visual tokens to operate as standalone entities within the architecture. Exploiting this discovery, we propose V-LynX, a scalable framework that integrates novel modalities into Video LLMs by repurposing the internalized interface. Departing from conventional paradigms that necessitate heavy modality-specific encoders or paired supervision, V-LynX employs a lightweight auxiliary pathway in parallel with the frozen vision encoder. Our method integrates new sensory inputs with intrinsic video priors by aligning both attention responses and statistical distributions using unpaired unimodal data sets. This ensures manifold compatibility while preserving the integrity of the Video LLMs. Extensive benchmarks demonstrate that V-LynX achieves SOTA and efficiency across audio-visual QA, 3D reasoning, high-frame-rate, and multi-view video understanding. The code is available at https://github.com/park-jungin/lynx.

</details>


### [65] [Structure-Aware Consistency Priors for Shape from Polarization in Complex Media](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00509)
*Kaimin Yu,Puyun Wang,Huayang He,Xianyu Wu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于结构感知偏振先验和双分支网络（IceSfP）的方法，用于在冰等复杂介质中从单视角偏振图像恢复表面法向量，并构建了首个真实世界冰面SfP数据集，实验表明该方法显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在冰等复杂介质中，光与物质的复杂相互作用导致偏振观测与表面法向之间存在非线性映射，使得单视角偏振图像的表面法向恢复极具挑战性。

Method: 提出基于自相关函数的结构感知偏振先验以捕捉AoLP的局部空间一致性；设计双分支网络IceSfP，通过跨模态注意力和多尺度特征融合整合原始偏振特征与先验信息。

Result: 在首个真实世界冰面SfP数据集上实验表明，该方法在所有指标上均超越现有方法，平均角度误差（MAE）达16.01度，比次优方法低2.74度。

Conclusion: 所提框架为复杂介质中的高精度几何感知提供了一种可泛化的解决方案。

Abstract: Recovering surface normals from single view polarization images in complex media remains challenging. This paper focuses on ice as a representative complex medium, where intricate light matter interactions lead to a nonlinear mapping between polarization observations and surface normals. To address this, a structure-aware polarization prior based on autocorrelation functions is proposed to capture the local spatial consistency of AoLP. Building on this, a dual-branch network (IceSfP) is designed to integrate raw polarization features with priors via cross modal attention and multi-scale feature fusion, enabling accurate surface normal estimation under complex media conditions. To evaluate the method, the first real-world ice SfP dataset is constructed. Experimental results show that the method outperforms existing approaches across all metrics, achieving a MAE of 16.01 deg, which is 2.74 deg lower than the second-best method. The framework provides a generalizable solution for high-precision geometric perception in complex media.

</details>


### [66] [An Effective Solution for the CVPR 2026 8th UG2+ Challenge Track 3: Dynamic Object Segmentation in Turbulence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00522)
*Hongzhen Li,Miao Yu,Leilei Cao,Youwei Pan,Yingfang Zhu,Fengjie Zhu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于湍流环境下动态目标分割（DOST）的新方法，在UG2+挑战赛Track 3中获得第一名。方法基于SegAnyMo框架，引入数据驱动的领域自适应策略（融合DAVIS与DOST数据并施加大气扰动模拟）和时空后处理模块（去除伪前景与噪声，保留小目标及帧间标签一致性）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升模型在严重大气畸变条件下的动态目标分割鲁棒性，应对UG2+挑战赛DOST任务的实际需求。

Method: 1) 数据中心化领域自适应：融合DAVIS与DOST数据，并添加模拟大气波动退化；2) 时空后处理模块：消除边界相连伪前景与瞬时碎片噪声，保持小目标完整性与跨帧标签一致性。

Result: 在UG2+ Challenge 2026 Track 3（DOST）中取得第1名。

Conclusion: 结合强基线SegAnyMo、数据增强式领域自适应与精细化时空后处理，可显著提升湍流场景下动态目标分割的精度与稳定性。

Abstract: In this work, we present our solution for the 8th UG2+ Challenge (CVPR 2026) Track 3: Dynamic Object Segmentation in Turbulence (DOST). Our method is built upon the strong baseline framework Segment Any Motion (SegAnyMo), which provides powerful mask generation and motion tracking capabilities. To further boost the segmentation performance under severe atmospheric distortions, we propose two key improvements. First, we employ a data-centric domain adaptation strategy. We significantly expand our training data by incorporating selected sequences from the DAVIS dataset alongside a subset of the DOST dataset, and apply simulated atmospheric fluctuation degradations to enhance the model's robustness against complex geometric distortions. Second, we introduce a spatio-temporal post-processing module. This refinement step effectively removes persistent boundary-connected false foregrounds and short-lived fragmented noise, while strictly preserving genuine small targets and maintaining original individual labels across frames. With these combined strategies, our proposed method ranks the 2st place in the challenge.

</details>


### [67] [ETC: Extreme Token Compression via Task-aware Visual Information Distillation in VLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00543)
*Yiling Gao,Hongchen Wei,Zhenzhong Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种极端令牌压缩（ETC）框架，通过变分信息蒸馏原理，在大幅减少视觉令牌数量的同时，保留任务相关的关键视觉信息，从而降低高分辨率图像在视觉-语言模型中的计算与KV缓存开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高分辨率图像在视觉-语言模型中生成大量视觉token，导致推理时计算成本和KV缓存开销过高。

Method: 基于信息论，提出ETC框架：利用文本到图像的跨注意力机制加权原始视觉特征，近似指令感知的预测充分统计量；再通过变分信息蒸馏使压缩表征能恢复该统计量。

Result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B和Qwen3-VL-2B上验证有效，即使仅保留单个token仍保持强任务性能，显著降低KV缓存开销。

Conclusion: ETC实现了在极高压缩比下兼顾效率与性能，为高分辨率VLM推理提供了高效可行的信息保留压缩范式。

Abstract: In Vision-Language Models (VLMs), high-resolution images produce a large number of visual tokens, resulting in high computational costs and KV-cache overhead during inference. To address this problem, we propose an Extreme Token Compression (ETC) framework that minimizes task loss when reducing the number of input tokens based on the principle of variational information distillation. Specifically, from an information-theoretic perspective, we show that minimizing task loss requires the compact representation to preserve the instruction-aware sufficient statistic of the task-relevant visual information for prediction. In practice, ETC leverages text-to-image cross-attention to weight the original visual features to approximate the latent instruction-aware predictive statistic. Moreover, ETC introduces a variational information distillation, enabling the compact representation to preserve the essential information to recover this predictive statistic. Experiments on LLaVA-1.5-7B and Qwen3-VL-2B show that ETC remains effective even under single-token compression, substantially reducing KV-cache overhead while retaining strong task performance.

</details>


### [68] [CAFOSat: A Strongly Annotated Dataset for Infrastructure-Aware CAFO Mapping Using High-Resolution Imagery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00548)
*Oishee Bintey Hoque,Nibir Chandra Mandal,Mandy L Wilson,Samarth Swarup,Madhav Marathe,Abhijin Adiga*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文介绍了CAFOSat，一个用于美国集中动物饲养场（CAFO）遥感制图的强标注、基础设施感知数据集，结合多源清单与AI辅助标注流程提升标注质量，并通过合成增强和多样化模型基准测试推动农业基础设施监测研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模从遥感影像中精准识别CAFO面临基础设施布局异质、位置记录噪声大、标注不一致及清单不全等挑战，亟需高质量、基础设施感知的数据集支撑。

Method: 构建CAFOSat数据集：融合NAIP高分辨率影像与多州CAFO清单，采用AI辅助标注、GradCAM定位和几何聚类优化弱地理标注；引入土地覆盖引导采样与空间排除约束筛选难负样本；人工验证提供 barn、粪污池、放牧相关等细粒度基础设施标注；设计基础设施感知合成增强流水线。

Result: CAFOSat包含20个州、4类主要CAFO的超45,000个图像块；在多种CNN、Transformer及视觉语言模型上验证了精炼标注与难负样本对分类性能与泛化能力的显著提升；合成增强提升了模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: CAFOSat为基础设施感知的农业遥感监测提供了首个大规模、高质量基准数据集，推动CAFO自动识别与环境健康风险评估的研究与应用。

Abstract: Concentrated Animal Feeding Operations (CAFOs) play an important role in agricultural production but are also associated with environmental, public health, and disease surveillance concerns. Large-scale mapping of CAFOs from remote sensing imagery remains challenging due to heterogeneous infrastructure layouts, noisy location records, inconsistent annotations, and incomplete inventories. We introduce CAFOSat, a strongly annotated, infrastructure-aware dataset for CAFO mapping across the United States. CAFOSat integrates high-resolution National Agriculture Imagery Program (NAIP) imagery with multi-source CAFO inventories collected across multiple states and transforms weak geolocation records into refined annotations through a human-in-the-loop pipeline combining AI-assisted annotation, GradCAM-based localization, and geometric clustering. To improve dataset quality, we curate challenging negative samples using land-cover-guided sampling with spatial exclusion constraints and provide infrastructure-level annotations, including barns, manure ponds, and grazing-related features, through manual verification. The resulting dataset contains more than 45,000 image patches spanning 20 states and four major CAFO categories. We benchmark a diverse set of convolutional, transformer-based, and vision-language models, demonstrating the value of refined annotations and curated negative samples for CAFO classification and generalization. In addition, we introduce a synthetic augmentation pipeline that generates infrastructure-aware variations to increase training diversity and improve robustness under distribution shifts. CAFOSat provides a large-scale benchmark for advancing infrastructure-aware agricultural monitoring and CAFO mapping from high-resolution remote sensing imagery.

</details>


### [69] [Improving Visual Grounding in Remote Sensing via Cluster-Guided Refinement and Model Ensemble Voting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00556)
*Panav Shah,Geet Sethi,Ashutosh Gandhe*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出两种视觉定位优化流程（SGR和CGR），结合遥感专用模型RemoteSAM与通用分割模型SAM3，并引入六模型集成策略，显著提升遥感图像中复杂、小目标、多尺度场景下的定位精度与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感图像视觉定位面临场景复杂、目标小、尺度变化大等挑战，单一模型难以全面应对。

Method: 提出Sequential Grounding Refinement（SGR）和Cluster-Aware Grounding Refinement（CGR）两种流程，先用RemoteSAM获取初始定位，再用SAM3进行精细化分割；并构建基于多数投票的六模型集成框架。

Result: 所提单流程及集成方法在定位精度和鲁棒性上均优于各单独模型。

Conclusion: 融合专用与通用模型的分阶段精化策略，配合多模型集成，可有效提升遥感图像视觉定位性能。

Abstract: Visual grounding aims to locate image regions that correspond to natural language descriptions and is a key component of interpretable vision systems. In remote sensing imagery, grounding is particularly challenging due to complex scenes, small objects, and large variations in scale. Relying on a single model is often insufficient to address these diverse challenges. In this work, we propose two grounding pipelines, Sequential Grounding Refinement (SGR) and Cluster-Aware Grounding Refinement (CGR), that combine the complementary strengths of RemoteSAM, a visual grounding model specialized for remote sensing, and SAM3, a powerful general-purpose segmentation model. Our approach first uses RemoteSAM to obtain an initial estimate of object location, which is then refined using SAM3 to produce more accurate and spatially consistent segmentations. Additionally, we explore an ensemble strategy based on majority voting across six diverse grounding pipelines, each with distinct capabilities. This multi-model framework improves robustness and significantly enhances localization accuracy. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed pipelines and ensemble approach outperform individual models, leading to more reliable and precise visual grounding predictions.

</details>


### [70] [DeepLatent: Think with Images via Parallel Latent Visual Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00562)
*Dongchen Lu,Zhimo Li,Mao Shu,Huo Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出DeepLatent框架，通过并行生成上下文条件的潜在视觉状态和连续空间强化学习优化潜在调制参数，显著提升视觉语言模型在‘图像思考’范式下的推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有‘图像思考’方法存在高延迟、操作类型受限（工具辅助法）或潜在表征质量差、性能不足（潜在推理法）的问题，亟需更高效、更鲁棒的潜在视觉推理框架。

Method: 提出DeepLatent：1）LatentFormer，使用可学习2D token并行生成锚定于原始图像特征的潜在状态；2）连续空间强化学习算法，在嵌入空间直接优化潜在调制参数；训练采用知识蒸馏+该RL算法；并构建大规模数据集DeepLatent-180K。

Result: 在多个基准测试中达到SOTA性能，验证了框架在潜在视觉推理任务上的有效性与先进性。

Conclusion: DeepLatent为‘思考以图像’提供了高效、可扩展且高质量的潜在推理新范式，兼顾效率与表征能力，推动视觉语言模型向更深层视觉理解迈进。

Abstract: The emerging paradigm of "thinking with images" embeds visual states into intermediate reasoning steps, defining a new frontier for Vision-Language Models. Existing approaches diverge along two lines. Tool-assisted methods apply explicit visual operations but suffer from high latency and restricted manipulation types. Latent reasoning methods autoregressively produce implicit visual states, but underperform tool-assisted methods, and their latent tokens fail to capture effective visual information. In this work, we propose DeepLatent, a parallel framework for latent visual reasoning. First, we introduce LatentFormer. It uses learnable 2D tokens to generate context-conditioned latent states in parallel, anchoring every visual update directly in the original image features. Second, we design a continuous-space reinforcement learning algorithm. It optimizes latent modulation parameters directly in the embedding space, significantly improving latent representation quality. The framework is trained via knowledge distillation followed by this continuous-space RL algorithm. Furthermore, we contribute DeepLatent-180K, a large-scale dataset tailored for latent visual reasoning. Extensive evaluations across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DeepLatent achieves state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [71] [Decomposed On-Policy Distillation for Vision-Language Reasoning: Steering Gradients for Visual Grounding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00564)
*Hee Suk Yoon,Eunseop Yoon,Jaehyun Jang,SooHwan Eom,Ji Woo Hong,Mark Hasegawa-Johnson,Qi Dai,Chong Luo,Chang D. Yoo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出视觉梯度引导（VGS）方法，通过分解VLM蒸馏损失为语言先验和视觉定位两部分，并利用其梯度近似正交的特性，动态重定向更新方向以优先优化视觉子空间，从而提升多模态推理中视觉定位能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于策略的多模态蒸馏方法将视觉语言模型（VLM）蒸馏视为单一整体优化问题，忽略了语言先验与视觉定位在优化目标上的内在差异；作者发现二者梯度近似正交，表明标准优化隐式妥协，而视觉定位可能是主要瓶颈。

Method: 将VLM蒸馏损失数学分解为语言先验和视觉定位两个独立分量；分析其梯度正交性；提出Visual Gradient Steering（VGS），在每次更新中动态投影并增强视觉方向的梯度分量，以显式优先优化视觉接地能力。

Result: 在多个蒸馏设置和复杂多模态基准上，VGS显著优于标准单体蒸馏方法，在保持极小训练开销的同时，显著提升视觉定位性能和整体多模态推理能力。

Conclusion: 将VLM蒸馏解耦建模并主动引导视觉梯度方向是更有效的策略；VGS验证了显式优化视觉子空间可突破传统蒸馏的性能瓶颈，为多模态小模型训练提供新范式。

Abstract: While on-policy distillation offers dense supervision for training small reasoning models, its optimization dynamics in the multimodal domain remain under-explored. In this work, we challenge the standard monolithic view of Vision-Language Model (VLM) distillation by mathematically decomposing the loss into two distinct components: the language prior and visual grounding. Our analysis uncovers that gradient vectors for these components are nearly orthogonal, indicating that the objective of aligning with the teacher's language distribution is geometrically independent from the objective of matching its visual perception. Consequently, standard optimization passively follows a suboptimal compromise trajectory that implicitly balances the two objectives. Hypothesizing that visual grounding constitutes the primary bottleneck for vision-language reasoning, we introduce Visual Gradient Steering (VGS), a method that dynamically reorients the update vector to prioritize the visual subspace. Experimental results on multiple distillation settings and complex multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that VGS significantly outperforms the standard monolithic formulation of on-policy distillation, achieving superior grounding with minimal training overhead.

</details>


### [72] [Improving Visual Representation Alignment Generation with GRPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00583)
*Shentong Mo,Sukmin Yun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出VRPO，一种基于强化学习的表示对齐优化策略，用于提升扩散Transformer的训练效率和生成质量。VRPO用动态奖励机制替代静态对齐损失，综合生成保真度、感知质量和语义一致性来引导特征对齐，在ImageNet-256上显著提升收敛速度与FID指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散Transformer因生成表征与判别表征对齐弱而导致训练低效；REPA等方法虽引入外部监督对齐，但其静态对齐损失缺乏训练/推理过程中的自适应能力，无法动态权衡表征一致性与生成质量。

Method: 提出VRPO（Generative Representation Policy Optimization），将表征对齐建模为奖励驱动的强化学习过程：以生成保真度、感知质量及扩散特征与预训练视觉嵌入间的语义一致性作为动态奖励信号，指导扩散模型优化内部表征。该方法可无缝集成到SiT/DiT架构中，计算开销极小。

Result: 在ImageNet-256x256上，VRPO-Alignment相比REPA在相同计算预算下实现最高+1.8 FID提升和2.3倍训练加速。

Conclusion: VRPO通过任务自适应的强化学习对齐机制，有效弥合了生成与判别表征之间的鸿沟，在不牺牲架构兼容性与效率的前提下，显著提升了扩散Transformer的训练效率与图像生成质量。

Abstract: Recent diffusion transformers have demonstrated strong image synthesis capabilities but remain inefficient to train due to weak alignment between generative and discriminative representations. While representation alignment frameworks such as REPA improve convergence by aligning noisy denoising features with pretrained visual encoders, their externally supervised alignment loss is static and lacks adaptivity during training and inference. Existing methods rely on fixed cosine alignment or contrastive objectives, which cannot dynamically balance representation consistency and generation quality, resulting in limited discriminative benefit and failing to optimize alignment in a task-adaptive manner. To address this, we propose VRPO, a reinforcement-based optimization strategy that replaces REPA's static alignment loss with a generative representation policy optimization objective. Instead of enforcing a fixed similarity constraint, VRPO treats representation alignment as a reward-guided process: the model receives adaptive rewards based on generation fidelity, perceptual quality, and semantic coherence between the diffusion features and pretrained visual embeddings. This formulation enables the generator to continuously refine its internal representations toward semantically meaningful directions while improving image quality. Our VRPO-driven training seamlessly integrates into diffusion transformers, introducing negligible computation cost and preserving full compatibility with SiT and DiT architectures. Extensive experiments on ImageNet-256x256 demonstrate that our VRPO-Alignment substantially enhances both convergence and fidelity, achieving up to +1.8 FID improvement and 2.3x faster training compared to REPA under identical compute budgets.

</details>


### [73] [Response-Aware Multimodal Learning for Post-Treatment Visual Acuity Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00588)
*Phuoc-Nguyen Bui,Van-Vi Vo,Duc-Tai Le,Van-Nguyen Pham,Ki-Young Kim,Seung-Young Yu,Hyunseung Choo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出ReVA框架，利用基线和1个月OCT图像及临床变量，预测糖尿病黄斑水肿患者3至24个月的视力变化轨迹，实现高精度多时间点视力预后预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 临床中医生需仅凭早期治疗反应估计DME患者长期视力预后，但现有OCT学习方法多聚焦短期响应或单终点预测，缺乏对多时间点视力轨迹的建模能力。

Method: 构建含188例真实世界DME患者的队列，采集基线与1月OCT图像及表格型生物标志物与临床变量；提出ReVA——一种响应感知的多模态框架，融合空间注意力机制提取OCT局部结构特征与依赖感知的表格编码器建模临床变量交互，并进行多时间点（3/6/12/18/24月）视力预测。

Result: ReVA在24个月视力预测上达到MAE=0.1246、RMSE=0.1621、R²=0.6064，且在所有预测时间点均保持稳定性能。

Conclusion: 仅使用早期OCT与临床数据即可实现有意义的长期视力轨迹预测，为抗VEGF治疗提供数据驱动的临床决策支持。

Abstract: Long-term visual acuity (VA) outcomes after anti-VEGF therapy are central to patient counseling, expectation setting, and follow-up planning in diabetic macular edema (DME). However, in clinical practice, physicians must often estimate long-term visual trajectories based only on early post-treatment findings, making reliable prognostication difficult. Although prior OCT-based learning approaches have largely focused on short-term response or single-endpoint prediction, modeling VA trajectories across multiple future time points from early longitudinal observations remains insufficiently explored.
