Abstract: Water research in Brazil largely overlooks the widespread damming of small streams for agricultural uses such as watering cattle, farm-scale hydropower, irrigation, and aquaculture. These ubiquitous dams and their reservoirs can alter water temperature, stream connectivity, aquatic habitats, greenhouse gas emissions, and evaporative water losses. Mapping small reservoirs is challenging because it requires reliably detecting small water bodies and distinguishing artificial reservoirs from natural lakes. As a result, most regional and global datasets exclude them. To address this gap, we trained a deep learning computer vision model to accurately segment small ($< 1 km^2$), stream-fed, surface water reservoirs in Brazil leveraging data from Landsat 5-9. Applying our model from 1984 to 2025, we created annual reservoir maps for the entire country to evaluate how their count, size, and distribution have changed over time. The number of detected reservoirs grew nearly fourfold from 263,913 to 996,245, while their total surface area increased from 3510 $km^2$ to 8550 $km^2$. To our knowledge, this is the first country-wide annual dataset representing the evolution of small reservoirs over four decades. The publicly available annual maps highlight the extent and cumulative impacts of the small stream impoundments across Brazil, providing actionable insights for managing freshwater ecosystems and water resources.

</details>


### [777] [Limits of Resolution Equivariance in Fourier Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00677)
*Alex Colagrande,Paul Caillon,Eva Feillet,Alexandre Allauzen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了傅里叶神经算子（FNO）在不同空间分辨率下的泛化能力，发现直接在细网格上推理并不总优于先在粗网格推理再上采样的基线方法，并揭示了非线性混叠是阻碍零样本分辨率等变性的关键障碍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 验证傅里叶神经算子（FNO）是否真正具备跨分辨率泛化能力，尤其是训练于粗网格、部署于细网格时的表现。

Method: 对比两种推理策略：直接在细网格S上运行FNO vs. 在训练粗网格s上运行后通过傅里叶零填充上采样至S；并分析各层频谱特性及能量分布。

Result: 在Darcy流任务中，直接细网格推理效果不稳定，有时差于粗网格+上采样基线；中间特征在傅里叶截断下能量持续向低频集中，高频输出主要由后期非线性/解码头生成。

Conclusion: FNO的跨分辨率性能受限于非线性混叠问题，粗网格推理加简单上采样是一个被低估但强效的基线；提升零样本分辨率等变性需重点解决非线性阶段引入的混叠。

Abstract: Fourier Neural Operators are often assumed to generalize across spatial resolutions, enabling training on a coarse grid and deployment on a finer grid. We test this assumption by contrasting two inference-time choices when moving from training resolution $s$ to test resolution $S>s$: running FNO directly at $S$, or running at $s$ and upsampling the prediction to $S$ via Fourier zero-padding. On Darcy flow, we observe that direct fine-grid inference is not reliably beneficial and can be worse than the low-grid-plus-upsampling baseline. We further analyze layerwise spectra and find that, under Fourier truncation, intermediate representations increasingly concentrate energy in low frequencies, with high-frequency output produced mainly by late nonlinear/decoder stages. This offers a mechanistic explanation for why FNO can perform well while retaining few modes, yet remain sensitive under resolution shifts. Our findings highlight a simple but strong baseline for cross-resolution evaluation and point to nonlinear aliasing as a key obstacle to zero-shot resolution equivariance.

</details>


### [778] [Prior-Guided Multi-Omic Transformers for Single-Cell Gene Regulatory Network Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00685)
*Tianyang Xu,Tianci Liu,Niraj Rayamajhi,Ryan Patrick,Kranthi Varala,Ying Li,Jing Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EpiAwareNet 是一种基于多组学Transformer的基因调控网络（GRN）重构方法，利用轻量级生物学先验（如bulk GRN）和基因-峰交叉注意力机制，从稀疏的单细胞ATAC-seq与RNA-seq配对数据中学习数据驱动的调控关系，显著提升重建准确性与生物学合理性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单细胞ATAC-seq数据极度稀疏，且现有方法依赖固定峰-基因映射和弱监督，难以准确重建GRN。

Method: EpiAwareNet分两阶段：Stage 1使用基因-峰交叉注意力模块学习联合表征，实现基因特异性的可学习信号聚合；Stage 2引入bulk来源的GRN先验作为带噪声的正样本，提供弱监督并增强鲁棒性。

Result: 在多个基准上优于单/多组学方法，显著提升已知调控互作的恢复率，生成的GRN更具生物学合理性。

Conclusion: 轻量级bulk先验结合自适应跨模态表征学习，可有效指导单细胞GRN推断，无需强标注或硬编码假设。

Abstract: Gene regulatory networks (GRNs) capture transcription factor-target interactions and are central to understanding cell-state regulation and disease. Reconstructing GRNs from paired single-cell transcriptomic and chromatin accessibility data is promising but challenging: scATAC is extremely sparse, and most methods rely on fixed peak-to-gene links and weak supervision. We present EpiAwareNet, a prior-guided multi-omic Transformer framework that reconstructs GRNs from paired single-cell data using only lightweight biological priors. In Stage 1, EpiAwareNet learns joint gene-peak representations with a gene-peak cross-attention module, enabling data-driven, gene-specific aggregation of accessibility signals rather than hard-coded peak-to-gene assignments. In Stage 2, EpiAwareNet incorporates a bulk-derived GRN prior as noisy positive edges to provide weak supervision under label scarcity, refining regulatory scores while remaining robust to prior noise. In our experiments, EpiAwareNet improves GRN reconstruction over representative single- and multi-omic baselines and yields GRNs with greater biological plausibility, such as improved recovery of known regulatory interactions, suggesting that lightweight biological priors from bulk data can effectively guide single-cell GRN inference when combined with adaptive cross-modal representation learning. Code and data will be available at https://github.com/tianyang-x/EpiAwareNet_pub.

</details>


### [779] [Dialectics of Alignment: Harnessing Unsafe Knowledge for Dynamic Safety Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00686)
*Maryam Hashemzadeh,Jerry Huang,Minseon Kim,Marc-Alexandre Côté,Sarath Chandar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SafeMoE框架，通过将不安全知识隔离到特定LoRA专家中，并利用轻量级门控网络动态调度，实现安全与信息性的协同提升，挑战了传统对不安全数据简单过滤的范式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM对齐方法依赖删除或拒绝不安全数据，导致模型过度保守、响应空泛，限制了其认知广度和实用性；作者认为不安全数据本身蕴含重要领域知识，应被可控利用而非简单舍弃。

Method: 提出SafeMoE：一种基于Mixture-of-Experts的对齐框架，将不安全语料训练的领域专用LoRA作为专家，用极小规模高质量安全响应数据训练轻量门控网络，在推理时动态协调各专家以兼顾安全性与信息性。

Result: 在严格安全基准测试中，SafeMoE安全响应率相对提升超20%（绝对提升超15%），同时生成更富信息量的回答；门控机制具备强零样本跨域泛化能力。

Conclusion: 真正的对齐安全不应靠掩盖不安全知识，而在于对其受控整合；SafeMoE标志着从‘数据擦除’到‘知识辩证利用’的范式转变。

Abstract: The prevailing paradigm in large language model (LLM) alignment operates via erasure, filtering unsafe data or training models to strictly refuse harmful prompts. While effective at reducing immediate toxicity, this approach fundamentally constricts the model's epistemological scope, resulting in over-cautious systems that output uninformative blanket refusals to sensitive yet benign queries. In this work, we challenge the orthodoxy that unsafe data must be discarded. We propose a dialectical approach to alignment, positing that unsafe data encodes rich, domain specific knowledge critical for nuanced, safe, and informative generation. To operationalize this, we introduce SafeMoE, a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) framework that isolates unsafe knowledge into domain-specific Low-Rank Adapters (LoRA experts) trained exclusively on harmful corpora. To synthesize safety from these unsafe primitives, we train a lightweight gating network using a minimal, highly curated set of safe-informative responses. During inference, this router dynamically orchestrates the unsafe experts, effectively steering the generation trajectory to harness their deep domain knowledge while strictly enforcing safety constraints. Extensive empirical evaluations across stringent safety benchmarks demonstrate that SafeMoE is not only safer, achieving over a 20% relative improvement in safe response rate (more than a 15% absolute gain), but also produces more informative responses when safety and harmfulness are of paramount concern. Furthermore, the routing mechanism exhibits strong zero-shot generalization to unseen domains and broader safety tasks without domain-specific supervision. Our findings suggest a paradigm shift in alignment: true safety requires not the masking of unsafe knowledge, but its controlled integration.

</details>


### [780] [DistMatch: Adaptive Binning via Distribution Matching for Robust Sequential Conformal Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00690)
*Enver Menadjiev,Jihyeon Seong,Jisu Yeo,Jaesik Choi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DistMatch is a binning-based sequential conformal prediction method that recursively partitions residuals using the KS statistic to achieve approximate exchangeability, avoiding reweighting and improving robustness to distributional shifts in time series.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Sequential conformal prediction assumes residual exchangeability, which is often violated in real-world time series due to temporal dependencies and distributional shifts; existing reweighting methods struggle to identify optimal weights.

Method: DistMatch recursively partitions residuals within a binary tree using the Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) statistic to induce approximately exchangeable leaves, then applies quantile regression with online updates within each leaf for locally adaptive inference.

Result: DistMatch outperforms existing sequential CP methods in extensive experiments, showing improved robustness to distributional shifts.

Conclusion: DistMatch provides a theoretically grounded, reweighting-free approach to sequential conformal prediction that enhances validity and adaptability in non-exchangeable time series settings.

Abstract: Sequential conformal prediction (CP) provides valid uncertainty quantification under the assumption of residual exchangeability. However, this assumption is often violated in real-world time series due to temporal dependencies and distributional shifts. While recent methods attempt to approximate exchangeability through reweighting, identifying optimal weights remains an open challenge. To address this limitation, we propose DistMatch, a binning-based method that recursively partitions residuals within a binary tree using the Kolmogorov-Smirnov (KS) statistic. We theoretically show that this partitioning induces approximately exchangeable leaves, thereby avoiding the need for reweighting. By applying quantile regression with online updates within each leaf, DistMatch enables locally adaptive inference and improves robustness to distributional shifts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DistMatch outperforms existing sequential CP methods.

</details>


### [781] [COPF: An Online Framework for Deployment-Stable Counterfactual Fairness in Evolving Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00700)
*Sheng'en Li,Dongmian Zou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出COPF框架，用于在线链接推荐中实现部署稳定的公平性监控与控制，通过定义基于曝光的反事实机会差距、显式探索与倾向得分日志来估计这些差距，并利用图感知双重稳健估计器进行公平性审计与控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在线链接推荐系统具有表现性（performative），即推荐策略会影响用户行为和后续反馈，导致基于日志数据的公平性估计在部署后可能失效或漂移。

Method: 提出COPF框架：（i）定义基于曝光的群体级反事实机会差距；（ii）通过显式探索与记录候选链接被展示的倾向得分（propensity）使其可估计；（iii）使用残差结果不可区分性（Residual-OI）及图感知双重稳健（GA-DR）估计器，在可配置的审计器族上进行公平性审计与控制，并设计在线多校准审计器与原始对偶控制器。

Result: 在两个TGB数据流和一个可控合成二部图数据流上的实验表明，COPF能显著降低暴露反事实群体差异的最坏情况峰值，同时对排序效用影响较小。

Conclusion: COPF为动态图上的在线链接推荐提供了一种理论有保障、实践有效的部署稳定公平性控制方法，兼顾公平性与实用性。

Abstract: Online link recommendation on evolving graphs is performative: by choosing which candidate links to show users, the system changes which links form and what feedback it later observes. Consequently, fairness estimates from logged outcomes can be misleading and may drift after deployment when the recommendation policy is updated. We introduce COPF (Counterfactual Online Performative Fairness), a decision-layer framework for deployment-stable fairness monitoring and control in online link recommendation. COPF (i) defines group-level opportunity gaps over exposure (shown vs. not shown) counterfactuals, (ii) makes them estimable by explicit exploration and by logging the probability (propensity) that each candidate is shown, and (iii) audits and controls fairness using residual outcome indistinguishability (OI) over a configurable auditor family with graph-aware doubly robust (GA-DR) estimators. We provide a noisy transfer theorem showing that Residual-OI on estimated GA-DR residuals implies bounds on exposure-counterfactual group gaps under temporal mixing and bounded local interference, and we instantiate an online multicalibration auditor together with a primal-dual controller. Experiments on two TGB streams and a controlled synthetic bipartite stream show that COPF reduces worst-case spikes in exposure-counterfactual group disparities with modest impact on ranking utility. Our code is available at https://github.com/lsnnnnnnnn/COPF.

</details>


### [782] [Graph Transfer Learning via Shared Latent Geometry: Theory and Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00716)
*Tong Wu,Andrew Campbell,Anna Scaglione*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种非对称双通路架构，通过教师编码器（利用高保真仿真器的密集状态）和学生编码器（从稀疏场数据学习），实现物理系统在拓扑与算子变化下的零样本迁移推理与控制，并提供可验证的误差界和有限样本认证协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统物理系统部署中，状态估计、逆问题求解等依赖数值优化，计算开销大；而物理信息学习虽将成本前置至训练阶段，但单编码路径在微调后会破坏潜在几何结构，且缺乏定量迁移保证。

Method: 设计非对称双通路架构：教师编码器提取对谱扰动稳定的算子多项式特征；学生编码器从稀疏场数据和算子描述中学习相同潜在几何；部署时仅使用冻结的学生编码器进行单次前向推理，并基于Wasserstein距离建立潜在分布邻近性条件以支撑零样本迁移与认证。

Result: 在电力系统状态估计任务中，实现对100种未见拓扑的零样本迁移，认证通过率达95%，精度媲美拓扑感知的牛顿-拉夫逊法，推理耗时低于1毫秒。

Conclusion: 非对称双通路结合算子锚定的潜在几何，为物理系统的可认证零样本推理与控制提供了新基础。

Abstract: Inference and control in engineered physical systems pay a heavy physics cost at deployment: state estimators, inverse-problem solvers, model-predictive controllers, schedulers, and observers are often not closed-form and must re-solve a numerical optimization per instance, with the operator re-supplied each time. Physics-informed learning moves this cost to training, but uses a single encoder pathway whose latent geometry de-learns under fine-tuning and admits no quantitative transfer guarantee. We propose an asymmetric two-pathway architecture that resolves both issues. A teacher encoder consumes privileged dense states from a high-fidelity simulator and represents the system through operator-polynomial features stable under spectral perturbation; a student encoder learns the same latent geometry from sparse field data and operator descriptors. At deployment the teacher is discarded, and the frozen student runs in a single forward pass with a transfer certificate. The design connects to privileged-information learning, knowledge distillation, and cross-modal distillation, but targets cross-instance transfer rather than fixed-instance prediction: topology and operator may change, while the latent task does not. We establish sufficient and near-necessary transfer conditions via Wasserstein proximity between latent laws, yielding a zero-shot error bound, and develop a finite-sample certification protocol with active expansion when coverage is incomplete. The framework applies wherever a system admits an operator with reportable spectrum. On power-system estimation, it achieves zero-shot transfer to 100 unseen topologies, a 95% certificate pass rate, accuracy competitive with topology-aware Newton--Raphson, and sub-millisecond inference. These results suggest asymmetric pathways plus operator-anchored latent geometry provide a foundation for certified zero-shot inference and control.

</details>


### [783] [Multi-Agent Conformal Prediction with Personalized Statistical Validity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00717)
*Martin V. Vejling,Christophe A. N. Biscio,Adrien Mazoyer,Petar Popovski,Shashi Raj Pandey*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出个性化联邦加权共形预测（PFWCP）框架，通过局部密度比加权与加权分位数聚合解决多智能体场景下数据异质性、隐私保护和校准数据不足等问题，提供每个参与方的渐近有效覆盖保证，并支持单次通信协议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共形预测在高风险机器学习任务中至关重要，但在本地校准数据有限、隐私约束强及数据异质性场景下面临挑战；现有联邦共形预测方法难以同时满足各智能体个体有效性与异质环境下的统计保证。

Method: 提出个性化联邦加权共形预测（PFWCP），融合局部密度比加权与加权分位数聚合，实现异质性校正与隐私保护；理论推导了加权共形预测下覆盖方差的调整形式（由有效样本量决定），并支持单次通信协议。

Result: 在合成与真实数据集上，PFWCP相比现有联邦共形预测基线显著提升校准质量；理论证明其对每个参与智能体均具有渐近有效的边际覆盖与校准条件覆盖保证。

Conclusion: PFWCP为多智能体联邦学习中的不确定性量化提供了兼顾个体有效性、隐私保护与异质鲁棒性的新范式，拓展了加权共形预测的理论边界与实用价值。

Abstract: Uncertainty quantification is essential in high-stakes machine learning tasks. However, one of the principled solutions, conformal prediction, faces challenges under limited local calibration data, privacy constraints, and data heterogeneity. In multi-agent settings, existing works do not simultaneously and satisfactorily address these challenges with guarantees either limited to averages across agents or losing validity in heterogeneous settings. Hence, we propose personalized federated weighted conformal prediction (PFWCP), a framework that combines local density ratio weighting with weighted quantile aggregation to correct for heterogeneity while preserving privacy. The method yields asymptotically valid marginal and calibration-conditional coverage guarantees for each participating agent and supports protocols with one-shot communication. Theoretical analysis presents an adjustment to the coverage variance, governed by an effective sample size expression, which is necessary in the context of weighted conformal prediction, and experiments on synthetic and real datasets show improved calibration quality over state-of-the-art federated conformal baselines.

</details>


### [784] [SORA: Free Second-Order Attacks in Fast Adversarial Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00738)
*Mazdak Teymourian,Ramtin Moslemi,Farzan Rahmani,Mohammad Hossein Rohban*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SORA方法，通过引入扰动可变性和PertAlign指标预测并防止对抗训练中的灾难性过拟合（CO），在保持高鲁棒性的同时提升干净样本准确率和训练效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决高效单步对抗训练中常见的灾难性过拟合问题，即对多步攻击的鲁棒性突然崩溃。

Method: 提出Epsilon Overfitting视角，设计PertAlign指标衡量梯度对齐程度以预测CO，并基于此构建自适应步长对抗训练方法SORA。

Result: SORA能稳定防止CO，在多个数据集和模型上达到SOTA鲁棒性与更高干净准确率，且仅需一套固定超参数，具备良好泛化性与计算效率。

Conclusion: 扰动可变性和几何感知的自适应调整是提升对抗训练鲁棒泛化能力的关键，SORA为高效鲁棒训练提供了实用新范式。

Abstract: Adversarial Training (AT) is a leading defense against adversarial examples but often suffers from Catastrophic Overfitting (CO) in efficient single-step variants, where robustness to multi-step attacks collapses despite high single-step performance. We address this failure mode with two contributions. First, we formalize Epsilon Overfitting (EO), a perspective in which fixed perturbation magnitudes and directions exacerbate CO, and show that introducing perturbation variability significantly improves robust generalization across different architectures and datasets. Second, we propose PertAlign (Perturbation Alignment), a theoretically grounded, computationally negligible metric that predicts CO onset by measuring gradient alignment across attack stages. Leveraging these insights, we introduce SORA, an adaptive step-size AT method that dynamically adjusts perturbations based on loss surface geometry. SORA consistently prevents CO, achieves state-of-the-art robustness and clean accuracy, and generalizes across datasets and architectures using a single fixed set of hyperparameters, which is essential for applicability in fast AT. Extensive experiments on diverse datasets and architectures show that SORA matches or surpasses the robustness of prior methods while delivering higher clean accuracy and superior efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/SecondOrderAT/SORA.

</details>


### [785] [Score $\times$ Decoder: A Unified View of Unsupervised Inference-Time Scaling for Hallucination Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00739)
*Yun-Chen Cheng,Che-Yu Lin,Cheng-Lin Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了在无监督条件下，如何利用基础大语言模型自身的内在信号来识别和生成正确答案，通过评估多种评分方法与解码策略的组合效果，发现自验证（self-verification）配合虚拟思考前缀表现最优，但评分效果依赖于所选解码方式及模型能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型即使在参数内包含正确答案时仍会幻觉，而现有最有效的推理时扩缩方法依赖有监督的验证器或奖励模型；本文旨在探索仅使用基础语言模型时，何种内在信号最能识别正确输出，以及如何最优解码。

Method: 构建评分×解码策略的网格：4种评分（困惑度、对比分数、幂分布似然、自验证） × 3类解码（优化、采样、共识），在MATH500数据集上系统评测基础版与指令微调版Qwen3-1.7B的表现；其中自验证引入训练无关的虚拟思考前缀以增强性能。

Result: 自验证在多数设置下表现最佳，尤其在加入虚拟思考前缀后显著提升；但所有评分的效果均非固定，而是高度依赖所搭配的解码策略及模型本身能力；不存在普适最优评分，必须联合选择评分与解码方式。

Conclusion: 在无监督场景下，不能孤立选择评分或解码策略，而需协同设计；自验证是一种强基线，但其优势需结合合适解码方式才能发挥；模型能力差异进一步影响策略有效性，强调了方法选择的上下文敏感性。

Abstract: Large language models hallucinate even when the answer lies within their parameters. While inference-time scaling can surface this latent knowledge, the most effective methods require supervision: a trained verifier or reward model. We ask what can be done with only a base language model: which intrinsic signal best identifies correct outputs, and how should it be decoded? We cast this as a score~$\times$~decoder grid pairing four scores (perplexity, contrastive, power-distribution likelihood, and self-verification) with three decoding families (optimization, sampling, consensus), and evaluate every cell on MATH500 with the base and instruction-tuned Qwen3-1.7B. While self-verification, which prompts the model to judge its own answer and is sharpened by a training-free virtual-thinking prefix, works well in most settings, no score has a fixed quality: its value depends on the decoder that consumes it and on model capability. When no supervision is available, the score and the decoding family must be chosen together.

</details>


### [786] [Quantum Tunneling-Aware Machine Learning: Physics-Derived Noise Models for Robust Deployment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00741)
*Uiwon Hwang,Jaeho Hwang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种量子隧穿感知的机器学习方法QTAML，通过WKB近似推导出部署时权重误差分布，并设计了无需重训练、无推理开销的补偿算法TAC，在显著降低ECC开销的同时保持高精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 晶体管微缩正逼近量子力学极限，栅氧化层变薄导致电子隧穿泄漏；而AI推理可容忍此类结构化误差，因此需建立符合物理机制的误差建模与补偿方法。

Method: 基于WKB近似从第一性原理推导权重误差分布，发现其具有仿射均值漂移、逐位方差层级（MSB主导）及逐层依赖于无穷范数和雅可比矩阵的结构；据此提出Tunneling-Aware Compensation (TAC) 算法，融合闭式均值校正与基于WKB方差分解的层自适应比特预算分配。

Result: 在四个CNN架构（p_flip=0.10）和一个Transformer编码器（p_flip=0.05）上，TAC达到95%干净精度，ECC开销比Uniform-MSP基线减少3.4×–33.6×；闭式饱和比ρ*可提前预测增益；WKB评分在异构架构小预算下比幅值法提升最高24个百分点；所有结果经蒙特卡洛验证。

Conclusion: WKB隧穿物理与噪声感知深度学习可深度结合，TAC为突破传统微缩极限提供了软硬协同设计的新范式。

Abstract: Transistor scaling is approaching a quantum-mechanical limit, as thin gate oxides induce electron leakage through quantum tunneling. Unlike conventional digital systems, AI inference can tolerate such errors provided their structure is modeled correctly. In this paper, we introduce quantum tunneling-aware machine learning (QTAML). We derive the deployment-time weight-error distribution from first principles using the Wentzel-Kramers-Brillouin (WKB) approximation and show that it has structure that generic Gaussian noise models miss: an exact affine mean drift, a per-bit variance hierarchy dominated by the most-significant bit, and a per-layer dependence on $\|W_\ell\|_\infty$ and the trained-network Jacobian. We package these three structural properties into a single deployment-time algorithm, Tunneling-Aware Compensation (TAC), that combines closed-form mean correction with an optimal layer-adaptive bit-budget allocation derived from the WKB variance decomposition. Across four convolutional architectures at $p_\mathrm{flip}$=0.10 and a transformer encoder at $p_\mathrm{flip}$=0.05, TAC reaches $95\%$ of clean accuracy with 3.4$\times$ to 33.6$\times$ less ECC overhead than Uniform-MSP, the natural baseline derived from the same physics. The closed-form saturation ratio $ρ^*$ predicts these gains in advance, and on heterogeneous architectures WKB-derived scoring outperforms magnitude-based allocation by up to 24 percentage points at small budgets. The algorithm requires no retraining, no labels, and no inference-time overhead. We also verify the WKB-derived distributional theorems to Monte Carlo precision. These results connect WKB tunneling physics with noise-aware deep learning and suggest a principled path toward hardware--software co-design beyond conventional scaling limits.

</details>


### [787] [A multimodal dataset of photoplethysmography and continuous behavioral responses to ASMR and nature videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00752)
*Tushar Das,Daigo Hozaki,Koushlendra Kumar Singh,Hirohito M. Kondo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了REST-ASMR多模态数据集，用于研究ASMR现象，包含PPG信号、音视频刺激和主观标注，并验证了其有效性；同时构建了BiLSTM模型实现高精度ASMR状态预测。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ASMR研究受限于缺乏标准化、开放获取的多模态数据集，亟需构建高质量数据集以支持生理机制探索与计算建模。

Method: 构建同步多模态数据集REST-ASMR，采集34名被试在ASMR触发视频与自然放松对照视频下的高分辨率PPG信号、时间对齐音视频刺激及连续主观标注；采用严格无泄漏的被试-视频双重独立4折交叉验证，训练BiLSTM模型预测主观ASMR‘刺痛感’状态。

Result: 数据集显示97%响应率、显著被试间一致性（p<0.05）及PPG反映的ASMR特异性心率减慢；BiLSTM模型实现视频级100%准确率、帧级平均准确率75.51%、宏F1为71.86%、自然视频基线特异性100%。

Conclusion: REST-ASMR为情感计算、多模态ASMR研究及个性化放松响应建模提供了坚实的时间密集型数据基础。

Abstract: Autonomous Sensory Meridian Response (ASMR) is a somatosensory phenomenon characterized by pleasant tingling sensations and cardiovascular slowing. However, ASMR research has been hindered by a dearth of standardized, open-access multimodal datasets. To address this limitation, we present REST-ASMR (Response to Environmental & Sensory Triggers), a synchronized multimodal dataset designed to capture behavioral reports and physiological dynamics during ASMR, with nature-relaxation videos as control stimuli. The dataset includes high-resolution photoplethysmography (PPG), time-aligned audiovisual stimuli, and continuous subjective annotations from 34 participants. Technical validation showed high stimulus efficacy (97% responder rate), significant stimulus-specific inter-subject agreement (p < 0.05), and a robust PPG-derived ASMR-specific cardiovascular deceleration. Additionally, a Bidirectional Long-Short Term Memory model successfully predicted subjective ASMR tingle states, achieving video-level ASMR vs. Nature classification with perfect accuracy and a frame-level global mean accuracy of 75.51%, macro F1-score of 71.86%, and 100% Nature-baseline specificity, under a strict, leakage-free subject-video double-independent 4-fold cross-validation. REST-ASMR constitutes a dense temporal foundation for affective computing, multimodal research, and the development of personalized models of relaxation-related responses.

</details>


### [788] [RADE: Random Add-Drop Edge as a Regularizer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00757)
*Danial Saber,Amirali Salehi-Abari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为RADE的随机增删边图增强方法，旨在同时解决图神经网络中的过拟合和过压缩问题，并通过理论保证实现训练与推理的一致性，且无需手动调参。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图神经网络（GNNs）面临过拟合和长程信息过压缩（over-squashing）两大挑战；现有随机增强（如删边）可缓解过拟合但加剧推理偏差且不改善过压缩；重连方法可缓解过压缩但缺乏正则化能力。

Method: 提出随机增删边（RADE）方法：在训练中同步随机删除和添加边，并从理论上保证训练与推理分布一致；进一步设计基于小批量梯度范数的自适应增删率平衡算法，使RADE实际免调参。

Result: 在节点分类与图分类基准上，RADE显著提升泛化性能并有效缓解过压缩；消融实验验证了训练-推理对齐、自适应率选择以及增边与删边协同作用的关键性。

Conclusion: RADE是一种兼顾正则化与长程信息传播的统一图增强框架，兼具理论严谨性与实践易用性，为GNN鲁棒性与表达能力提升提供了新思路。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) suffer from overfitting and over-squashing of long-range information. Stochastic graph augmentations (e.g., edge deletion) regularize training against overfitting but can introduce train-inference misalignment and do not improve over-squashing. In contrast, rewiring methods improve connectivity to mitigate over-squashing, but are not designed to regularize training. We propose Random Add-Drop Edge (RADE), a stochastic graph augmentation method that jointly drops and adds edges to address both overfitting and over-squashing simultaneously. RADE is provably designed to align training and inference so that random augmentations regularize training without distribution shift, while supporting long-range communication at inference. We further propose and study a mini-batch gradient-norm balancing algorithm that adapts deletion and addition rates during training, rendering RADE hyperparameter-free in practice. Experiments on node- and graph-classification benchmarks show that RADE is a strong regularizer and mitigates over-squashing. Ablations support the roles of train-inference alignment, adaptive rate selection, and the complementary effects of random edge deletion and edge addition.

</details>


### [789] [Distributed GNEP Algorithms without Multiplier Sharing and Applications to Multi-Robot Coordination and Contextual Bandit-Based Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00759)
*Shao-An Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需交换拉格朗日乘子的全分布式连续时间算法，用于求解广义纳什均衡问题（GNEP），并拓展至离散化实现；同时，结合亚马逊合作研究，提出基于上下文赌博机的自适应主动学习策略，以缓解数据标注成本高、手工策略泛化性差的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 1) 现有分布式GNEP算法需交换拉格朗日乘子，带来通信开销与隐私风险；2) 主动学习中手工设计策略泛化能力弱，难以适配未知数据分布。

Method: 1) 针对GNEP：设计不依赖乘子交换的连续时间动力学算法，结合强单调性与线性共享约束分析收敛性，并给出多种离散化方案；2) 针对主动学习：将策略选择建模为上下文赌博机问题，动态匹配最优标注策略。

Result: 1) 算法收敛至一般GNE（不限于v-GNE），收敛点依赖初值，且在多机器人协同与部署任务中验证有效；2) 上下文赌博机驱动的主动学习在公开数据集上优于固定策略。

Conclusion: 所提GNEP算法降低了通信与隐私代价，拓展了可收敛解的范围；所提主动学习框架提升了策略自适应性与实际部署鲁棒性；两项工作分别推动了分布式博弈优化与高效标注学习的发展。

Abstract: Recent advances in artificial intelligence have expanded the focus from classical optimization to include equilibrium analysis in noncooperative games. Many such games involve shared constraints, leading to Generalized Nash Equilibrium Problems (GNEPs). Existing distributed algorithms typically require agents to exchange Lagrange multipliers to enforce consensus and compute variational-GNEs (v-GNEs).
  This work introduces fully distributed continuous-time algorithms and establishes convergence without requiring multiplier exchange, thereby reducing information exchange per iteration while improving privacy preservation. The analysis focuses on strongly monotone games with convex individual constraints and linear shared constraints. I also propose several discretization schemes for the continuous-time algorithms. The proposed approach converges to general GNEs, rather than being restricted to v-GNEs, with the attained equilibrium depending on the initialization. The effectiveness of the proposed method is demonstrated through applications in multi-robot coordination and placement.
  In the second part, this work includes research conducted in collaboration with Amazon scientists. One of the most challenging problems in real-world machine learning is labeled data collection, which typically requires substantial human effort and cost. Active learning aims to reduce this labeling requirement. Existing handcrafted active learning strategies, however, generally perform well only on specific types of datasets, which are often unknown in advance. In this work, I propose using contextual bandits to adaptively select the most suitable active learning strategy. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is demonstrated on publicly available external datasets.

</details>


### [790] [Confidence-Adaptive SwiGLU for Mixture-of-Experts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00761)
*Shaohua Li,Xiuchao Sui,Xiaobing Sun,Yuhang Wu,Liangli Zhen,Yong Liu,Rick Siow Mong Goh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为κ-SwiGLU的新门控机制，它根据token级别的路由置信度动态调整MoE模型中专家门控的锐度，从而在保持低开销的同时提升模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: SwiGLU作为现代Transformer MLP中的标准门控激活函数，其门控锐度通常在训练过程中固定不变，缺乏对不同token路由置信度的适应性；而MoE模型中不恰当的门控锐度可能导致专家选择偏差或信息泄露。

Method: 提出κ-SwiGLU，将SiLU门控函数的锐度系数κ建模为路由器logit的可学习函数，使每个专家门控能根据token路由置信度在平滑与尖锐之间自适应插值。

Result: 在FineWeb-Edu数据集上，κ-SwiGLU在8至28层MoE Transformer模型中均提升了平均CORE性能，仅引入极小参数量和轻微计算开销。

Conclusion: token级置信度感知的门控锐度调节是一种有效且高效的改进MoE MLP性能的新机制。

Abstract: SwiGLU has become a standard gated activation in modern Transformer MLPs, yet its gate sharpness -- the smoothness and selectivity of the gating function -- is typically fixed throughout training. In this work, we propose Confidence-Aware SwiGLU ($κ$-SwiGLU), a variant of SwiGLU for Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models that adjusts expert gate sharpness according to token-level routing confidence. Specifically, $κ$-SwiGLU parameterizes the SiLU gate sharpness coefficient as a learnable function of the router logit, enabling each expert gate unit to interpolate between smooth, broadly active gating and sharp, selective gating. We evaluate $κ$-SwiGLU on the FineWeb-Edu dataset across MoE Transformer models ranging from 8 to 28 layers. Across these settings, $κ$-SwiGLU improves mean CORE performance while adding negligible parameters and incurring only a small computational overhead, demonstrating that confidence-aware gate sharpness is a promising mechanism for improving MoE MLPs. The code is available at https://github.com/askerlee/kappa-swiglu.

</details>


### [791] [Logit Distillation on Manifolds: Mapping by Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00771)
*Yiru Yang,Junling Wang,Nishant Kumar Singh,Luohong Wu,Haoran Yan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量级知识蒸馏方法，通过层和点映射将师生模型表征对齐到高维嵌入空间，并结合LoRA，使学生模型可训练参数低于教师的1%，同时显著降低词错误率（WER）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决模型集成虽能提升性能但部署成本高、计算开销大的问题，尤其针对大型神经网络。

Method: 引入层和点映射机制，将学生与教师模型表征对齐至高维嵌入空间；结合LoRA进行参数高效微调。

Result: 学生模型可训练参数<1%教师模型，在WER指标上显著优于其他蒸馏方法；支持快速、并行训练。

Conclusion: 该方法在大幅压缩模型参数的同时保持甚至提升性能，为高效部署高质量语音识别模型提供了新路径。

Abstract: A simple way to improve the performance of almost any machine learning model is not to train a single but several models with diverse algorithms which will make slightly distinct kinds of predictions and errors on the same data, and thus improve the average predictions and robustness. However, making predictions using a whole ensemble of models is cumbersome and computationally too expensive to allow deployment to a large number of users, especially if the models are large neural nets. In response to this, we introduce a layer and point wise projection mapping, which maps student and teacher representations into an aligned high-dimensional embedding space during training process. The proposed approach combined with LoRA injection reduces the student model trainable parameters to less than 1% of the teacher model, while significantly improving word error rate (WER) compared to other distillation methods, as demonstrated in ablation studies. Unlike a mixture of experts, our method can be trained rapidly and in parallel.

</details>


### [792] [Latent Diffusion Pretraining for Crystal Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00776)
*Shrimon Mukherjee,Kishalay Das,Partha Basuchowdhuri,Pawan Goyal,Niloy Ganguly*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于潜在扩散模型的预训练框架CrysLDNet，结合VAE与扩散模型，从大量无标签晶体结构数据中学习表征，显著提升小样本下晶体性质预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 晶体性质预测面临标注数据稀缺的问题，而现有图神经网络和Transformer模型依赖大量标注数据，难以应对实际场景。

Method: 提出CrysLDNet：在预训练阶段，先用VAE将3D晶体结构映射至平滑潜在空间，再在该空间中进行扩散建模；随后微调图编码器以完成特定性质预测任务。

Result: 在JARVIS和MP数据集上分别比基线提升4.26%和4.90%；在稀疏数据下鲁棒性强，并能利用少量实验数据校正DFT计算误差。

Conclusion: 潜在扩散预训练可有效缓解晶体性质预测中的数据稀缺问题，所学表征兼具泛化性与纠错能力。

Abstract: Fast and accurate prediction of crystal properties is a central challenge in new materials design. Graph neural networks and Transformer-based models have emerged as powerful tools for this task due to their ability to encode the local structural environment of atoms within a crystal. However, these models are data-hungry, and in practice, labeled data for crystal properties are scarce. Pretraining-finetuning strategies, particularly those based on diffusion models, have shown promise in addressing these limitations. In this work, we introduce a novel latent diffusion based pretraining framework, CrysLDNet, designed to mitigate data scarcity. Our approach integrates a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) with a diffusion model during the pretraining stage. The VAE encoder maps 3D crystal structures into a smooth latent space within which the diffusion process is applied. This latent diffusion pretraining enables the graph encoder to effectively capture structural and chemical semantics from large-scale unlabeled data, which can then be finetuned for specific property prediction tasks. Comprehensive experiments on popular DFT datasets for property prediction reveal that CrysLDNet significantly outperforms both training-from-scratch and pretrained baselines, with improvements of 4.26% and 4.90% on the JARVIS and MP datasets, respectively. Additionally, the learned representations remain robust in sparse-data conditions and are expressive enough to correct DFT errors when finetuned with limited experimental data. Code is available at: https://github.com/shrimonmuke0202/CrysLDNet.git.

</details>


### [793] [Behavior-Invariant Task Representation Learning with Transformer-based World Models for Offline Meta-Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00780)
*Fuyuan Qian,Menglong Zhang,Song Wang,Quanying Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合信息论任务表示学习与Transformer随机世界模型的新框架，以解决离线元强化学习中上下文与策略分布偏移问题，尤其在稀疏奖励场景下提升泛化性与稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线元强化学习面临上下文和策略分布偏移的挑战，尤其在稀疏奖励下导致智能体陷入模式困境、泛化能力差。

Method: 引入信息论驱动的任务表示学习提取行为策略不变的任务潜变量，并构建Transformer-based随机世界模型；在基于想象的rollout中施加保守值惩罚以缓解策略偏移与模型误用。

Result: 在分布外及稀疏奖励设置下，该方法显著优于现有SOTA方法，展现出更强的稳定性与泛化能力。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效缓解了离线元强化学习中的分布偏移问题，为稀疏奖励与泛化场景提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: Offline meta-reinforcement learning leverages static datasets to enable agents to generalize to unseen environments by combining offline efficiency with meta-learning adaptability, yet it faces key challenges from context and policy distribution shifts. These issues hinder agents from adapting to online environments, and are further exacerbated under sparse-reward settings. As a result, agents often become trapped in an inherent pattern dilemma, failing to achieve robust generalization. In this work, we propose a novel framework that integrates information-theoretic task representation learning with a Transformer-based stochastic world model. Our approach extracts task-defining latent variables that are invariant to behavior policy, thereby effectively mitigating the context distribution shift. To further handle policy shift and model exploitation, we apply a conservative value penalty to imagination-based rollouts, preventing the policy from exploiting model inaccuracies while maintaining robust adaptation. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art approaches, with superior stability and generalization under out-of-distribution and sparse-reward settings.

</details>


### [794] [Extending Causal Metamodeling to a non-Markovian Queue](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00795)
*Pracheta Amaranath,Anant Bhide,David Jensen,Peter Haas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将模块化动态贝叶斯网络（MDBN）扩展至非马尔可夫排队系统的新方法，通过相型分布近似非指数分布，并解决了相数选择、参数学习与采样间隔设定等关键挑战，实现了首个面向非马尔可夫系统的因果元建模技术，在G/M/1队列上验证了其对概率与因果查询的高精度与大幅推理加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有MDBN元建模方法仅适用于马尔可夫系统，无法处理更普遍的非马尔可夫排队（如服务时间服从一般分布的系统），亟需拓展其适用范围。

Method: 采用相型分布（phase-type distributions）近似非指数随机变量；设计兼顾准确性与可计算性的相数选择策略；提出高效参数学习算法；确定适配连续时间仿真的离散时间MDBN采样间隔。

Result: 在G/M/1队列实验中，所提MDBN能以比直接仿真快数个数量级的速度，准确回答各类概率与因果查询（PCQs）。

Conclusion: 该工作首次实现了非马尔可夫系统的因果元建模，为复杂排队系统的快速、可解释分析提供了新范式。

Abstract: Metamodels for discrete-event simulations approximate the behavior of simulation models without running expensive simulations. Prior work introduced modular dynamic Bayesian networks (MDBNs) -- a class of metamodels that can estimate a range of probabilistic and causal queries (PCQs) using a single, trained model -- but the method was limited to Markovian systems. In this paper, we initiate an extension of MDBNs to non-Markovian queues by approximating non-exponential distributions using phase-type distributions. This approach raises novel challenges, including balancing metamodeling accuracy and tractability when choosing the number of phases, efficiently learning metamodel parameters, and choosing the sampling interval that is used to approximate a continuous-time simulation by a discrete-time MDBN. We provide preliminary solutions to these challenges, yielding the first causal metamodeling technique for non-Markovian systems. Experiments on a G/M/1 queue demonstrate that the MDBN can produce accurate answers to PCQs with orders-of-magnitude speedup of inference times relative to direct simulation.

</details>


### [795] [Safe-Subspace Pseudo-Label Refinement for Source-Free Graph Domain Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00808)
*Yingxu Wang,Xinwang Liu,Siyang Gao,Nan Yin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向无源图域自适应（SF-GDA）的Selective伪标签方法S²PLR，通过构建语义与结构双重可信子空间、结合置信度验证与噪声鲁棒正则化，提升伪标签可靠性，缓解图消息传递中错误累积问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在源图不可访问的SF-GDA场景下，特征与拓扑偏移导致伪标签不可靠，盲目自训练会通过图消息传递放大系统性错误。

Method: 提出SafeSubspace Pseudo-Label Refinement (S²PLR)框架：1）利用源模型委员会估计语义置信度与分歧；2）通过图对比学习学习目标图内在结构表示；3）基于邻域一致性验证伪标签；4）对不确定样本采用噪声容忍的软正则化而非硬标签。

Result: 在图像与真实图基准数据集、多种域偏移设置下，S²PLR展现出鲁棒且具竞争力的跨域迁移性能。

Conclusion: 伪标签可靠性可被局部可控（即在‘安全子空间’内），而非需全局低噪声假设；融合语义置信与结构一致性验证是提升SF-GDA鲁棒性的有效路径。

Abstract: Source-free graph domain adaptation (SF-GDA) aims to adapt source-trained graph models to unlabeled target graphs when source graphs are no longer accessible. A central obstacle is pseudo-label reliability: under feature and topological shifts, source-induced predictions may become confidently wrong, and indiscriminate self-training can amplify systematic errors through graph message passing. This paper studies SF-GDA from a selective pseudo-labeling perspective. Instead of assuming globally bounded pseudo-label noise over the entire target domain, we identify a confidence-consistent safe subspace on which pseudo-label noise can be controlled under restricted posterior discrepancy, and derive a target-risk decomposition that separates safe-subspace fitting error, selected-label noise, and uncertain-set risk. Guided by this analysis, we propose SafeSubspace Pseudo-Label Refinement (S$^2$PLR), a source-free graph adaptation framework that applies hard pseudo-label supervision only to target graphs supported by both semantic and structural evidence. Specifically, S$^2$PLR estimates semantic reliability using source-committee confidence and disagreement, learns a targetintrinsic structural representation via graph contrastive learning, verifies pseudo-labels through neighborhood consistency, and exploits the remaining uncertain samples with noise-tolerant soft regularization rather than unreliable hard labels. Experiments on image and real-world graph benchmarks under different domain shifts demonstrate that S$^2$PLR achieves robust and competitive performance across diverse source-free transfer settings.

</details>


### [796] [OmniEEG-Bench: A Standardized Evaluation Benchmark for EEG Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00815)
*Ziling Lu,Zongsheng Li,Xinke Shen,Kexin Lou,Yingyue Xin,Xiaoqi Chen,Shinan Wang,Xiang Chen,Jiahao Fan,Chenyu Huang,Xin Xu,Zhoujie Hou,Chen Wei,Quanying Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了OmniEEG-Bench，一个面向脑电图（EEG）基础模型的统一基准与下游任务路线图，涵盖六大类任务，并标准化了评估协议；通过评测10个代表性模型，揭示了EEG基础模型存在类似大模型的缩放规律——预训练数据多样性与模型规模共同决定性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有EEG基础模型评估碎片化，缺乏统一基准和一致任务协议，阻碍了模型性能的公平比较与系统性发展。

Method: 构建OmniEEG-Bench统一基准，涵盖6大任务家族，标准化任务卡规范、模型部署流程与评估指标，并整合54个EEG数据集；对10个代表性EEG基础模型进行跨数据集、多场景评测并发布排行榜。

Result: 发现预训练数据多样性和模型尺寸均显著正向影响模型平均排名，首次在EEG基础模型中验证了缩放律行为；OmniEEG-Bench代码已开源。

Conclusion: EEG基础模型的可扩展性不仅依赖于增大模型参数量，更需拓展预训练数据的广度与多样性；OmniEEG-Bench为该领域提供了标准化评估框架与发展方向指引。

Abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) supports a variety of brain-computer interface (BCI) tasks ranging from brain-state monitoring to human-LLM interactions. EEG foundation models are emerging, but evaluation remains fragmented due to heterogeneous datasets and nconsistent task protocols. Here, we introduce OmniEEG-Bench, a unified benchmark and downstream task roadmap for EEG foundation models (FMs). It organizes evaluation of EEG FMs into six task families spanning (i) signal reliability, (ii) biometrics and disease, (iii) consciousness and state, (iv) cognition and emotion, (v) naturalistic stimulus decoding, and (vi) motor and interaction, introducing a new generation of tasks not systematically benchmarked in prior EEG FM work. OmniEEG-Bench standardizes model deployment, task definitions, and metrics through a task-card specification, and unifies 54 EEG datasets with consistent evaluation protocols. We benchmark 10 representative EEG foundation models and report a leaderboard that covers diverse evaluation settings. Both pretraining dataset diversity and model size are significantly associated with better average ranks across datasets, revealing scaling-law behavior in EEG foundation models (Figure 1). These results suggest that scaling EEG foundation models requires not only larger architectures but also broader and more diverse pretraining data. The benchmark code is available at https://github.com/ncclab-sustech/omni-eegbench.git.

</details>


### [797] [A Comparative Analysis of Machine Learning Algorithms for Multi-Task Prediction of the Parameters of the Pectin Hydrolysis--Extraction Process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00821)
*Mullosharaf K. Arabov,Shavkat Yo. Kholov,Zainiddin K. Muhiddin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究利用机器学习方法（特别是CatBoost）对果胶水解-提取工艺进行多任务回归建模，基于1000组实验数据，实现了对产率、半乳糖醛酸含量、分子量和酯化度的高精度预测，并开发了可部署的交互式Web界面。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 控制复杂的多参数果胶水解-提取工艺难度大，传统试错法成本高、效率低，亟需数据驱动的智能建模方法以减少物理实验依赖。

Method: 构建包含7种植物原料、4个可控工艺参数（温度、压力、时间、pH）及4个输出指标的实验数据库；采用11种机器学习算法进行多任务回归建模与比较；通过超参数优化和特征重要性分析评估模型性能；最终将最优模型（CatBoost）封装为生产级Web应用。

Result: CatBoost在多任务回归中平均R²达0.946；特征重要性显示原料类型贡献最大（63.6%），其次为温度和保温时间；模型已成功部署为交互式Web界面。

Conclusion: 集成学习方法结合统计分析与可解释AI，能显著降低实验成本，为果胶智能化生产控制提供可靠技术基础。

Abstract: This study addresses the challenge of controlling a complex, multi-parameter technological process -- pectin hydrolysis--extraction -- using machine learning methods. The experimental foundation is a unique database comprising 1,000 laboratory experiments conducted under controlled conditions on seven types of plant raw material with four variable process factors (temperature 85--130 C, pressure 0.9--2.2 atm, holding time 3--10 min, pH 1.5--2.0). Four output characteristics were recorded: pectin yield, galacturonic acid content, molecular weight, and degree of esterification. To solve the multi-task regression problem, 11 algorithms were trained and compared: regularised linear models, ensemble methods (Random Forest, Gradient Boosting, XGBoost, CatBoost, Extra Trees), k-nearest neighbours, support vector regression, and a multilayer perceptron. The best results were demonstrated by CatBoost (average R-squared approximately 0.946 after hyperparameter optimisation). Feature importance analysis revealed the dominant role of the raw material type (63.6% of total importance), followed by temperature and holding time. The developed pipeline was exported in a production-ready format and deployed as an interactive web interface. The findings demonstrate that ensemble methods combined with rigorous statistical analysis and interpretable AI significantly reduce the need for physical experiments and form the basis for intelligent pectin production control.

</details>


### [798] [Partial Fairness Awareness: Belief-Guided Strategic Mechanism for Strategic Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00826)
*Xinpeng Lv,Chunyuan Zheng,Yunxin Mao,Renzhe Xu,Hao Zou,Shanzhi Gu,Liyang Xu,Huan Chen,Yuanlong Chen,Wenjing Yang,Haotian Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出部分公平意识（PFA）框架，通过公开公平约束候选集但隐藏实际采用的约束，结合信念引导的战略机制，缓解公平暴露困境，在保障公平性的同时提升社会福利与系统稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平感知策略分类方法面临公平暴露困境：公开公平约束易引发策略性操纵导致公平反转，而完全隐藏则损害社会福利并抑制真实改进。

Method: 提出部分公平意识（PFA）问题；设计信念引导的战略机制，使智能体基于交互反馈在约束候选集上迭代更新信念分布，逐步逼近系统实际采用的底层公平约束。

Result: 在真实与合成数据集上的实验表明，PFA相比完全公开或完全私有公平机制，能显著降低群体公平差距、提高真正合格个体的接受率，并实现更稳定的结果。

Conclusion: 部分公开公平约束信息（即候选集）而非全部细节，可在战略环境下兼顾公平性、效率与稳定性，为公平机器学习提供新范式。

Abstract: Strategic machine learning investigates scenarios where agents manipulate their features to receive favorable decisions from predictive models. To address fairness concerns intrinsic to strategic classification, recent work has introduced group-specific fairness constraints. However, current fairness-aware approaches face a fundamental dilemma in the issue of fairness exposure: making these constraints public enables strategic manipulation and can lead to fairness reversal, while keeping them hidden may reduce social welfare and discourage genuine improvement. To fill this gap, we subsequently propose the problem of partial fairness awareness (PFA), as our theoretical analysis informs that such a dilemma can be mitigated by releasing the candidate set of fairness constraints and concealing the grounding constraint. To be specific, we introduce a belief-guided strategic mechanism, wherein agents iteratively interact with the decision system and maintain a belief distribution over the candidate set of fairness constraints. This belief-guided process enables agents, through iterative interaction and feedback, to update their belief distribution over the candidate set, thereby gradually aligning their belief with the grounding fairness constraint employed by the system. Extensive experiments on real-world and synthetic datasets demonstrate that PFA achieves lower group fairness gaps, higher acceptance of truly qualified individuals, and more stable outcomes compared to fully public or private fairness regimes.

</details>


### [799] [Beyond Independent Manipulation: Individual Fairness-aware Strategic Classification with Peer Imitation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00827)
*Xinpeng Lv,Chunyuan Zheng,Yunxin Mao,Renzhe Xu,Jinxuan Yang,Yuanlong Chen,Wangrong Huang,Shaowu Yang,Wenjing Yang,Xinwang Liu,Peng Cui,Haotian Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出个体公平感知的战略分类（IFSC）框架，解决传统战略分类在个体公平要求下因代理间操纵行为相互依赖而导致的建模失配问题；IFSC将操纵建模为基于相似性的对可见正向决策邻域的模仿，并引入随机扰动以应对同伴可观测性不确定性，实验证明其提升了个体公平一致性并缓解模仿引发的失真。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有公平感知战略分类方法主要关注群体公平且假设代理独立行动，但在个体公平要求下，代理的特征操纵行为因需与相似个体结果一致而变得相互依赖，导致经典独立模型无法准确刻画此类战略行为。

Method: 提出个体公平感知战略分类（IFSC）框架，将战略操纵建模为基于相似性的、朝向可见被接受邻域的模仿行为，并在模仿诱导的后操纵分布上学习分类器；为应对同伴可观测性不确定性，采用鲁棒学习过程，在操纵模拟中引入随机扰动。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，IFSC显著提升了个体公平一致性，并有效缓解了由模仿行为引发的决策失真。

Conclusion: IFSC为个体公平约束下的战略分类提供了更符合现实代理行为的建模框架，通过建模 peer-driven 操纵与鲁棒学习，弥补了传统方法在个体公平场景下的理论与实践缺陷。

Abstract: Strategic classification (SC) investigates scenarios where agents manipulate their features to obtain favorable decisions from predictive models. Existing fairness-aware SC approaches primarily focus on group fairness and typically assume that agents respond independently. However, when individual fairness is required, ensuring similar individuals receive similar outcomes, agents' manipulation becomes interdependent: an agent's preferred manipulation depends on the neighborhoods' outcomes. This induces a mismatch between classical SC formulations and fairness-aware decision settings, where independent models no longer accurately characterize strategic manipulations. To address this issue, we introduce individual fairness-aware strategic classification (IFSC), a framework that models peer-driven manipulation arising from individual fairness, where agents imitate nearby positively decided peers to obtain favorable outcomes. IFSC characterizes strategic manipulation as similarity-based imitation toward visible accepted peers and learns classifiers under the resulting post-manipulation distributions. To account for uncertainty in peer observability, IFSC employs a robust learning process that introduces stochastic perturbations during manipulation simulation. Experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate that IFSC improves individual-fairness consistency and mitigates imitation-induced distortions.

</details>


### [800] [Online Packet Scheduling with Deadlines and Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00835)
*Gianmarco Genalti,Achraf Azize,Vianney Perchet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在部分反馈（即包权重仅在处理后才可知）下，网络路由器如何在线调度具有截止时间的数据包以保证服务质量（QoS）。作者将问题建模为带部分反馈的在线包调度（OPSD），结合随机假设与多臂老虎机（bandit）框架，提出以α-遗憾最小化为目标的学习算法，并在不同松弛度下给出理论保证；特别地，在2-有界截止时间情形下，其确定性算法突破了经典黄金分割竞争比Φ=1.618的长期瓶颈，达到更优的θ_K ∈ [√2, Φ)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 网络路由器需在每个时钟周期决定传输哪个即将过期的数据包，但包的价值（权重）在调度前未知，仅在执行后可观测；传统确定性或完全信息调度策略在此部分反馈场景下失效，亟需设计兼顾学习与实时调度的新算法。

Method: 将问题建模为带部分反馈的在线包调度（OPSD）问题，引入随机权重假设与bandit反馈机制；建立其与sleeping bandits问题的联系；以α-遗憾最小化为优化目标，针对不同松弛度（slackness span）分别设计随机化与确定性算法，并进行严格的理论分析。

Result: 所有算法均达到\widetilde{O}(\sqrt{KT})的α-遗憾上界，匹配标准bandit下界；在2-有界截止时间情形下，确定性算法取得最优竞争比；当包类型数K≥2有限时，竞争比可突破黄金分割比Φ，达紧致值θ_K ∈ [√2, Φ)。

Conclusion: 在部分反馈约束下，通过融合bandit学习与在线调度理论，本文不仅实现了最优α-遗憾性能，还在关键实际场景中首次打破了长期存在的黄金分割竞争比障碍，为QoS路由器设计提供了兼具理论严谨性与实践可行性的新范式。

Abstract: Network routers that enforce Quality-of-Service (QoS) guarantees must decide, at every clock cycle, which expiring packet of information to transmit, even when the value of the packet is unknown until it is processed. We frame this problem as the Online Packet Scheduling with Deadlines (OPSD) problem under Partial Feedback: packets arrive at every clock cycle, with different deadlines, but the weights are only observed after execution. Under a stochastic assumption on the unknown weights, we explore different variants of the OPSD problem with bandit feedback. We establish a connection between our setting and the sleeping bandits problem, and set our learning goal to $α$-regret minimization. We provide algorithms with provable $α$-regret guarantees under different spans of slackness, distinguishing systems allowing for randomization and systems that do not. In every scenario, our algorithms achieve an $α$-regret upper bound of $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}\left(\sqrt{KT}\right)$, matching the lower bound for the standard bandit setting. In the practically relevant case of $2$-bounded deadline instances, where the deadline is set at most one clock cycle away from the arrival, our deterministic algorithm achieves the provably tightest possible competitive ratio. Remarkably, when the number of distinct packet types $K\ge 2$ is finite, it is possible to break the well-established $Φ= \frac{1+\sqrt{5}}{2}$ competitive ratio barrier and attain a tighter competitive ratio $θ_K$ ranging in $[\sqrt{2}, Φ)$.

</details>


### [801] [CUPID in the Model Zoo: Online Matchmaking for Selecting Your Dream LLM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00846)
*Son Nguyen,Xinyuan Liu,Ransalu Senanayake*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于对抗型赌博机（dueling bandit）的交互高效主动学习框架，用于在大量LLM中快速为用户匹配最符合其隐式偏好的模型，通过用户对模型响应的成对反馈进行偏好建模与优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户难以从快速增长且特性不透明的LLM池中选择合适模型，且往往缺乏明确表达自身偏好的词汇或意识。

Method: 设计了一个基于dueling bandit的主动学习框架，引入信念感知的上置信界（belief-aware UCB）策略，在探索模型多样性与利用已推断偏好之间取得平衡。

Result: 在多组LLM实验和人类用户研究中验证了该方法能在更低交互成本下更高效地实现用户与LLM的对齐。

Conclusion: 该框架显著提升了LLM选择过程的交互效率与个性化适配能力，适用于受限预算下的实际部署场景。

Abstract: Users increasingly face the challenge of selecting an appropriate LLM for a given task from a rapidly growing pool of LLMs, each with distinct but often opaque latent properties. Compounding this challenge, users may lack the vocabulary or awareness to explicitly articulate the characteristics they value in an LLM's responses or deployment. We propose an interaction-efficient active learning framework in which a dueling bandit algorithm iteratively selects pairs of LLMs, collects user feedback about their responses, and updates its belief about the user's latent preferences. We introduce a novel belief-aware upper confidence bound strategy that balances exploration of the model pool with exploitation of inferred preferences, enabling efficient alignment between user needs and LLM capabilities under user-specified cost and time budgets. Through diverse experiments on LLMs and human studies, we experimentally verify that our model can efficiently match well-aligned LLMs to users at a lower cost.

</details>


### [802] [Enhancing LLM Metacognition via Cognitive Pairwise Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00869)
*Weitao Li,Hao Zhou,Xuanyu Lei,Fandong Meng,Yuanhang Liu,Jingyi Ren,Ante Wang,Xiaolong Wang,Yuanchi Zhang,Fuwen Luo,Guangwen Yang,Lin Gan,Weizhi Ma,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出认知成对训练（CPT），一种在推理链层面进行对齐的中间训练阶段，通过学习区分可信与有缺陷的推理，提升大语言模型的推理可靠性与元认知能力平衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SFT或RL方法仅在响应层面教模型拒绝回答或表达不确定性，易过拟合于回避行为，而非真正提升推理可靠性；而RLVR的结局级奖励可能导致模型在证据或推理不可靠时仍给出高置信度答案。

Method: 提出认知成对训练（CPT），将推理链的成对比较转化为可复用的对齐信号，在中间训练阶段引导模型内化推理质量判别边界，而非记忆表面拒绝模式。

Result: 在5种模型规模和3个模型家族上验证，CPT显著改善推理–元认知权衡；14B模型上，CPT+RL比标准SFT+RL提升+2.2数学平均分和+5.2 abstention-F1；分析表明CPT提升推理链质量，并具有强鲁棒性与可扩展性。

Conclusion: CPT是一种有效提升LLM推理可靠性的新对齐范式，通过在认知层面建模推理质量差异，避免了响应级拒答的过拟合问题，为RLVR框架下的可信推理提供了新路径。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become central to LLM reasoning, but its outcome-level rewards can make models more willing to give confident answers when evidence or reasoning is unreliable. Existing SFT or RL methods mainly teach LLMs to refuse or express uncertainty at the response level, which can overfit abstention behavior rather than improve reasoning reliability. To address this limitation, we propose Cognitive Pairwise Training (CPT), a cognitive mid-training alignment stage that turns pairwise comparisons over reasoning traces into a reusable alignment signal. By learning to distinguish trustworthy from flawed reasoning, CPT encourages the model to internalize a reasoning-quality discrimination boundary rather than memorize surface refusal patterns. Across five model scales and three model families, CPT improves the reasoning--metacognition trade-off. At 14B, CPT+RL outperforms the standard SFT+RL pipeline by +2.2 math-average points and +5.2 abstention-F1 points. Further analyses show that CPT improves trace quality and exhibits strong robustness and scalability across evaluation and training settings. Code and models are released at https://github.com/Tsinghua-dhy/CPT.

</details>


### [803] [Task diversity produces systematic transfer but inhibits continual reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00880)
*Purab Seth,Neil Shah,Kunal Jha,Samuel J. Gershman,Max Kleiman-Weiner,Wilka Carvalho*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了Banyan——一个GPU加速的持续强化学习（CRL）基准环境，支持在地图布局、交互对象和子目标依赖结构三个独立可控维度上调节任务多样性；实验表明，增加任一维度的多样性可提升分布偏移后的局部迁移能力（即新任务起始性能接近旧任务末期水平），但该优势无法长期维持，随着任务分布偏移次数增多，长周期任务性能趋于饱和且早期任务知识被遗忘；Banyan旨在系统评估任务多样性何时促进可迁移学习、迁移是否持久，以及其在真正持续学习中的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 以往工作虽发现任务多样性可提升零样本泛化能力，但多在训练完成后以冻结权重方式评估，尚未明确任务多样性是否有助于代理在多次任务分布偏移中持续学习；本文旨在探究受控的任务多样性如何影响持续学习过程中的迁移能力、迁移持久性及其边界。

Method: 提出Banyan——一个GPU加速的持续强化学习领域，其任务多样性由三个正交轴（地图布局、交互对象、子目标依赖层级结构）独立控制；在多个分布偏移场景下，系统评估不同多样性配置对代理初始适应性能、长期性能演化及旧任务遗忘程度的影响。

Result: 在单次分布偏移时，沿任一多样性轴增加任务多样性均能显著提升代理在新任务上的起始性能（即局部迁移有效）；但随偏移次数增加，长时程任务性能出现平台期，且早期任务表现明显下降，表明局部迁移不足以支撑长期持续学习。

Conclusion: 任务多样性可增强短期分布偏移下的学习迁移，但不能单独保障长期持续学习；Banyan为定量研究多样性驱动的迁移机制、其持续性瓶颈及持续学习所需额外机制提供了可控实验平台。

Abstract: Continual reinforcement learning aims to produce agents that learn not only to improve at their current tasks but also to adapt as task distributions change. Training an agent on many diverse tasks can induce zero-shot generalization, but previous work generally evaluates this generalization after training -- with frozen weights. Whether task diversity also improves an agent's ability to continue learning across distribution shifts remains unclear. We introduce Banyan, a GPU-accelerated continual RL domain in which task diversity factors into three independently controllable axes: the map layouts an agent must navigate, the objects it must interact with, and the hierarchical structures of sub-goal dependencies. Across individual distribution shifts, increasing diversity along each axis causes agents to begin training on the new tasks near the performance attained on the previous one, even when the shift changes the structure of the optimal policy. However, as the number of shifts increases, this local transfer does not by itself yield sustained continual learning: longer-horizon tasks plateau, and earlier task distributions are forgotten after later training. Banyan is a benchmark for studying when controlled task diversity produces transferable learning, when that transfer persists, and where it falls short of proper continual learning.

</details>


### [804] [Dive into Waves: Morlet Spectral Transformer for Cross-Subject Emotion Decoding from EEG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00884)
*Jiaxin Qing,Lexin Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Morlet谱变换器（MST），通过Morlet小波分词、长上下文基线去除和频带特异性空间投影三个关键组件，在无需预训练的情况下，在SEED系列数据集上超越了大型预训练EEG模型和频域方法，实现了高效、可解释的跨被试情绪识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨被试脑电（EEG）情绪识别具有实际重要性但极具挑战性：情绪相关EEG信号微弱、噪声大、被试间差异大，且缺乏清晰波形特征，而现有方法在处理跨被试变异性、频谱表征匹配和频带特异性建模方面存在明显不足。

Method: 提出Morlet谱变换器（MST），包含三个核心模块：1）Morlet小波分词，生成匹配脑节律多尺度结构的时频表征，并将微分熵扩展为适配Transformer的形式；2）长上下文基线去除，作为简单时序归一化以消除被试特异性漂移和窗口冗余；3）频带特异性空间投影，为每个频带学习独立通道混合器，增强可解释性并抑制跨通道混叠；整体集成于时空Transformer主干中。

Result: MST即使不依赖预训练，在全部SEED家族数据集（SEED、SEED-IV、SEED-V）上均稳定优于大型预训练EEG基础模型及各类频域方法，展现出更高准确率、更低计算成本与更强可解释性。

Conclusion: 精心设计的表征方法（如MST）可成为大规模预训练的有效替代方案，在跨被试EEG情绪识别任务中兼顾性能、效率与可解释性。

Abstract: We study cross-subject emotion recognition from EEG, a practically important yet challenging problem in brain-computer interfaces. Unlike tasks with clear waveform signatures, emotion-related EEG signals are primarily encoded in spectral power and are weak, noisy, and highly variable across subjects. Existing approaches rely either on large pretrained EEG foundation models, which require massive data yet still struggle with cross-subject variability, or frequency-domain encoders, which better reflect spectral structure but suffer from mismatched representations, drift-dominated tokenization, and lack of band-specific spatial modeling. In this article, we propose the Morlet Spectral Transformer (MST), built around three key components and integrated with a spatiotemporal Transformer backbone. First, Morlet wavelet tokenization provides a time-frequency representation that matches the multi-scale structure of brain rhythms, and extends classical differential entropy features to a form suitable for Transformers. Second, long-context baseline removal acts as a simple temporal normalization that removes subject-specific drift and redundancy across nearby windows. Third, frequency-specific spatial projection learns a separate channel mixer for each frequency band, capturing interpretable band-specific patterns and reducing cross-channel mixing. We show that, even without pretraining, MST consistently outperforms both large pretrained EEG foundation models and frequency-based methods across all SEED-family datasets. These results suggest that careful representation design can yield an accurate, cost-effective, and interpretable alternative to large-scale pretraining.

</details>


### [805] [Memory-Efficient LLM Training with Dynamic Sparsity: From Stability to Practical Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00888)
*Qiao Xiao,Boqian Wu,Patrik Okanovic,Tomasz Sternal,Maurice van Keulen,Elena Mocanu,Mykola Pechenizkiy,Decebal Constantin Mocanu,Torsten Hoefler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SMET方法，通过优化器预热和密度感知学习率缩放来稳定动态稀疏训练（DST），解决大语言模型稀疏训练中因新参数冷启动导致的优化不稳定问题，并降低内存消耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态稀疏训练（DST）在大语言模型训练中存在优化不稳定性（如拓扑更新后损失尖峰），源于标准Adam优化器对新再生参数的冷启动问题。

Method: 提出Sparse Memory-Efficient Training（SMET）：引入优化器预热机制缓解冷启动；采用密度感知学习率缩放提升训练进度；仅对活跃参数存储梯度和优化器状态以节省内存。

Result: 理论分析表明SMET改善优化稳定性；实验验证其支持稳定、可扩展且内存高效的LLM稀疏预训练。

Conclusion: SMET为稀疏训练成为大语言模型训练的实际可行替代方案铺平了道路。

Abstract: Dynamic Sparse Training (DST) offers a promising paradigm for improving the training and inference efficiency of deep neural networks; however, we find that in large language model training, DST can suffer from optimization instability, manifested as loss spikes after topology updates. In this work, we show that the naive use of standard Adam-based optimizers leads to a cold-start issue for newly regrown parameters, resulting in excessively large updates and disrupted training dynamics. To address this issue, we propose Sparse Memory-Efficient Training (SMET), which stabilizes DST with optimizer warm-up and improves training progress through density-aware learning-rate scaling. SMET further reduces memory consumption by storing gradients and optimizer states only for active parameters. We provide a theoretical analysis of the update behaviors under SMET, showing improved optimization stability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SMET enables stable, scalable, and memory-efficient sparse pre-training of LLMs, paving the way for sparse training as a practical alternative to dense training. Our code is publicly available at: https://github.com/QiaoXiao7282/SMET.

</details>


### [806] [An Exploratory Study into using Machine-Learning for Fast Step-by-step Emulation of Numerical Mechanical Thrombectomy Simulations for Ischemic Stroke](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00892)
*Thijs Stessen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本论文探讨了利用机器学习代理模型加速缺血性中风机械取栓术中的数值物理仿真，以辅助临床决策。研究训练了三个代理模型，在简化抽吸过程的两种仿真上进行测试，结果表明其中两个模型在单步预测上准确且大幅提速，但在复杂几何结构的长时间仿真中稳定性不足。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机械取栓治疗缺血性中风需在极短时间内做出关键决策，而现有数值物理仿真虽有指导潜力，但速度太慢无法实时支持；亟需快速、准确的替代模型。

Method: 训练三种基于机器学习的代理模型，使用两种不同几何复杂度的简化抽吸过程数值仿真数据，并结合特定数据增强策略进行评估。

Result: 两个模型能高精度预测单步仿真并实现显著加速，尤其在应用特定数据增强时效果更佳；但在复杂几何结构下的长时间仿真中表现出不稳定性。

Conclusion: 当前代理模型可在简化场景下有效加速仿真，但尚不具备处理真实复杂场景的长期稳定性；本工作为后续构建可扩展、稳定的机械取栓仿真代理方法奠定了基础。

Abstract: The treatment of ischemic stroke using mechanical thrombectomy involves difficult decisions under intense time constraints. Numerical physics simulations can in theory inform operators to make better decisions regarding treatment approaches and device selection, but are too slow to do so in practice. In this thesis, we investigate if current machine learning based surrogates can accurately emulate these simulations in a step-by-step manner while making them significantly faster. To do this we train three surrogate models on two simulations that involve a simplified aspiration procedure, with varying levels of geometric complexity. Our results show that two of our models accurately predict singular simulation steps and provide substantial speedups, especially when combined with specific data augmentations. However, the models showed a lack of stability when emulating simulations with complex geometries over longer time periods. Overall, this work provides a foundation for future studies to develop stable methods that scale to realistic numerical physics simulations of mechanical thrombectomy.

</details>


### [807] [Accuracy, Stability, and Repeated-Run Reliability of Large Language Models on Deterministic Programming Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00920)
*Yongxi Zhou,Lai Yun Choi,Jiaxi Wen,Wenbo Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了大语言模型在确定性文本生成任务中，单次运行通过率（run-level pass rate）会高估无重试覆盖率（retry-free coverage）达17.8个百分点，尤其在中等性能模型中最显著；作者提出重复运行评估协议，发现稳定性与准确性存在系统性偏差，强调稳定性分析应作为常规准确率报告的必要补充。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准代码生成基准通常只关注单次准确率或多次采样下的最终成功率，但实际部署中还需模型在相同提示下输出稳定、一致的结果，即‘稳定性’需求未被充分评估。

Method: 提出一种重复运行评估协议，定义并测量运行级准确率、无重试覆盖率和每问题变异性；在基于时效性的100道LeetCode风格编程题上，对5个厂商家族共16个模型、2种提示模板、每题5次重复运行，共16,000个实例进行评估。

Result: 运行级通过率与完美稳定性率高度相关（r=0.985），但前者始终高于后者，最大差距达17.8个百分点，并导致相近模型排名反转；提示工程效果因模型而异，并非普适增益。

Conclusion: 对于确定性文本生成任务，仅报告单次准确率具有误导性；重复运行下的稳定性分析是评估LLM实际部署能力不可或缺的一环，应成为标准评估流程的组成部分。

Abstract: Run-level pass rate overstates retry-free coverage by up to 17.8 percentage points -- and the gap is largest precisely for mid-performing systems. We investigate this accuracy--stability relationship in large language model (LLM) evaluation for deterministic text-conditioned generation, using programming tasks as a concrete testbed. Standard code-generation benchmarks emphasize single-run accuracy or eventual success under repeated sampling, but many deployment settings also require stability: consistent outcomes across repeated invocations under the same task description. We present a repeated-run evaluation protocol with metrics for run-level accuracy, retry-free coverage, and per-problem variability. On a recency-based benchmark of 100 LeetCode-style problems, we evaluate 16 models from five provider families under two prompt templates with five repeated runs per problem, yielding 16,000 evaluation instances. Although run-level pass rate and perfect stability rate are strongly correlated (r=0.985), pass rate consistently exceeds retry-free coverage -- a gap that reaches 17.8 percentage points and reverses model rankings even among closely matched systems. Prompt effects are model-dependent rather than uniformly beneficial. These results suggest that repeated-run stability analysis is a necessary complement to conventional accuracy reporting for deterministic text-conditioned generation tasks.

</details>


### [808] [Task Structure Reverses Layerwise State Encoding in Sequence Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00926)
*Yuhang Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了不同序列模型（如Transformer、Mamba、LSTM等）在不同任务（Parity、Dyck-k、S₃置换）上层间状态可读性的分布规律，发现状态集中/分散模式取决于任务的计算结构（如栈式vs前缀更新），而非代数性质（如交换性）；并指出探针可读性不等于计算瓶颈位置，机制特征是架构与任务共同决定的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究常将序列模型的层间状态编码视为架构固有属性（如RNN集中、Transformer分散），但作者观察到同一架构在不同任务下状态分布模式会反转，亟需厘清驱动该现象的本质因素（代数结构 vs 计算结构）。

Method: 在Parity、Dyck-k和非交换群S₃置换三个任务上，对Transformer、Mamba、Mamba-2、LSTM、GRU五种架构进行层间线性探针分析、因果干预（如层删除、激活修补）和归因分析（如Conv1D attribution），并对比预训练与微调模型表现。

Result: 1）状态集中/分散模式随任务反转：Parity下Mamba/LSTM晚期集中、Transformer渐进构建；Dyck-k下则相反；2）S₃任务与Parity聚类，表明分组由计算结构（前缀更新/栈）主导，而非交换性；3）探针可读性≠计算瓶颈：Pythia Dyck存在强中间层瓶颈，而Mamba虽终层最可读，但中段修补即可大幅恢复性能。

Conclusion: 序列模型的机制特征（如状态可读性分布、计算瓶颈位置）并非架构独有属性，而是架构与任务计算结构共同作用的结果；单纯依赖探针定位瓶颈存在误导风险，需结合因果干预进行验证。

Abstract: Mechanistic studies of sequence models often treat layerwise state encodings as architectural traits: recurrent models concentrate readable state, attention-based models distribute it. We find that the same architecture reverses this profile when the task changes. Across Transformers, Mamba, Mamba-2, LSTMs, and GRUs, Parity is concentrated late in Mamba and the recurrent baselines and built gradually by Transformer; on bounded-depth Dyck-k the pattern flips. The same flip appears in fine-tuned Mamba-130M and Pythia-160M, and the Pythia Dyck bottleneck persists at 410M. Two explanations are conflated in the literature: algebraic structure (commutativity) versus computational structure (prefix update vs. stack). To separate them we add a third task: non-commutative S_3 permutation composition. S_3 groups with Parity, not Dyck, on layerwise probing across all five architectures and on Mamba-specific Conv1D attribution, so the grouping tracks computational structure rather than commutativity.
  Causal interventions show that, in the 4-layer formal models, linearly readable directions are often functionally necessary and can remain important at out-of-distribution lengths on Parity and Dyck. At pretrained scale the picture splits. Fine-tuned Pythia Dyck has a strong middle-layer bottleneck (L6-L7 ablation drops accuracy by roughly 81% at 160M; broader L4-L18 plateau at 410M), far weaker at the best-probe layer. Pretrained Mamba shows the complementary failure mode: its final layer is highly readable, no single probe direction breaks the task on Parity, Dyck, or S_3, yet mid-position activation patching there recovers about 97-98% of the clean-corrupted logit gap. Probing localizes where state is linearly available, not always where the computation is bottlenecked. Mechanistic signatures are properties of architecture and task together.

</details>


### [809] [Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators for Structure-Preserving Surrogate Modeling of Constrained PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00937)
*Lennon J. Shikhman,Shane Gilbertie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators的新框架，通过在定向胞腔复形上表示PDE状态、利用学习到的限制映射耦合局部特征空间，并结合基于关联/霍奇结构的消息传递，实现离散化感知与结构保持的神经PDE代理模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准神经算子将几何与离散化视为次要因素，而物理状态在不同拓扑位置（如顶点、边、面、体等）具有天然归属并需满足兼容性约束，现有方法难以自然建模这些结构关系。

Method: 提出Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators：将PDE状态定义在定向胞腔复形上；用学习的限制映射连接不同维数胞腔上的特征空间；采用基于incidence/Hodge结构的消息传递；更新头经coboundary或通量映射实现约束内生化（而非仅靠损失函数强制）。

Result: 在湍流磁流体动力学（MHD）和聚变平衡代理任务中，该方法显著提升结构敏感诊断指标，包括rollout行为、散度控制、谱误差及平衡回归精度。

Conclusion: 胞腔层（cellular-sheaf）结构是一种对受约束多物理场系统中神经PDE代理模型有效的归纳偏置。

Abstract: Neural operators provide fast surrogate models for PDE simulations, but standard architectures often treat geometry and discretization as secondary to field data. Physical states are usually represented as grid-channel stacks, even when different quantities naturally belong on vertices, edges, faces, cells, boundaries, or interfaces and must satisfy compatibility constraints. We propose Cellular Sheaf Neural Operators, a discretization-aware framework for structure-preserving neural PDE surrogates. The method represents PDE states on oriented cell complexes, couples local feature spaces through learned restriction maps, and uses incidence/Hodge-informed message passing to follow computational geometry. Learned update heads pass through coboundary or flux maps, allowing selected constraints to arise from cell-complex structure rather than only from loss penalties. For magnetohydrodynamics, this yields face-based magnetic-flux updates driven by edge electromotive fields and finite-volume-style fluid updates driven by learned face fluxes and cell sources. On turbulent MHD and fusion-equilibrium surrogate tasks, the method improves structure-sensitive diagnostics, including rollout behavior, divergence control, spectral error, and equilibrium-regression accuracy. These results indicate that cellular-sheaf structure is a useful inductive bias for neural PDE surrogates in constrained multiphysics systems.

</details>


### [810] [PRISM: Gauge-Invariant Tangent-Space Differentially Private LoRA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00944)
*Shihao Wang,Xueru Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PRISM方法，解决在LoRA微调中应用差分隐私时因参数非唯一性导致的噪声放大问题，实现与规范无关、稳定且高效的隐私保护。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LoRA的低秩参数化存在因子分解非唯一性（gauge ambiguity），导致直接应用DP-SGD会产生规范依赖的扰动和不可控的噪声放大，损害隐私-效用权衡。

Method: 提出PRISM——一种内蕴的、规范不变的差分隐私机制：通过在LoRA更新矩阵Z的低维流形上直接加噪，设计高效低维噪声采样器，并引入DP感知的规范不变自适应优化规则。

Result: PRISM避免了双线性噪声放大，给出Z上有效内蕴噪声的闭式刻画；提供标准(ε,δ)-DP保证；实验表明其显著提升数值稳定性与隐私-效用平衡。

Conclusion: PRISM是首个为LoRA量身定制的内蕴差分隐私框架，从几何本质出发保障隐私机制的规范不变性与实用性。

Abstract: Applying differential privacy (DP) via DP-SGD to Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is a natural approach for privacy-preserving fine-tuning. However, LoRA's low-rank parameterization poses a fundamental challenge. In LoRA, each trainable update is represented as a low-rank matrix $Z = AB^\top$, but this factorization is inherently non-identifiable: many factor pairs $(A,B)$ represent the same update $Z$. As a result, applying DP-SGD directly to the factors induces gauge-dependent perturbations on $Z$, and we show that this naive DP-LoRA can lead to unbounded noise amplification. We propose PRISM, an intrinsic DP mechanism for LoRA that is gauge invariant by construction, avoids bilinear noise amplification, and admits an efficient low-dimensional noise sampler. Moreover, PRISM yields a closed-form characterization of the effective intrinsic noise induced on $Z$, enabling stable privacy-utility trade-offs through bounded, gauge-invariant perturbations. We establish standard $(ε,δ)$-DP guarantees for PRISM and introduce a DP-aware, gauge-invariant adaptive update rule that prevents adaptive optimization from amplifying injected privacy noise, improving numerical stability in practice.

</details>


### [811] [Silent Failures in Federated Personalization of Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00947)
*YongKyung Oh,Alex Bui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型的可信度失效类型——'静默失效'（Silent Failures），源于基础模型在联邦学习中个性化时因隐私约束导致的行为不可见性，包括偏见放大、公平性崩溃和对齐退化等，并构建了六类失效模式的分类体系，指出仅靠隐私保护训练不足以保障可信部署，呼吁建立隐私保护下的行为评估研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着基础模型通过联邦学习在去中心化私有数据上个性化并大规模部署，监管对上市后监控的要求日益提高，但联邦学习的隐私约束限制了对模型行为的可见性，导致一类难以察觉的可信度失效问题被忽视。

Method: 通过现状分析识别现有基准测试的结构性割裂（联邦基准重系统性能、集中式基准重行为但不兼容联邦隐私），提出涵盖基础模型个性化、数据集偏移与核心联邦约束交互的六类静默失效模式分类法，并进行系统性分析。

Result: 揭示了隐私保护训练本身不足以支撑可信部署；明确了静默失效作为联邦人工智能可信性诊断的新标准类别；提出了隐私保护行为评估的研究议程。

Conclusion: 静默失效是联邦学习与基础模型个性化交汇下产生的独特可信挑战，需发展兼顾隐私与可观测性的新评估范式，将其纳入联邦AI可信性标准框架。

Abstract: Foundation models are increasingly personalized on decentralized private data through federated learning and are now deployed at scale under growing regulatory requirements for post-market monitoring. We argue that this convergence creates a distinct and under-recognized class of trustworthiness failures, which we term "Silent Failures." These include amplified bias, fairness collapse, and alignment erosion that may remain difficult to detect because federated learning's privacy constraints limit visibility into model behavior. A landscape analysis of existing benchmarks reveals a structural divide. Federated benchmarks evaluate system performance but provide limited insight into model behavior, whereas centralized trustworthiness benchmarks assess behavior but require model access incompatible with federated privacy. We introduce a taxonomy of six silent failure modes arising from the interaction of foundation model personalization, dataset shift, and core federated constraints. Our analysis shows that privacy-preserving training alone is insufficient for trustworthy deployment. We conclude with a research agenda for privacy-preserving behavioral evaluation and propose that silent failures become a standard diagnostic category for trustworthy federated artificial intelligence.

</details>


### [812] [Explainable deep reinforcement learning reveals energy-efficient control strategies for turbulent drag reduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00949)
*Federica Tonti,Ricardo Vinuesa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合多智能体深度强化学习（MARL）与可解释深度学习（XDL）的方法，利用SHAP归因指导奖励设计，显著提升了壁面湍流中的减阻与净能量节约效果，同时大幅降低作动能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统直接优化壁面剪切应力或反对控制策略存在能耗高、可解释性差、性能受限等问题，亟需一种兼顾高效性、可解释性与低能耗的智能流动控制方法。

Method: 基于多智能体深度强化学习框架，设计三种SHAP引导的奖励函数：分别基于预测未来速度场、皮肤摩擦系数、以及皮肤摩擦系数与壁面压力脉动联合预测的U-Net模型的SHAP归因；对比分析各策略的减阻（DR）与净能量节约（NES）性能。

Result: 联合皮肤摩擦系数与壁面压力脉动的SHAP策略最优，实现34.44%减阻率和34.01%净能量节约率，仅需0.43%归一化输入功率；相较反对控制，DR和NES分别提升49.41%和48.52%；相较壁面剪切应力基线，作动成本从5.90%降至0.43%。

Conclusion: SHAP引导的奖励设计能有效提升MARL在湍流控制中的物理一致性与能效，所发现的‘压力门控’作动机制揭示了近壁湍流结构时间尺度上的最优控制规律，为可解释智能流控提供了新范式。

Abstract: We propose a method combining Multi-Agent Deep Reinforcement Learning (MARL) and eXplainable Deep Learning (XDL) to reduce drag in wall-bounded turbulent flows. Taking as a baseline the results of training agents directly targeting wall-shear stress and opposition control, three SHAP-guided approaches are compared. In the first, the reward is computed from SHAP attributions of a U-net predicting the future velocity field; in the second, from SHAP attributions of a U-net predicting the skin-friction coefficient; in the third, from a combination of SHAP attributions of two U-nets predicting the skin-friction coefficient and the wall pressure fluctuations, respectively. The combined SHAP strategy based on skin-friction coefficient and wall-pressure fluctuations achieves the best overall performance, achieving a DR of 34.44% and a NES of 34.01% with only 0.43% normalized input power. Relative to opposition control, drag reduction and net energy saving increase by 49.41% and 48.52%, respectively. Compared with the direct wall-shear-stress baseline, the proposed strategy simultaneously improves performance while reducing the normalized actuation cost from 5.90% to 0.43%. Analysis of the results reveals that the energetically efficient policy is consistent with pressure-gated actuation, activating predominantly at near-zero wall pressure, and operates on a temporal timescale comparable to the lifetime of the near-wall turbulent structures.

</details>


### [813] [COLLIE: Guiding Skill Discovery in Semantically Coherent Latent Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00950)
*Yao Luan,Ni Mu,Hanfei Ge,Yiqin Yang,Bo Xu,Qing-Shan Jia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出COLLIE框架，通过利用无监督数据构建语义一致的技能潜在空间，实现无需额外训练的引导式技能发现，有效利用稀疏在线人类反馈，避免危险行为并提升下游任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有引导式技能发现（GSD）方法依赖额外指导模型、预定义规则或专家示范，在稀疏、在线收集的人类反馈下效果不佳；同时，无监督技能发现（USD）易产生无关或危险行为。

Method: 提出COLLIE框架，利用密集无监督数据构建语义连贯、结构良好的技能潜在空间，支持训练免费的引导信号生成，并理论分析其有效性。
