We find that DSBR consistently stabilizes test-time adaptation, prevents model collapse, and matches or outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, DSBR operates solely at test-time.

</details>


### [962] [Local Preferential Bayesian Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02351)
*Johanna Menn,Miriam Kober,Paul Brunzema,David Stenger,Sebastian Trimpe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种局部偏好贝叶斯优化（local PBO）方法家族，将高维贝叶斯优化中的信任域和导数引导的局部搜索思想引入偏好学习框架，显著提升高维、复杂场景下的优化效率与性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有偏好贝叶斯优化（PBO）方法依赖全局搜索，在高维问题中效率低下，难以满足实际偏好优化（如策略搜索）需求。

Method: 提出两类局部PBO方法：基于信任域的局部搜索和基于拉普拉斯近似高斯过程后验一阶、二阶导数的导数引导局部搜索。

Result: 在GP样本路径、标准基准函数及策略搜索任务上的实验表明，所提方法在高维、陡峭最优解场景下显著优于全局偏好基线，大幅降低累积遗憾。

Conclusion: 局部PBO方法有效拓展了偏好优化的适用维度与场景，为真实世界中基于人类偏好的高维优化任务提供了高效新范式。

Abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) is a popular and effective approach for tuning expensive, noisy experiments, but requires the formulation of an explicit objective function. Preferential BO (PBO) removes this requirement by learning from pairwise human feedback, yet existing methods struggle to efficiently optimize beyond low- and medium-dimensional problems due to their global search approaches. We address this limitation by developing a family of local PBO methods that transfer key ideas from high-dimensional BO to the preferential setting. In particular, we introduce local PBO methods which adapt trust-region and derivative-informed local search to pairwise preference feedback, where the latter exploits first- and second-order derivatives of the Laplace-approximated GP posterior. Our benchmark on GP sample paths, standard optimization benchmark functions, and policy-search tasks shows that local PBO methods are especially effective in high-dimensional and complex landscapes with steep optima. Compared with global preference-based baselines, they can substantially reduce cumulative regret, making them particularly useful for real-world preference-based optimization tasks such as policy search.

</details>


### [963] [Minimax-Optimal Policy Regret in Partially Observable Markov Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02363)
*Raman Arora*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在部分可观测环境中与策略性、自适应对手进行序贯决策的问题，提出了一个基于乐观最大似然的分段算法，实现了O~(√T)的策略遗憾，并给出了匹配的下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准遗憾定义在面对依赖学习者策略的对手时不再适用，且需从部分观测中学习潜在动态。

Method: 提出一种基于置信集的分段式乐观最大似然算法，每轮使用几何增长的时间段选择一个策略，置信集由历史数据累积构建。

Result: 算法实现O~(√T)策略遗憾，显式依赖于时间步长T、对手记忆长度、置信半径及可观测算子类的聚合Eluder维数；并证明了匹配的下界。

Conclusion: 该工作为部分可观测马尔可夫博弈中对抗性学习提供了理论保障，并可扩展至自适应时间范围和具有指数衰减记忆的对手。

Abstract: We study sequential decision-making in partially observable environments against strategic, adaptive opponents, modeled as partially observable Markov games (POMGs). The central challenge is to learn latent dynamics from partial observations while facing an adversary whose behavior depends on the learner's strategy, making standard regret notions inadequate. We prove that an epoch-based optimistic maximum-likelihood algorithm achieves $\tilde{O}(\sqrt{T})$ policy regret for fixed problem parameters, with explicit dependence on the horizon, adversary memory, confidence radius, and the aggregate Eluder dimension of the observable-operator class. The algorithm selects one policy per geometrically growing epoch using confidence sets built cumulatively from past data, which keeps the cost of comparing adversary responses across policies logarithmic in $T$. We also prove a lower bound matching the $\sqrt{T}$ and aggregate-Eluder-dimension dependence, up to problem-dependent and logarithmic factors. Finally, we extend the framework to horizon-adaptive guarantees and adversaries with geometric fading memory.

</details>


### [964] [FOAM: Frequency and Operator Error-Based Adaptive Damping Method for Reducing Staleness-Oriented Error for Shampoo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02365)
*Kyunghun Nam,Sumyeong Ahn*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FOAM算法，通过动态调节阻尼因子和特征分解频率来稳定Shampoo优化器的训练过程，缓解因预条件矩阵更新延迟导致的性能下降与数值不稳定性问题，在保持收敛性的同时显著降低实际运行时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Shampoo优化器虽在大规模优化任务中表现优异，但其矩阵求逆计算开销巨大，实践中常采用过时的预条件矩阵更新（即‘staleness’），导致计算效率与优化精度之间的根本权衡。

Method: 从收敛性与稳定性两个角度对staleness进行理论分析，发现阻尼（damping）可作为数值稳定器有效抑制其负面影响；基于此，提出FOAM算法，自适应地联合调控阻尼因子与特征分解频率，依据对staleness相关误差的近似估计进行动态调整。

Result: 实验表明，FOAM相比标准Shampoo显著减少了壁钟时间（wall-clock time），同时维持了鲁棒的收敛性能。

Conclusion: staleness虽提升计算效率，但损害优化性能与数值稳定性；引入自适应阻尼与特征分解调度的FOAM算法可在不牺牲收敛性的前提下有效缓解该问题，为高效二阶优化提供了新思路。

Abstract: Shampoo is attracting considerable attention for its superior performance on large-scale optimization benchmarks; yet it faces a significant practical bottleneck: the prohibitive computational overhead of matrix inversion. To mitigate this, practitioners typically rely on stale preconditioner updates, creating a fundamental trade-off between computational efficiency and optimization fidelity. In this work, we provide a theoretical study of staleness through the complementary lenses of convergence and stability. While staleness improves computational efficiency, it inherently degrades performance and introduces numerical instability. Crucially, we identify that damping, acting as a numerical stabilizer, can effectively suppress these negative effects. Guided by this analysis, we propose FOAM, an adaptive algorithm that stabilizes training by dynamically controlling both the damping factor and the eigendecomposition frequency based on an approximation of the staleness-oriented error. Experimental results demonstrate that FOAM reduces wall-clock time compared to standard Shampoo while maintaining robust convergence.

</details>


### [965] [When Do Attention Circuits Form? Developmental Trajectories of Capability and Attention-Sink Emergence Across Three 1B-ClassArchitectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02378)
*Yongzhong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了三种1B级语言模型（Pythia 1B、OLMo 1B、OLMoE 1B-7B）在训练过程中注意力头电路（特别是BOS-attractor和induction头）的形成轨迹，发现BOS头在底层（L0/L1）始终为零，不同模型中BOS吸引子比例呈现不同涌现形态，且induction电路与attention-sink电路的形成在时间上分离达10–20倍token量，并可在极早期（0.3–2%训练量）识别稳定电路。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解大语言模型中关键注意力机制（如induction、BOS-attractor）如何随训练动态形成，检验‘induction phase transition’是否统一刻画多种能力涌现过程。

Method: 对三个1B级模型（跨架构与数据集）在10个对数间隔检查点共30次可解释性分析，结合参与比（PR）谱信号与能力特异性选择性筛选，追踪induction、previous-token、BOS-attractor三类头的演化。

Result: 发现五条规律：(F1) L0/L1层始终无BOS头；(F2) BOS吸引子分数涌现形态因模型而异；(F3) DCLM模型中induction电路早于BOS-attractor电路10–20倍token；(F4) 能力筛选可在0.3–2%训练量内收敛至最终induction电路；(F5) 每个最终induction头的PR值在其能力阈值首次被跨越时即已升高。

Conclusion: induction与attention-sink（BOS-attractor）是两个在时间尺度、演化形态和机制上均分离的能力形成过程，需分别建模，挑战了单一‘induction phase transition’的简化叙事。

Abstract: We track the developmental trajectory of attention-head circuit formation across three 1B-class language models spanning two architecture families (dense transformer, mixture-of-experts) and two pretraining corpora (The Pile, DCLM): Pythia 1B, OLMo 1B-0724-hf, and OLMoE 1B-7B-0924. At each of 10 log-spaced revisions per model -- 30 mechanistic-interpretability runs in total -- we apply a participation-ratio (PR) spectral signal and an all-head capability-specific selectivity screen to track induction, previous-token, and BOS-attractor heads as they emerge.
  Five findings. (F1) Layers 0 and 1 produce zero BOS-classified heads at every revision in every model: the L0/L1 zero-BOS floor is an architectural property, not a learned outcome. (F2) The whole-model BOS-attractor fraction follows three distinct emergence shapes -- a gradual ramp in Pythia 1B, a sharp phase transition in OLMo 1B (7% to 70% between adjacent checkpoints), and a gradual ramp in OLMoE 1B-7B. (F3) In DCLM models, induction-circuit formation precedes BOS-attractor formation by 10-20x in tokens; capability-circuit formation and attention-sink formation are two transitions, not one. (F4) The capability-specific screen converges to the final induction circuit within 0.3-2% of total training tokens -- circuit identification does not require the final model. (F5) For every final-checkpoint induction head sampled across all three models, per-head PR is elevated at or before the first revision at which that head crosses its capability-selectivity threshold.
  The results refine the induction-phase-transition framing: in 1B-class models trained on DCLM, the induction transition and the attention-sink transition are separated by an order of magnitude in tokens and have qualitatively different shapes.

</details>


### [966] [TabPrep: Closing the Feature Engineering Gap in Tabular Benchmarks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02384)
*Andrej Tschalzev,Nick Erickson,Yuyang Wang,Huzefa Rangwala,Stefan Lüdtke,Heiner Stuckenschmidt,Christian Bartelt*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TabPrep，一种轻量级、面向结构化数据模式的特征工程预处理流程，显著提升各类模型在TabArena基准上的性能，填补了当前表格数据评估中缺失特征工程环节的长期空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表格机器学习研究过度关注模型架构，忽视特征工程；现代基准测试完全忽略特征工程，导致评估不全面、存在未量化差距。

Method: 设计TabPrep轻量级预处理流水线，包含针对三类典型结构化数据模式的特征生成器，并系统集成到多种模型（树模型、神经网络、线性模型、基础模型）的训练与调优中。

Result: TabPrep在TabArena基准上一致提升各类模型性能，常超越仅靠模型改进带来的增益；在性能、效率和跨数据集适用性上均优于以往自动化特征工程方法。

Conclusion: 系统性特征工程本身即可达到甚至超越前沿模型创新的效果；TabPrep的开源将推动特征工程重新纳入标准表格数据评估流程。

Abstract: Progress in tabular machine learning has largely focused on increasingly sophisticated model architectures. At the same time, feature engineering remains a critical yet underexplored component of real-world modeling pipelines that is entirely absent from modern benchmarks, which creates an unquantified evaluation gap. In this work, we introduce TabPrep, a lightweight preprocessing pipeline composed of feature generators that are carefully designed to target three specific structural data patterns. We show that many widely used model classes exhibit predictable blind spots to these patterns and that systematic feature engineering alone can establish new peak performance. Across the TabArena benchmark, integrating TabPrep into model training and tuning consistently improves performance for tree-based, neural, linear, and foundation models, often surpassing gains achieved by model-centric innovations alone. TabPrep outperforms previous automated feature engineering approaches in performance, efficiency, and applicability across datasets, enabling integration into large-scale benchmarks. By releasing TabPrep (see https://github.com/atschalz/tabprep), we enable researchers to integrate feature engineering into their benchmarking setup, filling a longstanding gap in tabular evaluations.

</details>


### [967] [Policy and World Modeling Co-Training for Language Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02388)
*Ning Lu,Baijiong Lin,Shengcai Liu,Jiahao Wu,Haoze Lv,Yanbin Wei,Lingting Zhu,Shengju Qian,Xin Wang,Ying-Cong Chen,Qi Wang,Ke Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PaW框架，在强化学习过程中同时进行策略和世界建模的联合训练，利用on-policy rollout中的动作-观测对作为世界建模监督信号，无需额外仿真器或推理开销，并通过数据选择、鲁棒损失和自适应平衡机制提升稳定性与效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习缺乏对动作如何影响环境的显式监督，而现有世界建模方法依赖额外仿真器、训练阶段或计算开销，不够高效实用。

Method: 提出PaW（Policy and World modeling co-training）框架，在RL策略训练中引入辅助世界建模监督；包含三个关键技术：基于动作熵的世界建模数据选择、抗噪的世界建模损失、奖励自适应的损失平衡机制。

Result: 在三个智能体任务基准上，PaW在不同模型和RL算法上均一致优于强RL基线。

Conclusion: 标准RL rollout本身即蕴含可用的世界建模监督信号，PaW验证了其在语言智能体训练中的实用性与有效性。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) improves large language model (LLM) agents by teaching them which actions lead to high rewards, but provides little supervision on what those actions do to the environment. World modeling (WM) can fill this gap, yet existing approaches often require separate simulators, extra training stages, or additional inference-time computation. We observe that on-policy RL rollouts already contain the needed signal: each transition pairs an action with its resulting next observation. Based on this observation, we propose PaW, a Policy and World modeling co-training framework that adds auxiliary WM supervision to the same policy during RL, without changing the inference paradigm. To make auxiliary WM supervision informative and stable, PaW introduces three components: action-entropy-based WM data selection, noise-tolerant WM loss, and reward-adaptive loss balancing. Experiments on three agentic task benchmarks show consistent improvements over strong RL baselines across models and RL algorithms. These results suggest that standard RL rollouts are a practical source of WM supervision for language-agent training.

</details>


### [968] [Speculative Sampling For Faster Molecular Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02455)
*Arthur Kosmala,Stephan Günnemann,Meng Gao,Brandon Wood*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Langevin Speculative Dynamics (LSD)的新方法，用于加速分子动力学（MD）模拟，通过结合快速草稿模型与慢速目标模型的并行验证机制，在不引入相对误差的前提下实现3-9倍加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 分子动力学（MD）本质上是串行的，难以通过并发计算提升单系统吞吐量，亟需一种高效且无偏的加速方法。

Method: 受语言模型和扩散模型中推测采样启发，LSD将推测采样扩展至二阶Langevin动力学，利用草稿模型生成候选步骤，并通过传输映射在并行中由目标模型验证，从而实现加速。

Result: LSD在多种系统和草稿-目标组合上实现了3–9倍的速度提升，理论与实验均证实其采样轨迹严格服从目标模型分布。

Conclusion: LSD是一种分布式、模型无关、无偏的MD加速框架，成功将推测采样范式拓展至物理模拟领域，兼具高效率与统计保真性。

Abstract: Molecular dynamics (MD) is a key tool for simulating the dynamical behavior of atomic systems. However, MD is inherently serial, which makes it difficult to increase single-system throughput with concurrent compute. To address this, we introduce Langevin Speculative Dynamics (LSD), a distributed and model-agnostic speculative sampler for accelerating MD without adding relative error. Inspired by speculative methods in language and diffusion modeling, LSD uses a draft model to propose fast simulation steps and verifies them in parallel with a slower target model, applying a transport map from the draft to the target distribution. We extend speculative sampling to second-order Langevin dynamics, derive the achievable speedup as a function of physical parameters, show that LSD generalizes across different systems and draft-target combinations with a 3-9x speedup, and confirm theoretically and empirically that LSD samples trajectories from its target model distribution.

</details>


### [969] [Expressivity of congruence-based architectures for DNNs on positive-definite matrices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02490)
*Antonin Oswald,Estelle Massart*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了用于分类对称正定矩阵的神经网络架构，重点分析了类似合同变换的层（输入矩阵左右分别乘以权重矩阵W及其转置）。作者指出，常见的半正交约束会限制这类层的表达能力，导致某些激活函数下网络退化为单隐层结构，并从谱多样性角度结合Poincaré分离定理解释其原因；此外还比较了多种黎曼分类器与该类特征映射的兼容性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升对称正定矩阵分类任务中基于合同变换的神经网络层的表达能力，并理解其理论局限性。

Method: 理论分析，包括利用Poincaré分离定理研究半正交权重下合同类层的谱多样性损失，并比较不同黎曼分类器与特征映射的兼容性。

Result: 证明半正交约束会导致某些激活函数下网络表达能力退化为单隐层等价形式；揭示该现象源于谱多样性的丧失；并讨论了不同黎曼分类器的适用性差异。

Conclusion: 合同类层的表达能力受权重矩阵正交性约束显著影响，需谨慎设计以避免退化；黎曼分类器的选择应与特征映射几何特性匹配。

Abstract: This work studies neural architectures for classifying symmetric positive-definite matrices, focusing on congruence-like layers, in which the input matrix is multiplied on the left and right by a (possibly rectangular) weight matrix $W$ and its transpose. Such layers lie at the core of the celebrated SPDNet and have also been employed independently for dimensionality reduction on positive-definite data. We show that the (semi)-orthogonality constraint commonly imposed on $W$ limits the expressivity of these layers: for certain activation functions, the resulting architecture collapses to a one-hidden-layer equivalent. This lack of expressivity follows from a loss of spectral diversity in congruence-like layers for semi-orthogonal $W$ and is a direct consequence of Poincaré's separation theorem. We then examine the choice of the final classifier, comparing several Riemannian classifiers and discussing their compatibility with the feature maps produced by congruence-like layers.

</details>


### [970] [A Biconvex Formulation for Stable Transport of Mixture Models with a Unique Solution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02515)
*Yeganeh Marghi,Kelly Jin,Uygar Sümbül*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出最优混合传输（OMT）框架，通过将传输问题从单个样本转移到子群体混合物，实现可扩展且可解释的分布映射，并提供理论稳定性保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有最优传输（OT）方法在大规模数据上计算开销大，且点对点传输计划难以解释。

Method: 提出最优混合传输（OMT），将传输建模为子群体（指数族分布）间的混合物映射，优化目标为严格双凸函数，具有唯一全局最小值；理论分析其对分布扰动的稳定性。

Result: OMT将计算复杂度从依赖样本量降为仅依赖混合成分数量；在合成数据、图像及大规模单细胞RNA测序数据上验证了其有效性与实用性。

Conclusion: OMT为大规模分布对齐提供了一种可扩展、稳定且可解释的新范式，显著缓解了传统OT的计算与可解释性瓶颈。

Abstract: Optimal transport (OT) provides a principled framework for mapping between probability distributions. Despite extensive progress, applying OT to large-scale data remains computationally demanding, and the resulting pointwise transport plans are often difficult to interpret. We introduce Optimal Mixture Transport (OMT), a scalable framework that shifts the transport paradigm from individual samples to mixtures of subpopulations, reformulating the transport problem as a strictly biconvex optimization with a unique global minimizer. We further establish theoretical guarantees on the stability of the OMT map, showing that bounded perturbations of the underlying distributions lead to bounded changes in the transport plan. By formulating subpopulations as exponential-family distributions, OMT decouples computational complexity from the sample size, scaling solely with the number of mixture components. We demonstrate the effectiveness and practicality of OMT on a wide range of synthetic benchmarks and real-world datasets, including image data and large-scale single-cell RNA sequencing measurements.

</details>


### [971] [Drifting Preference Optimization for One-Step Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02521)
*Zhou Jiang,Yandong Wen,Zhen Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DrPO（Drifting Preference Optimization），一种面向确定性单步文本到图像生成器的在线偏好微调方法，无需依赖策略似然、去噪轨迹或可微奖励梯度，仅通过样本排序与特征空间合成更新方向实现高效对齐。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单步文本到图像生成器部署友好，但其偏好微调困难，因主流对齐方法常依赖策略似然、去噪轨迹、可微奖励梯度或测试时优化，难以适配黑盒/非可微奖励。

Method: DrPO对每个提示采样多个图像，用目标奖励排序；利用高分与低分样本构建非参数偶极偏好场，并结合冻结基础生成器估计参考漂移，形成特征空间更新方向；该方向通过脱离式的特征空间回归目标进行优化，奖励仅用于排序，不参与反向传播。

Result: 在SD-Turbo和SDXL-Turbo上验证，DrPO在HPSv3和GenEval等基准上优于无奖励梯度的单步偏好基线，并在匹配有效批次下将HPSv3训练计算量降低3.51倍；初步离线实验表明样本驱动的梯度合成策略具有更广适用性。

Conclusion: DrPO为单步生成器提供了一种高效、灵活、免奖励梯度反传的在线偏好对齐新范式，支持任意黑盒奖励，保持单次前向推理效率。

Abstract: One-step text-to-image generators are attractive for deployment because they generate an image with a single forward pass, but preference finetuning them remains difficult: standard alignment methods often rely on policy likelihoods, denoising trajectories, differentiable reward gradients, or test-time optimization. We propose Drifting Preference Optimization (DrPO), an online preference-finetuning method for deterministic one-step generators. For each prompt, DrPO samples candidates from the current generator, ranks them with a target reward, and uses high- and low-scoring samples to synthesize a feature-space update direction. The update is a non-parametric dipole preference field plus a reference drift estimated from the frozen base generator, and is optimized through a detached feature-space regression target. The target reward is used only for ranking, so DrPO can train with large, black-box, or non-differentiable rewards while inference remains a single generator call. We evaluate DrPO on SD-Turbo and SDXL-Turbo with multiple target rewards and benchmarks, including HPSv3 and GenEval. DrPO improves alignment over reward-gradient-free one-step preference baselines and reduces HPSv3 training computation by $3.51\times$ under the matched effective-batch setting by removing reward-model backpropagation. Initial offline experiments suggest that sample-based gradient synthesis can also be used beyond online reward ranking.

</details>


### [972] [IntraShuffler: A Privacy Preserving Framework for Heterogeneous DP Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02563)
*Farhin Farhad Riya,Olivera Kotevska,Jinyuan Stella Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了异构差分隐私联邦学习（HDP-FL）中ε感知聚合带来的新型隐私推断攻击风险，并提出IntraShuffler中间件防御框架，在保留ε-aware聚合优势的同时显著削弱服务器对客户端分布属性和跨轮更新的推断能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在异构差分隐私联邦学习中，ε-aware服务器聚合虽提升模型效用，但会暴露非IID数据导致的梯度结构信号，使诚实但好奇的服务器可实施隐私推断攻击（如推断客户端数据分布、跨轮链接更新），现有Shuffle-Model防御与HDP-FL不兼容。

Method: 首先形式化并实证验证隐私推断攻击（结合梯度去噪与代理建模）；继而提出IntraShuffler：一种面向HDP-FL的中间件，按隐私预算兼容性分桶，并在桶内进行参数级洗牌，以破坏梯度持久结构，同时支持ε-aware聚合。

Result: 在四个数据集上实验表明，IntraShuffler将梯度可恢复性降低60%以上，代理推断准确率从0.78降至0.33，且在多种FL聚合规则下保持相当的模型效用。

Conclusion: IntraShuffler有效缓解HDP-FL中ε-aware聚合引发的新型隐私泄露风险，实现了隐私保护增强与模型效用维持之间的实用平衡，为实际部署异构隐私联邦学习提供了可行路径。

Abstract: Heterogeneous Differential Privacy (HDP) in Federated Learning (FL) allows clients to select individual privacy budgets ($\varepsilon_i$) according to institutional policies and data sensitivity. In practice, many HDP-FL systems employ $\varepsilon$-aware server aggregation to improve model utility by re-weighting client updates according to their declared privacy budgets. However, gradient updates in FL retain structural patterns induced by non-independent and identically-distributed (non-IID) data, and these additional signals exposed by $\varepsilon$-aware aggregation create new opportunities for inference by an honest-but-curious server. In this work, we first show that a server equipped with gradient denoising and surrogate modeling can mount a \emph{Privacy Inference Attack} that infers distributional attributes of clients and links updates from the same client across training rounds, measured via surrogate inference accuracy and linkage success, under realistic knowledge constraints.
  The Shuffle-Model has been widely studied as a defense against such inference risks by anonymizing update sources, but it is fundamentally incompatible with HDP-FL $\varepsilon$-aware aggregation. To address this challenge, we propose \textbf{IntraShuffler}, a middleware defense framework designed for HDP-FL systems. IntraShuffler introduces a privacy-aware shuffling mechanism that groups clients into privacy-compatible buckets and performs parameter-level shuffling within each bucket to disrupt persistent gradient structure while preserving $\varepsilon$-aware aggregation. Experiments across four different datasets show that IntraShuffler reduces gradient recoverability by over 60% and decreases surrogate inference accuracy from 0.78 to 0.33 while maintaining comparable model utility across multiple FL aggregation rules.

</details>


<div id='cs.RO'></div>

# cs.RO [[Back]](#toc)

### [973] [VLAMotor: Test-Guided Enhancement of Vision-Language-Action Models via Agent-BasedData Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00053)
*Zeqin Liao,Peifan Ren,Zixu Gao,Hongyu Gong,Lianyu Hu,Wenbing Tang,Yuhong Nan,Zibin Zheng,Yang Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出VLAMotor框架，通过距离感知测试暴露VLA模型失败案例，并利用代理式数据合成生成修复轨迹用于微调，显著提升模型在仿真与真实硬件上的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型受限于训练数据覆盖，易在部署中遭遇边缘场景失败；当前研究仅止步于失败检测，缺乏将失败转化为监督数据以实现模型修复的机制。

Method: VLAMotor包含两阶段：1）基于输入到训练样本距离估计不确定性，结合不确定性排序与冗余消除构建紧凑测试集以暴露多样化失败；2）将失败轨迹抽象为语义表示，规划参数化修复技能序列，并通过逆运动学与运动执行生成可执行轨迹，自动标注后用于微调原VLA模型。

Result: 在四个机器人操作任务中，VLAMotor生成的仿真测试用例92.33%触发VLA失败，测试覆盖率较SOTA工具提升18.93%；微调后模型整体成功率提升49.25%；部署至真实硬件时成功率提升57.50%。

Conclusion: VLAMotor首次实现了从失败暴露到自动修复闭环的VLA增强框架，验证了基于失败驱动的低成本、高效益模型优化路径的有效性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models follow a data-driven paradigm and are constrained by the coverage of training data, making them prone to failure on edge-case configurations after deployment. To mitigate such risks, it is essential to expose high-quality failure modes and convert the resulting failures into supervisory data for model enhancement. Existing studies largely stop at failure detection and lack a mechanism for leveraging discovered failures for model repair.
  We propose VLAMotor, the first analysis framework for VLA enhancement, which integrates distance-aware model testing for failure exposure and agent-based data synthesis for model finetunning. First, VLAMotor estimates input uncertainty based on the distance to training samples, and combines uncertainty ranking with redundancy elimination to build compact test sets that expose diverse failures. Then, VLAMotor abstracts failure trajectories into structured semantic representations, and plans parameterized repair-skill sequences, which are then realized as executable trajectories through inverse kinematics and motion execution. The resulting successful trajectories are automatically labeled and used to fine-tune the original VLA model, yielding an enhanced VLA model. Evaluation on four representative robotic manipulation tasks shows that 92.33% of the in-simulation test cases generated by VLAMotor trigger VLA failures, and VLAMotor improves test coverage over the state-of-the-art tool by 18.93%. By fine-tuning VLA models with synthetic data derived from failed test cases, VLAMotor further enhances the overall success rate of VLA models by 49.25%. When deployed on real hardware, the simulation-enhanced models improve the success rate over the original VLA models by 57.50%, demonstrating an effective and low-cost direction for VLA enhancement.

</details>


### [974] [From Human Videos to Robot Manipulation: A Survey on Scalable Vision-Language-Action Learning with Human-Centric Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00054)
*Zhiyuan Feng,Qixiu Li,Huizhi Liang,Rushuai Yang,Yichao Shen,Zhiying Du,Zhaowei Zhang,Yu Deng,Li Zhao,Hao Zhao,Zongqing Lu,Oier Mees,Marc Pollefeys,Jiaolong Yang,Baining Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: This survey reviews how human videos can be leveraged to train Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for embodied control, categorizing methods into four types of action-related information extraction and identifying three key open challenges.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Existing VLA models rely on costly, embodiment-specific robot demonstrations; human videos offer abundant, diverse interaction data but pose challenges due to embodiment differences and lack of task-aligned annotations.

Method: The paper proposes a taxonomy of four approaches to extract action-relevant information from human videos: (i) latent action representations, (ii) predictive world models, (iii) explicit 2D supervision, and (iv) explicit 3D reconstruction.

Result: A unified framework for human-video-to-VLA knowledge transfer is established, along with identification of three core challenges: episode structuring, grounding to robot actions under heterogeneity, and realistic evaluation design.

Conclusion: Human videos are a promising, underutilized resource for VLA pretraining; advancing this direction requires addressing structural, grounding, and evaluation challenges to bridge the gap between human-centric data and robot execution.

Abstract: Recent progress in generalizable embodied control has been driven by large-scale pretraining of Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models. However, most existing approaches rely on large collections of robot demonstrations, which are costly to obtain and tightly coupled to specific embodiments. Human videos, by contrast, are abundant and capture rich interactions, providing diverse semantic and physical cues for real-world manipulation. Yet, embodiment differences and the frequent absence of task-aligned annotations make their direct use in VLA models challenging. This survey provides a unified view of how human videos are transformed into effective knowledge for VLA models. We categorize existing approaches into four classes based on the action-related information they derive: (i) latent action representations that encode inter-frame changes; (ii) predictive world models that forecast future frames; (iii) explicit 2D supervision that extracts image-plane cues; and (iv) explicit 3D reconstruction that recovers geometry or motion. Beyond this taxonomy, we highlight three key open challenges in this area: structuring unstructured videos into training-ready episodes, grounding video-derived supervision into robot-executable actions under embodiment and viewpoint heterogeneity, and designing evaluation protocols that better predict real-world deployment performance and transfer efficiency, thereby informing future research directions. A curated list of papers and resources is available at https://github.com/AaronFengZY/HumanCentricToVLA-Survey.

</details>


### [975] [Reinforcement Learning for Optimal Experiment Design in Parameter Identification of Mechatronic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00059)
*Julian Langschwert,Georg Schaefer,Jakob Rehrl,Stefan Huber,Simon Hirlaender*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的激励信号生成方法，用于机电系统辨识，在保证硬件安全约束的同时实现了高精度参数估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典系统辨识方法依赖专家知识和手工设计激励信号以满足硬件安全约束，泛化能力受限。

Method: 设计了一个强化学习智能体，在Quanser Aero 2实验平台上自主学习最优激励信号，并通过奖励塑形自动满足安全约束。

Result: 在10组独立训练中，该方法在三个被辨识参数上均达到与经典方法相当甚至更优的估计精度，且仅产生0.75%的安全违规。

Conclusion: 强化学习可有效替代传统人工设计，实现安全、高效、通用的系统辨识激励信号生成。

Abstract: Informative excitation signals are critical for accurate system identification of mechatronic systems, yet classical system identification (SI) approaches require expert knowledge and hand-crafted signal design to respect hardware safety constraints, limiting their generalizability. We propose a reinforcement learning (RL) agent that learns optimal excitation signals for a Quanser Aero 2 testbed while autonomously enforcing safety constraints through reward shaping. Evaluated across 10 independent training seeds, our comprehensive agent achieves competitive estimation accuracy across all three identified parameters, outperforming classical baselines while incurring only 0.75% safety violations.

</details>


### [976] [Linear Motility Maps in Nonlinear Viscous Fluids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00063)
*Yishun Zhou,Shai Revzen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文探讨了在不同粘度流体中微小系统运动的规律，扩展了低雷诺数下的‘运动性映射’理论至幂律流体，并发现Carreau-Yasuda型非牛顿流体中可通过非对称‘尺蠖’模型实现违反‘贝壳定理’的净位移，且运动方向可随速度调节。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解微尺度生物系统（如细菌、精子）在复杂生物流体（非牛顿流体）中的运动机制，突破传统低雷诺数下‘贝壳定理’对往复形变无法产生净运动的限制。

Method: 理论建模与分析：推广 motility map 至幂律粘度流体；构建两质量-非对称拖曳系数的 inchworm 模型；在 Carreau-Yasuda 流体中分析其非线性拖曳导致的速度依赖性净运动。

Result: 1) motility map 在幂律流体中仍为速度线性；2) 在 Carreau-Yasuda 流体中，非对称 reciprocal 运动可产生可调向净位移；3) 揭示非线性拖曳可‘绕过’贝壳定理。

Conclusion: 几何力学中的线性 motility map 可拓展用于幂律流体的运动分析与设计；某些非线性本构关系（如 Carreau-Yasuda）为微游泳器设计提供了新自由度，使看似违反贝壳定理的运动成为可能。

Abstract: Systems moving in low Reynolds number fluid regimes are known to be governed by a ``motility map'' which linearly relates their shape change rates to they body frame velocity moving through the fluid. A consequence of this is ``Purcell's Scallop Theorem'' -- a locomotion system that undergoes shape changes that follow the same path forward and backward in time (reciprocal body deformations) cannot achieve net displacement, regardless of pacing of those changes.We show that linear-in-velocity motility maps extend to any power law viscosity (a.k.a. Ostwald--de Waele fluid), and therefore to many biological fluids in intermediate shear ranges. We also show that the linear-in-velocity property can be violated in Carreau-Yasuda fluids to produce net motion using an ``inchworm'' model consisting of two unequal masses with unequal drag coefficients performing reciprocal motions. Interestingly, the direction of motion can be switched by changing speeds. Our results show that the linear motility map of geometric mechaincs can be used to analyze and design locomotion in power-law fluids, and that some nonlinear drag relationships such as Carreau-Yasuda can be exploited to generate net locomotion in seeming violation of the ``scallop theorem''.

</details>


### [977] [Invascal: Inverse-Vacuity Self-Calibration for Uncertainty-Aware LiDAR Range-View Semantic Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00069)
*Kerim Turacan,Hannes Reichert,Andrei Bolandut,Konrad Doll*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种轻量、架构无关的不确定性感知Adapter Head，通过Preference Head和Strength Head解耦分类偏好与置信强度，并结合Invascal自校准目标，实现高精度、高可靠性的LiDAR语义分割不确定性估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LiDAR语义分割不确定性估计方法（如softmax置信度）常过自信且校准差；而更可靠的方案（如MC Dropout、集成）计算开销大，难以满足实时需求。

Method: 设计了架构无关的Adapter Head，包含Preference Head（建模类别偏好）与Strength Head（建模证据强度），构建evidential Dirichlet表示；提出逆空泛性自校准目标（Invascal），直接监督Strength信号以实现可靠且防发散的不确定性校准。

Result: 在多个LiDAR数据集和骨干网络上验证，相比确定性训练、MC Dropout、集成及已有evidential方法，本方法显著提升不确定性校准性能，同时保持分割精度，且计算开销极小。

Conclusion: 该方法在不牺牲精度的前提下，以极低额外开销实现了高质量、可部署的不确定性估计，为自动驾驶与机器人安全感知提供了实用新范式。

Abstract: LiDAR semantic segmentation is a core perception capability for autonomous vehicles and mobile robots. However, safe operation also depends on knowing when predictions are unreliable. Existing approaches typically rely on softmax confidence, which is often miscalibrated and overconfident, while stronger uncertainty estimates from Monte Carlo dropout or ensembles are often computationally expensive for real-time use. To this end, we introduce a novel, architecture-agnostic uncertainty-aware Adapter Head. It decomposes the prediction into a Preference Head for class ranking and a Strength Head that refines uncertainty assessment, thereby enabling a principled construction of evidential Dirichlet representations. Building on this design, we propose our inverse-vacuity self-calibration objective (Invascal), which directly supervises the strength signal to produce reliable and well-calibrated uncertainty estimates while preventing runaway evidence growth. We evaluate our framework across multiple LiDAR datasets and backbone architectures. We compare against deterministic training, Monte Carlo dropout and ensembles, and prior evidential methods. Our approach consistently improves uncertainty calibration over traditional deterministic methods with minimal computational overhead. At the same time, it preserves competitive segmentation accuracy, where prior evidential methods often suffer performance degradation.

</details>


### [978] [Balancing Accuracy and Efficiency: Adaptive Dynamics Orchestration for Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00085)
*Francesco Cancelliere,Aniket Datar,Giovanni Muscato,Xuesu Xiao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出自适应动力学编排（ADO）框架，通过动态选择最适合当前导航场景的动力学模型，在保证实时性的同时提升预测精度，显著降低建模误差并增强越野机器人在复杂地形中的导航可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MPC自主导航中高保真动力学模型计算开销大、实时性差，而轻量模型预测不准、存在安全隐患，亟需平衡精度与效率。

Method: ADO构建多精度动力学模型库，利用在线反事实轨迹回放计算各模型残差，实时估计其在当前地形下的性能，并据此动态选择最优模型。

Result: 真实越野机器人实验表明，ADO相比固定低延迟基线显著降低建模误差，同时接近最高保真模型的精度，却不承担其计算成本。

Conclusion: ADO有效缓解了MPC中模型精度与实时性的根本权衡，提升了复杂地形下自主导航的可靠性与有效性。

Abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) for autonomous navigation faces a fundamental trade-off between model accuracy and real-time efficiency. High-fidelity dynamics models can accurately predict complex vehicle-terrain interactions during trajectory rollouts, but incur significant computational cost, increasing inference latency and reducing control frequency. Conversely, lightweight models enable fast updates and dense sampling, yet may produce erroneous predictions under safety-critical conditions, potentially leading to catastrophic failures such as vehicle rollover. To address this trade-off, we propose Adaptive Dynamics Orchestration (ADO), a framework that dynamically selects the most appropriate dynamics model for the current navigation context. ADO maintains a library of models spanning diverse accuracy-efficiency profiles and continuously refines terrain-conditioned performance estimates using residual errors from online counterfactual rollouts, where executed control actions are replayed across the model library to assess predictive discrepancy. These estimates guide model selection in real time, balancing computational efficiency and predictive accuracy. Real-world experiments on an off-road ground robot demonstrate that ADO significantly reduces modeling error compared to a fixed low-latency baseline, while approaching the accuracy of the highest-fidelity model without incurring its computational cost, resulting in more reliable and effective navigation in challenging terrain.

</details>


### [979] [Whole-Body Inverse Kinematics with Graph Diffusion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00086)
*Helong Huang,Kai Tan,Feng Wen,Guowei Huang,Xingyue Quan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出GraphDiff-IK，一种基于图扩散的结构感知逆运动学（IK）方法，将机器人建模为URDF构建的运动学图，通过条件图扩散直接生成关节配置，并引入分层消息传递与躯干感知条件机制，提升多分支机器人的几何一致性与多解能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有逆运动学方法难以泛化到不同机器人构型，且无法有效建模IK的多模态特性，尤其在具有多个运动学分支的关节系统中。

Method: 提出GraphDiff-IK：基于URDF构建机器人运动学图；将IK建模为图上的条件扩散过程；引入结构感知图推理框架（含分层阶段式消息传递与躯干感知条件）；融合带噪声的正向运动学反馈与任务空间监督以增强几何一致性。

Result: 在多种机器人平台上实验表明，该方法在单臂、双臂及带躯干/腰部结构的机器人上均实现高精度、稳定IK性能，并能为冗余机器人生成多个可行解。

Conclusion: GraphDiff-IK提供了一种统一、结构感知的扩散建模范式，显著提升了IK对多样化机器人形态和多模态解空间的建模能力。

Abstract: Inverse kinematics (IK) is a fundamental problem in robotics, requiring the generation of joint configurations that satisfy target end-effector poses. Existing approaches often struggle to generalize across diverse robot morphologies and to effectively model the multi-modal nature of IK, particularly in articulated systems with multiple kinematic branches. In this work, we propose GraphDiff-IK, a structure-aware graph diffusion framework for inverse kinematics. Specifically, we represent the robot as a kinematic graph constructed from the robot URDF, where nodes correspond to actuated joints and edges encode kinematic dependencies. Building upon this representation, we formulate IK as a conditional graph diffusion process that directly generates joint configurations on the robot graph. To better capture structural dependencies in articulated systems, we further introduce a structure-aware graph reasoning framework with hierarchical stage-wise message passing and torso-aware conditioning for multi-branch robots. In addition, we incorporate noisy forward kinematics feedback and task-space supervision to improve geometric consistency during denoising. The proposed framework provides a unified formulation that naturally supports single-arm robots, dual-arm systems, and articulated robots with torso or waist structures. Extensive experiments on diverse robotic platforms demonstrate that the proposed method achieves accurate and stable IK performance while preserving the ability to generate multiple feasible solutions for redundant robotic systems.

</details>


### [980] [Can Predicted Dynamics Exist in the Physical World?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00089)
*Barak Or*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出物理可接纳性（physical admissibility）作为预测与控制之间的接口，通过多层级物理约束（运动学、动力学、时域合成条件）对模型输出进行事前验证与拒绝，显著提升预测方案的物理可行性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低RMSE预测不保证物理可执行性，需在执行前对预测结果进行物理合理性验证。

Method: 将解码后的预测视为候选动力学，施加运动学、动力学及直接到合成时间域的约束条件进行验证；采用受控证伪（controlled falsification）和残差分析评估各条件判别能力，并引入条件级归因机制。

Result: 在LeRobot PushT数据集上，一步预测RMSE与标准化动力学残差AUC达0.982和0.972；完整物理可接纳性门限AUC为0.957；残差滤波与全门限机制可拦截87–89%无效提案，同时保持平均进展接近0.998。

Conclusion: 物理可接纳性门限是一种有效的事前验证机制，能高精度识别并拒绝物理不可行预测，兼顾可靠性与任务进展。

Abstract: Predictive Physical AI systems output state rollouts, action chunks, and latent plans, yet a low root-mean-square error (RMSE) does not imply that a particular proposal is physically executable. We formulate physical admissibility as a prediction-control interface: before execution, a decoded proposal is treated as candidate dynamics and evaluated using kinematic, dynamic, and direct-to-composed horizon conditions. Passing is not a certificate of task success; rejection identifies violation of the specified physical envelope and gives a component-level reason. On Hugging Face LeRobot PushT, controlled falsification shows that one-step prediction-RMSE and standardized dynamics residuals reach area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) 0.982 and 0.972, kinematic-only conditions reach AUC 0.592, and the full gate reaches AUC 0.957 with condition-level attribution. In replay-based intervention experiments, residual-based filters and the full physical-admissibility gate prevent 87-$89% of invalid proposals while preserving mean progress near 0.998.

</details>


### [981] [Silent Failures in Physical AI: A Literature Review of Runtime Action Authorization for Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00090)
*Barak Or*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文探讨了物理人工智能（Physical AI）系统在执行物理动作时的安全问题，指出当前模型可能在看似自信、合理且语义对齐的情况下产生危险的物理行为，而这种‘静默失败’难以被传统AI内容审核或经典机器人安全方法捕捉；文章提出需构建运行时授权边界，并定义了静默物理动作失效、运行时护栏功能分类及评估标准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理AI系统在多模态感知、语言指令与世界表征驱动下执行物理动作，但其黑箱特性可能导致看似合理却实际危险的动作，而现有安全机制（如AI内容审核或传统机器人安全）无法充分应对这类‘静默失败’。

Method: 通过综述具身基础模型、世界模型、机器人仿真、具身安全基准、安全控制、运行时保障、不确定性估计、验证与护栏评估等方向，识别技术断层，提出统一的问题形式化框架，定义静默物理动作失效，构建运行时护栏功能分类体系，并明确护栏作为物理AI可信保障机制的评估要求。

Result: 识别出当前各安全与能力技术路线缺乏统一的运行时授权边界；提出了物理AI中‘静默物理动作失效’的明确定义；建立了运行时护栏功能的分类法；并给出了评估不同护栏机制有效性的核心要求。

Conclusion: 必须在黑箱物理AI模型与物理执行之间建立可验证、可评估的运行时授权边界；单一技术路径不足以保障物理AI安全，需融合多学科方法构建系统性保障机制；所提出的分类与评估框架为后续物理AI安全研究与工程实践提供了基础支撑。

Abstract: Physical AI systems increasingly map multimodal observations, language instructions, and learned world representations into physically consequential actions. Robotics foundation models, vision-language-action models, and world-model-based autonomous systems can condition decisions that move vehicles, robots, drones, and industrial machines. This transition exposes a safety problem that is not fully captured by conventional AI content moderation or by classical robot safety alone: a black-box model may issue a physically consequential action while appearing confident, plausible, and semantically aligned. The resulting failure can be silent, arising from sensor drift, occlusion, state-estimation error, distribution shift, hallucinated affordances, or invalid physical assumptions before downstream hardware controllers detect a violation.
  Across embodied foundation models, world models, robotics simulation, embodied safety benchmarks, safe control, runtime assurance, uncertainty estimation, verification, and guardrail evaluation, model capability and safety mechanisms have advanced along largely separate technical tracks. A recurring gap synthesized here is that no single stream surveyed in this review supplies a complete runtime authorization boundary between black-box Physical AI models and physical execution. The resulting analysis develops a bounded problem formulation, a definition of silent physical-action failure, a taxonomy of runtime guardrail functions, and evaluation requirements for comparing guardrails as Physical AI assurance mechanisms.

</details>


### [982] [RocketSmith: An Agentic System for High-Powered Rocket Design and Manufacturing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00097)
*Peter Pak,Jesse Barkley,Rumi Loghmani,Derek Baich,Ananya Pamal,Amir Barati Farimani*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RocketSmith 是一个智能代理系统，用于高功率火箭的设计、制造和优化，支持零样本和人机协同工作流，并通过增材制造成功开发并试飞了四枚火箭。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提高高功率火箭研发过程的自动化与智能化水平，降低设计与制造门槛，提升迭代效率和飞行性能预测精度。

Method: 构建名为 RocketSmith 的多智能体系统，集成子代理与技能模块，支持参数化设计生成、飞行稳定性验证及飞行参数优化，并结合 FDM 增材制造进行实物制作与人工评估。

Result: 成功设计、制造并试飞四枚不同构型的高功率火箭；全部实现稳定发射，其中两枚成功回收且可复用；实测顶点高度与仿真预测结果吻合度达 84%。

Conclusion: RocketSmith 验证了智能代理系统在复杂工程任务（如火箭研发）中端到端自动化设计与制造的可行性与有效性，为未来自主工程系统提供了新范式。

Abstract: This work presents RocketSmith, an agentic system capable of the design, manufacturing, and optimization processes in high powered rocket development. The system enables the intelligent automation of software tools as to not only validate factors such as flight stability but also generate the parametric design components for the rocket assembly. A collection of subagents and skills enable optimization workflows of flight parameters via iteration in both zero-shot and human-in-the-loop workflows. With this system, four distinct high power rockets with various motor and assembly configurations were developed utilizing the unique design capabilities of additive manufacturing. These assembly components were fabricated using various FDM printers, manually evaluated for flight readiness, and flight tested at a launch event. From these tests, all rockets achieved a stable launched and two of the four rockets were successfully recovered in reflyable condition. Within the collected flight data, an 84% accuracy was achieved when comparing measured apogee to that calculated in flight simulations.

</details>


### [983] [PEACE: A Planner-Executor Agent with Constraint Enforcement for UAVs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00104)
*Erdem Uysal,Timo Kehrer,Sebastiano Panichella*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向PX4无人机的规划-执行代理（PEACE），通过解耦大语言模型（LLM）的高层任务规划与底层控制，结合ROS 2工具调用、MAVLink通信、模块化视觉检测与3D世界建模，并引入约束执行与有界重规划机制，在仿真中验证了其在可解释性、安全性与效率上的优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于基础模型的自主系统存在两大问题：紧耦合LLM控制导致高延迟与幻觉风险；或编译自然语言为黑盒端到端策略，难以解释、约束，且依赖领域数据与微调。

Method: 设计规划-执行双模块架构：LLM单次前向推理生成结构化任务计划；ROS 2工具接口调用执行器，经MAVLink控制PX4；融合2D检测器（YOLO/VLM）与针孔深度投影构建3D世界模型；引入约束层（高度/地理围栏）与有界重规划机制应对执行失败。

Result: 在Gazebo PX4软件在环仿真中验证可行：相比紧耦合LLM控制，显著提升可解释性、约束保障能力，并大幅减少LLM调用次数。

Conclusion: 解耦式规划-执行范式是构建安全、可控、可解释基础模型驱动机器人系统的有效路径，为LLM在真实自主系统中的落地提供了新设计模式与工程实践参考。

Abstract: Foundation models are increasingly used to drive autonomous systems, yet existing approaches either keep the model in a tight control loop, raising latency and hallucination risk, or compile natural language into opaque end-to-end policies that are hard to explain, constraint and require domain-specific datasets and fine-tuning. We propose a planner-executor agent for PX4-based drones that decouples high-level mission planning from low-level control. A large language model performs single-pass task planning, while execution is handled through a structured ROS 2 tool-calling interface bridged to MAVLink. The system constructs a world model by combining modular 2D detectors (e.g., YOLO or vision-language models) with a pinhole depth projection module for 3D object localization. A constraint enforcement layer enforces altitude limits and horizontal geofencing, and bounded replanning enables recovery from execution-time action failures. We position our approach within three common design patterns for foundation-model-based robotics systems and demonstrate its feasibility in PX4 software-in-the-loop simulations in Gazebo. Results highlight improved explainability, constraint enforcement, and reduced LLM calls compared to tightly coupled LLM control. The code, dataset, videos, and other material can be found at the following link: https://github.com/erdemuysalx/PEACE

</details>


### [984] [World Models for Robotic Manipulation: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00113)
*Fangyuan Wang,Ziyuan Wang,Guorui Pei,Mengshi Zhang,Canxi Liang,Jun Hu,Zhongxuan Li,Jinsong Wu,Ning Han,Zeqing Zhang,Jiaming Qi,Hongmin Wu,Shiyao Zhang,Pai Zheng,Jia Pan,David Navarro-Alarcon,Sichao Liu,Peng Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文综述了面向机器人操作的世界模型，从预测表征、动作关联方式和使用时机三方面梳理现有工作，提出统一定义与功能分类，并系统分析其在机器人学习流程中的基础设施角色、数据集与评估方法，指出接触建模、幻觉控制等关键挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 世界模型术语涵盖广泛但缺乏统一框架，导致文献碎片化，难以识别对机器人操作真正关键的设计选择。

Method: 通过三个核心问题（预测什么表征、如何与动作关联、何时在学习流程中使用）进行系统性综述；明确定义世界模型为动作条件化的预测系统，并区别于其他模块；构建五类表征家族与功能分类法；映射基础设施角色在预训练、后训练与推理适应阶段的应用；综合分析34个操作数据集与评估协议。

Result: 建立了世界模型的结构化分类体系与功能地图，明确了其作为机器人学习基础设施的演进趋势，并系统总结了当前数据集、评估标准及关键挑战。

Conclusion: 世界模型正从任务专用的动力学预测器演变为支撑整个机器人学习流程的通用预测基础设施，但仍面临接触建模不准确、预测幻觉、动作对齐困难及闭环评估缺失等开放问题。

Abstract: Robotic manipulation depends on the ability to anticipate how actions reshape objects, contacts, and scene geometry before execution. Learned world models provide this capability by predicting task-relevant future evolution under robot intervention, yet the term now spans latent dynamics models, action-conditioned video generators, three- and four-dimensional scene predictors, physics-informed simulators, and predictive modules inside vision-language-action systems. This breadth has fragmented the literature and obscured the design choices that matter for manipulation. We survey world models for robotic manipulation through three questions: what future representation is predicted, how prediction is connected to action, and when prediction is used in the robot-learning pipeline. We operationally define a world model as an action-conditioned predictive system and distinguish it from perception modules, inverse models, policies, rewards, and value functions. We then organize existing work into five representation families, develop a functional taxonomy that separates integrated prediction-action models from explicit predictive planners, and characterize infrastructure roles including synthetic experience generation, candidate filtering, search-based evaluation, learned environments, and outcome verification. We further map these roles across pretraining, post-training, and inference adaptation, review 34 manipulation datasets, and synthesize evaluation protocols for predictive fidelity, task performance, and simulator reliability. This survey shows that world models are evolving from task-specific dynamics predictors into predictive infrastructure for robot learning, while exposing open challenges in contact modeling, hallucination control, action alignment, and benchmarking under closed-loop use.

</details>


### [985] [Ontology-Guided Reasoning for Affordance-Based Explanations of Robot Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00117)
*Amar Halilovic,Vahidin Hasic,Senka Krivic*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于本体引导的推理方法，用于生成基于功能可供性（affordance）的机器人导航解释，强调解释需语义明确且可执行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在人类环境中，机器人仅检测路径被阻不够，还需理解周围物体的功能可供性、可能的状态变化及哪些变化能使其安全继续导航。

Method: 构建本地功能可供性本体，表征实体、其可供性、可供性状态及定性空间关系，并评估假设性的物体-可供性状态变化作为候选解释因素。

Result: 在机器人图书管理员场景的轻量级基准测试中，该方法比纯语义基线更准确识别相关解释因素，且在语义干扰增加时仍保持鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 功能可供性本体不仅能描述环境语义，更能作为可解释性和可靠机器人自主性的推理基础。

Abstract: This paper proposes ontology-guided reasoning for affordance-based explanations of robot navigation. In human environments, it is not sufficient for a robot to detect that its route is blocked. It must also reason about what nearby objects afford, which state changes are possible, and which of these changes would allow it to continue safely. We address this problem by representing nearby entities, their affordances, affordance states, and qualitative spatial relations in a local affordance ontology and by evaluating hypothetical object--affordance state changes as candidate explanation factors. This yields explanations that are not only semantically grounded but also actionable. We instantiate the approach in a lightweight benchmark centered on a robot librarian scenario and evaluate it on procedurally generated navigation cases. The results show that ontology-guided reasoning identifies relevant explanation factors more accurately than a semantic-only baseline and remains robust as semantic clutter increases. Overall, the paper argues that affordance ontologies can serve not merely as semantic descriptions of the environment, but as reasoning foundations for explainability and reliable robot autonomy.

</details>


### [986] [V2I Work Zone Geometry Reconstruction with Pose-Conditioned UWB Range Denoising](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00119)
*Jiaxi Liu,Hangyu Li,Yang Cheng,Rui Gana,Junwei You,Weizhe Tang,Peng Zhang,Steven T. Parker,Xiaopeng Li,Bin Ran*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向多锚点超宽带（UWB）测距的位姿条件化、排列等变预测去噪器，以提升施工区锥桶定位与几何重建精度，尤其在非视距（NLOS）主导场景下显著改善测距准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: UWB测距在实际施工区部署中受突发离群值、非视距（NLOS）误差、锚点顺序任意性及车辆位姿不确定性影响，导致工作区地图构建不可靠。

Method: 提出位姿条件化、排列等变的预测去噪器：采用共享式锚点时间预测建模范围动态，对称集合聚合处理无序/缺失锚点，位姿条件残差解码引入运动几何先验；并采用两阶段训练策略——先基于观测范围学习预测，再以NLOS加权监督微调去噪器。

Result: 在真实CAV采集的稀有V2I UWB外场数据和大规模可控仿真基准上验证，该方法显著提升测距精度、锥桶定位与工作区几何重建性能，在NLOS主导场景下稳健，对锚点重索引和中度锚点丢失鲁棒，并使测量加权场均方误差（MSE）相对原始输入降低66.9%。

Conclusion: 所提去噪框架有效缓解了UWB在复杂施工区环境下的测距退化问题，为C-V2X高精度基础设施感知提供了实用可行的技术路径。

Abstract: Reliable work zone mapping is important for connected and autonomous vehicles (CAVs) to navigate safely and smoothly through work zone areas. Cone-mounted ultra-wideband (UWB) roadside units (RSU) offer a cost-effective way for work zone layout inference, as roadside anchors and vehicle tags provide direct vehicle-to-infrastructure (V2I) range constraints for work zone geometry reconstruction. However, UWB range estimation is degraded by bursty outliers, non-line-of-sight (NLOS) errors, arbitrary anchor-ordering issues, and vehicle pose uncertainties in practical field deployments. To address these challenges, this study proposes a pose-conditioned, permutation-equivariant predictive denoiser for multi-anchor UWB ranging. The model employs shared anchor-wise temporal prediction to capture range dynamics, symmetric set aggregation to handle unordered and missing anchors, and pose-conditioned residual decoding to incorporate vehicle motion as a geometric prior. A two-stage training strategy first learns prediction from observed ranges, and then fine-tunes the denoiser with NLOS-weighted supervision. The method is evaluated on rare real-world V2I UWB field data collected with a CAV, as well as on controlled large-scale simulation benchmarks for ablative insights. Results show that the proposed method substantially improves range accuracy, cone localization, and work zone geometry reconstruction in challenging NLOS-dominated regimes, remains robust to anchor re-indexing and moderate anchor dropout, and reduces measurement-weighted field MSE by 66.9% relative to the raw input.

</details>


### [987] [Completion at the Boundary (CaB): Deployable Switching with Completion-Aware Control under Limited Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00145)
*Yusuke Sano,Takeshi Itoga*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Completion at the Boundary (CaB)方法，通过Boundary-Phase Tokens（Before/Hit/After）建模指令完成边界，实现可审计的切换决策（when）与边界稳定的手动交接控制（how），在Minecraft VLA基准上提升了复合指令执行与交接质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作（VLA）代理缺乏可靠的指令完成判断机制，尤其在短复合指令（如“先A再B”）中，错误的完成时机导致级联失败；而部署场景要求低校准、无测试时重学习、全局统一切换规则，传统标量完成预测易受任务极性变化影响。

Method: 提出CaB框架：1）用Boundary-Phase Tokens（Before/Hit/After）显式建模完成事件局部相位，保留双向边界证据；2）CaB-When模块将该结构化输出转化为最小化、可审计的切换时刻决策；3）CaB-How复用同一完成对象调节动作生成，保障交接稳定性；采用干预感知的E1/E2评估协议。

Result: 在第一人称Minecraft VLA基准上，CaB在容量与部署约束一致的前提下，显著提升复合指令执行准确率与手off质量（如减少过早/过晚切换）。

Conclusion: 保留双向边界证据的结构化完成建模（而非标量坍缩）是提升VLA系统在开放指令空间中鲁棒交接能力的关键；CaB提供了一种符合实际部署需求的、可解释且可复用的完成判定范式。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) agents can execute natural-language instructions, yet deployed systems still lack an operational interface: deciding when the instruction is complete. This gap is acute in short composites ("do A, then B"), where mistimed handoffs cascade into downstream failures. Completion is inherently closed-loop because switching is an intervention that changes the instruction context and thus future actions and observations. We study completion under a deployable low-calibration regime motivated by open-ended instruction spaces, enforcing no test-time relearning and a single globally calibrated switching rule selected once on development set and reused unchanged on test set. Under this constraint, collapsing asymmetric boundary evidence into a single scalar can be brittle under polarity shifts across tasks. We propose Completion at the Boundary (CaB), which predicts an event-local completion object in the form of Boundary-Phase Tokens (Before/Hit/After), retaining two-sided boundary evidence under this discipline. CaB-When converts this completion object into a minimal, auditable switching decision (when), while CaB-How reuses the same completion object to condition action generation for boundary-stable control through handoffs (how). Using an intervention-aware E1/E2 protocol, we show that CaB improves composite execution and handoff quality on a first-person Minecraft VLA benchmark under matched capacity and deployability constraints.

</details>


### [988] [Modeling Robotics Dataset Construction as an Artifact-Based Build Process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00162)
*Leon Pohl,Lukas Beer,George Sebastian,Mirko Maehlisch*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Bagzel，一种基于Bazel的开源工具，将机器人数据集构建建模为基于构件的构建过程，显著提升ROS bag到nuScenes格式数据集转换的效率、可复现性与增量更新能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有将ROS bag转换为机器学习数据集的方法多依赖临时脚本，导致工程开销大、迭代周期慢，缺乏可复现性和增量构建支持。

Method: 将数据集构建抽象为基于构件（artifact）的依赖图构建过程，并基于Bazel实现开源工具Bagzel；进一步引入服务端扩展Bagzel-xattr以优化摘要管理。

Result: 在20.4 GB数据集上，Bagzel在热构建中提速达386.26倍、增量构建提速7.21倍；相比基线方法，其运行时间随数据规模增长更平缓；Bagzel-xattr额外带来5.9%平均加速。

Conclusion: 将机器人数据集构建建模为构件化构建流程，能显著降低更新延迟，同时保障确定性与可复现性，为机器人数据工程提供高效、可靠的新范式。

Abstract: Robotic systems generate large volumes of multimodal sensor data, but converting ROS bag recordings into machine learning datasets is often handled by ad hoc sequential scripts, creating engineering overhead and slow iteration cycles. We model dataset construction as an artifact-based build process over a dependency graph and implement this approach in Bagzel, an open-source Bazel extension for reproducible, incremental dataset generation (including nuScenes-format export). We compare Bagzel and Bagzel-xattr (server-side digest management) against a sequential rosbag2nuscenes baseline. Bagzel reduces runtime in all evaluated execution modes, with the largest gains in iterative workflows (up to 386.26x in warm builds and 7.21x in incremental builds on a 20.4 GB dataset). Across dataset sizes from 5.1 to 20.4 GB, Bagzel variants show markedly better scaling behavior than the baseline, especially in warm and incremental modes. Bagzel-xattr provides additional gains, with a mean runtime reduction of 5.9% compared to Bagzel in the input granularity study. Overall, modeling robotics dataset construction as an artifact-based build process substantially reduces dataset update latency while maintaining a deterministic build design that supports reproducibility. Bagzel is publicly available at https://github.com/UniBwTAS/bagzel.

</details>


### [989] [Safe2Drive: Evaluating Safe Driving Behaviors of E2E Autonomous Driving Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00191)
*Nishad Sahu,Kalpana Panda,Congyuan Yu,Changzhong Qian,Shounak Sural,Ragunathan Rajkumar*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Safe2Drive（S2D）评估基准，聚焦三类常见安全关键场景（施工区、行人乱穿马路、遮挡弱势道路使用者），新增100个挑战性场景，并引入以安全性为核心的SafeDriving Score（SDS）指标；在两个SOTA端到端驾驶策略（LEAD和SimLingo）上的实验表明，其在S2D上性能大幅下降，暴露出模型在安全行为推理（如施工区理解、红灯停车、行人紧急制动）方面的严重缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶策略虽在封闭仿真中得分高，但其在常见安全关键场景下的鲁棒性和安全性尚不明确，亟需更严格、更贴近现实风险的评估基准。

Method: 构建Safe2Drive（S2D）基准：基于Bench2Drive扩展100个安全关键场景（施工区、行人乱穿、遮挡VRU）；设计SafeDriving Score（SDS），融合预碰撞制动、施工区物体接触、车道居中、行驶平滑性等安全指标；在CARLA中评估LEAD和SimLingo两个SOTA模型。

Result: 两模型在S2D上驾驶得分（DS）显著下降（LEAD：94.70→39.95；SimLingo：85.07→41.00），SDS极低（LEAD：11.85；SimLingo：15.27）；暴露脆性安全行为，如施工区理解差、闯红灯、行人制动迟滞或缺失。

Conclusion: 当前端到端自动驾驶模型缺乏对安全关键场景的可靠行为推理能力，即使在训练过的CARLA城镇中亦表现脆弱；S2D为推动安全驱动模型发展提供了新评估范式与开源资源。

Abstract: Recent end-to-end (E2E) autonomous driving policies achieve high driving scores in closed-loop simulations. Yet it remains unclear whether these policies handle common safety-critical scenarios. We present Safe2Drive (S2D), a set of Bench2Drive-aligned scenario extensions focused on three frequent families of road hazards: work zones, pedestrian jaywalking, and occluded vulnerable road users (VRUs). Safe2Drive adds 100 common but challenging scenarios and introduces SafeDriving Score (SDS), a safety-centric metric that augments prior evaluators with pre-crash braking, work zone-object contact, lane centering, and smoothness checks. Evaluating two state-of-the-art policies (LEAD and SimLingo) on S2D, we find that their driving scores drop sharply relative to their reported Bench2Drive baselines (LEAD: from 94.70 DS on Bench2Drive to 39.95 DS on S2D; SimLingo: from 85.07 DS on Bench2Drive to 41.00 DS on S2D) and that SDS on S2D is low (11.85 for LEAD and 15.27 for Sim-Lingo). These results are consistent with brittle safe-driving behaviors such as poor work-zone understanding, red-light violations, and late or absent braking for pedestrians. This study highlights a lack of safe behavioral reasoning in E2E models even when tested on CARLA towns that are part of the training set. We plan to release the code and videos for all 100 S2D scenarios.

</details>


### [990] [Cuttlebot: a platform demonstration for complex, autonomous, bio-inspired swimmers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00197)
*Alexander Nicholas White,Ang Leo Li,Alexander Yin,Derrick Roseman,Valeria Saro-Cortes,Hannah Wiswell,Aimy Wissa,Mihai Duduta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文介绍了一种名为CORE的自主机器人平台，用于驱动六个人工肌肉，并结合视觉和空间感知功能；基于该平台开发了仿乌贼机器人Cuttlebot，采用波动鳍推进方式实现三维游泳，测试显示其最大平移速度为2.5 cm/s、旋转速度为10°/s，并能六轴可控输出力与力矩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深海作业与资源开发需求增长，亟需生态友好且环境耐受性强的软体机器人；介电弹性体人工肌肉虽具耐压耐温及柔性优势，但难以集成到机器人系统中。

Method: 设计并实现自主机器人平台CORE，集成六通道人工肌肉驱动与多模态传感（视觉与空间）；基于CORE构建仿乌贼机器人Cuttlebot，采用四鳍人工肌肉+触手式软抓手结构，通过波动鳍实现三维游动；开展系留与无缆游泳实验，并施加专用控制信号实现六自由度力/力矩调控。

Result: Cuttlebot在实验中实现最高2.5 cm/s平移速度和10°/s旋转速度；CORE平台成功驱动人工肌肉实现六轴可控力与力矩输出；验证了该平台支持复杂仿生水下机器人的可行性。

Conclusion: CORE平台为开发面向海洋探测与监测的复杂仿生游泳机器人提供了通用硬件基础，Cuttlebot作为首个示范样机，验证了技术路径的有效性与扩展潜力。

Abstract: Increasing interest in deep-sea operations and resources motivates the development of ecologically sensitive but environmentally durable robots. Dielectric elastomer actuator artificial muscles are good candidates for powering such systems due to their pressure and temperature tolerance and soft makeup, but they are difficult to integrate with robotic systems. This work presents an autonomous robotic platform: the CORE, capable of driving six artificial muscles while sensing visual and spatial information. To validate the platform, we developed the Cuttlebot - a cuttlefish-inspired robot that swims in three dimensions using undulatory fin locomotion. The Cuttlebot has four primary artificial muscles in its fins in addition to a tentacle-inspired soft gripper. The robot was evaluated in a series of tethered and untethered swimming tests, demonstrating a top speed of 2.5 centimeters per second translation and 10 degrees per second rotation. Furthermore, the CORE system was capable of driving specialized control signals into the artificial muscles to controllably output force and torque in six axes. This work provides a platform for developing complex, bio-inspired swimming robots for ocean exploration and monitoring, laying the foundation with our leading example: the Cuttlebot.

</details>


### [991] [Series-Parallel Integrated Nonlinear Elastic Actuator applied to the lean motion of a bicycle simulator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00201)
*Christina Kohler,Michiel Plooij,Nuria Peña-Perez,Arend L. Schwab,Heike Vallery*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型执行器SPINEA，通过非线性传动结构使单个弹性元件同时兼具并联与串联弹性特性，兼顾高扭矩输出与高精度力控，成功应用于高保真骑行模拟器的倾角控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统并联弹性执行器（PEA）和串联弹性执行器（SEA）各有优势但难以兼顾；现有混合方案需多个弹性元件或离合机构，结构复杂、体积大。亟需一种紧凑、高性能、能同时实现高扭矩与精确力控的新型执行器。

Method: 提出Series Parallel Integrated Nonlinear Elastic Actuator（SPINEA），利用电机轴与负载轴不共线的非线性传动结构，使单一弹性元件在动力学上同时呈现并联与串联弹性行为；构建原型并集成至触觉自行车模拟器中，开展固定框架激励实验与真人骑行实验。

Result: 实验证明SPINEA具备低阻抗特性，在车架固定时扭矩跟踪带宽达4.25 Hz，真人骑行时达4 Hz，可满足高动态、高保真骑行倾角渲染需求。

Conclusion: SPINEA通过几何驱动的非线性弹性集成机制，实现了单弹性元件的双重功能，为高扭矩、高保真触觉交互提供了紧凑高效的执行器新范式，具有跨领域应用潜力。

Abstract: Designing robots for high-torque, high-fidelity haptic interaction is challenging. Parallel Elastic Actuators (PEAs) use elastic elements in parallel to smaller motors to complement torques, and Series Elastic Actuators (SEAs) use elastic elements in series to decouple motor impedance and improve force control. Recent work combines SEAs and PEAs to obtain both benefits but requires separate elastic elements or clutching. This paper presents the Series Parallel Integrated Nonlinear Elastic Actuator (SPINEA), which merges SEA and PEA such that a single elastic element takes on dual roles simultaneously, parallel and series. This is achieved by a nonlinear transmission in which the motor and load have misaligned rotation axes and are elastically connected. This geometry enables both high peak torque and precise torque tracking. We apply SPINEA to actuate lean of a haptic bicycle simulator, which requires high moments and precise rendering for safe and realistic rider interactions. We realized a prototype and performed experiments, both with an external excitation setup and with riders cycling. Our results confirm SPINEA's low impedance and precise torque tracking, up to 4.25 Hz with the bicycle frame fixed and up to 4 Hz with riders. The benefits may transfer to other applications requiring compact, high-performance actuation.

</details>


### [992] [Continuous Reasoning for Vision-Language-Action](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00229)
*Yueh-Hua Wu,Tatsuya Matsushima,Kei Ota*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出Continuous Reasoning for Vision-Language-Action（CR-VLA），用可共享、可验证的连续隐变量（高斯潜空间）替代传统自然语言作为VLA模型的推理媒介，以更好匹配连续控制的时间粒度；通过自验证目标（EMA教师模型复用学生推理预测动作）训练该隐接口，在LIBERO-PRO和真实机器人（TX-G2、HSR）上显著提升任务成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然语言在VLA中存在时间粒度不匹配问题：其任务级抽象难以支撑细粒度连续动作控制；需一种更适配、可跨模型共享且能被下游动作性能验证的推理媒介。

Method: 提出Continuous Reasoning框架：1）将推理建模为结构化连续思想（共享高斯隐变量）；2）以该隐变量为共享上下文生成分块动作；3）设计自验证训练目标——EMA教师模型必须能基于学生生成的隐变量准确预测真实动作。

Result: 在LIBERO-PRO上提升鲁棒性；真实机器人实验中，TX-G2和HSR的平均子任务成功率分别较基线π0.5提升40.4%和26.3%。

Conclusion: VLA中的推理关键不在于增加文本token，而在于构建可共享、可验证、与时间延展控制结构对齐的内部连续表示；连续隐变量比自然语言更适合作为VLA的推理媒介。

Abstract: Natural language is a powerful reasoning medium for language and vision-language models, but it is mismatched to the granularity of continuous control. Text and explicit subgoals operate at task-level granularity, whereas vision-language-action (VLA) policies must choose actions at a much finer temporal scale; a single reasoning step can therefore span many action chunks while remaining only weakly coupled to the action needed now. This suggests a different question for VLA: what should play the role of language? We argue that a useful VLA reasoning medium must be shareable across model instances, verifiable through downstream action improvement, and aligned with temporally extended control structure.
  Based on this view, we propose Continuous Reasoning for Vision-Language-Action. Our model first predicts continuous reasoning in the form of a structured set of continuous thoughts, then reuses them as shared context for chunk-structured action generation. Better action prediction alone does not certify good reasoning: if the same internal medium cannot be shared across model instances and independently verified through improved downstream control, the added latent may simply become a model-private shortcut that helps on seen behaviors without supporting generalizable control. We therefore instantiate continuous reasoning as a shared Gaussian latent interface and train it with a self-verification objective in which an exponential-moving-average teacher must successfully consume the student's reasoning when predicting target actions.
  Empirically, Continuous Reasoning improves LIBERO-PRO robustness and performs strongly on real robots, raising mean subtask success over π0.5 by 40.4% on TX-G2, an AgiBot G2-compatible variant, and 26.3% on HSR. This suggests that reasoning in VLA is less about extra tokens than about a shareable, verifiable internal language for action.

</details>


### [993] [HOIST: Humanoid Optimization with Imitation and Sample-efficient Tuning for Manipulating Suspended Loads](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00252)
*Songyang Liu,Shunyu Yao,Dingyuan Huang,Shuai Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HOIST是一种结合模仿学习和高效强化学习的方法，用于提升人形机器人操控悬吊负载的精度和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人形机器人操控悬吊负载具有挑战性，因其负载为欠驱动、振荡系统，仅能通过全身运动和间歇接触进行控制；纯模仿学习无法优化最终放置精度，而从零开始的强化学习在真实人形机器人上既不安全又样本效率低。

Method: HOIST首先基于虚拟现实（VR）遥操作演示对高层视觉-语言-动作（VLA）策略进行微调，并通过全身控制器执行其指令；随后利用VLA轨迹与批量迭代强化学习进一步优化放置精度和停止行为。

Result: 在仿真和真实人形机器人实验中，HOIST相比纯模仿学习和其他基线方法表现更优；相较于纯VLA轨迹，其平移定位误差减少19.9 cm，原始角度误差减少3.56度。

Conclusion: HOIST验证了人形机器人在欠驱动物料搬运任务中的潜力，展示了模仿学习与高效强化学习结合的有效性。

Abstract: Manipulating suspended payloads with humanoid robots is challenging because the robot can only influence an underactuated, oscillatory load through whole-body motion and intermittent contact. Imitation learning provides safe initial behavior but does not directly optimize final placement, while reinforcement learning from scratch is unsafe and sample-inefficient on real humanoids. We present HOIST-Humanoid Optimized with Imitation and Sample-efficient Tuning for manipulating suspended loads. HOIST first finetunes a high-level vision-language-action (VLA) policy from virtual-reality (VR) teleoperation demonstrations and executes its commands through a whole-body controller. It then uses VLA rollouts and iterative batched RL to improve placement accuracy and stopping behavior. Experiments in simulation and on a real humanoid show that HOIST improves over imitation-only and additional-demonstration baselines; compared with pure VLA rollouts, HOIST reduces translational placement error by 19.9 cm and raw angular error by 3.56 degrees, demonstrating the potential of humanoids for underactuated material-handling tasks.

</details>


### [994] [Per-Group Error, Not Total MSE: Fine-Tuning Vision-Language-Action Models for 11-DoF Mobile Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00253)
*Pau Montagut Bofi,Mario García Blasco,Tessa Pulli,Markus Vincze*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究了在具有异构关节空间的移动操纵器上微调视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型时，使用整体均方误差（MSE）作为评估指标的局限性；作者发现，按关节组（如机械臂、夹爪、头部、轮式底盘）分别分析误差比总MSE更能反映真实机器人性能，并建议采用分组误差作为检查点选择的更可靠指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在移动操纵器上微调VLA模型时，整体MSE最低的检查点在真实机器人上表现未必最优，这是因为将异构关节组（如臂、夹爪、头、底盘）统一为单一MSE指标会掩盖某些关键关节（如机械臂）的预测失败。

Method: 对SmolVLA（450M）和π₀.₅（3.3B）两个VLA模型在丰田HSR机器人（11自由度）上进行微调，并开展按关节组（arm、base等）的误差分解分析；在60次真实机器人实验中对比各模型性能，并用Mann-Whitney检验评估显著性。

Result: π₀.₅（80k步）在真实机器人任务得分（4.0/4）显著优于其他模型（SmolVLA: 3.5/4；π₀.₅专家微调3k步: 3.75/4），且该优势与离线臂组误差最一致，而非总MSE或底盘组误差。

Conclusion: 对于具有异构动作空间的机器人，按关节组评估误差比总体MSE更可靠，应作为模型检查点选择的核心指标。

Abstract: Fine-tuning Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for mobile manipulators with heterogeneous joint spaces can produce a counterintuitive result: the checkpoint with the lowest aggregate MSE is not the one that performs best on the real robot. We argue this is a predictable consequence of collapsing heterogeneous joint groups (arm, gripper, head, wheeled base) into a single metric, where easy-to-predict joints can mask joints that still fail.
  We fine-tune SmolVLA (450M, action-expert only) on the 11-DoF Toyota HSR and compare it against $π_{0.5}$ (3.3B), a stronger pretrained baseline. Per-group analysis exposes two patterns: in SmolVLA, the mobile base converges slowest and limits overall performance. In expert-only fine-tuning of $π_{0.5}$ (training only the action head, backbone frozen), total MSE drops below the baseline but arm accuracy degrades. On 60 real-robot trials (20 per model), $π_{0.5}$ 80k (4.0/4) significantly outperforms both fine-tuned variants (expert-only 3k: 3.75/4; HSR-SmolVLA: 3.5/4; Mann-Whitney $p \leq 0.010$), despite expert-only 3k having the lowest total MSE. This separation is most consistent with the offline arm-group error, not total MSE or base-group error. We conclude that per-group error is a more reliable signal than total MSE for checkpoint selection on robots with heterogeneous action spaces. Code: https://github.com/paumontagut/per-group-mse-vla

</details>


### [995] [ScaRF-SLAM: Scale-Consistent Reconstruction with Feed-Forward Models and Classical Visual SLAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00307)
*Yuhao Zhang,Yifu Tao,Frank Dellaert,Maurice Fallon*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将经典特征SLAM与几何基础模型（GFMs）解耦融合的框架，SLAM负责鲁棒低延迟位姿跟踪，GFMs专用于建图；通过锚定GFM建图到SLAM位姿、多尺度深度优化和子图在线更新，避免GFM误差影响位姿估计，同时提升重建精度。实验在室内外大规模数据集上验证了其轨迹与重建性能的显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有将SLAM与几何基础模型（GFMs）直接统一的方法对模型能力与预测不确定性高度敏感，GFM的几何误差会严重影响位姿估计。

Method: 提出解耦框架：用经典视觉SLAM实现鲁棒低延迟跟踪；GFM仅用于建图，并锚定于SLAM输出的位姿；通过跨深度尺度优化、子图构建、轻量级帧与子图尺度优化、投影式点云融合及子图在线更新来保证几何一致性与实时性。

Result: 在自建环路丰富、建筑尺度室内数据集上，轨迹精度优于现有方法，重建精度提升10%-20%，每10米分段重建误差约2 cm；在大型室外数据集上，每30米分段误差为10 cm（相对于LiDAR真值）。

Conclusion: 解耦SLAM与GFM的职责可有效隔离模型不确定性对位姿估计的影响，在保障跟踪鲁棒性的同时显著提升密集重建质量与尺度一致性，是一种更可靠、更实用的几何感知建图范式。

Abstract: Recent works have explored unifying SLAM with geometric foundation models (GFMs). However, directly using GFM predictions for tracking is highly sensitive to model capability and uncertainty, as geometric inaccuracies in the predictions can adversely affect pose estimation. To address this limitation, we present a decoupled framework that integrates classical feature-based SLAM with GFMs, which achieves higher quality and more consistent dense reconstruction. In brief, we use classical visual SLAM for robust low-latency tracking and use GFMs exclusively for mapping. By anchoring mapping to poses produced by the SLAM module and optimizing across depth scales, the proposed design avoids propagating inaccuracies from GFM predictions into pose estimation while imposing geometric constraints on the reconstruction. The system builds submaps from multiple posed keyframes and enforces scale consistency via lightweight frame and submap scale optimization. It also performs projection-based point cloud fusion within each submap, and updates submaps online to reflect trajectory updates from the feature-based SLAM. To evaluate tracking and reconstruction of our method, we introduce a loop-rich, building-scale indoor dataset with accurate sensor trajectories and LiDAR ground-truth. Experiments show that our approach achieves superior trajectory accuracy while improving reconstruction precision by 10%-20% over existing methods, with about 2 cm reconstruction error per 10 m chunk on building-scale dataset. On large-scale outdoor datasets, it attains 10 cm error per 30 m chunk (w.r.t LiDAR ground-truth models).

</details>


### [996] [DRL-Based Pose Control for Double-Ackermann Robots Under Actuation Uncertainties](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00313)
*Oussama Zaim,Mélodie Daniel,Aly Magassouba,Miguel Aranda,Olivier Ly*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种sim-to-sim-to-real方法，通过在PyBullet中引入Gazebo观测到的执行器效应，并结合多环境DRL（SAC和CrossQ），提升了双Ackermann转向机器人姿态控制策略在仿真与真实机器人间的泛化能力与鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习策略在真实机器人上部署时，常因仿真与现实动力学差异而性能下降；双Ackermann转向机器人因其非完整约束更难控制，且原有ManeuverNet仅支持位置控制，扩展至全姿态控制后任务难度加大，同时执行器建模不准确导致跨仿真器迁移失败。

Method: 在ManeuverNet基础上扩展为全姿态控制任务；分析执行器不确定性对策略迁移的影响；采用sim-to-sim-to-real范式，将Gazebo中观测到的执行器效应嵌入PyBullet训练环境；使用SAC和CrossQ进行多环境强化学习。

Result: 改进策略在Gazebo中成功率提升至92%，严苛阈值下仍达69%；无需额外调参即成功迁移到真实机器人；相较基线（PyBullet训练、Gazebo测试）成功率从25%显著提升。

Conclusion: 引入目标仿真器（Gazebo）的执行器特性到源仿真器（PyBullet）中，结合多环境DRL，可有效缓解建模误差带来的策略退化，提升跨仿真器及sim-to-real迁移鲁棒性。

Abstract: Robust deployment of deep reinforcement learning (DRL) policies on real robots remains challenging due to discrepancies between simulation and real-world dynamics. We address this issue in the context of maneuvering with double-Ackermann-steering mobile robots, which introduce additional constraints due to their non-holonomic nature. Building upon the DRL framework ManeuverNet, we extend its objective from position control to full pose control, resulting in a more challenging task. We further investigate the impact of actuation-related uncertainties on policy transfer. The use of simplified actuation models during training of the extended policy can lead to poor generalization, shown by a success rate drop from 100% in PyBullet to 25% in Gazebo under stricter evaluation conditions. To address this limitation, we adopt a sim-to-sim-to-real approach, where actuation effects observed in Gazebo are incorporated into the PyBullet training environment. Using multi-environment DRL with SAC and CrossQ, we learn policies that remain robust despite modeling inaccuracies. This approach can significantly reduce the performance gap across simulators, achieving up to 92% success rate in Gazebo and maintaining 69% under stricter thresholds, with successful transfer to a real robot without additional tuning.

</details>


### [997] [Crazyflow: An Accurate, GPU-Accelerated, Differentiable Drone Simulator in JAX](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01478)
*Martin Schuck,Marcel P. Rath,Yufei Hua,AbhisheK Goudar,SiQi Zhou,Angela P. Schoellig*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了Crazyflow，一个面向空中机器人算法开发的高性能、高保真、可微分且支持大规模集群仿真的统一仿真平台，显著提升了仿真速度与精度，并支持在线强化学习和多层级抽象建模。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有空中机器人仿真器在保真度、可微分性、集群规模等方面各自独立发展，缺乏一个能同时满足这些需求的统一平台，限制了算法（尤其是数据驱动和在线学习方法）的发展。

Method: 设计并实现了Crazyflow仿真器，融合高精度动力学建模、GPU加速物理引擎、解析梯度计算、轻量级系统辨识流程及多层级抽象接口；支持单机至数千架集群仿真，并与开源Crazyflie硬件生态无缝兼容。

Result: 相比SOTA仿真器，单机仿真速度快一个数量级以上，支持每集群4000架、总计数千集群的仿真；实现实测亚厘米级轨迹跟踪、超5亿步/秒采样式避障；首次实现真实无人机抛掷后0.38秒内完成在线强化学习恢复控制。

Conclusion: Crazyflow是一个开源、高速、高精度、可微分且高度可扩展的空中机器人仿真平台，为合成数据生成、在线学习与新型算法研发提供了统一基础支撑。

Abstract: High-quality, large-scale synthetic data from simulations is becoming a cornerstone for pushing the capabilities of robot algorithms. While aerial robotics simulators have evolved to support specialized needs such as fidelity, differentiability, and swarms independently, a unified platform that can synthesize data across all these domains is missing. In this work, we propose Crazyflow, a simulator designed to push the limits of aerial-robotics algorithm development, from model-based to data-driven methods, gradient-based to sampling-based approaches, and single-agent to multi-agent systems. Compared to existing state-of-the-art drone simulators, it achieves speeds more than an order of magnitude faster for a single drone and can simulate thousands of swarms of 4000 drones each. Real-world experiments show Crazyflow supports both analytical-gradient-based policy learning, achieving sub-centimeter trajectory tracking accuracy without domain randomization, and sampling-based obstacle avoidance at speeds exceeding half a billion steps per second. Breaking the traditional train-then-deploy paradigm, we show that its unprecedented speed even enables in-flight reinforcement learning; we demonstrate this by throwing a physical drone into the air and training a recovery policy from scratch in 0.38 seconds, successfully stabilizing the drone. Crazyflow supports multiple levels of simulation abstraction, is directly compatible with all open-source Crazyflie models, and enables rapid reconfiguration across custom drone platforms and applications by providing a light-weight system identification pipeline. By pushing accuracy, speed, and differentiability simultaneously, Crazyflow serves as an open-source resource for synthetic data generation, with emerging capabilities for large-scale parallelization for online, in-execution learning and optimization, opening the door to novel algorithm development.

</details>


### [998] [Belief Consistency Between Foundation-Model Evidence and Geometric Perception in Persistent Robotic Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00318)
*Christoffer Heckman,Harel Biggie,Brendan Crowe,Nicholas Roy*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于融合几何感知与基础模型语义输出的新型地图更新算子，通过每类校准的提交门和每事件冲突丢弃窗口机制，显著提升了语义地图的准确性和可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有映射系统将基础模型语义通道简单视为额外投票者，未校准其类别级可靠性，也缺乏检测几何与语义通道矛盾的机制。

Method: 提出一种更新算子，包含两个协同机制：每类校准的提交门（commit gate）和每事件冲突丢弃窗口（conflict-drop window），后者在语义主张与几何通道实时矛盾时拒绝提交该主张。

Result: 在KITTI-360和ScanNet上验证，相比仅校准方法，汽车类提交精度达99.7%（vs. 43.9%），平均逐类IoU为0.522（vs. 0.180）；优于单体式VLM提示，在真实部署中对几何通道类型和基础模型更换均具鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该算子能有效融合多源异构感知信号，在保持高精度的同时提升语义地图的可信度与实用性，适用于实际机器人部署。

Abstract: Persistent maps used by autonomous robots increasingly fuse a geometric perception stack whose assertions are well-characterized with a foundation-model channel that produces semantic claims without calibrated reliability about the same scene. Contemporary mapping systems integrate the two channels by treating the foundation-model channel as an additional voter into a per-element posterior, uncalibrated for its own per-class reliability and without machinery to flag when the two channels contradict each other at a given moment.
