Motivation: 现有基于扩散或流匹配的生成式动作策略虽在行为克隆中表现优异，但迭代采样延迟高，难以满足高频机器人控制需求；而单步方法虽快，却丢失了关键的中间轨迹演化与动作校正能力；显式估计训练时漂移场又因专家演示条件稀疏而数学上不适定。

Method: IDP通过提取观测相似专家动作的局部变化来构建条件专家几何，并与全局参考几何对比以分离出条件特异性约束；该局部几何结构自适应加权一个标量势目标；结合专家邻近的终端评估，IDP在训练中直接对单步生成器施加流形约束。

Result: 在2D、3D及真实世界操作任务上的大量实验表明，IDP能有效维持对有效动作流形的遵循，性能优于显式漂移方法，并与强单步基线相当。

Conclusion: IDP成功弥合了单步生成效率与训练时动作校正能力之间的鸿沟，为高效且几何一致的机器人模仿学习提供了新范式。

Abstract: Generative action policies based on diffusion or flow matching excel in behavior cloning, yet their iterative sampling is prohibitive for high-frequency robot control. While recent one-step formulations alleviate this latency, they inevitably discard the intermediate trajectory evolution that provides crucial action correction. Directly recovering this mechanism by explicitly estimating a training-time drifting field is mathematically ill-posed due to extreme conditional demonstration sparsity. We introduce Implicit Drifting Policy (IDP), a one-step imitation learning framework that brings the training-time correction of Drifting into policy learning without explicit vector field estimation. IDP extracts a conditional expert geometry from the local variation of observation-similar expert actions, and compares it against a global reference geometry to isolate condition-specific constraints. This local geometric structure adaptively weights a scalar potential objective. Combined with an expert-proximal terminal evaluation, IDP directly enforces manifold constraints on the one-step generator during training. Extensive evaluations across 2D, 3D, and real-world manipulation tasks show IDP effectively maintains adherence to valid action manifolds, improving upon explicit drifting methods and achieving competitive performance with strong one-step baselines.

</details>


### [1037] [Tether-Aware Dynamic Collision Avoidance for USV-HROV Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01112)
*Yang Gu,Ziyang Hong,Xuanlin Chen,Hao Wei,Cheng Wang,Shujie Yang,Yulin Si*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种针对水面无人艇（USV）在跟踪水下混合遥控潜水器（HROV）时的系缆感知动态避碰方法，兼顾系缆安全与张紧风险，结合视线导航实现协同跟踪与避障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: USV在跟踪HROV进行海底电缆巡检时，需通过脐带缆供电通信；但动态避碰易导致脐带缆刮擦他船或过度张紧，威胁作业安全。

Method: 1）构建系缆安全感知的平面域以隐式表征三维系缆-障碍船碰撞风险；2）提出系缆张紧感知的速度障碍法实现安全避碰；3）与视线（LOS）制导融合，协调跟踪与避障。

Result: Gazebo仿真表明该方法可在规避动态障碍船的同时保障系缆安全，并降低USV避让过程中系缆张紧概率。

Conclusion: 所提系缆感知动态避碰方法有效平衡了避碰安全性与HROV作业稳定性，适用于复杂水域中USV-HROV协同巡检任务。

Abstract: Heterogeneous marine robotic systems composed of an unmanned surface vehicle (USV) and a hybrid remotely operated vehicle (HROV) have shown great potential for subsea cable inspection. In such missions, the USV tracks the HROV at the surface while supplying power and communication through an umbilical tether. However, dynamic collision avoidance for the USV during HROV tracking is challenging because the submerged tether may scrape against passing vessels, while evasive maneuvers can enlarge the USV--HROV separation, thereby increasing the likelihood of tether tautness and compromising HROV operations. To address these challenges, this work proposes a tether-aware dynamic collision avoidance method for a USV tracking an HROV. First, a tether safety-aware planar domain is introduced to represent the three-dimensional collision risk between the tether and obstacle vessels without an explicit tether shape model. Second, a tether tautness-aware velocity obstacle method is developed to achieve safe avoidance while reducing the likelihood of tether tautness. Finally, the method is integrated with line-of-sight guidance to coordinate HROV tracking and collision avoidance. Gazebo-based simulations show that the proposed method avoids dynamic obstacle vessels while maintaining tether safety and reducing the likelihood of tether tautness during USV evasive maneuvers.

</details>


### [1038] [ImagineUAV: Aerial Vision-Language Navigation via World-Action Modeling and Kinodynamic Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01205)
*Xuchen Liu,Jiawei Huang,Shihao Xia,Bingxi Liu,Jinqiang Cui,Jiankun Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ImagineUAV框架，通过潜空间视频扩散模型进行指令驱动的未来观测想象，并从中推断6自由度飞行动作，再经运动学-动力学规划器优化为无碰撞轨迹，实现鲁棒、实时的无人机视觉语言导航。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言动作（VLA）模型在无人机视觉语言导航（VLN）任务中因几何不一致和动力学不匹配而表现脆弱，难以应对部分可观测条件下的6自由度飞行控制。

Method: 提出ImagineUAV框架：1）采用级联的世界-动作建模，用潜视频扩散模型生成指令条件下的未来观测帧以显式‘想象’环境演化；2）通过动作提取器从生成观测中推断6-DoF动作；3）引入运动学-动力学规划器生成无碰撞轨迹；4）设计步蒸馏推理流程保障实时性。

Result: 在基准测试和真实无人机飞行实验中，仅含1.3B参数的ImagineUAV优于现有VLN与VLA基线方法。

Conclusion: 基于‘想象’的世界模型可有效缓解VLA模型的几何与动力学失配问题，提升无人机在复杂环境中的语义导航鲁棒性与实用性。

Abstract: Vision-language navigation (VLN) for UAVs demands grounding free-form instructions into 6-DoF flight under partial observability. While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models excel at semantic reasoning, they suffer from brittleness due to geometric inconsistency and dynamics mismatch. To address this, we propose ImagineUAV, an imagination-driven framework leveraging cascaded world-action modeling. Instead of direct regression, ImagineUAV employs a latent video diffusion model to generate instruction-conditioned future observations, explicitly imagining environmental evolution, from which 6-DoF motions are inferred via an action extractor. A kinodynamic planner then refines these estimates into collision-free trajectories. Additionally, a step-distilled inference pipeline ensures real-time execution. With only 1.3B parameters, ImagineUAV outperforms prior VLN and VLA baselines on benchmarks and real-world flights, validating the practicality of imagination-driven aerial navigation.

</details>


### [1039] [Training-Free Imitation Learning with Closed-Form Diffusion Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01238)
*Raghav Mishra,Ian R. Manchester*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需训练的闭式扩散策略（CFDP），利用演示数据集直接推导出闭式得分函数，实现毫秒级实时模仿学习，并在性能上媲美需数小时训练的神经扩散策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散策略虽性能优异，但离线训练时间长，拖慢数据收集与策略部署循环。

Method: 提出闭式扩散策略（CFDP），基于演示数据集直接构造闭式得分函数，无需训练；支持实时推理与硬件部署，并可作为可组合原语用于神经扩散策略的推理时编辑（如策略引导和演示增强）。

Result: CFDP在真实硬件（移动CPU）上实现毫秒级推理，快于神经扩散策略；在模仿学习基准上性能媲美需数小时训练的神经基线；支持对预训练神经扩散策略进行数据驱动的推理时编辑。

Conclusion: CFDP提供了一种训练-性能的良好权衡，将扩散策略从训练密集型范式转向即插即用、可编辑的数据驱动推理范式。

Abstract: While diffusion-based policies have impressive performance and expressivity, their long offline training slows down the data collection and policy deployment loop. We introduce Closed-Form Diffusion Policies, a class of training-free diffusion-based policies for imitation learning using the closed-form score derived from the demonstration dataset. We deploy CFDP with real-time inference with a mobile CPU in hardware experiments, showing it can successfully perform imitation directly from the dataset in milliseconds and with faster inference than neural diffusion policies. In experiments on imitation learning benchmarks, we show that CFDP is competitive against neural baselines that require hours of training, providing a favorable tradeoff between training time and performance. Finally, we show how closed-form diffusion policies act as a composable primitive that enables data-driven inference-time editing of pre-trained neural diffusion policies, including policy guidance and novel demonstration augmentation.

</details>


### [1040] [OneVLA: A Unified Framework for Embodied Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01241)
*Lingfeng Zhang,Xiaoshuai Hao,Yingbo Tang,Lei Zhou,Shuyi Zhang,Jinkun Liu,Hongsheng Li,Chenhao Zhang,Qiang Zhang,Hangjun Ye,Xiaojun Liang,Long Chen,Wenbo Ding*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出OneVLA，一种统一的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型架构，首次将导航与操作任务整合于单一框架中，通过统一动作头和多阶段渐进训练策略（含链式思维微调），在仿真与真实环境中均达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型受限于任务专用架构，仅支持导航或操作之一，阻碍通用机器人代理的发展。

Method: 设计统一动作头以同时生成导航与操作动作；提出多阶段渐进训练策略，包括精选数据构建与链式思维（CoT）微调，促进两任务间正向迁移与相互增强。

Result: OneVLA在仿真与真实世界环境中均显著超越单任务专用模型及现有跨任务模型，达到SOTA性能。

Conclusion: OneVLA通过统一导航与操作两大核心能力，为构建真正通用的机器人系统奠定基础，并将开源模型与代码。

Abstract: Navigation and manipulation are fundamental capabilities of embodied intelligence, enabling robots to interpret natural language commands and interact physically with their surroundings. However, current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain constrained by task-specific architectures, specializing in either navigation or manipulation, which hinders the development of general-purpose robotic agents. To bridge this gap, we introduce OneVLA, a unified architecture that integrates these distinct tasks into a single, cohesive framework. Specifically, we design a unified action head capable of generating both navigation and manipulation actions without requiring task-specific variants. Furthermore, we propose a multi stage progressive training strategy-incorporating curated data construction and Chain-of-Thought (CoT) fine-tuning that facilitates strong positive transfer and mutual reinforcement between the two domains. Extensive experiments in both simulated and real-world environments demonstrate that OneVLA achieves state-of-the-art performance, significantly outperforming both specialized single-task and existing cross-task models. By unifying these core capabilities, OneVLA paves the way for truly general-purpose robotic systems. The model and source code will be publicly released.

</details>


### [1041] [DeepIPCv3: Event-Aware Multi-Modal Sensor Fusion for Sudden Pedestrian Crossing Avoidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01277)
*Oskar Natan,Andi Dharmawan,Aufaclav Zatu Kusuma Frisky,Jazi Eko Istiyanto,Jun Miura*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出DeepIPCv3，一种融合LiDAR与动态视觉传感器（DVS）事件流的多模态自主驾驶框架，利用跨模态Transformer注意力机制实现低延迟、抗运动模糊的行人突现场景响应，并在自建多光照条件数据集上验证其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶系统依赖帧式传感器，在突发行人横穿等高动态场景中存在感知延迟和运动模糊，带来严重安全风险。

Method: 提出DeepIPCv3框架：融合LiDAR点云（提供稠密3D几何）与DVS事件流（微秒级异步响应）；设计Transformer-inspired跨模态注意力机制实现动态模态对齐；采用混合策略网络（启发式轨迹跟踪+神经直接预测）输出局部路径点与控制指令。

Result: 在自建多模态离线数据集（涵盖正午与傍晚）上验证，DeepIPCv3显著降低轨迹与控制误差，消除暴露失败与运动模糊，实现光照无关的、具备数学边界保证的快速避障能力，达到SOTA预测性能。

Conclusion: LiDAR与DVS的互补融合可有效克服帧式感知瓶颈，为高动态、低延迟自动驾驶提供可靠新范式；代码将开源以促进后续研究。

Abstract: Current end-to-end autonomous driving systems predominantly rely on frame-based sensors, which suffer from inherent perception latency and motion blur during highly dynamic encounters, specifically sudden pedestrian crossings. To address this critical safety vulnerability, we propose DeepIPCv3, a novel multi-modal autonomous navigation framework that synergizes the dense 3D spatial geometry of LiDAR point clouds with the microsecond-level asynchronous event streams of a Dynamic Vision Sensor (DVS). We introduce a Transformer-inspired cross-modal attention mechanism to dynamically correlate these distinct modalities, allowing the network to instantaneously prioritize high-speed dynamic updates without sacrificing structural scene awareness. The fused latent representations are then mapped to safe local waypoints and executable control commands via a hybrid policy network that blends heuristic trajectory tracking with direct neural predictions. Due to the severe physical risks associated with live testing of these sudden crossing scenarios, the framework is rigorously evaluated offline using a custom multi-modal dataset collected across both well-illuminated noon and challenging evening conditions. Extensive comparative and ablation studies demonstrate that DeepIPCv3 achieves state-of-the-art predictive performance. By effectively eliminating exposure failures and motion blur, the proposed LiDAR and DVS fusion yields the lowest trajectory and control command errors, enabling highly reactive, mathematically bounded evasive maneuvers regardless of ambient illumination. To support future research, we will release the codes to our GitHub repo at https://github.com/oskarnatan/DeepIPCv3.

</details>


### [1042] [PSG-Nav: Probabilistic Scene Graph Navigation via Multiverse Decision Making](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01313)
*Rufeng Chen,Yue Chang,Xiaqiang Tang,Hechang Chen,Sihong Xie*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出PSG-Nav方法，通过构建3D概率场景图建模感知不确定性，并结合多世界决策与证据经验校准器提升开放词汇导航性能，在多个基准上达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开放词汇导航方法多采用局部最优确定性策略，难以应对语义模糊和模型误差带来的感知不确定性，限制了全局最优决策能力。

Method: 提出概率场景图导航（PSG-Nav）：1）构建使用完整语义类别分布的3D概率场景图；2）引入Multiverse Decision机制从联合分布中采样多个高概率世界设定，评估导航路标与各世界的兼容性；3）设计Evidential Experience Calibrator，利用历史成功/失败记忆在线校准检测结果以缓解认知不确定性。

Result: 在MP3D、HM3D和HSSD基准上成功率达66.1%、44.8%和67.9%，均创当时SOTA。

Conclusion: PSG-Nav通过显式建模和推理感知不确定性，显著提升了开放词汇导航的鲁棒性与全局决策能力，为具身智能中的不确定性处理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Open-vocabulary navigation requires embodied agents to manage significant perception uncertainty stemming from semantic ambiguity and model errors.
  However, most existing works settle for local optimal deterministic approaches, depriving complex navigation decision-making over multiple composite possibilities that are critical for globally better solutions.
  In this paper, we propose Probabilistic Scene Graph Navigation (PSG-Nav), which constructs a 3D Probabilistic Scene Graph that uses full semantic categorical distributions to account for perception uncertainty.
  To efficiently use the local distributions to compose and reason about the optimal navigation landmarks, we propose Multiverse Decision to sample multiple most likely world settings from the joint distribution, and evaluate navigation landmarks based on the compatibility between landmarks and multiverses.
  To mitigate false positives due to epistemic uncertainty in open-vocabulary navigation, we introduce the Evidential Experience Calibrator, which enables online lifelong adaptation by cross-validating detections against memories of past successes and failures.
  Extensive experiments on widely-used benchmarks MP3D, HM3D, and HSSD demonstrate that PSG-Nav establishes new state-of-the-art results, achieving Success Rates of 66.1%, 44.8%, and 67.9%, respectively. Code is available at: https://psg-nav.github.io/

</details>


### [1043] [S2M-Trek: From Single to Multi-Sphere Transport via Per-Frame Deep Sets on a Wheel-Legged Robot](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01332)
*Zong Chen,Xuebin Li,Jinpeng Xiao,Shaoyang Li,Ben Liu,Min Li,Zhouping Yin,Yiqun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文研究了在轮腿式四足机器人背部同时运输多个自由滚动球体的动态定位操作问题，提出了一种名为Per-Frame Deep Sets（PFDS）的新架构，以解决标准历史拼接编码器因忽略每帧内球体排列对称性而导致的学习失败问题；PFDS在仿真中成功实现五球无掉落运输，并进一步蒸馏为仅依赖触觉地图的轻量级策略TactSet。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在多球运输任务中因未显式建模每帧内的球体排列对称性（per-frame permutation symmetry），导致强化学习训练失败或依赖槽位索引捷径，难以扩展至更多球体。

Method: 提出Per-Frame Deep Sets（PFDS）：先在每帧内对球体集合做置换不变池化，再进行时序读出；理论证明其G_frame-不变性与通用逼近能力；并通过2×2消融实验验证架构与数据增强（槽位随机化）的独立作用；最后用DAgger将PFDS蒸馏为仅使用16×16布尔触觉接触图的TactSet策略。

Result: PFDS在相同PPO预算下稳定达到五球无掉落运输（5/5随机种子）；HCDS基线无法超越两球阶段，除非引入槽位随机化；TactSet在去除球体状态特权信息后仍保持G_frame-不变性与高性能。

Conclusion: 显式建模每帧内集合对称性对多目标动态loco-manipulation至关重要；PFDS提供了可证明的对称性保证与强扩展性；触觉驱动的TactSet验证了低维、不变表征的可行性。

Abstract: We study the problem of scaling dynamic loco-manipulation from a single free-rolling sphere to multiple spheres transported simultaneously on the back of a wheel-legged quadruped, without fences, grippers, or mechanical stops. Multiple identical free-rolling spheres form an unordered set with no persistent identity: their ordering may change independently at each history frame, creating a \emph{per-frame permutation symmetry} that standard history-concatenation set encoders do not explicitly enforce -- these encoders impose only a shared, diagonal permutation symmetry over the full history. We show that this symmetry mismatch leads to a concrete failure mode in curriculum-based reinforcement learning. Within the same PPO training budget, flat MLPs and branch-wise encoders plateau at or below the two-sphere stage, while a history-concatenation Deep Sets baseline (\HCDS) fails to progress past the two-sphere stage in our runs unless ball-to-slot assignments are randomised during training, suggesting that it exploits slot indices as a curriculum shortcut rather than learning identity-free multi-sphere dynamics. We propose \textbf{Per-Frame Deep Sets (\PFDS)}, which performs permutation-invariant pooling within each history frame before temporal readout; we prove that \PFDS is $\Gframe$-invariant and universally approximates continuous $\Gframe$-invariant policies. A $2{\times}2$ ablation over encoder architecture and slot randomisation separates the architectural and data-augmentation pathways, and \PFDS reaches the five-sphere stage with 100\% no-drop transport in simulation across all five random seeds. We further distill the \PFDS teacher into \TactSet via DAgger, replacing privileged sphere-state observations with a $16{\times}16$ Boolean union contact map, yielding a compact and naturally $\Gframe$-invariant tactile representation.

</details>


### [1044] [ActMVS: Active Scene Reconstruction with Monocular Multi-View Stereo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01367)
*Guo Pu,Yixuan Han,Zhouhui Lian*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了ActMVS，首个支持单目视觉的在线主动场景重建框架，通过视图因子图构建与全局深度优化，实现实时、高精度、全局一致的稠密深度图生成，从而支持机器人/UAV在无深度传感器条件下进行安全导航与环境重建。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有主动重建方法依赖深度传感器，增加平台成本与重量；而单目方法多为离线、缺乏全局一致性且帧率不足，难以满足实时导航需求。

Method: 提出ActMVS框架，包含视图因子图构建以指导多视角立体匹配（MVS）深度预测，以及全局深度优化模块，实现在线、稠密、全局一致的深度图生成。

Result: 在Replica数据集上，ActMVS性能媲美RGB-D方法，支持单目机器人/UAV实时构建可靠占据地图并完成安全轨迹规划。

Conclusion: ActMVS首次实现了高效、在线、单目主动场景重建，推动了轻量级、低成本空间智能系统的发展。

Abstract: Active scene reconstruction enables robots/UAVs to autonomously plan trajectories and reconstruct environments without costly manual data acquisition. Unlike passive methods, active reconstruction requires real-time construction of high-confidence occupancy maps for collision-free navigation. Existing approaches rely on depth sensors for occupancy map updates, increasing platform cost and weight. To advance spatial intelligence, we aim for a vision-only monocular solution. However, current monocular scene reconstruction methods operate offline and fail to deliver globally consistent dense depth at the frame rates required for robots/UAVs navigation. To bridge this gap, we introduce ActMVS, the first framework for monocular active reconstruction. Our framework integrates a view factor graph construction for informed Multi-View Stereo depth prediction, along with a global depth optimization, to enable the online generation of high-quality, globally consistent dense depth maps. This enables monocular robots/UAVs to maintain reliable occupancy maps for safe trajectory planning during reconstruction. Experiments on Replica datasets demonstrate performance competitive with RGB-D methods. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/TrickyGo/ActMVS.

</details>


### [1045] [Autopilot-Preserving Residual Q-Learning with HJB-Inspired Finite-Action Risk Filtering for Fixed-Wing UAV Command Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01397)
*Mehmet Iscan,Batuhan Temiz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种在固定翼无人机上结合经典自动驾驶仪与学习型监督器的新架构，通过在自动驾驶仪之上添加一个基于HJB方程思想的残差选择机制，在不修改底层控制器的前提下提升抗风扰性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典自动驾驶仪在强侧风与急转弯耦合场景下适应性差；端到端强化学习策略直接作用于舵面，存在执行风险高、安全性低的问题。

Method: 设计一个学习型监督器，从有限有界动作集中选择对空速、高度、航向参考的残差修正；使用半离散值迭代批评器（类HJB）评分候选残差，基于无操作相对哈密顿优势排序，并通过受控制李雅普诺夫函数和控制屏障函数启发的有限动作屏蔽机制保障安全，始终保留‘无操作’兜底选项；修正后的参考被投影至可执行包络后输入原自动驾驶仪。

Result: 在统一12状态运行环境中，HJB残差方法将平均RMS路径跟踪误差降至44.809米，相比基线自动驾驶仪（338.617米）降低86.77%，相比表格Q学习残差（88.809米）降低49.54%；增益集中在基线最差区域，但伴随空速误差上升。

Conclusion: 该‘自动驾驶仪保持型’残差监督架构在显著提升鲁棒性的同时保障了安全性与可解释性，其性能提升与权衡（如空速误差上升）均被完整报告，验证了分层学习控制的有效范式。

Abstract: A fixed-wing UAV must hold airspeed, altitude, and heading references under wind, gusts, and turbulence, channels coupled so that correcting one can degrade another. Classical autopilots stabilize the airframe well but adapt poorly when a hard crosswind meets an aggressive turn, while reinforcement-learning (RL) policies acting directly on the surfaces concentrate exploration risk at the actuator interface. We place a learned supervisor above an unchanged autopilot rather than inside it: it selects a residual from a finite, bounded action set on the commanded airspeed, altitude, and heading; the modified reference is projected into an admissible command envelope before reaching the autopilot, which stays the only actuator-facing controller. What is new is how the residual is chosen. HJB residual scores candidates with a semi-discrete value-iteration critic in the spirit of the Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman (HJB) equation, ranks them by a no-op-relative Hamiltonian advantage, and filters them through a control-Lyapunov- and control-barrier-inspired finite-action shield that always keeps a no-op fallback. On a shared 12-state runtime holding the plant, autopilot, and actuator model fixed, so the comparison is at the package level, HJB residual lowers mean RMS path-tracking error to 44.809 m, against 338.617 m for the baseline autopilot and 88.809 m for a tabular-Q residual, an 86.77% reduction over the baseline and 49.54% over Q-learning. The gain concentrates where the baseline fails worst and comes with a measured rise in airspeed error, so no method dominates every metric. We present this autopilot-preserving residual command-supervision design and benchmark with its trade-offs reported intact.

</details>


### [1046] [A Sonar-Visual Dataset for Cross-Modal Underwater Robot Perception](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01398)
*Weitung Chen,Phil Tinn,Per Gunnar Auran,Martin Ludvigsen,Peter Halland Haro*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了SOVIS数据集，首个大规模声纳-视觉配对水下数据集，包含76,000+帧、17次潜水采集，并配套清洗同步流程与交互式标注工具；基于小样本标注验证了跨模态鱼类检测任务，mAP@0.10较单目相机基线提升7倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 水下机器人常同时使用相机和声纳进行感知，但因缺乏足够声纳-视觉配对数据，跨模态学习研究受限。

Method: 构建SOVIS声纳-视觉配对数据集（76,000+帧，6个地点，17次潜水），开发端到端数据清洗与同步流程，并设计交互式标注工具；在小规模标注子集上开展跨模态鱼类检测实验。

Result: 在跨模态鱼类检测任务中，mAP@0.10指标相较单目相机基线提升7倍；SOVIS成为首个支持密集声纳预测等研究的公开水下跨模态基准。

Conclusion: SOVIS填补了水下跨模态感知领域高质量配对数据的空白，为后续如单目图像预测密集声纳图等研究提供了基础支撑。

Abstract: Underwater robots typically use both cameras and sonar for perception to leverage the rich semantic details of vision and the robust range measurements of acoustics. However, learning to map between these modalities via cross-modal prediction remains underexplored due to limited sonar-visual paired datasets. We present SOVIS, a sonar-visual dataset for cross-modal underwater perception. SOVIS comprises over 76,000 paired frames collected across 17 dives at six sites in the Trondheimfjord, supported by an end-to-end pipeline that cleans and synchronizes the cross-modal sensor data. We also introduce an interactive annotation tool designed to accelerate the labeling process for this paired data. Finally, we demonstrate a proof-of-concept cross-modal fish detection task using a small subset of labeled data, achieving a 7x improvement in mAP@0.10 over a monocular camera baseline. SOVIS serves as the first step toward advancing cross-modal underwater perception research, enabling research directions such as dense sonar prediction from monocular images.

</details>


### [1047] [LEGS: Fine-Tuning Teleop-Free VLAs for Humanoid Loco-manipulation in an Embodied Gaussian Splatting World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01458)
*Hojune Kim,Timothy Chen,Jiankai Sun,Lars W. Osterberg,Qianzhong Chen,Ke Wang,Mac Schwager*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出LEGS（通过具身高斯泼溅进行运动操作），一种混合模拟器，利用3D高斯泼溅背景与网格前景合成逼真训练数据，无需人工遥操作即可大规模生成带标签的演示数据，并在Unitree G1人形机器人上验证其VLA策略优于人类示范和纯网格仿真基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA策略在人形运动操作任务中受限于高昂且复杂的人类遥操作示范采集；纯仿真微调策略又难以有效迁移到真实世界。

Method: 提出LEGS混合模拟器：用3D高斯泼溅重建真实感背景，叠加网格化的机器人/物体/道具前景；结合程序化运动原语生成器自动合成带标签演示；采用两阶段确定性颜色校准对齐渲染图像与真实相机；支持同一动作在不同背景/物体下重渲染以低成本增强数据多样性。

Result: 在Unitree G1机器人三类递增难度的抓取放置任务中，仅用LEGS合成数据训练的策略全面超越人类遥操作训练策略；相比纯网格仿真基线，证明了光真实感渲染对合成数据迁移的关键作用；LEGS-AUG（重渲染增强）策略在物体与场景外观联合变化下仍保持成功，而遥操作基线完全失效。

Conclusion: LEGS通过解耦运动与外观建模、引入光真实感3DGS背景及低成本重渲染机制，显著提升了合成数据在人形VLA策略训练中的有效性与泛化能力，为人形机器人低成本、高保真仿真训练提供了新范式。

Abstract: Training vision-language-action (VLA) policies for humanoid loco-manipulation is constrained by the high cost and complexity of collecting human teleoperation demonstrations. VLA policies fine-tuned in simulators have, until now, failed to transfer effectively in humanoid loco-manipulation tasks. We present LEGS (Loco-manipulation via Embodied Gaussian Splatting), a hybrid simulator that composites a mesh foreground (robot, objects, props) over a photorealistic 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) background reconstructed from a handheld scene capture. LEGS uses a procedural motion-primitive generator to synthesize labeled demonstrations at scale without human teleoperation, and a deterministic two-stage color calibration to align the rendered 3DGS image to the robot's deployment camera. On a Unitree G1 humanoid robot, across three pick-and-place tasks of increasing whole-body difficulty and three VLA backbones (psi_0, pi_0.5, GR00T N1.6), a policy trained purely on LEGS data matches or exceeds one trained on human teleoperation demos on every experiment. It also outperforms a mesh-only simulation baseline that ablates the effect of the 3DGS background, showing that photorealistic rendering is a key enabler for synthetic data transfer. Humanoid motion is recorded independently of scene appearance in LEGS, allowing the same auto-generated demonstrations to be re-rendered under new backgrounds and object meshes--covering a new scene at more than 15x lower cost than teleoperation--to augment training data for robustness to scene variations. Under combined object-and-scene appearance shift, the policy trained on re-rendered LEGS-AUG data maintains task success while the baseline trained on teleoperation data fails entirely. Our project page is located at https://legsvla.github.io/.

</details>


### [1048] [Spatio-Temporal Reconnection for Multi-Robot Networks using Adaptive Prescribed-Time CBFs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01526)
*Hao Liu,Yupeng Yang,Yanze Zhang,Wenhao Luo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自适应预设时间控制屏障函数（adaptive PT-CBF）框架，使多机器人系统可在通信暂时中断后、在可调且可行的预设时间内重新连接，并引入兼顾任务执行与重连紧迫性的重连触发机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多机器人系统要求通信图始终保持连通过于严格，尤其在通信范围有限而环境广阔时；允许临时断连再重连更利于高效执行任务并保障信息及时共享。

Method: 提出自适应预设时间控制屏障函数（adaptive PT-CBF）框架，并设计联合考虑任务执行与重连紧迫性的重连触发机制。

Result: 理论分析证明可在预设有限时间内实现满足要求的重连；实验验证了该方法在提升任务效率和保障重连性能方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 所提adaptive PT-CBF框架及重连触发机制，为多机器人系统在受限通信条件下的灵活、可靠协同提供了新思路与可行方案。

Abstract: In multi-robot systems, maintaining persistent communication graph connectivity is often overly restrictive, especially when robots have limited communication ranges but operate in large environments. Instead, allowing robots to temporarily disconnect and later reconnect is often more desirable for efficient task execution while still ensuring timely information sharing across the team. In this paper, we propose an adaptive prescribed-time control barrier function (adaptive PT-CBF) framework that enables robots to temporarily disconnect and re-enter the communication range within an adjustable and feasible prescribed time. Moreover, we introduce a reconnection triggering mechanism that jointly considers task execution and reconnection urgency, thereby providing a principled way to decide when reconnection should occur. Theoretical analysis justifies convergence to the satisfying reconnection within a prescribed finite time. Experimental results validate the performance of our proposed adaptive PT-CBF with improved task efficiency and satisfying reconnections.

</details>


### [1049] [Hierarchical Object Representation for Spatial Robot Perception: Points, Meshes, and Superquadrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01545)
*Ceng Zhang,Wan Su,Mohamed Samshad,Gregory S. Chirikjian,Rajat Talak*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于3D场景图的分层物体几何表示方法，包含从原始传感器数据到稠密网格再到超二次曲面（superquadrics）的四层抽象结构，支持高保真重建、鲁棒重定位、解析式碰撞检测，并在多组室内外真实数据集上验证了其有效性，尤其在地图对齐任务中优于现有SOTA方法ROMAN。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D场景图（3DSG）中物体几何表示过于简化（如点云片段或3D包围框），难以支持高精度重建、鲁棒重定位和高效解析碰撞检测等高级机器人任务。

Method: 提出一种四层分层物体表示：1）原始RGB-D数据；2）稠密3D网格；3）超二次曲面（superquadrics）等解析几何原语；4）结构化场景图。构建端到端处理管线，从机器人采集的RGB-D流中自动构建该表示。

Result: 在HOPE、ReplicaCAD、Kimera-Multi和NUS Campus等多个数据集（含Unitree B2实机采集）上验证了该表示的有效性；超二次曲面驱动的地图对齐方法显著优于ROMAN。

Conclusion: 分层、解析、紧凑的超二次曲面表示能统一支撑重建、重定位与导航规划等关键任务，为长期自主机器人提供更鲁棒、可扩展的场景理解基础。

Abstract: Hierarchical 3D Scene Graphs (3DSG) have emerged as an actionable and scalable representation for long-term autonomy incorporating metric, semantic, and topological information in the scene. However, the question of geometric representation of objects in 3DSG has been overlooked as most methods use simplified geometric models such as partial point clouds or 3D bounding boxes. In this work, we introduce a hierarchical object representation that can be leveraged for high-fidelity object-level reconstruction, object-based robust re-localization or map alignment, and efficient and analytical collision checking for safe robot navigation planning in dense and cluttered environments. The representation is structurally organized into four distinct layers, progressively abstracting the scene from raw sensor data to dense 3D meshes to analytical primitives such as superquadrics, which provide a sparse and analytical representation for object geometry. We develop a pipeline that builds the hierarchical object representation from RGB-D image stream captured by a robot, and demonstrate its working in real-world open-set object scenes in both indoor and outdoor environments. Extensive experiments across diverse datasets including HOPE, ReplicaCAD, Kimera-Multi, and NUS Campus Dataset collected using Unitree B2 Robot validate our pipeline in both indoor and outdoor environments. We show that our superquadric-based map alignment method outperforms the current state-of-the-art object based map alignment method ROMAN. Our code can be found at https://github.com/perceptica-robotics/Hickory.

</details>


### [1050] [Hierarchical Semantic-Augmented Navigation: Optimal Transport and Graph-Driven Reasoning for Vision-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01565)
*Xiang Fang,Wanlong Fang,Changshuo Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为HSAN的分层语义增强导航框架，通过动态分层语义场景图、基于最优传输的拓扑规划器和图感知强化学习策略，显著提升了视觉-语言导航在连续环境中的性能与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLN-CE方法在长时序任务中因场景理解不足、规划效率低及决策鲁棒性差而表现不佳。

Method: 提出HSAN框架：1）构建动态分层语义场景图；2）基于最优传输（Kantorovich对偶）的拓扑规划器；3）图感知的强化学习低层控制器；融合谱图理论与多模态学习。

Result: 在多个VLN-CE基准上达到SOTA，显著提升导航成功率与跨环境泛化能力。

Conclusion: HSAN通过语义建模、理论驱动规划与端到端控制的协同设计，有效克服了传统静态地图与启发式规划的局限性，为VLN-CE提供了新范式。

Abstract: Vision-Language Navigation in Continuous Environments (VLN-CE) poses a formidable challenge for autonomous agents, requiring seamless integration of natural language instructions and visual observations to navigate complex 3D indoor spaces. Existing approaches often falter in long-horizon tasks due to limited scene understanding, inefficient planning, and lack of robust decision-making frameworks. We introduce the \textbf{Hierarchical Semantic-Augmented Navigation (HSAN)} framework, a groundbreaking approach that redefines VLN-CE through three synergistic innovations. First, HSAN constructs a dynamic hierarchical semantic scene graph, leveraging vision-language models to capture multi-level environmental representations, from objects to regions to zones, enabling nuanced spatial reasoning. Second, it employs an optimal transport-based topological planner, grounded in Kantorovich's duality, to select long-term goals by balancing semantic relevance and spatial accessibility with theoretical guarantees of optimality. Third, a graph-aware reinforcement learning policy ensures precise low-level control, navigating subgoals while robustly avoiding obstacles. By integrating spectral graph theory, optimal transport, and advanced multi-modal learning, HSAN addresses the shortcomings of static maps and heuristic planners prevalent in prior work. Extensive experiments on multiple challenging VLN-CE datasets demonstrate that HSAN achieves state-of-the-art performance, with significant improvements in navigation success and generalization to unseen environments.

</details>


### [1051] [Embedding Semantic Risk into Distance Fields and CBFs for Online Monocular Safe Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01605)
*Dawei Zhang,Nuo Chen,Shuo Liu,Roberto Tron,Zhiwen Fan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种在线单目感知-控制框架，将语义风险嵌入控制屏障函数（CBF）所用的距离场中，通过在欧氏有符号距离场（ESDF）中直接融合障碍物几何与类别相关风险，实现更安全、语义感知的导航与遥操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于感知的安全滤波器通常对所有障碍物施加统一的距离安全裕度，或仅将语义信息用于下游控制器调整，未能在空间表征层面编码语义风险。

Method: 构建单目RGB视频驱动的SLAM前端（基于基础模型），结合逐帧语义分割，将像素级类别标签融合至稠密3D几何重建；再据此生成语义增强型ESDF——依据障碍物类别进行差异化膨胀，并将该ESDF及其梯度输入CBF控制器，辅以类别相关增益调节控制响应。

Result: 在仿真与真实硬件实验中实现10–20 Hz在线运行，显著提升遥操作与自主导航中的语义感知安全性。

Conclusion: 将语义风险前置于空间距离表征（ESDF）中，而非后置于控制层，可兼顾安全性、实时性与语义敏感性，为单目系统提供轻量高效的语义安全导航新范式。

Abstract: We propose an online monocular perception-to-control framework that embeds semantic risk into the distance field used by Control Barrier Function (CBF)-based safe navigation and teleoperation. Many perception-based safety filters assign the same distance-based safety margin to all mapped obstacles or use semantics only as a downstream controller adjustment, rather than encoding semantic risk in the spatial representation. Our framework instead reasons online about obstacle geometry and class-dependent risk by embedding semantic information directly into the Euclidean Signed Distance Field (ESDF). This design encodes semantic risk before control optimization, so high-risk objects exert a larger spatial influence in the safety field while retaining efficient ESDF queries at runtime. Specifically, a foundation-model-based SLAM front end reconstructs dense 3-D geometry from monocular RGB video, while per-frame semantic segmentation provides pixel-level class labels that are fused into the reconstructed geometry. The resulting geometric-semantic representation is then converted into an ESDF, where semantic labels identify safety-relevant regions and impose class-dependent inflation before field computation. The semantic-aware ESDF provides the local distance values and spatial derivatives required by the CBF controller, while class-dependent gains further regulate the controller response. Extensive simulation and hardware experiments demonstrate online operation at 10--20 Hz and semantic-aware safe behavior in both teleoperation and autonomous navigation.

</details>


### [1052] [FlipItRight: Stable Pose-Targeted Throw-Flip Across Diverse Objects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01713)
*Axel Dawne,Shinkyu Park*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FlipItRight是一个用于高自由度机械臂稳定平面姿态目标投掷翻转的框架，通过分解任务为物体级和机器人级规划器，实现了90%的成功率，并且无需先验数据或学习模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决高自由度机械臂在投掷翻转任务中对目标姿态控制不稳定、执行鲁棒性差以及依赖大量训练数据的问题。

Method: 提出FlipItRight框架，将任务分解为物体级规划器（生成满足目标着陆姿态的释放状态候选）和机器人级规划器（评估可执行性并构建可行摆动运动）；以释放状态为显式中间表示，实现候选过滤、释放与预摆配置自适应选择及近释放阶段结构化运动设计（如末端执行器恒速摆动以提升释放时机不确定下的鲁棒性）。

Result: 在真实平台上对多种形状、尺寸和质量的物体进行验证，120次试验中成功率达90%；消融实验表明各设计选择均提升性能；无需先验数据或学习模型，可直接部署于新物体与目标。

Conclusion: FlipItRight提供了一种不依赖数据驱动、具备强泛化能力与高鲁棒性的投掷翻转控制框架，适用于实际机器人操作场景。

Abstract: We propose FlipItRight, a framework for stable planar pose-targeted throw-flip with a high-DoF manipulator. The task is decomposed into an object-level planner, which generates candidate release states satisfying the desired landing pose, and a robot-level planner, which evaluates executability and constructs a feasible swing motion. Treating the release state as an explicit intermediate representation enables principled candidate filtering, adaptive selection of release and pre-swing configurations, and structured near-release motion design -- in particular, approximately constant end-effector velocities during the final swing phase to improve robustness to release-timing uncertainty. We validate on a real platform across objects of varying shape, size, and mass, achieving a 90% success rate across 120 trials. Ablation studies confirm that each design choice contributes to throwing performance, and the framework requires no prior data or learned model, enabling direct deployment on new objects and targets without environment-specific calibration or data collection.

</details>


### [1053] [Trans2Occ: Voxel Occupancy Estimation and Grasp for Transparent Objects from Simulation to Reality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01777)
*Yixuan Yang,Sha Zhang,Rui Li,Zhenfei Yin,Xinzhu Ma,Yiran Qin,Lei Bai,Xudong Xu,Shilin Shan,Wangmeng Zuo,Yanyong Zhang,Wanli Ouyang,Feng Zheng,Shixiang Tang,Dongzhan Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于单视角RGB图像的透明物体感知与操作框架，直接预测体素空间占据，支持下游机器人抓取任务，并通过仿真生成大规模训练数据，在仿真到真实场景中无需微调即表现出良好泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 透明物体因折射和反射导致深度传感不可靠，现有方法（如多视角重建或深度补全）难以在实际机器人系统中扩展和部署。

Method: 提出基于单视角RGB输入的体素空间占据预测框架；构建可生成多样化材质与光照下RGB-体素配对数据的仿真流水线；采用规则化抓取策略基于预测占据进行操作。

Result: 预测的占据表示对域偏移鲁棒，仿真到真实场景无需微调即可有效迁移；在仿真和真实环境中均实现准确3D理解与可靠透明物体抓取。

Conclusion: 单视角体素占据预测为机器人透明物体感知提供了一种可扩展且有效的实用解决方案。

Abstract: Transparent objects remain challenging for robotic perception due to unreliable depth sensing caused by refraction and reflection. While prior approaches rely on multi-view reconstruction or depth completion, they are often difficult to scale or deploy in real-world robotic systems. In this paper, we present a practical framework for transparent object perception and manipulation based on single-view RGB input. Our approach predicts voxel-space occupancy directly from a single image, providing a geometry-aware representation that supports downstream robotic grasping. To enable large-scale training, we construct a simulation pipeline that generates paired RGB images and voxel occupancy annotations under diverse materials and lighting conditions. We demonstrate that the predicted occupancy representation is robust to domain shifts and transfers effectively from simulation to real-world robotic setups without fine-tuning. A simple rule-based grasping strategy built on top of the occupancy further achieves reliable grasp performance on transparent objects. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments show that our framework provides accurate 3D understanding and enables practical manipulation of transparent objects. These results suggest that single-view occupancy prediction offers a scalable and effective solution for transparent object perception in robotics.

</details>


### [1054] [DisFlow: Scene Flow from Distance Field for Object Pose, Velocity Tracking, and Dynamic Object Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01824)
*Lan Wu,Sheila Sutjipto,Jennifer Wakulicz,Teresa Vidal-Calleja*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: DisFlow是一种基于距离场的在线场景流估计新框架，支持6DoF动态物体位姿估计、运动跟踪与表面重建，采用高斯过程隐式曲面（GPIS）表征场景，并在物体坐标系中进行概率融合，实现实时稠密几何、法向、位姿轨迹、速度及不确定性输出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法多在相机或世界坐标系中操作，难以保证动态物体几何一致性；需一种能联合优化位姿、运动与表面重建的实时、鲁棒在线框架。

Method: 提出DisFlow框架：以高斯过程隐式曲面（GPIS）建模场景，利用表面法向作为导数约束提升距离场精度与梯度不确定性估计；基于距离场计算场景流，通过闭式优化在物体坐标系中增量配准点云，实现位姿与运动估计。

Result: 在动态物体序列上验证，DisFlow可同时实现高精度位姿与运动跟踪，并重建高质量物体表面，所有输出（几何、法向、轨迹、速度、不确定性）均达实时速率。

Conclusion: DisFlow通过在物体坐标系中紧密耦合空间与时间信息，显著提升了动态场景理解的准确性、一致性和实时性，为机器人感知与操作提供了统一、概率化的在线建模工具。

Abstract: We present \emph{DisFlow}, a novel framework for online scene flow estimation from distance field that enables \emph{6DoF dynamic object pose estimation}, \emph{motion tracking}, and \emph{surface reconstruction}. The scene is represented by Gaussian Process Implicit Surfaces (GPIS), with surface normals serving as derivative constraints, enabling accurate signed distance computations near the surface and gradient queries with uncertainty. With this representation as a foundation, we compute a scene flow from the distance field that describes how surface points are transported over time in consecutive frames. Through our flow, we can estimate an object's pose and motion by incrementally registering a new observed point cloud via an elegant closed-form optimisation. Unlike prior methods that operate in the camera or world frame, our approach performs probabilistic fusion directly in the \emph{object frame}, where the object remains geometrically consistent over time. The tight coupling of the DisFlow method in space and time yields dense geometry, surface normals, object pose trajectories, velocities, and uncertainty, all at real-time rates. We evaluate DisFlow on dynamic object sequences and demonstrate that it achieves accurate pose and motion tracking while simultaneously reconstructing high-quality object surfaces. Code publicly available at \href{https://github.com/LanWu076/disflow_ros2}{https://github.com/LanWu076/disflow\_ros2}

</details>


### [1055] [The Lie We Tell: Correcting the Euclidean Fallacy in Vision Language Action Policies via Score Matching on Tangent Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01847)
*Bing-Cheng Chuang,I-Hsuan Chu,Bor-Jiun Lin,YuanFu Yang,Min Sun,Chun-Yi Lee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文指出当前基于扩散模型的视觉-语言-动作策略在表示机器人位姿时存在‘欧氏谬误’，即错误地将SE(3)流形上的姿态视为欧氏空间R^12向量，导致几何失真；为此提出Lie Diffuser Actor（LDA），在SE(3)流形上直接建模，利用左不变SDE加噪、切空间得分预测与指数映射采样，从根本上消除流形漂移、保证坐标系等变性与测地线最优性，并在仿真与真实机器人任务中验证了性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散策略将SE(3)位姿扁平化为R^12向量，引发流形漂移、坐标变换下不等变、轨迹非测地线等几何缺陷，损害机器人控制的准确性与效率。

Method: 提出Lie Diffuser Actor（LDA）：在SE(3)流形上构建扩散过程，采用左不变随机微分方程（SDE）注入噪声，在李代数（切空间）中预测得分函数，并通过指数映射实现流形上采样。

Result: 在CALVIN ABC→D基准上平均任务长度从3.27提升至3.51（+7.3%）；在真实机器人实验中，LDA在大多数任务上优于基线方法。

Conclusion: 在SE(3)流形上原生建模扩散过程可有效克服欧氏谬误，显著提升机器人操作策略的几何一致性与实际性能，为具身智能中的位姿表征提供了更严谨的几何基础。

Abstract: Diffusion-based Vision-Language-Action policies achieve remarkable success in robotic manipulation, yet commit a fundamental geometric error we term the $\textbf{Euclidean Fallacy}$: representing SE(3) poses as flat $\mathbb{R}^{12}$ vectors. This approximation induces (1) manifold drift violating SO(3) constraints, (2) broken equivariance under coordinate transformations, and (3) non-geodesic trajectories with excessive kinematic cost. We introduce $\textbf{Lie Diffuser Actor (LDA)}$, a diffusion framework operating intrinsically on SE(3). Our method injects noise through left-invariant SDEs, predicts scores in the tangent space, and retracts samples via the exponential map. This formulation eliminates manifold drift by construction while guaranteeing coordinate-frame equivariance and geodesic optimality. On CALVIN ABC$\rightarrow$D, LDA improves average task length from $3.27$ to $3.51$ ($+7.3\%$). We further validate our method on real robot and the results show that our methodology outperforms the baseline on majority tasks.

</details>


### [1056] [PHASOR: Phase-Anchored Universal Action Representations for Humanoid Embodiments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01851)
*Kihyun Kim,Chaeyun Kim,Jongho Shin,Taeyoun Kwon,Junghyun Kim,Mijin Koo,Haon Park*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将动作嵌入空间作为首要设计目标的新范式，通过利用运动的周期性，将其分解为相位流形和姿态分支，并结合运动语义蒸馏，构建了一个跨机器人平台、可解释且与具体形态无关的动作嵌入空间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有动作嵌入方法将动作潜变量视为任务特定中间表示，导致其结构混乱、依赖具体机器人形态、缺乏运动语义关联，限制了可解释性、可控性和跨平台迁移能力。

Method: 利用运动固有周期性，将动作嵌入分解为FFT参数化的相位流形（捕获循环结构）和条件化姿态分支（编码非周期构型细节），并引入运动语义蒸馏；进而将多种人形机器人锚定到共享的人类预训练流形上。

Result: 构建出跨机器人平台的统一动作嵌入空间，在跨形态动作检索任务中表现优异，并在下游机器人控制任务中实现稳定性能提升。

Conclusion: 将动作嵌入空间本身作为核心设计对象，辅以基于运动特性的结构化建模与语义蒸馏，可有效提升动作表征的可解释性、泛化性与跨平台适用性。

Abstract: Learning a good action embedding space is fundamental to scalable robot policy learning, yet existing methods treat action latents as task-specific intermediates rather than first-class representations. The resulting latents are unstructured, embodiment-specific, and weakly tied to motion semantics, limiting interpretability, controllability, and transferability across robots. We position the action embedding space itself as a first-class design target, with downstream policy quality emerging from representation quality. Exploiting motion's intrinsic periodicity, we factorize it into a phase manifold that captures cyclic structure via FFT-parametric coefficients, together with a pose branch that conditions the manifold on non-periodic configuration detail. Combined with motion-semantic distillation, this factorized structure yields a cross-embodiment motion manifold that is interpretable and embodiment-agnostic by design. Anchoring multiple humanoid robots to a shared human-pretrained manifold then produces a unified action embedding space across diverse platforms, achieving strong cross-embodiment retrieval and consistent gains on downstream robot tasks.

</details>


### [1057] [Set-Supervised Diffusion Policy: Learning Action-Chunking Diffusion through Corrections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01865)
*Zhaoting Li,Gang Chen,Javier Alonso-Mora,Cosimo Della Santina,Jens Kober*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为Set-Supervised Diffusion Policy（SDP）的新框架，利用人类纠正行为中的正负动作片段进行对比学习，提升扩散策略在机器人操作任务中的鲁棒性和数据利用效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散策略易受分布偏移影响，依赖大量专家干预，且忽略人类纠正中‘不期望动作’这一负信号，导致过拟合和数据利用低效。

Method: SDP从人类纠正提供的正负动作片段构建‘期望动作集合’，设计新的训练流程，使扩散策略在生成时对齐该集合，引入对比式集合监督机制。

Result: 在多个机器人操作任务上验证了SDP显著提升策略性能，尤其增强对噪声数据的鲁棒性，并能生成高质量聚合数据集，提高人机协同学习的效率与可靠性。

Conclusion: SDP通过有效利用人类纠正中的负反馈信号，突破了传统行为克隆方法的局限，为基于人机交互的扩散策略学习提供了更高效、鲁棒的新范式。

Abstract: Diffusion policies have recently emerged as a powerful framework for robotic manipulation. However, like other behavior cloning methods, they remain vulnerable to distributional shift, often requiring human-in-the-loop interventions to correct failures during deployment. These interactions naturally provide paired supervision in the form of the robot's undesired actions and the human teacher's corrective actions. Yet existing data aggregation pipelines and standard behavior cloning losses largely ignore this negative signal from undesired actions, leading to overfitting to teacher's actions and an increasing reliance on costly expert data. To address this limitation, we propose Set-Supervised Diffusion Policy (SDP), a novel learning framework that utilizes contrastive action-chunk data to train diffusion policies from human corrections. From paired positive and negative action-chunks, SDP constructs a set of desired action-chunks and designs a training pipeline that encourages the diffusion policy to align with the set. Through extensive experiments across multiple robotic manipulation tasks, we demonstrate that SDP consistently improves policy performance, with particularly strong gains in robustness to noisy data. Moreover, SDP induces high-quality aggregated datasets, enabling more efficient and reliable policy learning from human-in-the-loop corrections. Our code is available at https://set-supervised-diffusion-policy.github.io/.

</details>


### [1058] [Closed-Form Pose Estimation of Endoluminal Medical Devices via Gradiometer-Based Electromagnetic Localization System](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01946)
*Zhiwei Wu,Jiahao Luo,Yubo Pu,Siyi Wei,Yuankai Chen,Jinhui Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于梯度计的电磁定位系统（GELS），通过紧凑型磁力计阵列作为准梯度计，利用欧拉齐次关系和多源Procrustes配准实现无需预校准场图或迭代优化的六自由度闭环姿态估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有六自由度姿态恢复方法通常依赖预校准的工作空间磁场图或非线性迭代优化，限制了其在腔内医疗设备远程导航中的实时性与适用性。

Method: 提出Gradiometer-Based Electromagnetic Localization System（GELS），使用嵌入式准梯度计（紧凑磁力计阵列）测量局部磁场及梯度张量；借助欧拉齐次关系将这些量映射为源与阵列间的位移；再通过多源Procrustes配准，仅需至少三个不共线已知位置磁源即可解算阵列位姿。

Result: 实验显示平均定位误差为10.80–15.57 mm，最高更新率达14.49 Hz，中位求解耗时172.00 μs；误差传播分析指出传感器间不一致性和偶极子模型失配是主要精度瓶颈。

Conclusion: GELS实现了无需初始位姿猜测、预校准场图或激励源矩标定的闭式六自由度定位，具备实时性与鲁棒性潜力，并为后续传感器与磁源设计提供了明确优化方向。

Abstract: Embedded magnetic tracking holds highly attractive prospects for remote navigation of endoluminal medical devices. However, existing six-degree-of-freedom pose recovery approaches often require pre-calibrated workspace field maps or iterative nonlinear optimization. This letter presents a Gradiometer-Based Electromagnetic Localization System (GELS), a closed-form tracking framework that uses a compact magnetometer array as an embedded quasi-gradiometer to estimate local magnetic fields and gradient tensors. These quantities are mapped by the Euler homogeneous relation to displacements between source and array, from which multi-source Procrustes registration recovers the array orientation and position using at least three non-collinear sources. The algorithm requires known source positions and array geometry, but no pre-calibrated workspace field maps, initial pose guesses, or calibrated excitation-source moments. The recovered pose also enables a proof-of-concept sub-level dipole localization task by serving as a mobile magnetic reference frame. Benchtop experiments across sensor-array configurations and excitation modes demonstrate sequence-averaged position errors of \SI{10.80}{\milli\meter}--\SI{15.57}{\milli\meter}, a fastest update rate of \SI{14.49}{\hertz}, and a median solver runtime of \SI{172.00}{\micro\second}. A perturbation-based error propagation analysis further identifies inter-sensor inconsistency and dipole-model mismatch as the dominant accuracy limits, thereby informing future sensor array and magnetic source design for further reducing pose-estimation error.

</details>


### [1059] [Learning Action-Conditional and Object-Centric Gaussian Splatting World Models for Rigid Objects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01950)
*Jens U. Kreber,Lukas Mack,Joerg Stueckler*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为MRO-GWM的新型世界模型，用于学习3D环境中多个刚性物体在动作条件下的动力学行为，通过物体中心高斯表示和时空Transformer架构实现对多物体运动的预测，并在合成数据集和非抓取式仿真操控任务中验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界模型在建模多刚体交互、处理遮挡导致的部分观测以及支持机器人非抓取式操控方面仍存在挑战，需一种能灵活表征任意形状、多物体场景并具备动作条件预测能力的3D世界模型。

Method: 提出Multi Rigid Object Gaussian World Model（MRO-GWM），采用物体中心高斯表示场景，结合新颖的时空Transformer架构，基于历史物体高斯表示与未来动作预测刚体运动；物体在规范坐标系中表示，运动建模为刚体变换；训练目标为多视角重建，以增强对遮挡鲁棒性。

Result: 在包含典型家居物体、多物体动态与交互的合成数据集上，MRO-GWM展现出优越的运动预测性能；在仿真中用于模型预测控制（MPC）时，成功实现了非抓取式操作任务。

Conclusion: MRO-GWM是一种有效且可扩展的3D世界模型框架，能够准确建模多刚体动作条件动力学，支持部分可观测场景下的长期预测与闭环控制，为具身智能体提供了更可靠的环境建模基础。

Abstract: World models enable intelligent agents to predict the consequences of their actions on the environment. In this paper, we propose Multi Rigid Object Gaussian World Model (MRO-GWM), a novel model that learns action-conditional dynamics of rigid objects in 3D. By representing the scene by object-centric Gaussians, we can represent arbitrary object shapes and multi-object scenes. We develop a novel spatio-temporal transformer architecture that predicts future rigid body motion from a history of object Gaussians and future actions. Objects are represented by their Gaussians in a canonical frame, which allows for describing object motion as rigid body transformation. Our model is trained on reconstructions from multiple viewpoints, which requires the model to handle partial observations of objects due to occlusions. We analyze prediction performance of our approach on synthetic datasets composed of typical household objects with multi-object dynamics and interactions by a robot end effector. We also evaluate our model in model-predictive control for non-prehensile manipulation in simulation.

</details>


### [1060] [Co-training with Ego-centric Video and Demonstration for Robot Navigation Task](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01951)
*Shoya Kuno,Yumo Ouchi,Kanata Suzuki*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种将人类第一人称行走视频转化为移动机器人模仿学习数据集的框架，通过估计相机运动并映射为机器人可执行动作，结合人类视频与真实机器人数据联合训练VLA模型，显著提升语言理解和动作生成能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动机器人导航任务中，高质量真实机器人训练数据采集成本高、耗时长；而利用人类第一人称视频进行数据增强在导航场景面临视角变化带来的挑战。

Method: 从人类第一人称步行视频中估计相机运动，并将其转换为适配地面移动机器人的动作表征；再将生成的数据与真实机器人采集数据联合用于VLA模型训练。

Result: 在水果搜索导航任务实验中，融合人类视频数据的VLA模型在语言理解和动作鲁棒性上均优于仅用单一数据源训练的模型。

Conclusion: 人类第一人称视频是一种有效且可扩展的移动机器人学习数据来源，所提框架成功 bridged 人类行为与机器人动作表征之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models are promising for diverse robotic tasks, but their performance heavily depends on large-scale high-quality training data, whose collection on real robots is costly and time-consuming. While prior work has explored augmenting manipulation datasets with egocentric human videos, applying such approaches to mobile robot navigation remains challenging due to viewpoint changes during locomotion. In this paper, we propose a framework that converts egocentric walking videos into datasets for mobile robot imitation learning. The proposed method estimates camera motion from human videos and transforms it into action representations compatible with ground mobile robots. By jointly training a VLA model on human-derived and robot-collected datasets, the model achieves improved language understanding and more robust action generation than training with either data source alone. Experiments on a fruit-search navigation task demonstrate that human egocentric videos provide an effective and scalable data source for mobile robot learning.

</details>


### [1061] [WALL-WM: Carving World Action Modeling at the Event Joints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01955)
*Shalfun Li,Victor Yao,Charles Yang,Truth Qu,Regis Cheng,Ryan Yu,Howard Lu,Newton Von,Vincent Chen,Yohann Tang,Maeve Zhang,Ellie Ma,Gody Li,Sage Yang,Lorien Shu,J. W. Gao,Ethan Chen,Colin Ye,Yu Sun,Elise Mon,PS Zhang,Neo Li,Lily Li,James Wang,Ping Yang,Chris Pan,Lucy Liang,Hang Su,Roy Gan,Hao Wang,Qian Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: WALL-WM 提出以语义事件为基本学习单元的事件驱动型世界动作模型，解决现有视频-动作模型中语言、视觉与动作在时间粒度上的不匹配问题，通过事件级预训练与两种推理模式，在真实世界泛化任务中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有世界动作模型（WAM）采用固定长度动作块进行优化，导致语言（语义目标）、视觉（连续场景变化）和动作（控制级时序）三者间存在根本性时间粒度不匹配，限制了长程语义理解与泛化能力。

Method: WALL-WM 构建事件驱动的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）预训练框架：1）以语义连贯的动作事件为原子单位；2）构建基于事件级标注与聚类平衡采样的数据生态；3）支持两种推理模式——事件模式（依下一事件描述生成可变长执行）与统一模式（结合VLM与阶梯解码实现固定块预测且保持梯度连续）；4）采用 Muon 优化器支撑大规模预训练。

Result: 在大规模真实世界泛化评测中，WALL-WM 在语言理解、场景适应与任务泛化方面均取得显著提升，达到当前最优（state-of-the-art）性能。

Conclusion: 以事件为中心的建模范式更契合多模态语义对齐本质，WALL-WM 为通用世界动作模型提供了可扩展、实用的规模化预训练路径。

Abstract: WALL-WM is a World Action Model that shifts video-action learning from chunk-centric optimization to event-grounded Vision-Language-Action pretraining, using semantically coherent action events as the atomic unit of learning. Existing WAMs commonly initialize from multimodal or video foundation models and then optimize fixed-length action chunks conditioned directly on the current observation and instruction. Although convenient, this chunk-centric formulation creates a fundamental granularity mismatch. Language describes semantic goals and events, vision evolves through continuous scene dynamics, and actions operate at control-level timescales; forcing all three into the same fixed-length prediction window turns VLA training into short-horizon correlation fitting. WALL-WM addresses this mismatch by organizing both supervision and data around semantic events. Specifically, it pairs event-grounded VLA pretraining with a data ecosystem built from event-level captions and cluster-balanced sampling, enabling scalable learning over diverse behaviors, scenes, and task structures. From the same event-pretrained backbone, WALL-WM supports two complementary inference modes. The event mode consumes next-event descriptions and enables variable-length execution chunks, while the unified mode uses a VLM with Staircase Decoding to condition conventional fixed-length chunk inference while preserving a gradient-continuous VLA path. Together with Muon-optimizer-based large-scale pretraining infrastructure, WALL-WM provides a practical scale-up recipe for general-purpose WAMs. Experiments show that WALL-WM generalizes broadly across language, scenes, and tasks, achieving state-of-the-art performance in large-scale real-world generalization evaluation.

</details>


### [1062] [Network Distributed Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Consensus Control of Quadcopters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02107)
*Youssef Mahran,Zeyad Gamal,Aamir Ahmad,Ayman El-Badawy*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向四旋翼集群一致性控制的网络分布式多智能体强化学习（ND-MARL）框架，将通信图结构嵌入决策过程，实现无需重训练即可从3机扩展至250机的零样本可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决传统多智能体强化学习在四旋翼集群控制中依赖中心化规划或完全去中心化执行所带来的可扩展性差、通信不感知等问题。

Method: 构建分层ND-MARL框架：高层采用多智能体Soft Actor-Critic（MASAC）训练分布式共识规划器，输入为2-邻域通信拓扑下的局部邻居信息；底层为经典四旋翼跟踪控制器；整体策略完全分布式执行。

Result: 在2-邻域通信拓扑下，3机训练的策略可零样本泛化至250机集群，保持一致收敛性；相比中心化MARL，轨迹更平滑、规划器与跟踪器集成更优；大规模时稳态分布展宽由稀疏信息传播导致。

Conclusion: ND-MARL是一种稳定、通信感知、具备强零样本可扩展性的分布式四旋翼集群一致性控制框架。

Abstract: This paper proposes a Network Distributed Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning (ND-MARL) framework for quadcopter consensus control. Compared to conventional multi-agent MARL formulations that rely on centralized planning or fully decentralized execution, ND-MARL incorporates the swarm communication graph into the decision process. Under a 2-Neighbor communication topology, each agent observes information of only two neighbors and outputs an action through a distributed policy. A high-level distributed consensus planner is trained using Multi-Agent Soft Actor-Critic (MASAC) and embedded in a hierarchical stack to generate reference target positions tracked by a low-level quadcopter controller. Results demonstrate smooth consensus trajectories and planner-tracker integration when compared to a centralized MARL controller. Most notably, the learned controller exhibits zero-shot scalability, as policies trained on a three-agent system are deployed to swarms of up to 250 agents under the same 2-Neighbor communication topology without retraining or fine-tuning, achieving consistent convergence with increasing steady-state spread at large team sizes due to sparse information propagation. These findings highlight ND-MARL as a stable framework for distributed, communication-aware quadcopter consensus control.

</details>


### [1063] [FW-NKF: Frequency-Weighted Neural Kalman Filters](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02251)
*Adnan Harun Dogan,Berken Utku Demirel,Christian Holz*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新型的频率加权神经卡尔曼滤波器（FW-NKF），通过在卡尔曼测量残差中嵌入因果谱整形算子，并联合学习观测与状态转移网络，以有效抑制带限噪声并提升状态估计鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典卡尔曼滤波在面对频变干扰（如传感器振动、电磁干扰、周期性噪声）及模型失配时性能下降；现有深度卡尔曼滤波方法缺乏对带限噪声的显式抑制机制。

Method: 提出频率加权神经卡尔曼滤波器（FW-NKF），将因果谱整形算子嵌入测量残差，联合学习观测网络与状态转移网络，实现滤波频谱与潜在状态表示的自适应调整。

Result: 在四类异构基准任务（包括多维Lorenz混沌系统和全身惯性姿态估计）上实验表明，定位误差最高降低10%，朝向精度显著提升；消融实验证实频率加权与深度潜态建模均对性能有贡献。

Conclusion: FW-NKF是一种有效的混合架构，能兼顾频域噪声抑制与复杂残差建模能力，提升了真实场景下机器人状态估计的鲁棒性与精度。

Abstract: Robust state estimation is central to robotic autonomy, yet classical Kalman filters struggle with frequency-dependent disturbances and model mismatch such as sensor vibrations, electromagnetic interference, and periodic noise. Although Deep Kalman Filter (DKF) variants extend the Extended Kalman Filtering (EKF) framework by learning latent transitions, they lack explicit mechanisms to suppress band-limited noise components that typically corrupt sensor measurements in real-world scenarios. We introduce the Frequency-Weighted Neural Kalman Filter (FW-NKF), a unified hybrid approach that embeds a causal spectral-shaping operator into the Kalman measurement residual and jointly learns observation, and transition networks. By adapting both the filter spectrum and the latent state representation, FW-NKF attenuates the noise-dominated frequency bands while capturing complex residual structures. We conduct extensive experiments on four heterogeneous benchmarks, including chaotic systems such as multi-dimensional Lorenz systems and full-body inertial pose estimation, and find a reduction in localization error of up to 10% as well as marked improvements in orientation accuracy. Our ablation studies confirm that frequency weighting and deep latent-state modeling contribute to overall performance.

</details>


### [1064] [Dexterity-BEV: Aligning 3D World and Actions for Generalizable Robot Policies Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02274)
*Huayi Zhou,Wei Gao,Dekun Lu,Ruiji Liu,Zhanqi Zhang,Ziyang Zhang,Jian Chen,Wenlve Zhou,Sheng Xu,Shumin Li,Kangyi Guo,Shichen Xu,Zixin Huang,Yongyi Su,Kui Jia*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向机器人操作的3D对齐端到端策略框架Dex-BEV，通过引入顶点图与顶点谱表示、BEV对齐坐标系及跨平台时空对齐流水线，克服了2D视觉语言模型在3D操作任务中缺乏空间感知与跨设备泛化能力的缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端操作策略依赖2D RGB输入，忽视操作固有的3D本质，且输入（视觉）与输出（动作）在3D空间及不同机器人/相机设置间缺乏空间对齐，导致泛化性差。

Method: 提出像素级3D输入表示（aligned vertex map & vertex spectrum），构建共享坐标系下的输入-输出3D对齐；设计鸟瞰图（BEV）作为规范对齐参考系并生成BEV图像；开发支持多机器人、多数据源的时空对齐数据处理流水线。

Result: 显著缓解了输入与输出在空间与时间维度上的错位问题，在真实世界操作任务中提升了策略的一致性与跨平台泛化能力。

Conclusion: 将2D大模型能力与显式3D几何对齐相结合是提升机器人操作泛化性的有效路径；Dex-BEV为统一、可扩展的具身智能训练范式提供了新基础。

Abstract: End-to-end manipulation policies, combined with web-scale pretrained Vision-Language Models (VLMs), show the promise for generalizable and dexterous robotic manipulation. However, they inherit two key limitations from 2D foundation models: 1) the reliance on 2D RGB inputs that ignores the intrinsically 3D nature of manipulation; and 2) the lack of spatial 3D alignment between input-output spaces as well as across diverse robot embodiments, camera setups, and trajectory datasets. In this paper, we present a series of contributions to address these issues. First, we introduce aligned vertex map and vertex spectrum -- a pixel-wise 3D representation that elevates 2D visual inputs to 3D, using camera calibration and optional depth. This novel input representation marries 3D awareness with the generalization of 2D large VLMs. Then, we propose to align the inputs and outputs of manipulation policies by expressing per-pixel 3D information of each camera view and robot actions to a shared coordinate. Based on this, we designate a canonical Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) alignment frame and innovatively propose to construct BEV images, producing a view-invariant representation robust to camera pose variations. To enable training and evaluation at scale, we develop a comprehensive data processing pipeline to perform such alignments; we also introduce a novel temporal alignment scheme for trajectories across diverse robots, human operators, and datasets. These contributions collectively mitigate input and output spatial-temporal misalignments, improving the consistency and generalization for real-world manipulation. Pretrained checkpoint, source code and data processing pipeline are available in https://hnuzhy.github.io/projects/Dex-BEV.

</details>


### [1065] [RoboSemanticBench: Diagnosing Semantic Grounding in Action Prediction for VLA Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02277)
*Bin Yu,Yao Zhang,Haishan Liu,Shijie Lian,Yuliang Wei,Xiaopeng Lin,Zhaolong Shen,Changti Wu,Ruina Hu,Bailing Wang,Cong Huang,Kai Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出RoboSemanticBench（RSB）基准，用于诊断视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在动作预测中对复杂指令语义的真正理解能力；实验表明，当前VLA模型虽能执行抓取动作，却难以基于语义正确选择目标，暴露出语义理解与动作预测之间的显著鸿沟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型在机器人任务中常依赖视觉或指令-动作捷径完成评估，而非真正理解指令语义；缺乏能严格检验语义接地能力的基准。

Method: 构建RoboSemanticBench（RSB），设计多选题驱动的具身任务：机器人需根据数学或常识类问题，从多个候选答案块中识别并抓取语义正确的块；涵盖四选一和十选一设置，控制算术、小学数学及常识推理难度。

Result: 在多个主流VLA模型上测试发现，其抓取成功率尚可，但语义正确选择率接近或低于随机水平（在控制抓取成功后），表明语义理解未有效转化为动作决策。

Conclusion: 当前VLA模型的预训练语义能力未能充分迁移到动作预测层面，亟需新方法提升语义到动作的可靠映射。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models are built on the premise that semantic understanding from pretrained language or vision-language backbones should guide robot action prediction. Yet robot fine-tuning is optimized as imitation over task-specific action distributions, and many evaluations can be solved through visual or instruction-action shortcuts. We introduce RoboSemanticBench (RSB), an embodied benchmark for diagnosing semantic grounding in action prediction: whether post-trained VLA models can use complex instruction semantics to select and manipulate the correct physical target. In each episode, a robot receives a multiple-choice math or general-knowledge question, observes candidate answer blocks, and must grasp the block corresponding to the correct answer. RSB covers controlled arithmetic, grade-school mathematical understanding, and commonsense or factual understanding under four-choice and ten-choice suites. Across representative VLA models, we find that many policies learn to grasp candidate blocks but select the semantically correct block at near-random or below-random rates after controlling for grasp success, revealing a persistent gap between backbone-level semantic competence and action prediction.

</details>


### [1066] [Dynamics Are Learned, Not Told: Semi-Supervised Discovery of Latent Dynamics Geometries For Zero-Shot Policy Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02280)
*Zhiming Xu,Weitao Zhou,Xianghui Pan,Nanshan Deng,Chengju Liu,Qijun Chen,Chenpeng Yao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向结果的动力学自适应方法，通过对比学习约束轨迹动力学编码器的Lipschitz常数，构建平滑且任务相关的隐空间，无需显式物理参数，在MuJoCo上显著提升了策略在严重动力学偏移下的鲁棒性与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中机器人动力学的动态变化导致传统强化学习策略失效；现有基于显式物理参数建模的方法依赖预设变化维度，在未建模或复合动力学变化下表现脆弱。

Method: 从结果导向出发，利用轨迹动力学编码器的Lipschitz常数与目标域遗憾之间的单调关系，通过对比学习对其上界进行约束，从而学习出平滑、任务相关且无需先验动力学信息的隐空间表示。

Result: 在MuJoCo基准测试中，该方法在严重动力学偏移（包括未建模和时变参数）下持续优于参数中心化基线，同时提升了分布内稳定性与隐变量可解释性。

Conclusion: 控制隐空间几何结构是一种有理论支撑且有效的鲁棒自适应机制。

Abstract: Real-world dynamics shifts pose a critical challenge for reinforcement learning in robotics, as policies tightly coupled to nominal environments often fail catastrophically when physical conditions change. Most existing methods rely on encoding explicitly identified physical parameters into a latent context, a parameter-centric paradigm that depends on pre-specified axes of variation and becomes brittle under unmodeled or compound dynamics changes. We revisit dynamics adaptation from an outcome-centric perspective: rather than telling policies what the dynamics are, we enable them to learn how dynamics affect interaction outcomes. Theoretically, this is grounded in a monotonic relationship between target-domain regret and the Lipschitz constant of a trajectory dynamics encoder. Practically, this constant can be upper-bounded through contrastive learning, yielding a smooth, task-relevant latent topology without privileged dynamics information. On MuJoCo benchmarks, our method consistently outperforms parameter-centric baselines under severe dynamics shifts, including unmodeled and time-varying parameters, while also improving in-distribution stability and latent interpretability. Overall, these results validate that controlling latent geometry is a principled mechanism for robust adaptation.

</details>


### [1067] [A Kinetic Theory of Encounter-Based Information Propagation in Multi-Robot Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02296)
*Alkesh K. Srivastava,Philip Dames*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于动力学理论的多机器人目标跟踪框架，聚焦于网络不连通场景下通过物理相遇传播信息的时效性问题，识别出访问、陈旧性和几何三大性能限制，并通过大规模仿真验证了该理论的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统无法假设网络持续连通，而目标跟踪性能高度依赖于目标信息被感知、在团队中传输并及时使用的能力；当仅通过物理相遇交换信息时，跟踪本质上是动力学驱动的信息传播问题。

Method: 建立基于相遇的信息传播动力学理论，形式化定义信息访问性、陈旧性（信息年龄）与几何约束三类限制，并通过大规模仿真实验（变化团队规模、区域大小、通信距离和目标速度）验证理论预测。

Result: 仿真结果证实了访问-陈旧性-几何三维度分解的有效性：通信覆盖决定访问跃迁；信息可及后，跟踪误差主要由目标位移主导；该响应在局部近似线性，但全局呈现非线性（受感知刷新与空间边界影响）；访问与陈旧性坐标能稳健刻画跟踪性能。

Conclusion: 本文建立了首个用于预测与设计基于相遇通信的多机器人系统的动力学理论框架，为不连通环境下的分布式协同提供了基础分析工具。

Abstract: Multi-robot systems cannot assume persistent network connectivity. We study this problem through target tracking, where performance depends on how quickly target information is sensed, transported through the team, and used before it becomes stale. When robots exchange information only through physical encounters, tracking becomes a kinetic information-transport problem: robot motion induces encounters, encounters carry target-state estimates, information age determines staleness, and stale information produces tracking error. This paper develops a kinetic theory of encounter-based information propagation and identifies three limits. The first is an access limit -- information cannot support team-level coordination unless it spreads beyond the robots that sensed it. The second is a staleness limit -- even propagated information loses value as the target moves. The third is a geometry limit -- when target motion outpaces information transport, tracking error approaches a saturation regime where communication improvements alone have diminishing returns. We evaluate the theory through large-scale simulations varying team size, operating area, communication range, and target speed. Results support the proposed access-staleness-geometry decomposition: communication coverage governs the access transition; once information is accessible, tracking error is shaped by target displacement; and this response is locally linear in restricted regimes but nonlinear over broader ranges because of sensing refreshes and bounded geometry. Across controlled sweeps and joint variation, the derived access and staleness coordinates reliably describe tracking performance. Together, these results establish a kinetic-theoretic framework for predicting and designing encounter-based multi-robot systems.

</details>


### [1068] [FATE-VLA:Failue-aware test generation for vision-language-action models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02307)
*Arusa Kanwal,Pablo Valle,Shaukat Ali,Aitor Arrieta*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种主动发现失败的VLA模型评估方法，结合多样性驱动探索与基于执行观测学习的代理模型，显著提升失败检测率和多样性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型评估依赖静态基准，难以发现高维具身空间中稀疏而聚集的失败案例，易低估鲁棒性风险。

Method: 将VLA评估重构为主动失败发现任务，提出失败感知的测试生成方法：融合多样性驱动的场景探索与从实际执行中学习的代理模型，引导测试聚焦高风险且多样化的场景区域。

Result: 在四个SOTA VLA模型上，该方法比基线最多提升29.7%的失败检出率，并揭示更丰富的失败模式；例如GR00T-N1.6的成功率从64.4%降至34.7%。

Conclusion: VLA评估应从固定任务套件上的被动测量，转向部署前自适应、以失败为导向的测试生成，以暴露模型弱点的结构。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are increasingly used as generalist robot policies, yet their evaluation still relies largely on static benchmarks that randomly sample task scenes. In high-dimensional embodied spaces, failures are sparse and clustered, so static benchmarking can underestimate robustness risks. We reframe VLA evaluation as an active failure-discovery problem and propose a failure-aware test-generation approach that combines diversity-driven exploration with surrogate models learned from observed executions. The method steers testing toward high-risk yet diverse scene regions. Across four state-of-the-art VLA models, it uncovers substantially more failures (up to +29.7 % over selected baselines) while revealing more diverse failure modes. This mean that, for instance, in the case of GR00T-N1.6, success rate dropped from 64.4% to 34.7%. More broadly, our findings call for a shift in VLA evaluation: from passive measurement on fixed task suites to adaptive, failure-seeking test generation that exposes the structure of model weaknesses before deployment.

</details>


### [1069] [Towards Precise Intent-Aligned VLA Aerial Navigation via Expert-Guided GRPO](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02313)
*Tianyang Chen,Wenjun Li,Xin zhou,Yuze Wu,Fei Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型的高效强化学习框架EG-GRPO，用于提升无人机在复杂人类指令下的导航性能，显著提升任务成功率与意图对齐能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准监督微调（SFT）在无人机视觉-语言-动作（VLA）任务中面临数据稀缺、泛化能力弱及对细微人类意图监督不足的问题；而传统强化微调在大范围连续空间中探索效率低，难以适用于空中导航。

Method: 提出EG-GRPO（专家引导的组相对策略优化）算法，利用少量专家数据增强在线rollout；设计异构并行流水线，实现仿真与推理并行，降低rollout时间。

Result: 在多个复杂人类意图任务上，EG-GRPO将任务成功率达SFT基线的2.13倍，意图对齐性能提升60.9%，rollout时间减少43.5%。

Conclusion: 所提RL框架有效提升了VLA模型在无人机导航中对细粒度人类意图的理解与执行能力，推动精准意图对齐飞行的发展。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising end-to-end paradigm for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to accomplish complex tasks specified by fine-grained instructions. However, standard supervised fine-tuning (SFT) suffers from data scarcity, limited generalization, and weak supervision for nuanced and complicated human intents. Reinforcement fine-tuning offers a natural way to mitigate these challenges and align policy behaviors with human intents through designable feedback, but applying it to aerial navigation remains challenging due to inefficient exploration in expansive continuous spaces. To address these challenges, we introduce an efficient reinforcement learning (RL) framework for VLA-based aerial navigation. At its core, we propose EG-GRPO (Expert-Guided Group Relative Policy Optimization) to augment online rollouts with few-shot expert data. Additionally, we design a heterogeneous pipeline enabling parallel simulation and inference, which reduces rollout time by 43.5%. Across multiple tasks specified by complex human intents, EG-GRPO improves the success rate to 2.13x that of the SFT baseline, while improving intent alignment performance by 60.9%. These results demonstrate that our framework can move aerial navigation toward precise intent-aligned flight.

</details>


### [1070] [A Simulation Platform for Flapping-Wing Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02370)
*Haichuan Li,Tomi Westerlund*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种高保真度的Unity仿真框架FWAV-Sim，用于解决扑翼飞行器（FWAVs）自主性开发中因仿真与现实差距大而导致的瓶颈问题。该框架融合了复合气动模型、分形噪声合成的湍流生成及真实传感器模拟，显著提升了控制器与感知系统在仿真中训练后的实际迁移性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有仿真平台过于简化气流模型和传感器模型，无法准确反映真实环境中复杂的湍流和感知限制，导致仿真到现实的迁移效果差，阻碍扑翼飞行器自主系统的鲁棒性开发。

Method: 构建基于Unity的高保真仿真框架FWAV-Sim，包含三部分：(1) 结合准稳态叶素理论与钝体阻力效应的复合气动模型；(2) 基于分形噪声合成的时空相关湍流生成；(3) 包含噪声IMU、LiDAR点云和RGB图像的真实传感器模拟。

Result: FWAV-Sim支持生成同步多模态数据集（含真值状态、气动力、风场及传感器流），实验验证表明其上开发的自主系统具备更强的仿真能力与现实迁移性能。

Conclusion: FWAV-Sim有效缩小了扑翼飞行器仿真与现实之间的鸿沟，为基于仿真的自主系统开发提供了更可靠、可扩展的平台。

Abstract: Flapping-wing aerial vehicles (FWAVs) demonstrate remarkable agility but face substantial autonomy challenges due to their high sensitivity to aerodynamic disturbances and limited sensor payload capacity. Current simulation platforms typically rely on oversimplified laminar flow assumptions and idealized sensor models, failing to capture the complex turbulence patterns and perceptual limitations encountered in real-world operation. This simulation-to-reality discrepancy significantly impedes the development of robust autonomy systems for FWAVs. We introduce FWAV-Sim, a high-fidelity Unity-based simulation framework that integrates: (1) a composite aerodynamic model combining quasi-steady blade-element theory with bluff-body drag effects, (2) spatiotemporally correlated turbulence generation through fractal noise synthesis, and (3) realistic sensor simulation including noisy IMU measurements, LiDAR point clouds, and RGB camera feeds. Our platform enables scalable generation of synchronized datasets containing ground-truth vehicle states, aerodynamic forces, turbulent wind fields, and multi-modal sensor streams. Experimental validation demonstrates that autonomy pipelines (including both controllers and perception systems) developed in FWAV-Sim exhibit significantly improved simulation capability, thereby advancing the outstanding performance in simulation-based development for flapping-wing aerial systems.

</details>


### [1071] [NDPP-Grasp: Non-Differentiable Physical Plausibility Constraint-Guided Task-Oriented Dexterous Grasp Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02432)
*Qiuchi Xiang,Haoxuan Qu,Hossein Rahmani,Jun Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新框架，将物理合理性引导直接注入任务对齐的灵巧抓取扩散模型的去噪过程中，从而在生成全程兼顾物理合理性和任务适用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于扩散的方法将任务对齐与物理合理性分开处理，后验修正策略无法在生成过程中引导物理约束，导致抓取质量受限。

Method: 设计一种可在去噪过程中直接嵌入非可微物理合理性约束的机制，使物理引导贯穿整个生成过程，同时保持任务对齐能力。

Result: 实验表明该框架显著提升了抓取的物理合理性与任务适配性，优于现有解耦式方法。

Conclusion: 将物理合理性作为内在引导融入扩散生成过程，比后处理修正更有效，为任务导向灵巧抓取提供了新范式。

Abstract: Task-oriented dexterous grasp generation aims to produce dexterous grasp poses that are both physically plausible and functionally suitable for specified manipulation tasks. Existing diffusion-based methods often address these two requirements in a decoupled manner: they first train a grasp diffusion model for task alignment and then rely on post-generation refinement to improve physical plausibility. However, this after-the-fact correction strategy applies physical plausibility guidance only once the grasp has already been generated, leaving the generation trajectory itself unguided by physical constraints and potentially leading to suboptimal grasps. To address this problem, we propose a novel framework that directly injects physical plausibility guidance into the denoising process of a task-aligned grasp diffusion model in a practical and effective manner, even when physical plausibility constraints are non-differentiable. This allows physical plausibility to shape grasp generation throughout denoising while preserving task alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate the efficacy of our framework.

</details>


### [1072] [Intercepting the Future: Latent-Space Predictive World Model for Dynamic VLA Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02486)
*Shahram Najam Syed,Arthur Jakobsson,Haoran Hao,Jeffrey Ichnowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AHEAD是一种预测-执行框架，通过为冻结的视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型添加一个轻量级、运动感知的潜在世界模型，使其能够应对动态场景中的快速移动物体，显著提升在动态操作任务中的成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VLA模型假设场景静止，无法处理对象在执行动作过程中移动的情况，导致因感知-执行延迟而抓取失败。

Method: 提出AHEAD框架：利用光学流估计patch级速度与加速度，训练小型世界模型在VLA特征空间中预测未来patch token；引入语言与运动联合显著性掩码聚焦关键区域，并自适应设定预测时间步长（依据预测不确定性动态终止）；最终将预测特征送入冻结的动作解码器生成动作。

Result: 在20个动态仿真任务中成功率提升至79%-97%（基线为31%-58%）；在UFactory xArm 7物理平台上，传送带与滚球任务达29/30–30/30，球拍拦截23/30，抛射物捕捉19/30（所有基线均为0/30）。

Conclusion: AHEAD有效弥合了VLA模型在动态环境中的感知-执行延迟鸿沟，仅增加4.9M参数即可大幅提升动态操作能力，验证了‘预测未来状态再决策’范式的有效性与实用性。

Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models generalize across static manipulation but fail when objects move during task execution. They map the current observation to an action and assume the scene is stationary between observation and execution, so at any non-trivial object speed the resulting latency exceeds the time available to grasp. We close this gap with AHEAD (Anticipatory Horizon Extrapolation with Adaptive Dynamics), a predict-then-act wrapper that augments a frozen VLA with a motion-aware latent world model. A small world model trained on manipulation video forecasts future patch tokens in the VLA's feature space, conditioned on per-token velocity and acceleration from optical flow. A language-and-motion saliency mask concentrates prediction on task-relevant patches, and the model rolls forward for an adaptive horizon, halting when prediction uncertainty crosses a threshold. The frozen action decoder then receives the predicted future tokens in place of the current ones. AHEAD adds 4.9M parameters to a frozen 7B OpenVLA and reaches 79 to 97% success across 20 dynamic simulation scenarios where the strongest baseline reaches 31 to 58%. On a physical UFactory xArm 7, AHEAD succeeds on 29/30 to 30/30 on three conveyor and rolling-ball tasks, 23/30 on paddle interception, and 19/30 on projectile catching where every baseline scores 0/30.

</details>


### [1073] [IMAC-AgriVLN: Can Agricultural Vision-and-Language Navigation Agents be Aware of Instruction Mistakes?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02519)
*Xiaobei Zhao,Xingqi Lyu,Xin Chen,Xiang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出A2A-MI基准和IMAC模块，解决农业视觉-语言导航（AgriVLN）中自然语言指令存在错误的现实问题，提升机器人对指令错误的识别与纠正能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有农业视觉-语言导航方法假设自然语言指令完全正确，但现实中指令常含错误，导致导航性能大幅下降，亟需提升机器人对指令错误的鲁棒性与自省能力。

Method: 构建含三类错误的A2A-MI基准；设计IMAC模块，联合分析指令与当前前视图像，判断并尝试修正指令错误；将IMAC集成至基线模型。

Result: 在A2A-MI上，SOTA方法成功率（SR）下降57%、导航误差（NE）上升9%；引入IMAC后显著提升性能，大幅缩小与无错指令下的性能差距。

Conclusion: 指令错误是农业VLN实际落地的关键瓶颈；IMAC模块有效增强模型对指令可信度的感知与纠错能力，为鲁棒农业导航提供新思路。

Abstract: Agricultural robots are serving as powerful assistants across a wide range of agricultural tasks, nevertheless, still heavily relying on manual operations or railway systems for movement. The AgriVLN method and the A2A benchmark pioneeringly extended Vision-and-Language Navigation (VLN) to the agricultural domain, enabling a robot to navigate to a target position following a natural language instruction. However, almost all the prior methods adopt an ideal assumption that the given instructions themselves are correct, which does not align with the realistic scenarios, because anybody may say an instruction with mistakes.
