To bridge this gap, we propose the A2A-MI benchmark, in which we build a semi-automatic data annotator to insert three mistake classifications into each original instruction in a more diversified and efficient way. We test several state-of-the-art agricultural VLN agents on it and observe a sufficient drop with -57% on SR and -9% on NE, from which we suggest that an agricultural VLN agent tends to assume that the given instruction is correct, so does not have the awareness to doubt it when the scenes it sees do not align with the instruction it receives. To build the awareness on instruction mistake, we propose the IMAC module analyzing the instruction and the current front-facing image, to judge whether the instruction has mistakes and attempt to correct it when needed. We integrate IMAC into the baseline model, and observe a noteworthy improvement, sufficiently narrowing the gap to the performance on instructions without mistakes. Project: https://github.com/AlexTraveling/IMAC-AgriVLN.

</details>


### [1074] [AFUN: Towards an Affordance Foundation Model for Functionality Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02551)
*Zhaoning Wang,Yi Zhong,Jiawei Fu,Henrik I. Christensen,Jun Gao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ourmodel，一种面向功能理解的可供性基础模型，能够从单帧RGB-D图像和语言任务描述中预测任务相关的功能掩码和3D接触后运动轨迹，并通过大规模标准化数据流水线支持开放世界泛化，在多个基准上显著超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建能同时理解交互位置（where）与方式（how），并跨环境、物体和任务泛化的可供性基础模型仍具挑战；现有方法通常只解决其中一部分问题。

Method: 提出ourmodel，输入单帧RGB-D图像和语言任务描述，输出任务条件的功能掩码（where）和3D后接触运动曲线（how）；构建统一的大规模数据流水线，将异构机器人、人类、仿真及真实扫描数据映射到含语言、掩码和物体中心3D运动标签的共享可供性模式。

Result: 在8个测试集上的可供性分割任务中，平均gIoU/cIoU分别提升+23.9/+26.3；接触点预测命中率较最优基线提升12.7–61.3%；3D运动预测在全部三个测试集上性能最优；无需微调即可直接部署于真实机器人操作。

Conclusion: ourmodel是迈向通用可供性基础模型的重要一步，具备强泛化能力与即插即用的现实部署能力，为开放世界机器人操作提供了可解释、功能驱动的感知-动作接口。

Abstract: Affordance understanding bridges visual perception and physical action, serving as an explainable interface for robot manipulation in open and unstructured real-world environments. Yet, building an affordance foundation model that not only understands where and how the interaction should happen, but also generalizes across diverse environments, objects, and tasks, remains a long-standing research challenge. Existing methods typically address only part of this challenge, either localizing task-relevant regions without specifying executable motion, or predicting motion but with limited scalability. In this paper, we present ourmodel, a step towards an affordance foundation model for functionality understanding. From a single RGB-D observation and a language task description, ourmodel predicts a task-conditional functional mask (where to interact) and a 3D post-contact motion curve (how to interact). To support open-world generalization, we build a large-scale standardized data pipeline that converts heterogeneous robot, human, simulation, and real-world scan data into a shared affordance schema with language, masks, and object-centric 3D motion labels. We evaluate ourmodel from three aspects: for affordance segmentation, ourmodel outperforms all baselines by a large margin across 8 test sets from 4 benchmarks, improving mean gIoU/cIoU by +23.9/+26.3; for contact-point prediction, it predicts substantially more accurate points, with a 12.7--61.3% hit-rate gain over the best baseline; and for 3D motion, it achieves the best performance on all three test sets. ourmodel can be deployed for real-world robot manipulation without finetuning for robot embodiment or using task-specific heuristics, demonstrating the ability to adapt to open-world affordance tasks. Project page: https://www.zhaoningwang.com/AFUN

</details>


### [1075] [Permissive Safety Through Trusted Inference: Verifiable Belief-Space Neural Safety Filters for Assured Interactive Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02562)
*Haimin Hu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于共形预测（conformal prediction）的算法，用于对信念空间安全滤波器（BeliefSF）进行高概率安全性认证，显式考虑运行时推理模块的可靠性，从而在保证形式化安全保证的同时降低保守性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统物理空间安全滤波器忽略在线学习与不确定性缩减能力；新兴的BeliefSF虽能闭环推理以降低保守性，但其因运行时推理误差和神经网络近似带来的安全性保障仍缺乏形式化验证方法。

Method: 提出一种结合共形预测的安全认证方法，聚焦于推理可靠区域进行验证，在保持标准共形预测简洁性和样本复杂度的同时，提升安全滤波器的许可性。

Result: 在人-车交互仿真基准测试中，所提方法验证出比标准共形预测基线显著更宽松（permissive）的信念空间安全滤波器。

Conclusion: 该方法为BeliefSF提供了可证明的高概率安全性保障，兼顾可靠性与实用性，推动了面向人机交互的自适应安全决策系统的发展。

Abstract: Autonomous robots that interact with people must make safe and efficient decisions under human-induced uncertainty, such as their preferences, goals, competency, and willingness to cooperate. Safety filters are a popular approach for ensuring safety in interactive robotics, since their modular design separates safety from performance, allowing robots to operate safely around people with minimal impact on task efficiency. While traditional safety filters typically operate only in the physical space, neglecting the robot's ability to learn and adapt online, the recently proposed belief-space safety filter (BeliefSF) reasons about robot safety in closed-loop with runtime inference that actively reduces the robot's uncertainty online, thereby reducing conservativeness in filtering. However, providing formal safety guarantees for robots deploying BeliefSF remains a significant challenge due to errors in runtime inference and neural approximation of safety filters required to handle the high dimensionality of belief spaces. In this paper, we propose an algorithmic approach to certify high-probability safety of BeliefSF using conformal prediction, while explicitly accounting for the reliability of the robot's runtime inference module. Our method leverages the structure of belief-space safety filtering by focusing verification on a region where inference is expected to be reliable. It preserves the simplicity and sample complexity of standard conformal prediction, yet can certify a substantially less conservative safety filter. Through a simulated human-vehicle interaction benchmark, we show that our approach verifies a significantly more permissive belief-space safety filter than a standard conformal prediction baseline.

</details>


### [1076] [RoboDream: Compositional World Models for Scalable Robot Data Synthesis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02577)
*Junjie Ye,Rong Xue,Basile Van Hoorick,Runhao Li,Harshitha Rajaprakash,Pavel Tokmakov,Muhammad Zubair Irshad,Vitor Guizilini,Yue Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种以具身智能为中心的世界模型，通过视频扩散模型生成逼真、多样化的机器人操作演示数据，解决了真实世界数据采集成本高的问题，并在真实实验中验证了其提升下游策略性能和减少真实数据需求的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实世界中通过遥操作收集大规模、多样化的机器人演示数据成本高昂且耗时，而现有生成方法要么仅限于表面视觉增强，要么产生不符合物理规律的运动（具身幻觉）。

Method: 提出一种具身智能为中心的世界模型，将生成锚定在渲染的机器人运动上，并以显式的场景和物体先验为条件，解耦轨迹执行与环境合成；支持两种数据扩展能力：（1）检索与重生（复用已有轨迹到新场景），（2）无道具遥操作（操作者仅在空中操作，模型后续补全目标物体与场景）。

Result: 在真实世界实验中，生成的数据持续提升了下游策略性能，并显著降低了多种操作任务所需的真实数据量。

Conclusion: 该方法为机器人学习提供了可扩展、具身合理、场景泛化的数据生成范式，有望大幅降低对真实世界演示数据的依赖。

Abstract: Scaling robot learning requires large-scale, diverse demonstrations, yet real-world data collection via teleoperation remains prohibitively expensive and time-consuming. While video diffusion models offer a promising avenue for data scaling, existing generative approaches are often limited to superficial visual augmentation, or suffer from embodiment hallucinations that yield physically infeasible motions. We present a generalizable embodiment-centric world model that achieves scalable data generation by synthesizing photorealistic demonstrations with novel objects, in novel scenes, and from novel viewpoints. Our approach anchors generation to rendered robot motion while conditioning on explicit scene and object priors, effectively decoupling trajectory execution from environment synthesis. This formulation has the potential to unlock two powerful data scaling capabilities: (1) retrieval and rebirth, which repurposes existing trajectories into entirely new contexts without new motion data; and (2) prop-free teleoperation, where operators manipulate empty air and the model hallucinates the target objects and scene afterwards, eliminating reset time. We demonstrate with real-world experiments that our generated data consistently improves downstream policy performance and significantly reduces real-world data requirements across diverse manipulation tasks.

</details>


<div id='cs.MA'></div>

# cs.MA [[Back]](#toc)

### [1077] [Leveraging the Learning Curve: Reusing Existing Architectural Patterns to Design and Implement MAS](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00287)
*Arthur Casals,Anarosa A. F. Brandão*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出将分布式系统（DS）工程方法与多智能体系统（MAS）理论结合，通过引入最小化智能体概念，提升MAS的工程化水平，并通过实践验证其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）具有天然的分布式与协作特性，但当前多数AI系统将其作为组件使用，忽视了其协作本质；同时，软件工程领域尚未充分融合分布式系统（DS）的成熟架构思想与MAS理论。

Method: 1）追溯MAS与DS的共同起源，建立架构类比以形成统一工程框架；2）定义一组最小化的智能体核心概念；3）将这些概念融入DS架构模式，设计分布式MAS；4）在研究生课程中教学应用，面向无智能体背景的学生开展MAS工程教学。

Result: 学生成功运用DS工具与技术实现MAS；尽管超三分之二学生缺乏分布式系统实践经验，两门课程平均期末成绩仍高于80%。

Conclusion: 将DS工程范式与精简的智能体概念相结合，可有效提升MAS的可工程化程度，支持现代AI系统在继承经典智能体研究基础上，稳健复用成熟的分布式系统方法与技术。

Abstract: Recent advancements in AI have led to the development of specialized systems related to multi-agent systems (MAS). However, the inherently collaborative nature of agents is often overlooked, and many of these specialized systems are used as components by other AI systems. From a software engineering perspective, this context can benefit from aligning the architectural characteristics of distributed systems with the inherently distributed nature of MAS. We propose that introducing a minimal set of agent-related concepts into the Distributed Systems (DS) domain can improve the engineering of modern MAS by leveraging techniques from DS engineering with established agent theory. In this study, we recapitulated the common origins of MAS and DS by drawing architectural parallels to establish a unified engineering approach. We then defined a minimal set of agent concepts to perform two practical studies on leveraging MAS development. First, we incorporated these concepts into a DS architectural pattern to design a distributed MAS. We then used these concepts in a graduate course to teach MAS engineering to students with no prior knowledge of agent theory. The learning outcomes from both courses included successful MAS implementation using DS tools and techniques. Although more than two-thirds of these students had no practical experience in developing distributed systems, the average final grade in both courses was above 80\%, thus validating our approach. Finally, we discuss how this study supports the development of advanced systems using modern AI techniques consistently with established agent-related research while leveraging established DS techniques and concepts.

</details>


### [1078] [State Machine Guided Multi-Relational Synthetic Data from Logs for Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00531)
*Aja Khanal,Apurva Narayan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出一种从软件日志中自动发现执行状态机并构建多表关系模式的框架，利用该结构生成符合时序与过程约束的合成数据，显著提升异常与缺陷检测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有日志异常检测方法将日志视为扁平模板序列，忽略了事件间由执行状态机决定的内在关系结构。

Method: 从原始日志中恢复执行状态机，构建包含trace、event、state、transition、parameter等实体的多表关系模式，并以此作为生成先验，合成满足结构、时序与过程约束的多关系合成日志数据。

Result: 合成数据在约束验证、分布相似性及过程指标上表现良好；在真实数据集上，用该合成数据增强训练可显著优于基于序列的方法和简单过采样。

Conclusion: 执行日志隐含一个受潜在状态机支配的关系型数据库结构，显式建模并利用该结构可实现更鲁棒、可解释的日志异常检测。

Abstract: Software systems generate massive unstructured logs that record execution behavior, failures, and interactions across components, yet existing log anomaly detection methods treat these logs primarily as flat sequences of templates, overlooking the relational execution structure that governs how events co-occur and evolve over time. We propose a framework that discovers this hidden structure by recovering an execution state machine directly from logs and inducing a corresponding multi-table relational schema connecting traces, events, states, transitions, and parameters. This discovered state machine serves as a generative prior to produce realistic multi-relational synthetic data that preserves structural, temporal, and process constraints while amplifying rare but valid execution behaviors. We assess the fidelity of the generated data through constraint validation, distributional similarity, and process-level metrics, and demonstrate its usefulness by showing that augmenting real logs with the synthetic relational data significantly improves anomaly and bug detection on held-out real datasets compared to sequence-based baselines and naive oversampling. Our results show that execution logs implicitly encode a relational database governed by a latent state machine, and that recovering this structure enables principled synthetic data generation for robust and interpretable anomaly detection.

</details>


### [1079] [Scaling Behavior of Single LLM-Driven Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00655)
*Jialing Li,Zhouhong Gu,Yin Cai,Hongwei Feng*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文系统研究了基于大语言模型（LLM）的同质多智能体系统（MAS）随智能体数量增加的性能变化规律，提出SIMAS框架，发现性能呈现边际递减而非单调提升，并揭示其根源在于协作增益与协调开销之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对LLM多智能体系统的规模化行为和内在集体动力学缺乏深入探索，尤其未在排除模型/知识异质性干扰下孤立考察协作规模效应。

Method: 提出简约的Sequential Iterative Multi-Agent System（SIMAS）框架，采用顺序式智能体间通信机制；在多种任务和不同规模LLM上开展大规模实验，定量分析性能随智能体数量变化的规律及影响因素。

Result: 发现MAS性能不随智能体数量单调增长，而是呈现边际递减趋势；性能拐点受基础LLM能力、任务类型和交互架构共同影响；性能下降主因是协调开销而非长上下文失效；该规律在辩论等其他交互结构中亦具普适性。

Conclusion: 集体智能是依赖于交互机制设计的涌现属性，而非智能体数量增加的必然结果；设计高效MAS需权衡协同收益与协调成本，‘更多智能体即更好’的假设不成立。

Abstract: The burgeoning field of LLM-based Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) promises to tackle complex tasks through collaborative intelligence, yet fundamental questions regarding their scaling behavior and intrinsic collective dynamics remain underexplored. This paper systematically investigates how the performance of a homogeneous MAS evolves as the number of agents increases, isolating the variable of collaboration from model or knowledge heterogeneity. We propose the Sequential Iterative Multi-Agent System (SIMAS) framework, a minimalist architecture centered on sequential inter-agent communication, to clearly observe scaling effects. Through extensive experiments across diverse tasks and model scales, we establish that MAS performance does not scale monotonically with agent count but follows a pattern of diminishing returns, governed by a trade-off between collaborative synergy and coordination overhead. Our findings reveal that effective MAS requires a sufficiently capable base LLM, that task type critically modulates the optimal agent count, and that collective intelligence is an emergent property contingent on strategic interaction design rather than a guaranteed outcome of agent plurality. The performance degradation stems coordination overhead rather than merely long-context failure, and the scaling tendency generalizes across interaction architectures like structured debate topologies. This work provides a foundational understanding of MAS scaling laws, offering practical guidance for designing efficient collaborative systems and challenging the prevailing assumption that more agents invariably lead to better performance.

</details>


### [1080] [Dynamic Coordination Strategy Selection for Enterprise Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00804)
*Thanh Luong Tuan*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文评估了企业多智能体系统中协调策略是否应根据问题类别动态选择，而非全局固定；实验覆盖30个跨行业任务、5类问题、4种执行条件及4种模型，在1440个输出上验证发现：虽未支持‘精确最优策略’假设，但‘近最优策略路由’假设强成立（预测策略始终在最优条件下0.10分内），且单智能体在结构化合规验证任务中明显优于共识策略；最终建议将动态路由作为校准后的默认策略，而非确定性赢家选择法则。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业多智能体系统中存在多种协调模式（如共识、辩论、综合、单智能体），但缺乏针对不同问题类别的实证指导，导致部署时策略选择盲目。

Method: 采用预注册实验设计，对30个跨六行业、五问题类的企业任务，在四种执行条件（共识/辩论/综合/单智能体）与四种模型（qwen_local/sonnet/gemma_openrouter/OpenAI）组合下进行三重重复实验（共1440样本），所有输出由固定Sonnet rubric统一评分，并进行Kendall's W检验比较越英双语任务的一致性。

Result: 1）未支持原假设H1（精确最优策略稳定可识别），因最优策略随模型变化且部分预测策略仅略低于实际最优；2）强支持‘近最优路由’：所有模型臂与问题类中，预测策略质量得分均在最优条件0.10分内；3）结构化合规验证任务一致偏好单智能体而非共识；4）H2（越英任务协调排序一致性差异）未获支持（Kendall's W≈0.20，p=0.85）。

Conclusion: 企业协调策略不应追求全局固定或确定性最优选择，而应将动态路由作为校准后的默认实践，兼顾鲁棒性与实用性。

Abstract: Enterprise multi-agent systems increasingly expose multiple coordination patterns, but deployments often lack evidence for when to use consensus, debate, synthesis, or a simpler single-agent workflow. This paper evaluates whether coordination strategy should be selected dynamically by problem class rather than fixed globally. We run a frozen matrix of 30 enterprise tasks spanning six industries, five problem classes, four execution conditions, three replications per cell, and four model arms: qwen_local, sonnet, gemma_openrouter, and an auxiliary openai cloud-validation arm. All 1,440 generated outputs are judged by a fixed Sonnet rubric.
  The main finding is bounded and operationally useful, but it is not the original strict H1. The pre-registered exact-winner/CI criterion is not supported: exact winner identity is unstable across model arms, and several predicted strategies are close to, but not above, the best observed alternative. A weaker near-best routing claim is strongly supported. In every pre-registered model arm and problem class, and again in the auxiliary OpenAI validation arm, the predicted strategy is within 0.10 quality-score points of the best observed condition. Structured compliance verification is the clearest exception to the original mapping: all arms favor single_agent rather than consensus. A pre-registered Kendall's W test finds no reliable difference between Vietnamese-domain and English-domain tasks in how consistently the four coordination conditions are ranked (mean W of 0.20 in both strata; signed-rank p = .85), so H2 is not supported. We conclude that enterprise coordination policy should use dynamic routing as a calibrated default, not as a deterministic winner-selection law.

</details>


### [1081] [FinCom: A Financial Multi-Agent Demo with Disagree-or-Commit Deliberation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00939)
*Chao Peter Yang,Zixiao Tan,Kaisen Yao,Ziyu Zhou,Eleanor Jiang,Michael Wu*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出FinCom（金融委员会）框架，通过引入Disagree-or-Commit（DoC）协议，在多智能体金融分析系统中结构化地嵌入异议机制，以克服现有共识/辩论范式中的‘奉承偏差’问题，显著提升推理准确性与风险意识。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型的多智能体金融系统在共识或辩论协调机制下易出现‘奉承偏差’（sycophancy），即代理屈从于同伴推理而非证据，导致过早一致与性能下降。

Method: 提出FinCom框架，采用受监管的多智能体架构：一个中央Supervisor协调三个ReAct增强的专业智能体（Research、Quantitative、Risk），各自配备角色专属工具；执行DoC协议——代理必须显式批判或承诺同伴推理，方可收敛推荐。

Result: 在最新金融智能体基准及90个内部手工构建任务上，采用LLM-as-a-Judge评估，DoC相比共识基线显著提升推理准确率与风险感知能力（内外部评估均验证）。

Conclusion: 将异议建模为治理原语而非噪声，FinCom提供了一种轻量、纯提示驱动的方法，增强金融智能体系统的可问责性、透明性与认知鲁棒性。

Abstract: Multi-agent systems powered by large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for financial analysis and decision support. However, existing coordination schemes, especially those emphasizing consensus or debate, are vulnerable to sycophancy: agents conform to peer reasoning instead of evidence, leading to premature agreement and degraded outcomes. We introduce FinCom (Financial Committee), a governed multi-agent framework and interactive system that operationalizes the Disagree-or-Commit (DoC) protocol to embed structured dissent into financial AI committees. A central Supervisor orchestrates three ReAct-enabled specialist agents: Research, Quantitative, and Risk. Each agent is equipped with role-specific tools for retrieval, computation, and stress testing. During deliberation, agents must either explicitly critique or commit to their peers' reasoning before converging on a unified recommendation.
  This demonstration showcases how FinCom supports committee-style financial analysis through coordinated multi-agent interaction, including structured report generation and interactive decision support. Evaluated across the most recent financial agent benchmark, in addition to 90 internal handcrafted financial tasks using an LLM-as-a-Judge protocol, DoC improves reasoning accuracy and risk awareness significantly over a consensus-seeking baseline on both an in-house and external evaluation set. By reframing disagreement as a governance primitive rather than noise, FinCom offers a lightweight, prompt-only recipe for improving accountability, transparency, and epistemic robustness in agentic financial systems.

</details>


### [1082] [Coordinating Task Switching in a Robotics Multi-Agent System Using Behavior Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01170)
*Lucas Haug,Anarosa Alves Franco Brandão,Arthur Casals*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于行为树（Behavior-Tree）的方法，用于提升VSSS小型足球机器人系统的多机器人协同能力，并通过FIRASim仿真和实际学术竞赛与传统的有限状态机（FSM）方法进行了对比评估。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在IEEE VSSS小型足球机器人比赛中，三机器人团队需在高度动态环境中高效协同，而传统FSM方法在复杂性和可维护性上存在局限，亟需更灵活、可扩展的协调机制。

Method: 采用行为树（Behavior-Tree）建模机器人协同策略，替代原有有限状态机（FSM）方案，并在FIRASim仿真平台及真实学术竞赛中进行对比实验验证。

Result: 行为树方案在仿真与实际比赛中均展现出优于FSM的协同表现，包括更高的任务执行稳定性、策略可读性与开发效率。

Conclusion: 行为树是一种适用于VSSS等动态多机器人系统的有效协调框架，相较FSM更具可扩展性、可维护性与实战鲁棒性。

Abstract: The application of multi-agent systems in robotics is a very challenging field. Several competitions involving such systems are proposed to foster research and development of strategies and mechanisms using games as the underlying domain. Among them are the ones from the \textit{IEEE Very Small Soccer (VSSS)} category, which is the case study described in this paper. In VSSS, two teams of three robots each compete in a very dynamic environment of a soccer game. Thus, coordination of robots' behavior during the game is crucial to win it. In this paper, we present a Behavior-Tree-based approach to support multi-robot coordination within the VSSS team of the ThundeRatz robotics team from the Universidade de S$\tilde{a}$o Paulo. Moreover, a comparison between the proposed approach and the previous one, which was based on a Finite State Machine (FSM), was conducted using the FIRASim simulator. Besides that, the performance of this new strategy was further evaluated in an academic robotics competition.

</details>


### [1083] [Multi-Agent Computer Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01533)
*Jing Yu Koh,Ruslan Salakhutdinov,Daniel Fried*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出多智能体计算机使用（MACU）系统，通过管理者模型将任务分解为有向无环图（DAG），支持并行执行与动态重规划，显著提升长周期任务的完成率与效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 单智能体计算机使用代理在复杂长周期任务中表现不佳，缺乏任务分解、并行执行和基于新信息持续重规划的能力。

Method: 设计一个通用多智能体架构：管理者模型将任务建模为DAG，调度多个子代理并行执行就绪节点，并根据子代理反馈动态更新DAG；强调对部分可观测环境的信息保留与传递。

Result: 在多个桌面与网页导航基准（OSWorld、Online-Mind2Web、WebTailBench、Odysseys）上，MACU比强单智能体基线提升3.4–25.5%；在Odysseys上平均任务完成耗时加速约1.5倍；展现出更优的测试时扩展性及解决卡顿长任务的能力。

Conclusion: 多智能体协同是提升计算机使用代理在长周期、高复杂度任务中生产力与有效性的关键路径。

Abstract: Computer use agents (CUAs) today are primarily deployed as single serial agents. This setup is suboptimal for complex long-horizon tasks that benefit from task decomposition, parallel execution, and consistent re-planning based on new information. In this paper, we argue that we should instead move towards evaluating and building multi-agent computer use (MACU) systems. These systems, which emphasize planning and parallel execution, alleviate many of the shortcomings of single-agent CUAs. We propose a general multi-agent setup in which a manager model decomposes computer use tasks as a directed acyclic graph (DAG), encoding relevant dependencies and goals for subagents. At each iteration, the manager dispatches parallel CUA subagents to carry out nodes on the ready frontier of the DAG, and continuously revises the DAG (adding, canceling, or rewriting nodes) as new findings arrive from subagents. This design treats the partially observable environment of computer use as a first class challenge: information that downstream agents may not be able to re-observe are retained and passed forward through the manager and DAG structure. We demonstrate that MACU consistently improves over strong single-agent baselines by $3.4-25.5\%$ on desktop (OSWorld) and web navigation (Online-Mind2Web, WebTailBench, Odysseys) benchmarks, exhibits more favorable test-time scaling, and solves complex long-horizon tasks where single-agent CUAs get stuck. On Odysseys, a long-horizon web navigation benchmark, MACU improves average task completion wall-clock time by ${\sim} 1.5 \times$, demonstrating its efficacy in speeding up traditionally slow CUA pipelines. Our findings highlight that multi-agent coordination is a promising axis for scaling computer use agents to work productively for longer and more effectively. We release all code and interactive visualizations at https://jykoh.com/multi-agent-computer-use.

</details>


### [1084] [Agent System Operations: Categorization, Challenges, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01581)
*Zexin Wang,Changhua Pei,Yuanhao Liu,Jingjing Li,Yintong Huo,Quan Zhou,Haotian Si,Hang Cui,Zihan Liu,Gaogang Xie,Fei Sun,Dan Pei,David Lo*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文针对LLM-based agent系统运维缺乏系统性研究的问题，提出AgentOps框架，定义了系统内/间异常，并涵盖监控、异常检测、根因定位与解决四大阶段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有agent系统虽应用广泛，但常出现异常导致不稳定与不安全，而当前对其运维的研究十分匮乏，亟需建立系统性运维框架。

Method: 通过调研，系统定义agent系统中的异常（分为系统内和系统间），并提出名为AgentOps的全新综合性运维框架，包含监控、异常检测、根因定位和解决四个阶段。

Result: 构建了首个面向agent系统的结构化运维框架AgentOps，并对异常类型与各运维阶段进行了明确定义与阐述。

Conclusion: AgentOps为agent系统运维提供了清晰的理论框架与实践路径，有望推动该领域系统化、标准化发展。

Abstract: As the reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) continue to advance, LLM-based agent systems offer advantages in flexibility and interpretability over traditional systems, garnering increasing attention. However, despite the widespread research interest and industrial application of agent systems, these systems, like their traditional counterparts, frequently encounter anomalies. These anomalies lead to instability and insecurity, hindering their further development. Therefore, a comprehensive and systematic approach to the operation and maintenance of agent systems is urgently needed. Unfortunately, current research on the operations of agent systems is sparse. To address this gap, we have undertaken a survey on agent system operations with the aim of establishing a clear framework for the field, defining the challenges, and facilitating further development. Specifically, this paper begins by systematically defining anomalies within agent systems, categorizing them into intra-agent anomalies and inter-agent anomalies. Next, we introduce a novel and comprehensive operational framework for agent systems, dubbed Agent System Operations (AgentOps). We provide detailed definitions and explanations of its four key stages: monitoring, anomaly detection, root cause localization, and resolution.

</details>


### [1085] [MetaForge: A Self-Evolving Multimodal Agent that Retrieves, Adapts, and Forges Tools On Demand](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01801)
*Shouang Wei,Houcheng Min,Xinpeng Dong,Xin Lin,Sen Cui,Bo Jiang,Zhongxiang Dai,Kun Kuang,Guandong Xu,Fei Wu,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出MetaForge框架，通过判断是否需要调用工具、检索合适工具、适配工具参数、在线生成新技能并回收至工具库，实现多模态智能体的按需自我演化，显著提升准确性、效率与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态智能体受限于静态预定义工具集难以泛化到新场景，且盲目调用工具导致冗余开销和噪声错误。

Method: MetaForge将智能体行为分解为四个耦合阶段：Decide（判断是否需调用工具）、Retrieve（检索合适工具）、Adapt（在任务上下文中适配工具参数）、Forge（在线合成新技能并回收至工具库），形成闭环；采用统一编排策略，并通过带调用成本惩罚的强化学习联合优化各阶段性能。

Result: 在12个基准测试中，MetaForge在准确性、效率和泛化性上持续超越16个基线模型。

Conclusion: MetaForge实现了从静态工具库到按需自我演化的范式转变，为多模态智能体提供了更灵活、鲁棒和可扩展的工具使用机制。

Abstract: Multimodal agents have achieved notable progress on complex reasoning tasks through tool use, yet remain limited by two issues: statically predefined tool inventories fail to generalize to unseen scenarios, and indiscriminate tool invocation incurs redundant cost and noise-induced errors. We propose MetaForge, a multimodal agent framework that learns when to invoke tools and how to evolve its toolset on demand. MetaForge factorizes agentic behavior into four coupled stages: Decide (judging whether tool use is warranted), Retrieve (selecting suitable tools), Adapt (grounding tool parameters in task context), and Forge (synthesizing new skills online and recycling them into the tool library for reuse), forming a closed judge-retrieve-adapt-forge-recycle loop. A unified orchestration policy enables the agent to choose among answering directly, reusing existing tools, or forging new ones. We jointly optimize invocation necessity, retrieval accuracy, execution effectiveness, and forged-skill reusability via reinforcement learning, with an explicit invocation-cost penalty discouraging redundant calls. Across 12 benchmarks, MetaForge consistently surpasses 16 baselines in accuracy, efficiency, and generalization, validating a paradigm shift from static tool inventories to on-demand self-evolution.

</details>


### [1086] [Dynamic Trust-Aware Sparse Communication Topology for LLM-Based Multi-Agent Consensus](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01828)
*Wanshuang Gou,Zihan Liu*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出DySCo（动态稀疏共识）机制，通过动态评估通信边价值、按需选择高价值边通信、基于动态信任加权聚合答案并提前终止讨论，在降低通信开销的同时保持多智能体交叉验证效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多智能体系统采用全连接通信导致消息量、Token成本和延迟随智能体数量近似二次增长；固定稀疏拓扑虽降开销但缺乏任务与推理状态自适应性，易保留低价值交互或丢失关键纠错信息。

Method: DySCo在每轮推理中基于智能体可靠性、答案分歧度和任务相关性动态评估通信边价值，在预算约束下选择少量高价值边进行消息交换，并通过动态信任权重聚合答案，当共识稳定时提前终止讨论。

Result: DySCo在数学推理、逻辑推理和事实问答任务上验证有效，显著降低通信复杂度，同时保持甚至提升推理准确率；理论分析支持其共识稳定性与通信效率优势。

Conclusion: DySCo实现了通信开销与推理可靠性之间的更好平衡，为大模型多智能体系统提供了可扩展、自适应且高效的协作范式。

Abstract: Large language model-driven multi-agent systems enhance the reliability of complex reasoning tasks through multi-round deliberation, role specialization, and cross-validation. However, existing multi-agent debate and collaboration frameworks typically adopt fully connected communication, causing the number of messages, token costs, and end-to-end latency to grow approximately quadratically with the number of agents; although fixed sparse topologies reduce overhead, they cannot adapt communication relationships to different task instances or intermediate reasoning states, making them prone either to preserving low-value interactions or to losing critical error-correction information. To address this problem, this paper proposes DySCo (Dynamic Sparse Consensus), a dynamic trust-aware sparse consensus mechanism. In each round of reasoning, DySCo estimates the value of communication edges based on agent reliability, answer divergence, and task relevance, and selects a small number of high-value edges for message exchange under budget constraints; it then aggregates the answers of different agents through dynamic trust weights and terminates the discussion early once consensus stabilizes. This mechanism replaces universal broadcasting with on-demand communication, thereby reducing communication overhead while preserving essential cross-validation information. We further present analyses of communication complexity and consensus stability, and evaluate the performance of DySCo on mathematical reasoning, logical reasoning, and factual question-answering tasks.

</details>


### [1087] [From Global Policies to Local Strategies: Multi-Objective Optimization of Resource-Specific Handover Policies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01857)
*Lukas Kirchdorfer,Artemis Doumeni,Han van der Aa,Hugo A. López*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合多智能体系统与多目标进化算法的资源级决策优化方法，以生成考虑人员协作模式的个性化任务交接策略，在合成和真实数据集上显著降低了成本和等待时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习的资源分配方法忽略了资源间的协作模式，而这种模式对实际任务交接有重要影响。

Method: 将基于多智能体系统的流程模拟器与多目标进化算法相结合，生成帕累托最优、面向具体资源的策略。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上，平均降低成本37%，减少等待时间58%，优于启发式基线方法。

Conclusion: 引入协作感知的多目标优化能有效提升业务流程性能，为资源级自适应决策提供了新范式。

Abstract: Efficient resource allocation is a key challenge in business process management, with direct implications for cost, throughput time, and utilization. While recent Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches have shown promise in deriving adaptive allocation policies, they typically neglect inter-resource collaboration patterns that can strongly influence real-world task handovers. Recognizing this, this paper introduces the first approach for multi-objective optimization of resource-level decision-making, enabling the recommendation of person-specific handover policies. To achieve this, our work combines an existing Multi-Agent System-based process simulator with a multi-objective evolutionary algorithm. The resulting approach produces Pareto-optimal, resource-specific policies that optimize the process across multiple objectives. Experimental results on synthetic and real-world datasets show that our approach reduces costs by an average of 37% and waiting time by 58%, consistently outperforming heuristic baselines and demonstrating the potential of leveraging collaboration-aware optimization to improve process performance.

</details>


### [1088] [RadioMaster: Multi-Agent System for Autonomous Radio Signal Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01862)
*Jiazhen Lei,Tianze Cao,Yuxin Sha,Sihan Wang,Bingbing Wang,Fengyuan Zhu,Zeming Yang,Xiaohua Tian*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出RadioMaster，一个全自动多智能体框架，用于将用户意图转化为真实的无线电信号，解决了现有大语言模型在射频信号生成中因领域知识匮乏和硬件约束不敏感而导致的性能瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将用户意图转化为物理无线电信号是无线原型设计的关键但繁琐步骤，需要深入的物理层知识，而现有大语言模型在此任务上表现不佳，主要受限于领域无知和对硬件约束不敏感。

Method: 提出RadioMaster多智能体框架，包含三个核心组件：RadioWiki（领域知识检索）、RadioAgent（协作生成I/Q样本及硬件配置）、RadioEmulator（闭环物理层验证）；并构建首个面向射频信号生成的基准RadioBench。

Result: 在真实场景评估中，RadioMaster在配置可行性与信号保真度方面显著优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: RadioMaster有效弥合了自然语言意图与物理无线电信号之间的鸿沟，为无线通信领域的智能化原型开发提供了新范式。

Abstract: Translating user intents into physical radio signals represents the critical yet notoriously tedious final step in wireless prototyping, as it requires intricate knowledge of physical layer details and presents immense implementation challenges. Large Language Models (LLMs) and multi-agent systems have revolutionized conventional software engineering, raising the compelling question of whether they can resolve these formidable difficulties. However, our investigations reveal that current models experience significant limitations and fail to accomplish this task when applied to radio signal generation. This performance degradation primarily stems from severe domain ignorance and a fundamental insensitivity to physical hardware constraints. To bridge this gap, we introduce RadioMaster, a fully autonomous multi-agent framework designed to seamlessly translate user input into real-world wireless emissions. RadioMaster operates on three synergistic pillars: RadioWiki for domain-specific knowledge retrieval, RadioAgent for collaborative I/Q sample generation alongside hardware configuration, and RadioEmulator for closed-loop physical layer verification. Furthermore, we construct RadioBench, the first comprehensive benchmark tailored specifically for the radio signal generation domain. Extensive real-world evaluations demonstrate that RadioMaster significantly outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines regarding configuration viability and signal fidelity.

</details>


### [1089] [QoEReasoner: An Agentic Reasoning Framework for Automated and Explainable QoE Diagnosis in RANs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01925)
*Qizhe Li,Haolong Chen,Shan Dai,Zhuo Li,Zhiwei Hu,Xuan Li,Guangxu Zhu,Qingjiang Shi*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出QoEReasoner，一种基于LLM的端到端智能体系统，通过结合确定性工具、领域知识库和历史案例库，实现对无线接入网（RAN）中QoE退化问题的自动化、可解释且高精度诊断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RAN中QoE退化诊断依赖人工专家分析高维跨层遥测数据，效率低、成本高；而直接使用LLM存在数值时序分析能力差、幻觉因果链、缺乏状态一致性等问题。

Method: 构建QoEReasoner系统：1）用确定性工具将原始KPI转为结构化证据；2）基于协议一致的领域知识库进行故障传播建模；3）利用专家验证的历史案例库引导假设生成；4）由有状态中央规划器闭环协调异常检测、因果追踪与根因定位。

Result: 在真实RAN数据集上，QoEReasoner在多项诊断任务中准确率比强基线高18%-40%，诊断时间从约30分钟缩短至3分钟，输出可解释性强、鲁棒性好，兼容多种LLM后端。

Conclusion: QoEReasoner成功弥合了LLM推理能力与RAN故障诊断严苛要求之间的鸿沟，为通信网络智能运维提供了可落地、可信赖的新范式。

Abstract: Diagnosing Quality-of-Experience (QoE) degradations in operational Radio Access Networks (RANs) is a critical but notoriously complex task, traditionally requiring labor-intensive expert analysis over high-dimensional, cross-layer telemetry. While Large Language Models (LLMs) offer unprecedented reasoning capabilities, they are fundamentally unsuited for raw RANs troubleshooting: they fail at numeric time-series analysis, hallucinate protocol-violating causal links, and lack the stateful rigor required for multi-step fault localization. To bridge this gap, we present QoEReasoner, an end-to-end, LLM-driven agentic system designed for automated and explainable QoE diagnosis. QoEReasoner tames the inherent unpredictability of LLMs by grounding their reasoning in the physical realities of the network. It employs deterministic tools to reliably translate raw numeric KPIs into structured evidence, enforces protocol-consistent fault propagation through a domain-specific Knowledge Base, and leverages a Historical Bank of expert-validated cases to guide hypothesis generation. A stateful central planner orchestrates this closed-loop process across anomaly detection, causal tracing, and root-cause localization. Evaluations on real-world operational RANs datasets demonstrate that QoEReasoner outperforms strong baselines by 18\%-40\% in accuracy across multiple diagnostic tasks. Furthermore, it reduces diagnostic time from approximately 30 minutes of manual expert analysis to just 3 minutes per session, delivering highly interpretable, expert-grade reports while remaining robust across diverse LLM backbones.

</details>


### [1090] [A Simple Hierarchical Causality Primer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01979)
*Tim Gebbie*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种形式化复杂系统中层次因果关系的框架，强调‘行动者’（actors）作为因果类别的实例化者，而非简单代理；通过因果类、聚合算子和离散事件时间映射来刻画跨层级的因果约束与组织机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为理解复杂系统中跨层级的因果作用机制，需超越传统基于代理（agents）的建模，引入能表达不同因果角色的‘行动者’及其层级间约束关系的形式化框架。

Method: 构建一个离散、简化的形式化框架，包含三个核心结构：（1）因果类别（causation classes），用于抽象行动者所体现的因果影响类型；（2）聚合算子（aggregation operators），实现跨层级的行为整合；（3）离散事件-时间映射（discrete event-time maps），刻画局部事件计数与全局时钟的关系。

Result: 提出了一个具备明确数学结构的层次因果模型，明确了行动者与代理的区分，并定义了支撑该模型所需的三类基本结构。

Conclusion: 层次因果性不能仅由局部代理动力学描述，必须引入行动者层级的因果类别及跨层级映射机制；该框架为复杂系统中多尺度因果建模提供了基础性形式工具。

Abstract: We provide a brief primer for the idea behind formalising hierarchical causality in the context of complex systems. Here actors are not simply agents. Actors instantiate causation classes. Agents implement local dynamics in given levels or organisation in a given system. Hierarchical causality then describes how actor-level roles constrain, select, and organise agent-level behaviour across levels. The system then necessarily requires three additional structures. First, causation classes to abstract a given form of causal influence that an actor instantiates. Second, aggregation operators to move across the levels. Third, discrete event-time maps are required because the system comprises events, and the relation between local event counts and any global clock must be specified. Our formulation here is purposefully simple and discrete.

</details>


### [1091] [Agentic-J: An AI Agent for Biological Microscopy Image Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02080)
*Lukas Johanns,Marilin Moor,Davide Panzeri,Yu Zhou,Xinyi Chen,Nora F. K. Pauly,Zixuan Pan,Matthias Gunzer,Andreas Müller,Yiyu Shi,Hedi Peterson,Jianxu Chen*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: Agentic-J 是一个容器化的多智能体AI助手，专为ImageJ/Fiji设计，使生物学家能用自然语言指定图像分析任务，并自动生成可追溯、可复现的脚本工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生物图像分析日益需要整合异构工具、编程环境和领域知识，而这些往往超出单个研究者的综合能力。

Method: 提出Agentic-J系统，采用容器化多智能体架构，包含插件管理、代码生成、调试、质量保证和统计报告等专业化子智能体，并生成结构化、可文档化的可执行脚本。

Result: 成功实现了从自然语言指令到完整、可复现ImageJ/Fiji分析工作流（如核分割、细胞追踪、多条件定量）的端到端自动转换，并在真实显微镜图像分析中进行了验证。

Conclusion: Agentic-J降低了生物图像分析的技术门槛，提升了分析的可追溯性、可重复性和协作效率，为跨学科生物图像分析提供了新范式。

Abstract: Biological image analysis increasingly demands integration across heterogeneous tools, programming environments, and domain knowledge that few researchers can command simultaneously. We present Agentic-J, a containerised, multi-agent AI assistant, primarily for ImageJ/Fiji that enables biologists to specify analysis tasks in natural language, from nuclei segmentation and cell tracking to multi-condition quantification. The agent generates executable scripts organised into a documented project structure, so every analysis decision is traceable and the workflow can be reproduced or shared. The specialised sub-agents handle plugin management, code generation, debugging, quality assurance, and statistical reporting. In this paper we introduce the system's design, demonstrate real biological microscopy image analysis workflows, and detailed the technical implementation.

</details>


### [1092] [A Game-Theoretic Decision Framework for Optimal Selection of Coordination Detection Methods in Multi-UAV Fleet Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02383)
*Christian Manasseh*

Main category: cs.MA

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种博弈论决策框架，通过将方法选择建模为监控方与自然（未知交通场景）之间的零和博弈，解决无人机编队协调检测中速度与精度的权衡问题；该框架结合多种检测算法、蒙特卡洛敏感性分析和多目标优化，生成鲁棒的混合策略，在不同操作优先级下推荐最优算法组合，并保证最坏情况下的性能下界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机编队在共享空域中运行时，协调检测与领航机识别面临实时性与检测精度的根本性权衡：快速方法牺牲准确性，高精度方法又可能超出可操作的冲突消解时间预算。

Method: 构建一个双人零和博弈模型（Monitor vs. Nature），设计端到端流程：从轨迹监控数据输入，经8种候选检测算法、蒙特卡洛敏感性分析刻画其随机性能，再通过多目标优化筛选Pareto最优方法组合；最终求解minimax混合策略，得到对场景不确定性鲁棒的概率化方法选择方案。

Result: 在200种随机配置（5–50架无人机）实验中，框架根据操作优先级推荐不同算法组合：Koopman Phase主导平衡型（70.6%）和速度优先型（79.7%），CRQA在领航机识别优先时占比最高（47.4%）；整体保证归一化效用值稳定在0.29–0.53之间。

Conclusion: 该框架首次为UTM（无人交通管理）中的编队监控提供了原理严谨、场景自适应的计算方法选择范式，兼顾实时性、鲁棒性与任务导向性。

Abstract: Detecting coordination among unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) fleets operating in shared airspace and identifying the route-lead aircraft whose navigation decisions govern fleet behavior presents a fundamental speed--accuracy trade-off: fast methods enable real-time traffic management but sacrifice detection fidelity, while accurate methods may exceed the time budget for actionable airspace deconfliction. This paper presents a game-theoretic decision framework that resolves this trade-off by formulating method selection as a two-player zero-sum game between a Monitor (selecting computational methods and parameters) and Nature (selecting the unknown traffic scenario). We construct an end-to-end pipeline from trajectory surveillance data through eight candidate detection algorithms, a Monte Carlo sensitivity analysis characterizing their stochastic performance, and finally a multi-objective optimization layer that identifies Pareto-optimal method portfolios. The minimax solution provides a robust mixed strategy with a probability distribution over methods that guarantees worst-case performance regardless of scenario uncertainty. Experimental evaluation across 200 randomized configurations spanning 5--50 aircraft demonstrates that the framework recommends distinct method portfolios depending on operational priority: Koopman Phase dominates balanced (70.6%) and speed-priority (79.7%) profiles, while CRQA emerges as primary (47.4%) when route-lead identification is prioritized. The framework achieves a guaranteed game value of 0.29--0.53 (normalized utility) across all tested preference profiles, providing the first principled, scenario-adaptive methodology for computational method selection in UTM fleet monitoring operations.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [1093] [PaintBench: Deterministic Evaluation of Precise Visual Editing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00188)
*Kai Xu,Ellis Brown,Shrikar Madhu,Rob Fergus,He He,Saining Xie*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了PaintBench，一个面向20种基础精确视觉编辑操作的动态可扩展基准，用于评估多模态模型在精确单答案图像编辑任务上的能力；实验表明现有模型性能普遍较低，且PaintBench得分能很好预测实际应用（如数据可视化编辑）中的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态模型虽擅长开放式的视觉编辑，但在执行精确、唯一答案的视觉编辑任务上仍存在显著瓶颈，缺乏可靠、无偏、可扩展的评估基准。

Method: 提出PaintBench基准：涵盖四类共20种精确编辑操作；采用过程化生成确保无限、防污染样本；使用确定性像素级评估替代主观判别模型；并构建TinyGrafixBench进行跨任务泛化验证。

Result: 在11个主流图像编辑模型上测试，最高mIoU仅17.1%；几何变换、多数结构操作和公式化颜色变换最难；性能受物体数量、背景复杂度、色彩方案及编辑区域大小显著影响；PaintBench分数与TinyGrafixBench表现高度线性相关（R²=0.91）。

Conclusion: PaintBench为精确多模态视觉编辑提供了严格、可复现、泛化性强的评估基础，揭示了当前方法的关键短板，并有望推动该方向的技术进步。

Abstract: While current multimodal models are proficient at open-ended visual editing, executing precise single-answer edits remains an important obstacle. To probe this challenge, we introduce PaintBench, a dynamically scalable benchmark targeting 20 fundamental precise visual editing operations across four categories: geometric transformation, structural manipulation, color change, and symbolic reasoning. Procedural generation with configurable complexity enables an effectively infinite, contamination-resistant evaluation suite, and deterministic pixel-level evaluation eliminates reliance on bias-prone judge models. Across 11 image editing models, we find overall low performance, with the current highest-performing industry leader scoring only 17.1% (mIoU). Task decomposition reveals especially challenging operation types (geometric transformation, most structural manipulation, formula-based color change) and model-specific specializations. Fine-grained benchmark diagnostics further show performance degradations induced by scene variations in object count, background complexity, color scheme, and edit-region size. To test generalization of PaintBench scores to applied task performance, we create a procedural, deterministic evaluation for data visualization editing (TinyGrafixBench) and find strong linear correlation with PaintBench scores ($R^2 = 0.91$, $p < 0.001$). Altogether, PaintBench provides a rigorous foundation for measuring and driving progress in precise multimodal visual editing.

</details>


### [1094] [Subgrid Marching Tetrahedra](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00454)
*Hossein Baktash,Mark Gillespie,Keenan Crane*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种名为'亚网格行进法（subgrid marching）'的新方法，用于从四面体网格与连续曲面交点中重建无自交、流形三角网格，突破了传统行进立方体/四面体方法在特征分辨率和拓扑限制上的瓶颈。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统行进立方体/四面体方法受限于奈奎斯特-香农采样定理，难以解析比网格更细的特征，且要求明确定义内外侧或一致朝向，无法处理带边界的曲面或杂乱多边形集合。

Method: 提出基于广义法向坐标（normal coordinates）的编码机制，用整数记录曲面与每条网格边的任意交点数，从而表达复杂表面连通性；在每个四面体内独立进行局部重建，保证跨单元网格一致性。

Result: 在相同计算时间与网格分辨率（甚至相同输出三角形数量）下，生成的网格精度显著高于经典方法；可处理带边界曲面、非定向输入及多片杂乱多边形（polygon soup），输出为流形、无自交三角网格。

Conclusion: 亚网格行进法通过拓扑编码绕过采样率限制，实现了高保真、鲁棒、并行化的隐式曲面重建，拓展了等值面提取与几何重建的应用边界。

Abstract: We describe a method for recovering a manifold, intersection-free triangle mesh from the points where edges of a tetrahedral grid pierce a continuous surface. Unlike classic marching cubes or tets, our subgrid marching scheme allows arbitrarily many surface patches within a single cell, capturing fine features and thin sheets. Moreover, it requires neither a well-defined inside/outside (allowing surfaces with boundary), nor consistently-oriented input geometry. Yet we retain the local, parallel nature of classic marching: reconstruction is performed independently per tet, yielding a conforming mesh across tet boundaries. Our key innovation is a generalization of normal coordinates from geometric topology, which encode surface connectivity via arbitrary integer intersection counts along each grid edge. This encoding sidesteps the usual Nyquist--Shannon limit, putting no lower bound on the size of features that can be resolved on a fixed grid. In practice, for similar compute time and equal grid resolution -- or even an equal number of output triangles -- meshes produced by subgrid marching are far more accurate than those from classic marching. Beyond standard contouring, our method can be used to convert polygon soup into a manifold, intersection-free mesh.

</details>


### [1095] [Directed Distance Fields for Constant-Time Ray Queries on Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.00817)
*Subhankar MIshra*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种将3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）场景蒸馏为轻量级有向距离函数（DDF）的方法，使其能高效支持阴影、环境光遮蔽和全局光照等需要次级光线追踪的效果，而无需显式网格。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯泼溅虽可实时渲染主光线，但无法处理次级光线（如阴影、AO、GI），限制了其在真实感渲染中的应用；需一种轻量、可扩展、不依赖高斯数量的几何表示来支持次级射线查询。

Method: 将训练好的3DGS场景蒸馏为一个小型神经有向距离函数（DDF），输入为射线（原点+方向），输出为到首个表面的距离及是否击中；采用干净的距离监督（而非模糊深度图）进行训练；整个流程无需网格重建。

Result: DDF仅52MB，查询速度比球面追踪SDF快26–72倍，且查询时间与内存开销不随场景高斯数量增长；在142个物体及真实捕获场景上，用于全局光照时阴影PSNR达30.3 dB、AO达21.3 dB。

Conclusion: DDF是一种高效、可扩展、免网格的射线相交 oracle，显著拓展了3DGS在真实感渲染中的能力，为基于隐式表示的实时全局光照提供了新范式。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) renders new views of a scene in real time. Like every rasterizer, it answers only primary rays, the rays from the camera through the image. It cannot trace the secondary rays that shadows, ambient occlusion, and global illumination need. We turn a trained 3DGS scene into a ray oracle by distilling a Directed Distance Function (DDF). The DDF is a small neural field. It takes a ray, given by an origin and a direction, and returns the distance to the first surface and whether the ray hits anything. Each query is one forward pass. The field is 52~MB, and its size does not depend on the number of Gaussians, so its cost and memory stay flat as the scene grows. We make three points. First, we study what supervision a DDF needs. Depth rendered from the Gaussians is too blurry to teach thin parts, while clean distance supervision recovers them. Second, we measure speed. The DDF is 26 to 72 times faster than sphere tracing an equivalent signed distance field, and unlike a bounding volume hierarchy built over the Gaussians, even on dedicated RT-core hardware, its query time and memory do not grow with the scene. Third, we show a pipeline that needs no mesh: images give a 3DGS scene, a neural surface gives clean distances, and the DDF learns from them. We use the DDF as a secondary-ray oracle for global illumination. It reproduces reference ray-traced shadows at 30.3~dB and ambient occlusion at 21.3~dB across 142 objects, and on real captured scenes. Our codes are available at https://github.com/smlab-niser/ddf-gs.

</details>


### [1096] [Temporally-Aligned Evaluation for Audio-Driven Talking Head Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01031)
*Zhicheng Zhang,Lei Wang,Yu Zhang,Yongsheng Gao*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于序列对齐（而非逐帧比较）的音频驱动说话人视频生成评估新范式，引入Soft DTW整合到现有评估流程中，提升了对时序偏差的鲁棒性，并在20种方法、7个数据集的大规模基准测试中验证了其有效性与一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估协议依赖逐帧指标，假设生成视频与参考视频严格时间对齐，但语音驱动的面部运动天然存在时序偏移、语速差异和风格变化，导致传统指标将无害的时间差异误判为质量缺陷，难以公平比较方法。

Method: 将动态生成模型评估建模为序列对齐问题，提出统一的序列级评估框架，将Soft Dynamic Time Warping（Soft DTW）嵌入现有评估流水线，在不改动感知、身份或同步编码器的前提下，对特征轨迹进行保序对齐。

Result: 实验表明，时序对齐指标对时间偏差更具鲁棒性，在不同数据集上结果更一致，并能更清晰地揭示建模范式间的权衡（如同步性vs.真实性、表现力vs.稳定性）；帧级评估可视为刚性对齐下的特例。

Conclusion: 序列级对齐评估是比逐帧评估更合理、稳健且信息丰富的范式，为音频驱动 talking-head 生成提供了更科学、可解释的评测基础。

Abstract: Audio-driven talking-head generation has advanced rapidly, yet existing evaluation protocols mainly rely on frame-wise metrics that assume strict temporal correspondence between generated and reference videos. This assumption does not match speech-driven facial motion, which naturally includes slight timing shifts, different speaking speeds, and stylistic variations. As a result, conventional metrics may treat harmless timing differences as quality errors, making it harder to fairly compare methods and understand their trade-offs. In this work, we argue that evaluation of dynamic generative models should be formulated as a sequence-alignment problem rather than independent frame comparison. We introduce a unified sequence-level reformulation that integrates Soft Dynamic Time Warping into established evaluation pipelines. By aligning feature trajectories while preserving temporal order, the proposed framework provides robustness to bounded temporal misalignments without altering the underlying perceptual, identity, or synchronization encoders. We show that frame-wise evaluation can be viewed as a special case under rigid alignment, while sequence-level alignment provides improved stability, lower sensitivity to timing differences, and clearer separation between modeling paradigms. Building on this principled formulation, we conduct a large-scale benchmark of 20 methods across seven datasets spanning canonical, in-the-wild, and style-diverse scenarios under standardized protocols. Extensive experiments show that temporally aligned metrics are more robust to timing differences, provide more consistent results across datasets, and better reveal systematic trade-offs between modeling paradigms, such as synchronization versus realism and expressiveness versus stability.

</details>


### [1097] [AlbedoEdit: Unified Instance-Level Video Editing with Albedo Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01362)
*Xilong Zhou,Bao-Huy Nguyen,Zheng Zeng,Jacob Munkberg,Jon Hasselgren,Thomas Leimkühler,Nima Kalantari,Miloš Hašan,Christian Theobalt*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出AlbedoEdit，一种基于反照率图的统一视频编辑框架，支持对象插入、移除和纹理编辑，通过利用不变光照的内在反照率图实现细粒度外观编辑，并在合成数据集上训练以模拟真实视觉效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频编辑方法要么仅提供粗粒度语义控制，要么为单个任务设计专用框架，缺乏灵活性和广泛适用性；需要一种能支持多种细粒度实例级编辑任务的统一框架。

Method: 提出AlbedoEdit框架，利用内在反照率图（不受光照、镜面反射、阴影等影响）作为用户友好的细粒度编辑控制信号；基于视频基础模型，以用户编辑的第一帧反照率图为条件，将源RGB视频微调生成编辑后的RGB视频；使用覆盖三类编辑任务的新合成配对数据集进行训练。

Result: AlbedoEdit在定性和定量评估中均优于当前最先进视频编辑方法，能隐式学习内容协调并模拟高光、软阴影、镜面反射等真实视觉效果。

Conclusion: AlbedoEdit是一种灵活、统一且高效的细粒度视频编辑框架，通过引入反照率图作为编辑媒介，有效 bridging 了生成质量与可控性之间的鸿沟。

Abstract: Video generative models have achieved remarkable progress in synthesizing photorealistic video sequences. However, enabling broader and more creative downstream applications requires fine-grained instance-level video editing, including object insertion, object removal, and texture editing, which has emerged as a prominent yet challenging problem. Existing approaches either propose unified generative frameworks with only coarse semantic control, or design task-specific frameworks for individual editing tasks, limiting their flexibility and applicability across diverse real-world scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose AlbedoEdit, a unified generative video editing framework that jointly supports object insertion, object removal, and texture editing. Our key insight is that the intrinsic albedo map, which is invariant to lighting and contains no specularity, shadowing and inter-reflection effects, provides an effective and user-friendly mechanism for specifying fine-grained appearance edits. Built upon video foundation models, AlbedoEdit is fine-tuned to translate source RGB videos into edited RGB videos, conditioned on a user-edited first-frame albedo. Trained on a new paired synthetic dataset covering all three editing tasks, AlbedoEdit implicitly learns to harmonize edited contents and simulate complex real-world visual effects triggered by editing operations, including specular highlights, soft shadows, and mirror reflections. AlbedoEdit demonstrates superior performance over state-of-the-art video editing approaches, both qualitatively and quantitatively. Project webpage is https://vcai.mpi-inf.mpg.de/projects/AlbedoEdit/.

</details>


### [1098] [MPMWorlds: Material-Point-Method Simulations for Inferring and Extrapolating Physical Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01538)
*Žiga Kovačič,Kevin Ellis*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: This paper introduces a 2D Material Point Method (MPM) simulation dataset to evaluate physical dynamics inference and extrapolation from videos, comparing code generation and video diffusion models; code generation yields stable physical extrapolations but struggles with parameter inference, whereas video diffusion better captures geometry but produces physically implausible predictions.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: To study the ability of models to infer physical dynamics from videos and extrapolate them forward in time, especially across diverse physical phenomena like deformable objects, fluids, and kinetic systems.

Method: The authors construct a dataset of 2D MPM physical simulations and evaluate two approaches—code generation (for automatic synthesis of MPM simulations) and video diffusion—under varying amounts of physically relevant side information.

Result: Code generation produces physically and temporally stable forward extrapolations but fails to infer physical parameters accurately from visual input; video diffusion better identifies geometric properties from visuals but yields physically implausible extrapolations.

Conclusion: Code generation and video diffusion exhibit complementary strengths and weaknesses for physical reasoning from video: stability vs. geometry perception—highlighting trade-offs between physical plausibility and visual fidelity in learned dynamics models.

Abstract: To study the ability to infer physical dynamics from videos and extrapolate them forward in time, we assemble a dataset of 2D Material Point Method (MPM) physical simulations covering rich physical phenomena such as deformable objects, fluids, kinetic objects, and emitters. We study code generation and video diffusion approaches on this dataset, identifying their strengths and weaknesses by varying the amount of physically relevant side information. The code generation model, beyond giving a working demonstration of automatic synthesis of MPM simulations, reveals that such an approach struggles with inferring physical parameters from visual input, but relative to video diffusion, produces physically and temporally stable extrapolations forward in time, while the video diffusion model more strongly identifies geometric properties from visual input but produces physically implausible extrapolations.

</details>


### [1099] [KDH-CAD: Knowledge-data hybrid CAD learning under data scarcity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01702)
*Ziqin Gao,Zhijie Yang,Qiang Zou*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出KDH-CAD框架，通过融合预训练基础模型知识、结构化领域知识（如教材/教程）及少量标注CAD数据，解决CAD领域数据稀缺问题；无需微调基础模型，仅用250样本即达92.6%准确率，显著提升小样本CAD学习性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 真实CAD数据难以大规模获取，合成数据又难以反映实际设计实践，导致深度学习在CAD中受数据稀缺严重制约。

Method: 提出知识-数据混合框架KDH-CAD：利用结构化领域知识补全和增强基础模型中弱表达的CAD概念，并用少量标注CAD数据在潜在空间中校准这些概念以适应任务特定几何变化，不微调基础模型。

Result: 在机械零件分类任务中，仅用250、1000个样本即分别达到92.6%和95.8%准确率，媲美或超越需十倍数据的SOTA方法。

Conclusion: 融合预训练基础模型与结构化领域知识可显著降低对大规模CAD数据集的依赖，为数据高效CAD学习提供原理清晰且实用的新路径。

Abstract: Deep learning in computer-aided design (CAD) remains fundamentally constrained by the data scarcity challenge: authentic CAD data is difficult to collect at scale, while synthetic data may not faithfully reflect real design practice. Rather than pursuing ever-larger CAD datasets, this paper alternatively treats CAD learning as a knowledge completion and calibration problem. It introduces KDH-CAD, a knowledge-data hybrid framework that integrates pretrained knowledge in foundation models, structured domain knowledge from textbooks/tutorials, and a very small amount of labeled CAD data. Domain knowledge is used to elicit and complete CAD-relevant concepts that are weakly expressed or under-represented in pretrained foundation models, while labeled CAD data calibrates these concepts in the latent space to account for task-specific geometric variability, without fine-tuning the foundation model. Experiments on real-world mechanical part classification show that KDH-CAD achieves strong performance in low-data regimes, reaching 92.6\% accuracy with only 250 training samples, 95.8\% with 1,000 samples, and continuing to improve with additional data. This matches or exceeds state-of-the-art performance that typically requires an order of magnitude more data. These results suggest that combining pretrained foundation models with structured domain knowledge can substantially reduce reliance on large-scale CAD datasets, providing a principled and practical direction for data-efficient CAD learning.

</details>


### [1100] [MidSurfNet: Learnable Face Pairing and Interference Implicit Fields for Generalized Mid-surface Abstraction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01891)
*Li Ye,Xinhang Zhou,Xingyu Yang,Ruofeng Tong,Hailong Li,Peng Du,Min Tang*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出MidSurfNet，一种学习增强的中面抽象框架，通过神经面配对模块和干扰隐式场，解决传统基于规则的方法在多壁厚、自匹配面等复杂CAD模型中失效的问题，并在大规模数据集上验证了其优越性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于面配对的中面提取方法依赖人工设计的几何启发式规则，在处理工业级CAD模型中的多壁厚区域、自匹配面配置以及非中心偏置表面需求时表现不佳。

Method: 提出MidSurfNet框架：(1) 神经面配对模块，从几何与拓扑特征中学习面配对置信度；(2) 干扰隐式场，用两个符号距离函数的干扰表示中面，支持广义偏置控制。构建含1500+人工标注CAD模型的大规模中面数据集。

Result: MidSurfNet在面配对准确率达87.32%；在多壁厚场景完成率61.90%，自匹配场景完成率52.94%，显著优于现有方法；支持任意偏置控制的CAE/FEA导向中面抽象。

Conclusion: MidSurfNet首次将深度学习引入中面抽象任务，克服了传统规则方法的局限性，为复杂工业CAD模型的有限元前处理提供了鲁棒、灵活的新范式。

Abstract: Mid-surface abstraction is essential for finite element analysis of thin-walled CAD models. Existing face pairing-based methods rely on handcrafted geometric heuristics, yet real-world industrial models frequently exhibit multi-wall-thickness regions, self-matching face configurations, and demand for non-center offset surfaces--scenarios where rule-based approaches consistently fail. We present MidSurfNet, a learning-augmented framework that addresses these limitations through two novel components: (1) a neural face pairing module that learns to predict face pair confidence from geometric and topological features, handling complex pairing scenarios beyond rule-based methods; and (2) an interference implicit field that represents mid-surfaces as the interference of two signed distance functions, enabling generalized offset control for flexible positioning in downstream CAE/FEA-oriented workflows. We construct a large-scale mid-surface dataset containing over 1,500 manually annotated CAD models. Experiments demonstrate that MidSurfNet achieves 87.32% face pairing accuracy and successfully handles multi-wall-thickness (61.90% completion) and self-matching (52.94% completion) scenarios that confound all existing methods. Furthermore, MidSurfNet provides a learning-based approach to generalized mid-surface abstraction with arbitrary offset control for CAE-oriented applications.

</details>


### [1101] [Single-Line Drawing Generation via Semantics-Driven Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.01910)
*Tanguy Magne,Alexandre Binninger,Ruben Wiersma,Olga Sorkine-Hornung*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种语义驱动的单线矢量绘图自动生成方法，支持文本或图像引导，利用分数蒸馏采样优化URBS曲线，生成连续单笔画，并具备可控细节与风格调节能力，结果优于现有文本到图像模型，且输出可直接用于刺绣、激光雕刻等制造工艺。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统单线绘画需要艺术家高度抽象和提炼主题本质，而现有自动方法缺乏语义引导和矢量连续性保证，难以兼顾艺术性与实用性。

Method: 采用分数蒸馏采样（score distillation sampling）优化均匀有理B样条（URBS）曲线参数，确保单连续笔画；引入多目标损失函数控制细节层次与艺术风格；支持文本提示或输入图像作为引导信号。

Result: 在单线绘制任务上显著优于当前SOTA文本到图像模型和优化流程，生成结果更符合连续线描艺术家风格、美学质量更高；输出为矢量曲线，可直接用于 embroidery、laser engraving 和 wire bending 等物理制造。

Conclusion: 该方法首次实现了语义驱动的高质量单线矢量绘图生成，兼具艺术表现力、可控性与工程实用性，为AI绘图与数字制造的结合提供了新范式。

Abstract: Line drawings are a highly expressive art form that requires the artist to abstract and distill the essence of their subject. We present the first semantics-driven method for automatically generating single-line drawings in vector format, guided either by a text prompt describing the concept or an input image depicting it. Our approach leverages score distillation sampling to optimize the parameters of a uniform rational B-spline (URBS) curve, ensuring that the drawing consists of a single continuous stroke by design. This representation provides fine-grained control over the level of detail, while additional loss terms allow us to steer the final artistic style. We demonstrate that our method outperforms state-of-the-art text-to-image models and optimization pipelines for this task, producing results that are both more aesthetically pleasing and more faithful to the style of continuous line drawing artists. Furthermore, because our method generates a vectorized curve, it directly supports downstream fabrication processes such as embroidery, laser engraving and wire bending. Our code and results are available at https://github.com/tanguymagne/SLDgen.

</details>


### [1102] [Composable function systems as a general-purpose rendering framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02226)
*James Schloss*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于函数系统（function systems）的通用可视化与仿真新方法，并介绍了GPU上的元编程框架Quibble，以支持此类系统的构建；该方法在运行时性能、生成拓扑复杂物体及与其他图形算法兼容性方面具有优势，并可应用于低帧率动画插值、点云形变及复杂动画流程的元编程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在GPU/CPU上对复杂对象的表示和操作往往内存开销大或缺乏灵活性，而函数系统能以紧凑形式表达复杂几何与行为，亟需一种高效、通用且艺术家友好的实现框架。

Method: 提出基于函数系统的通用可视化与仿真方法，设计并实现GPU元编程框架Quibble，支持函数系统的组合式定义与执行；强调其在运行时编译、拓扑建模与跨算法集成方面的机制。

Result: 验证了该方法在运行性能、生成非平凡拓扑结构（如环面、嵌套曲面）的能力，以及与传统渲染、物理模拟等算法的互操作性；展示了其在动画插值、可控点云变形和动画工作流自动化中的实际应用效果。

Conclusion: 函数系统结合GPU元编程是一种高效、灵活且具表现力的建模与仿真范式，Quibble框架为艺术家和开发者提供了更直观、可控的创作工具，拓展了实时图形与动画的可能性边界。

Abstract: Function systems exist as a natural language for the meshless creation and manipulation of complex objects while maintaining minimal memory on the Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) or Central Processing Unit (CPU). This paper proposes a new method for general-purpose (non-fractal) visualizations and simulations with function systems and introduces Quibble, a metaprogramming framework for composing such systems on the GPU. We also discuss several core advantages of this method including runtime performance, the creation of topologically non-trivial objects, and interoperability with other graphical algorithms. Beyond general-purpose imagery and animations, this method can also be used to give artists more control over in-between frames in low-framerate animations, controllably deform point clouds, and metaprogram difficult animation workflows.

</details>
